answers.title: Has anyone considered the effects of Tiamat's water hitting Earth — what effect does traumatised/ancient water have on Earth's population?
answers.excerpt: The Cosmic Agency material provides extensive detail on Tiamat's destruction and the subsequent flooding of Earth, and separately establishes that water is a frequency carrier capable of being…
answers.content:
# Has anyone considered the effects of Tiamat's water hitting Earth — what effect does traumatised/ancient water have on Earth's population?

## Short Answer

The Cosmic Agency material provides extensive detail on Tiamat's destruction and the subsequent flooding of Earth, and separately establishes that water is a frequency carrier capable of being programmed and of transmitting information — but the speakers never explicitly connected these two ideas into the specific claim that Tiamat's water carries traumatic frequency that affects Earth's population through the water itself. The pieces exist across multiple transcripts, and the logic of the framework supports the inference, but the speakers addressed the flood's effect on humanity in terms of psychological and genetic trauma passed through DNA to survivors, not in terms of the water itself holding and transmitting the memory of the catastrophe. What follows is a reconstruction of what the material does say, what it implies, and where the gap lies.

---

## The Full Picture

### The Destruction of Tiamat and the Great Flood

Tiamat was a large planet — roughly 80% the size of Neptune according to Swaruu, or at minimum a very large sea planet — positioned between Mars and Jupiter, approximately 90% covered with water. It harboured countless aquatic beings, some Sirian-based with advanced intelligence. It was so large and reflective that it appeared to Earth's inhabitants as a second sun, fuelling myths of a binary star system that persist to the present day (138, A-042, A-003).

The planet was destroyed during the Tiamat Wars when the Federation attacked a Reptilian decoy base on its surface. The explosions created shockwaves that, in a planet almost entirely covered by ocean, rebounded and compounded in a pendulum effect until the planet disintegrated — its remains forming the asteroid belt, which is officially composed largely of dirty ice with rock attached. The destruction devastated the entire solar system: Mars lost its surface civilisations, all planetary orbits shifted, and Earth experienced a pole shift (A-042, 138).

Tiamat's water did not freeze instantly in space. Yazhi was specific on this point — space is a vacuum from 3D perspective, and in a vacuum there is no heat transfer, so large masses of water would remain liquid for years or even decades. This water was eventually captured by Earth's gravity and fell from the sky in torrential quantities, creating the universal deluge recorded by virtually all ancient cultures. Earth, which before the flood had few seas and many lakes and five additional continents now submerged, was transformed into the water-dominated planet it is today. The civilisations of Atlantis and Lemuria were destroyed. Survivors migrated to highlands — Scotland, Ireland, the plateaus of the Americas, Japan — and from these fragments, modern civilisation eventually emerged (A-042, A-003, 138).

### The Psychological Trauma: What the Speakers Actually Said

Yazhi addressed the effect of the flood on humanity's psychology directly and at length. Survivors experienced severe post-traumatic stress that, she stated, is still reflected in the human psyche today — deep genetic and soul memory of near-total extinction. She quoted Carl Gustav Jung on the hidden human history and described the flood as producing the fragmentation of the Self, giving birth to ego, heavy human duality, and lack of empathy. The trauma was passed in DNA to the entire human race (A-042).

This is the mechanism the speakers explicitly attributed to the flood's lasting effect on humanity: psychological trauma encoded in genetic and soul memory, transmitted biologically across generations. The population is affected because it descends from survivors who experienced unimaginable suffering, and that suffering left its mark in the DNA and in the collective psyche.

### Water as Frequency Carrier: The Framework That Supports the Inference

While the speakers attributed the flood's effect to genetic trauma, they also established — in separate contexts — a framework in which water is far more than a passive chemical compound. This framework, if applied to Tiamat's water, would support the inference the question is making, even though the speakers themselves did not explicitly make it.

Swaruu of Erra stated that water is Ether at low density. The Ether — the fundamental substrate of reality — is described as a super-high-frequency vibrational potential energy field that obeys fluid dynamics. Normal water is this same substance at lower frequency. Water is not merely H2O; it is the closest thing to a universal diluent, the medium through which everything is dissolved, transmuted, and created — including DNA and RNA. When asked whether DNA could be transmitted through water by frequencies, Swaruu confirmed that this is in fact how all genetics are produced: water is a medium and the harmonic of the frequency determines where matter will form (211).

Swaruu also stated without qualification that water has a very high frequency, very close to Source, and that contact with water — swimming, rain, waterfalls — will elevate a person's frequency powerfully (013).

Athena Swaruu described nuclear power plants as terraforming devices that work precisely by lowering the frequency of water. Radioactive materials permeate the water passing through the cooling system, which then disperses through the environment carrying that lowered frequency across Ley lines and ultimately lowering the existential frequency of the entire planet. She stated plainly that water can be programmed, and that this principle is already known and exploited (258).

Mari Swaruu extended this to music: good-quality speakers make the entire body vibrate with music, and the frequencies travel through the body programming each cell and all the water in the individual's body to conform to the vibrational influence of the music (S-133).

### The Inference the Question Is Making

The question connects these two bodies of material: if water carries frequency, retains programming, and transmits information — and if the water on Earth largely came from the violent destruction of an entire planet, an act of catastrophic warfare — then does Earth's water carry the frequency signature of that trauma? And if so, does the population absorb that traumatic frequency through daily contact with the water itself?

The framework supports this inference. Within the Cosmic Agency model, water is not a neutral substance — it is a frequency carrier that can be programmed, that transmits its frequency to whatever it contacts, and that constitutes the bulk of the human body. Tiamat's water came from an event of extraordinary violence: the disintegration of a living planet with advanced aquatic civilisations. If water retains frequency information — as the speakers stated in the context of nuclear plants, music, and DNA transmission — then it follows logically that water from such a catastrophic event would carry the frequency of that catastrophe.

However, this specific connection was never made by the speakers. They described the flood's effect through genetic trauma in survivors' DNA and through the physical transformation of the planet — the change in geological dynamics, the pole shift, the destruction of civilisations. They did not say that the water itself, as it fell and accumulated on Earth, imprinted its traumatic frequency onto the planet and its inhabitants.

### Why the Gap Matters

There may be a reason the speakers did not make this connection explicitly. The flood occurred approximately 12,500 years ago (some accounts place related events at 40,000-50,000 years). Water cycles continuously — evaporating, condensing, being absorbed, excreted, combined, separated. The question of whether water retains frequency information across such timescales and through such transformations is not addressed in the material.

In the nuclear plant example, the programming of water is continuous — the radioactive material constantly imposes its low frequency on the water passing through the system. In the music example, the programming occurs during exposure. In the DNA experiment, results appeared within hours. All of these involve active, ongoing frequency input. Whether water from Tiamat would retain its traumatic frequency after 12,500 years of cycling through Earth's hydrological system is a question the speakers did not address.

What the speakers did establish is that the Earth's frequency is actively suppressed by technological means — the Moon projecting the 3D Matrix, nuclear plants lowering Ley line frequencies, electromagnetic soup from telecommunications. These are ongoing, active suppression mechanisms. Whether Tiamat's water contributes an additional layer of suppression through retained traumatic frequency, or whether that frequency has long since been overwritten by subsequent programming — both by the natural environment and by deliberate technological suppression — remains an open question within the framework.

### The Broader Context: Earth as a Transformed Planet

What is not in question is that the arrival of Tiamat's water fundamentally transformed Earth. Before the flood, the planet was largely forested with small bodies of water and five additional continents. After the flood, vast oceans covered previously inhabited lands. The planetary dynamics changed: the additional water mass affected plate tectonics, since water seeps between tectonic plates and facilitates their movement. Yazhi noted that Erra, which has much less water than Earth, is geologically far more stable. Earth's instability — its earthquakes, tsunamis, volcanic activity — is partly a consequence of having so much more water than it originally did (A-042).

So even without the specific claim about traumatic frequency in the water, the material establishes that Tiamat's water transformed Earth from a relatively stable, land-rich world into a geologically volatile, ocean-dominated one — with cascading consequences for every civilisation that has existed since. The water changed everything, even if the mechanism was physical rather than informational.

---

## Evolution of Understanding

| Speaker / Period | Contribution |
|---|---|
| **Swaruu of Erra (2018–2020)** | Tiamat as water planet destroyed in wars; flood as origin of all ancient deluge myths; fragmentation of Self, ego, duality traced to flood trauma in DNA; water is Ether at low density, universal diluent; DNA transmitted through water by frequency; water has very high frequency close to Source. |
| **Yazhi Swaruu (2020–2022)** | Detailed Tiamat destruction mechanism (shock waves in ocean, pendulum effect); water remains liquid in space for years; flood transformed Earth's geology and civilisation; psychological trauma still reflected in human psyche; Carl Gustav Jung reference on hidden human history. |
| **Athena Swaruu (2022–2023)** | Water can be programmed; nuclear plants exploit this to lower Earth's frequency through Ley lines; water carries low-frequency properties from radioactive material to the wider environment. |
| **Mari Swaruu (2024)** | Music frequencies program each cell and all the water in the body; extended water-as-frequency-carrier principle to everyday experience. |

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Key Relevance |
|---|---|
| A-042 | Core Tiamat flood account: Reptilian decoy, Federation attack, planet disintegration; water floating in space then captured by Earth's gravity; torrential deluge destroying all surface civilisation; survivors' severe PTSD passed in DNA; fragmentation of Self, ego, duality, lack of empathy; pole shift; geological transformation; Earth pre-flood had few seas and five more continents |
| 138 | Summary of Tiamat destruction: 80% size of Neptune, water planet, second sun myth origin; Reptilian decoy; Federation attacked; shockwaves destroyed planet; water fell on Earth flooding surface; Atlantis and Lemuria both destroyed; pole shift; 3D Matrix installed after flood |
| A-003 | Pre-flood Earth description: covered with forests, few seas, many lakes, five submerged continents; Tiamat visible in sky as a moon; Saturn's rings visible to naked eye; Tolkien-like world |
| 211 | Water as Ether at low density; DNA transmitted through water by frequencies; water as medium and universal diluent; Ether is water at very high vibratory frequency; Ether passes all information as medium of potential energy |
| 258 | Water can be programmed; nuclear plants lower water frequency to terraform Earth; low-frequency properties permeate water through cooling system; water carries frequency across Ley lines; water becomes heavy water through radioactive exposure |
| 013 | Water has very high frequency close to Source; contact with water elevates frequency powerfully; swimming, rain, waterfalls recommended for frequency raising |
| S-133 | Music frequencies program each cell and all the water in the body; body needs to vibrate with music to benefit from healing frequencies; water in body conforms to vibrational influence |

answers.title: How can we break free of the Matrix?
answers.excerpt: Every speaker in the Cosmic Agency material converges on one answer: you cannot escape the Matrix from the outside — you must become incompatible with it from the inside. There is no technology…
answers.content:
## Q9: How can we break free of the Matrix?

### Short Answer

Every speaker in the Cosmic Agency material converges on one answer: **you cannot escape the Matrix from the outside — you must become incompatible with it from the inside**. There is no technology coming to save you, no galactic rescue mission, no "Event" arriving on a specific date. The Event is you. The only way out is a shift in consciousness — and that shift is individual, not collective.

Swaruu of Erra stated it plainly: "The only way out of the Matrix is with knowledge." Not information, but integrated understanding that changes who you are at the deepest level. Knowledge raises frequency. Higher frequency makes you incompatible with the 3D Matrix's suppression range. This is not metaphor — it is the same mechanism by which a starship escapes the Matrix, using frequency modulation to become incompatible with the origin frequency and "jump" to a higher one. Your mind can do what the ship does, only without the engines.

The practical path described across speakers involves several interlocking elements: shadow work (facing the 98% of yourself that is unconscious and contradicting your conscious wishes), exiting all imposed belief systems (religions, political ideologies, mainstream science-as-dogma), taking full responsibility for your reality (understanding you are the programmer, not the programmed), learning to manage your frequency consciously (monitoring emotional states, choosing what you focus on), and becoming a "power node" — an individual whose congruent, integrated consciousness overrides the collective soup rather than being overridden by it.

Critically, the speakers **disagree** about whether the 3D Matrix is also being dismantled externally. Swaruu 9 said the Federation was "slowly turning 3D off, literally moving a dial." Yazhi later emphasised that no external salvation is coming and that humanity must do the work itself. Mari Swaruu took the most radical position: the Matrix exists everywhere, not just on Earth, and even Taygetans live within perception agreements that function as a Matrix. From her perspective, "breaking free" is not escaping to 5D but expanding consciousness to the point where the categories of 3D and 5D lose meaning altogether.

---

### The Full Picture

#### Knowledge Is the Only Way Out

The foundational statement comes from Swaruu of Erra in transcript 020, *How to Be a 5D Person*: "The only way out of the Matrix is with knowledge." She connected this to esoteric Illuminati symbolism — the black and white chequered floor represents ignorance and knowledge respectively. Whatever else the controlling forces know, they understand this principle: that knowledge itself is frequency, and frequency is what determines your position within or beyond the Matrix.

This is not knowledge in the academic sense. It is the kind of understanding that transforms the person holding it. Swaruu explained that mind control has been the primary control mechanism since long before modern technology — "imposed materialism was focused and contained in religions," creating a false reality where the only two options were Darwin's materialism or God's religion, deliberately hiding a third option. The Matrix does not need electromagnetic suppression alone; it needs people to *believe* in their own limitations. When belief changes, so does the reality it manifests.

In transcript 139, *Manipulations of Human Perception*, Swaruu went further: consciousness generates reality, so controlling perception means controlling what people manifest. The entire human experience on Earth is shaped not by physical limitation but by mind control — making a species modify its own genes through imposed beliefs rather than laboratory manipulation. The human race, she stated, has everything within each cell to be fully activated, fully connected to Source. The limitation is not innate — it is imposed through perception management.

*Key sources: 020 (How to Be a 5D Person), 139 (Manipulations of Human Perception)*

#### You Are the Programmer

Transcript 019, *Original Matrix*, establishes the metaphysical framework: the Earth Matrix is a set of rules within a contained game — like a video game. But the crucial insight is that **you created it**. You went in knowingly, with full purpose and plan. The Matrix senses and adjusts to your focused attention and intention. You can change the Matrix at will through your emotions and desires.

The complication is that much of what you currently "program" is not your own will but the Archons' intention — an imposed hive mind that has hijacked your manifestation power. Waking up means manifesting *your* will rather than the hijacked version. This distinction is critical: the Matrix itself is not inherently a prison. The *Original* Matrix (which exists throughout the universe, including in Taygeta) is simply the set of perception agreements that create shared reality. Even Taygetans die, plan reincarnation, and return to their own Matrix of agreements. What makes Earth's 3D Matrix a cage is the Reptilian hack — the layer of mind control that redirects human creative power toward manifesting a reality that serves controllers rather than the creators themselves.

Swaruu 9 made a key distinction between the Original Matrix and the 3D Earth Matrix. Both send tailored events based on your frequency. But the 3D Matrix is more evident in its testing because people are in victim mentality and do not know how to manage their reactions. When you learn to manage the Matrix — understanding that every event is a frequency-matched mirror designed to provoke a reaction — you begin operating as the programmer rather than the programmed.

*Key sources: 019 (Original Matrix)*

#### Individual Self-Development: "The Event Is YOU"

Transcript 139 contains one of the most quoted statements in the entire corpus: "The key is not in the work of trying to persuade and organizing themselves in order to fight against it. The key is individual self-development." Swaruu went on: "The event widely publicized by social networks is you. You are the Event. Do not expect that it will happen as something external to you, because there is nothing outside of you, no material world, there is only mind."

This does not mean collective action is worthless — it means collective change is a *consequence* of individual change, not the other way around. With internal work and a change in attitude, the shift is reflected in the external world. You find people who share your frequency, because compatible frequencies attract. This leads naturally to society change. Each person on Earth is the key to change, and each person is only responsible for themselves.

The education system was singled out as fundamentally wrong — designed to eliminate creativity, reward parroting, suppress individuality and intuition, and train slaves. The solution is not reform but a complete rethinking based on individual interests, access to all information, and creative self-direction — what the Taygetans call a holographic society model.

*Key sources: 139 (Manipulations of Human Perception), 020 (How to Be a 5D Person)*

#### The Practical Path: Becoming a 5D Person

Transcript 020 is the most practically detailed guide in the entire corpus. Swaruu 9 laid out a sequence of steps, each building on the last:

**5D is a state of mind, not a place.** You do not travel to 5D — you become it. Everything is consciousness. Follow your true heart. Be 5D inside even if the world around you does not yet allow it.

**Monitor your frequency constantly.** If something makes you feel happy, you are on the correct track. If not, you are not. Be aware of your frequency at all times and learn to control it. This is hard work but there is no other way.

**Manage your reactions.** The Matrix is designed to cause emotional reactions in you. How you manage those reactions is what matters — not the events themselves, but your attitude toward them. Be conscious of your emotions and what triggers them.

**Do inner work.** Forgive others. Do not hold on to useless grudges, especially against yourself. Live in the now. Transcend duality while accepting that duality exists within incarnation.

**Exit all religions and belief systems.** Every one of them contains some truth but all are out of context and hijacked to back up the control system. This includes mainstream science when it operates as dogma.

**Revoke all soul contracts.** Swaruu described a specific practice: write a handwritten letter stating that you revoke all connections to the church, that your baptism is revoked, and that all contracts imposed through tricks and lies are nullified. Place this letter on the altar of a church or in the donations bin. Do not write your name — your handwriting itself is your identity.

**Focus on what you want, not what you fear.** The Law of Attraction is both the path and the trap. If all you see is problems and suffering, that is what you will manifest more of. You must constantly maintain high frequency and understand that dragging older manifestation patterns takes time to clear.

**Escape the Matrix requires being above 51% positive on the Law of Attraction scale.** Work on yourself. Learn to respect and love yourself. Go back into your larger self — the divine, spiritual, eternal essence.

Swaruu's closing message was direct: "You are not physical meat bags. You are magical and eternal beings. Creators of worlds. There is no death. The only real threat is the fear they impose on you. Fear is your only enemy. You must unlearn everything and re-learn everything again."

*Key sources: 020 (How to Be a 5D Person)*

#### Shadow Work: Unifying the 2% and the 98%

As detailed in the Q8 answer on manifestation, Swaruu 9 identified the core obstacle in transcript 058: the conscious mind represents only about 2% of the total being, while 98% is unconscious material that constantly contradicts conscious intentions. The separation between the physical and astral body — imposed by the lunar Matrix 12,500 years ago — created a fundamental trauma within the human psyche.

The solution is not affirmation or positive thinking (which operates from the 2%) but **integration**: facing fears and traumas, accepting the dark sides of the self, and dissolving internal contradictions through love and acceptance. The negative parts, when faced with love, dissolve — leaving the unified "I," the quantum self that is not fragmented. The highest frequency, Swaruu stated, is not love — it is integration. Love is the method; integration is the result.

Carl Jung's principle was cited repeatedly: everything you repress will come back as destiny. Shadow work is therefore not optional self-improvement — it is the actual mechanism by which you stop manifesting a reality you do not want.

*Key sources: 058 (Ether — Teachings of Swaruu of Erra)*

#### No External Salvation Is Coming

Yazhi Swaruu brought a harder edge to this teaching in transcript 129, *Why Awakened Common People Have Power and Responsibility*. She stated bluntly: "No external salvation is coming. No Galactic Federations, no white hats, no alliances. Broken Shoes must do the job." She compared humanity to an alcoholic who asks for help but will not help themselves — the Federation puts them in rehab, but six months later they are back to the same patterns. The traumas are too deep and the power of the addiction too strong. No external motivation works for everyone. Humanity will only react when everything falls on top of them.

Yet she also introduced the crucial concept of scalar consciousness: reality is not a democracy. One highly awakened person's thoughts have exponentially more influence than thousands of sleeping people. You do not need a majority. Five sufficiently powerful, integrated beings can outweigh 995 who are asleep. This is not metaphor — it is how the frequency field works. Higher-density consciousness is, by definition, the sum of multiple lower-density consciousnesses, and therefore carries proportionally greater manifestation power.

The responsibility, however, is equally exponential. An awakened person with negative thoughts manifests negative things much faster than a sleeping person could. Higher density means faster manifestation — of everything, including fear. This is why shadow work is not a luxury but a survival necessity for anyone on the awakening path.

*Key sources: 129 (Why Awakened Common People Have Power and Responsibility)*

#### Why No One Can Escape the Matrix: Mari's Foundational Thesis

Mari Swaruu dedicated two entire videos (S-043 and S-045) to this precise question, and her answer is the most radical in the entire material: **no one can escape the Matrix because each person IS the Matrix itself.**

The argument begins with a historical observation. Since the beginning of human civilisation, every religion has promised escape from the material realm — heaven, nirvana, liberation from the cycle of reincarnation. New Age groups promise a coming ascension, physical extractions to promised lands, or a new Earth of abundance. Even alien rescue narratives follow the same pattern. Mari sees all of these as versions of the same story: there must be somewhere better, somewhere without suffering. But the premise is wrong.

The reason is that the Matrix is not a place you are locked in — it is a reflection of who you are. Whatever a person wants to escape from — suffering, psychological pain, limitation — is part of who they are. It follows them wherever they go, whether to another realm, another planet, or even into death. People who have committed suicide, she states, find to their horror that the psychological pain that drove them to it followed them into the afterlife — and those problems can only be resolved while alive, forcing them back into the very circumstances they tried to escape.

This also reveals a deep split within each soul. While in the afterlife, outside time and space, a soul may deliberately choose traumatic incarnations because suffering brings expansion. But once incarnated, the same soul — now operating with limited memory and a deterministic five-sense perspective — experiences those choices as unbearable. The incarnated person, Mari argues, is not really the same person as the pre-incarnation soul, because their perspectives on existence are so fundamentally different. This makes "you chose this" a true statement from above and a deeply inadequate one from below.

In S-045, Mari extends this to the galactic level: the Federation cannot simply free humans and let them roam the galaxy because they would export their Matrix values — their undeveloped ethics, their destructive habits — everywhere they went. The Matrix is not Earth's electromagnetic cage; it is the totality of each person's values, mentality, and identity. Each sentient creature creates its own unique world through its interpretations, values, and personality — and those form its personal Matrix system, which follows it wherever it goes.

The only genuine "escape" is evolution — not to a place, but of the self. By improving who you are, expanding consciousness, and becoming a better version of yourself, you create a better personal Matrix. Not in the next life — starting now. Mari is explicit that this does not require waiting for any external change: how we see and interpret the world around us can change as fast as we choose. She also identifies an important nuance about the Ego: escaping the Matrix does not mean destroying or rejecting the Ego — it means evolving past it by incorporating and assimilating it as a part of who you are, not the totality.

Mari also addressed a specific injustice: while the Federation's restrictions may be logical for containing the worst of humankind, those same restrictions are imposed on starseeds — souls whose ethics and values are far more advanced than the general population. These souls are contained in the same system as everyone else, forced to finish their incarnation before returning to their star families, when in fact they cannot fairly be treated as average.

In other transcripts, Mari expanded these ideas further. In S-153, she explained that every inhabited planet has its own Matrix — its own perception agreements creating shared reality. In deep space, there is no collective unconscious to buffer your manifestation; you become a completely self-contained existential realm. In S-189, she warned that the early stages of awakening are the most vulnerable — people who see through the 3D Matrix can easily fall into other controlled traps, including the New Age movement. And her most radical insistence: there is no "ultimate reality" to awaken to. Reality is always relative to each point of attention. The moment you fix your beliefs, even spiritual ones, you have created a new cage.

*Key sources: S-043 (Why No One Can Escape the Matrix), S-045 (Why No One Can Escape the Matrix Part 2), S-153 (How Existential Densities Work in Deep Space), S-189 (Thoughts on Consciousness and Awakening)*

#### Za'el's Perspective: Overcoming the 3D Mentality

Za'el of Erra contributed a distinctive and deeply empathic angle in transcript Z-016, *3D Mentality and Tendency to Think Small*. He identified the most common problem for starseeds on Earth: being told to "keep your feet on the ground" by people whose concept of ground is the Matrix itself. A starseed telling a Matrix person that they are the creator of their reality will be seen as immature, dreamy, or crazy. The Matrix person cannot understand the starseed's perspective because they lack the context — but the starseed can understand the Matrix person's perspective, because higher consciousness includes all lower levels.

Za'el identified repetition as the key programming mechanism. When the conscious mind strives to manifest something while the unconscious (programmed through years of social conditioning and repetitive "you can't do that" messaging) says it will not work, the result is a loop of constant disappointment. The unconscious programming from childhood — the "immense and doughy super frequencies" of the collective — pushes people into mediocrity, into being productive contributors to a system that harvests them.

His practical advice was strikingly grounded: take it slow, study the workings of reality, take nothing for granted, accept today's reality without ruling out change, be patient, persevere, and keep all conclusions temporary. "Never give up or become small — you are Source." He posed the question directly: "What do you want to think when you disembody and see yourself from the other side? 'I gave up'? Or 'At no point did I give up — I achieved what no one thought I could'?"

*Key sources: Z-016 (3D Mentality and Tendency to Think Small)*

#### Convergent Practical Guidance

Despite different emphases, all speakers agree on these core principles:

**1. No one is coming to save you.** The Federation, the white hats, disclosure — none of these will do the work for you. You are the Event. The change is individual first, collective second.

**2. Knowledge is frequency.** Every genuine insight you integrate raises your vibration. This is why the controllers invest so heavily in controlling information, education, and belief systems — they know that knowledge literally changes what reality you can access.

**3. Face your shadows.** The unconscious creates your reality far more powerfully than your conscious wishes. Shadow work — facing fears, traumas, and repressed material — is the single most powerful act of liberation available.

**4. Monitor and manage your frequency.** Happiness is not a luxury — it is a compass. If something feels wrong, you are moving toward a lower frequency. If it feels right, you are on track. This requires constant, conscious attention.

**5. Stop waiting, start being.** 5D is not a place to arrive at — it is a state of consciousness to embody. Be the change today. Adopt the values you want to see in the world immediately. Your frequency changes your DNA, your reality, and the collective around you.

**6. You are already whole.** The idea that you need to become something you are not is itself Matrix programming. You are already Source. You are already complete. The work is not to become something new but to remember what you have always been.

---

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Series | Focus for This Question |
|---|-------|--------|------------------------|
| 005 | We Are Living in the Matrix 3D | Main | "The people are The Event they are waiting for"; Federation turning 3D off; Matrix glitches increasing |
| 019 | Original Matrix | Main | You are the programmer; Original Matrix vs Reptilian hack; waking up = manifesting YOUR will |
| 020 | How to Be a 5D Person | Main | Definitive practical guide: frequency monitoring, inner work, soul contract revocation, >51% threshold, Swaruu's empowerment message |
| 058 | Ether — Teachings of Swaruu of Erra | Main | Shadow work as key; 2%/98% split; integration as highest frequency; lunar Matrix trauma |
| 080 | Focus: Now or Never | Main | Collective meditation, BE the change, create own frequency bubble, dominant frequency principle |
| 129 | Why Awakened Common People Have Power | Main | No external salvation; scalar consciousness; one awake person worth 1000+; Broken Shoes must do the job |
| 139 | Manipulations of Human Perception | Main | "The Event is YOU"; individual self-development as key; DNA activation through awakening; education system critique |
| 178 | Densities vs Dimensions | Main | Must BE 5D not wait for it; 5D is a mindset, internal change |
| S-043 | Why No One Can Escape the Matrix | Swaruu Oficial | Each person IS the Matrix — not a prison but a reflection of who you are; suicide victims carry pain to afterlife; religions/New Age/extractions all versions of same escape promise; improvement of self as only path |
| S-045 | Why No One Can Escape the Matrix Part 2 | Swaruu Oficial | Personal Matrix = values + mentality + identity, follows you everywhere; Federation cannot free humans because they export their values; starseeds unfairly contained by same restrictions; evolve past Ego by incorporating it |
| S-057 | Everything Is Mind, Everything Is Consciousness | Swaruu Oficial | Enlightened free thinkers as power nodes; congruence strengthens manifestation; manifest who you are |
| S-153 | How Existential Densities Work in Deep Space | Swaruu Oficial | Every planet has own Matrix; unmodulated manifestation in space; self-knowledge as essential |
| S-189 | Thoughts on Consciousness and Awakening | Swaruu Oficial | Stages of awakening vulnerability; no ultimate reality; flexibility of ideas; you are Source |
| Z-016 | 3D Mentality and Tendency to Think Small | Za'el & Arien | Starseed vs Matrix person dynamic; repetition as programming; never give up; temporary conclusions |

answers.excerpt: Also covers: What is ascension really? Is a collective shift to 5D coming? How does the Law of Attraction work?  ### Short Answer  According to the Taygetans, raising your frequency is not about…
answers.content:
## How can we raise our frequency / become "5D"?

*Also covers: What is ascension really? Is a collective shift to 5D coming? How does the Law of Attraction work?*

### Short Answer

According to the Taygetans, raising your frequency is not about waiting for an external event — no galactic wave, no solar flash, no collective shift is coming to elevate humanity into 5D. "5D" is not a place you travel to; it is a state of perception you embody. Swaruu of Erra stated it plainly: being a 5D person while living in the 3D Matrix is entirely a mental and spiritual state. You do not need permission, technology, or cosmic timing. You need to change how you think, what you focus on, and who you are.

The practical advice spans the full range of the material and involves both inner and outer work. On the outer level, Swaruu prescribed concrete steps: clean up your diet, leave addictions, spend time in nature, exercise, drink clean water, use music deliberately, and meditate. On the inner level — which all later speakers agreed matters far more — the work is psychological and spiritual: identify and integrate your shadow aspects, master your emotional compass, practise radical self-love, remove toxic influences from your life, and act as if you are already the person you wish to become.

Yazhi deepened this by arguing that emotions are a compass pointing toward or away from Source — positive emotions signal integration, negative ones signal separation. She was emphatic that ascension is strictly individual, that the New Age concept of collective ascension is a control mechanism, and that being your higher self is something you do now, not after death. Mari Swaruu pushed furthest into practical territory, arguing that the Law of Mirrors — changing yourself rather than chasing external outcomes — is more accurate than the Law of Attraction as commonly understood, and that psychological barriers (not the Van Allen belts) are the real obstacle.

Athena challenged the entire framework of density classifications, calling them arbitrary and warning that no place called "4D" or "5D" exists to transition into. The frequency of the planet is polarising, she said — not uniformly rising.

### The Full Picture

#### What "5D" Actually Means

The first and most important clarification across the material is that 5D is not a location. Swaruu explained in transcript 020 that being a 5D person while living in 3D is simply a state of mind — a way of perceiving and interacting with reality. The Van Allen belts impose a frequency ceiling, but as multiple speakers confirmed, most humans operate far below that ceiling anyway. The limitation is internal, not external.

Swaruu used a direct formulation: live as if you are already a 5D creature. Follow your true heart in everything. Be aware of your frequency at all times. Do not wait for something external to change your circumstances — that waiting is itself the trap.

Athena complicated this further in transcript 405, arguing that the entire system of numbered densities — 3D, 4D, 5D — is an arbitrary classification that does not reflect reality. There is no discrete place called "4D" that humanity is transitioning into. Frequency exists on a continuum, and what is happening on Earth is not a uniform rise but a polarisation: some individuals are rising in frequency while others are descending. The average may appear stable while the extremes diverge. She was emphatic that no galactic wave or cosmic event is coming to shift everyone simultaneously — anyone claiming otherwise is selling a version of the same passive salvation narrative that organised religion has always used.

Mari echoed this in transcript S-168, calling the popular ascension narrative a manipulation scheme functionally identical to religious promises of future reward. The message "just wait, ascension is coming" keeps people passive and dependent — exactly the state that serves those who benefit from the current system. Her counter-instruction was blunt: do not wait for ascension. Be ascension.

#### The Practical Steps: Outer Work

Swaruu of Erra provided the most detailed practical prescriptions in transcript 013. These are the concrete, actionable steps she described for raising personal frequency:

**Diet.** Avoid meat (especially industrially farmed), sugar, processed foods, and GMOs. Swaruu explained that these lower frequency not only through their chemical effects but because of the suffering and low-frequency intention embedded in their production. She recommended fruits, vegetables, nuts, and clean water — the simplest dietary framework aligned with high frequency.

**Addictions and substances.** Leave all addictions. No recreational drugs, no alcohol, no smoking. Swaruu was unequivocal: these substances lower frequency immediately and create dependency patterns that anchor consciousness in low-vibration cycles. Even substances marketed as "spiritual" (ayahuasca, psilocybin) were not endorsed — the experience may feel expansive but the dependency on an external substance to access higher states is itself a limitation.

**Exercise and nature.** Physical movement raises frequency directly. Time in nature — forests, mountains, water — exposes you to the higher frequencies of natural environments that have not been artificially suppressed by urban electromagnetic pollution and collective low-frequency thought patterns.

**Music.** Use music deliberately as a frequency tool. Certain music raises frequency; other music lowers it. Swaruu recommended being conscious of what you listen to and choosing music that elevates your emotional state rather than reinforcing negative patterns.

**Water.** Drink the cleanest water available. Water carries frequency imprints, and Swaruu connected this to the broader principle that everything in your environment contributes to or detracts from your personal frequency.

**Crystals and meditation.** Crystals (Lapis Lazuli was Swaruu's favourite) can support frequency maintenance, though they are tools rather than solutions. Meditation in the Taygetan method is simple: sit comfortably, stop the mind, and allow connection with Source. No elaborate rituals or specific techniques are required — the goal is simply to quiet the internal noise that prevents natural high-frequency awareness.

#### The Inner Work: Shadow Integration and Emotional Mastery

Every speaker agreed that the inner work matters far more than the outer steps. Swaruu introduced the concept of shadow work in transcript 040, drawing directly on Jung's framework: the shadow is everything about yourself that you have repressed, denied, or hidden — the parts you consider unacceptable. These repressed aspects do not disappear; they operate unconsciously, driving behaviour patterns, emotional reactions, and reality manifestation from below the threshold of awareness.

Swaruu described a three-step process: identify the shadow (notice where you have disproportionate emotional reactions — resistance is the key indicator), expose it (bring it into conscious awareness through honest self-examination), and reprogram it (replace the old pattern with a consciously chosen response). A fully enlightened being, in her framework, is simply someone with no remaining shadows — complete self-knowledge with nothing hidden.

Yazhi expanded this in transcript 126, arguing that shadow work is the essential mechanism of what people call ascension. Her formulation was stark: you must face the monster to become the celestial being. There is no shortcut, no bypass, no spiritual technique that lets you skip the confrontation with your own darkness. The New Age movement's emphasis on "love and light" while avoiding shadow material is, in her view, a trap that keeps people on the surface while their unexamined shadows continue to generate the very reality they are trying to escape.

She connected this to the concept of ascension itself, arguing that the popular understanding — a collective shift triggered by external cosmic forces — is a Cabal control mechanism. It keeps people waiting passively for salvation rather than doing the difficult inner work that actually changes frequency. Real ascension, Yazhi insisted, is strictly individual. No one ascends collectively. Each person does their own work or does not.

#### Emotions as a Frequency Compass

Yazhi provided what may be the most practically useful framework in transcript 108: emotions are a compass indicating your alignment with Source. Positive emotions — joy, love, excitement, peace, gratitude — signal that you are integrating toward Source, moving in the direction of higher frequency. Negative emotions — fear, anger, resentment, guilt, shame — signal separation from Source, movement toward lower frequency.

This is not a moral judgement but a navigational tool. Negative emotions are not "bad" — they are information. They tell you that something in your current state of being is misaligned. The appropriate response is not to suppress them (which creates shadow material) but to investigate what they are pointing to and address the underlying cause.

Yazhi was careful to note that both logic and emotion are necessary. The Federation, she observed, has become too logical — making decisions based on rules and procedures while ignoring the emotional-intuitive dimension. Humans tend toward the opposite extreme, being emotionally reactive without rational examination. The integrated state uses both: emotional awareness to sense direction, rational analysis to navigate effectively.

#### The Law of Mirrors and Manifestation

Mari Swaruu introduced a significant reframing in transcripts S-173 and S-174. She argued that the "Law of Attraction" as popularly understood — think positive thoughts and good things come to you — is incomplete to the point of being misleading. What actually operates is the Law of Mirrors: reality reflects back to you what you are, not what you want.

The distinction is critical. The Law of Attraction as taught in popular culture implies you can remain the same person while attracting different circumstances through thought alone. The Law of Mirrors says that your circumstances will change only when you change. You do not attract a better relationship by visualising one — you attract it by becoming the kind of person who naturally exists in that kind of relationship. You do not manifest abundance by affirming it — you manifest it by resolving the internal scarcity patterns that generate scarcity in your external reality.

Mari's practical framework was the most action-oriented in the material. She emphasised clarity (know exactly what you want), focus (stop dispersing energy across contradictory desires), proactive action (manifestation requires doing, not just thinking), and the removal of toxic influences (people, environments, habits, and media that anchor you in low frequency). She was particularly direct about toxic relationships: if someone consistently lowers your frequency, remove them from your life. This is not selfish — it is prerequisite. Service to self enables service to others. You cannot elevate anyone else's frequency while yours is being dragged down.

She also addressed the psychological barriers that most people encounter when attempting change. The body and mind are programmed by years of habit, social conditioning, and repetitive thought patterns. When you attempt to change, this programming actively resists — generating fear, doubt, rationalisation, and self-sabotage. Recognising this resistance as mechanical rather than meaningful is essential. The discomfort of change is not a sign that you are doing something wrong; it is a sign that you are disrupting a pattern that needs disrupting.

#### The Starseed Dimension

Yazhi revealed in transcript 129 that awakened individuals — particularly starseeds — have a disproportionate influence on planetary frequency. A single awakened person's consciousness is scalar: it does not add linearly but multiplicatively. One awakened starseed's creative frequency is equivalent to approximately 1,500 ordinary humans. A highly awakened individual can influence tens or hundreds of thousands.

This means that the practical work of raising your own frequency is not merely personal. Every individual who raises their frequency shifts the planetary average. Small actions create shock waves through the collective field. Yazhi described this as the fundamental reason starseeds incarnate on Earth: not to "save" anyone (which would violate free will) but to raise the frequency of the environment simply by being present and aware within it.

She connected this to responsibility: awareness is proportional to responsibility. The more you know, the more your choices matter — not because someone imposes that obligation, but because expanded awareness means expanded influence on the collective field.

#### Being Your Higher Self Now

One of Yazhi's most important contributions came in transcript 131: be your higher self now, not later. The common spiritual assumption is that you will become your higher self after enough work, after death, after ascension — at some future point. Yazhi rejected this entirely. Your higher self is not a future state; it is who you already are beneath the accumulated limitations.

She made a critical observation about death: disincarnation does not automatically elevate understanding. You take your Matrix with you. If you die full of unresolved shadows, limiting beliefs, and low-frequency patterns, those patterns persist in the afterlife. The veil of forgetfulness upon reincarnation then ensures you start the cycle again without remembering the work you failed to do. The only way to break this cycle is to do the work while incarnated — to become your higher self while still in the body, within the limitations of 3D, surrounded by all the obstacles that make it difficult.

Self-love, Yazhi emphasised, is the starting point — not the destination. You cannot do meaningful inner work from a position of self-hatred. The foundation of all frequency elevation is accepting yourself as you are right now, while simultaneously committing to growth. These are not contradictory: you can love what you are and still choose to become more.

#### What Ascension Is Not

The later speakers were increasingly forceful about what ascension is not:

It is not a collective event. There is no coming galactic wave, solar flash, or cosmic trigger that will shift humanity to a higher density. Athena stated in transcript 405 that the frequency of the planet is polarising, not uniformly ascending. Mari called the collective ascension narrative a manipulation tool in S-168.

It is not passive. Waiting for ascension is the opposite of ascending. Every speaker who addressed this topic insisted that frequency elevation requires active work — psychological, emotional, behavioural, and practical. The idea that you can meditate your way to 5D without changing how you live, eat, think, and relate to others was rejected across the board.

It is not a destination. Swaruu stated in transcript 038 that ascension never ends. There is no final level, no point at which you are "done." Yazhi described enlightenment in transcript 388 as a process, not a state — dynamic, ever-evolving, with no ceiling. The moment you think you have arrived, you have stopped moving.

It is not about escaping Earth. Multiple speakers warned against the desire to leave 3D as a motivation for spiritual work. The point is not to escape the limitation but to transcend it from within — to become 5D while still here, still subject to the same conditions as everyone else, demonstrating through your own frequency that the limitation is not absolute.

#### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on raising frequency |
|---------|--------|-------------------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2018–2019 | Most practical and prescriptive. Detailed outer steps (diet, exercise, nature, crystals, meditation) plus inner work (shadow integration, thought awareness). 5D is a mental state you embody now. Ascension is personal, never ends. Knowledge is the way out. |
| **Yazhi** | 2020–2022 | Deepest philosophical layer. Emotions as Source-integration compass. Collective ascension is a Cabal control mechanism — individual only. Shadow work is the essential mechanism. Be your higher self now, not after death. Awakened consciousness is scalar — one starseed equals thousands. Self-love is the starting point. |
| **Athena (Swaruu X)** | 2022–2023 | Challenged the density classification system itself. No place called "4D" to transition to. No galactic wave coming. Frequency is polarising, not uniformly rising. Rejected passive ascension narratives. |
| **Mari Swaruu** | 2023–2024 | Most action-oriented. Law of Mirrors over Law of Attraction — change yourself, not your wishes. Ascension narrative is manipulation like religion. Practical: remove toxic people, overcome psychological barriers, act as if already achieved. Service to self enables service to others. Quantum jumps possible from rock bottom. |

The trajectory mirrors other topics: from Swaruu's practical prescriptions, through Yazhi's philosophical deepening, to Mari's emphasis on agency and action. All agree that frequency elevation is real, individual, and requires active work. They disagree on emphasis — Swaruu focuses on what to do, Yazhi on why it works, Athena on what frameworks to discard, and Mari on what psychological barriers to overcome.

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 013 | How to Raise Your Frequency | Swaruu's practical prescriptions: diet, addictions, exercise, nature, water, crystals, music, meditation, thought awareness |
| 020 | How to Be a 5D Person | 5D as mental state, live as 5D creature now, law of attraction, knowledge as escape route, consciousness rules genes |
| 038 | What Is 5D Ascension? | Ascension never ends, strictly personal, not tied to 2012 or cosmic events, enjoy the ride, no attachments |
| 040 | Shadow Work | Jung's framework applied: identify, expose, reprogram shadows. Resistance as key indicator. Full enlightenment = no shadows |
| 108 | Emotions: What Are They? | Yazhi's compass model: positive = integration toward Source, negative = separation. Both logic and emotion needed |
| 126 | Ascension — What Is It Really About? | Collective ascension as Cabal control. Individual only. Shadow work essential. Face the monster to become celestial being |
| 129 | Why Awakened Common People Have Power | Scalar consciousness: one awakened person equals 1,000+ sleeping. Small actions create shock waves. Responsibility proportional to awareness |
| 131 | Let's Be Our Higher Self Now | Be higher self now, not later. Limitation defines expansion. Self-love as starting point. Matrix carried after death |
| 366 | Frequencies, Consciousness States | 5D as average caused by people. Personal frequency bubbles. Consciousness and measurable frequency inseparable |
| 388 | Buddha and Enlightenment | Enlightenment as process not destination. Limits are illusion. Dynamic and ever-evolving. Van Allen bands transcendable |
| 405 | Transition into 4D? | No place to transition to. No galactic wave coming. Frequency polarising, not uniformly rising. Arbitrary density classifications |
| S-168 | Ascension (Mari) | Ascension narrative as manipulation scheme. Waiting mentality dangerous. Be ascension, don't wait for it. Law of Attraction requires acting as if already achieved |
| S-173 | Law of Attraction — Become Best Version | Clarity, focus, proactive action. Psychological barriers are main obstacles. Remove toxic influences. Become best version of self |
| S-174 | Dramatic Life Changes, Law of Mirrors | Law of Mirrors over Law of Attraction. Must change self not chase things. Service to self enables service to others. Quantum jumps from rock bottom |

answers.title: How can you trap a being that is aware they create everything in their reality?
answers.excerpt: You cannot — and the question contains its own answer. The key word is "aware." A being that is genuinely aware it creates everything in its reality cannot be trapped, because the instant it…
answers.content:
# How can you trap a being that is aware they create everything in their reality?

## Short Answer

You cannot — and the question contains its own answer. The key word is "aware." A being that is genuinely aware it creates everything in its reality cannot be trapped, because the instant it recognises the trap, the trap dissolves. Athena Swaruu stated this without qualification: the soul is Source itself, and the instant it notices it is in a trap, it breaks free — there is no delay, no process, no negotiation (286). The entire mechanism by which beings are held in limiting realities — on Earth or anywhere else — depends on a single condition: the being must not be aware that it creates its reality. The veil of forgetfulness, memory implants, perception manipulation, belief system engineering, and the telepathic reinforcement of limiting ideas all serve one function: to prevent that awareness from arising. None of them can hold a being that has genuinely achieved the awareness the question describes. The speakers were unanimous across years of discussion: the only chain is the being's own mind. Yazhi stated it directly — it is only their own mind that traps them, with or without mind control of the negatives (390). Mari Swaruu added the crucial structural insight: no one can escape the Matrix because each being IS its own Matrix — you cannot escape yourself — but you can evolve that Matrix by changing who you are, which changes what you manifest (S-045). The trap is not a cage. It is a mirror. And a being that understands mirrors cannot be fooled by reflections.

---

## The Full Picture

### The Impossibility of Trapping Source

The foundation of the answer comes from the most explicit treatments of what the soul actually is. Swaruu X (Yazhi) explained that the soul does not exist as a separate thing that can be acquired, trapped, destroyed, or sold. The soul IS Source itself — pure consciousness, the great whole that includes everything. She used the analogy of a measuring tape: the soul is not the tape or the housing but the stretch of tape between one measurement and another — a self-imposed limitation within Source that creates the experience of being someone specific rather than everything at once. There is nothing outside Source to do the trapping, because there is nothing outside Source at all (184).

Athena Swaruu addressed the question of soul traps directly and categorically: the soul cannot be trapped because it is Source itself. An infinite creator cannot be contained by anything within its own creation. The instant the soul notices it is in some kind of trap, it breaks free. There is no mechanism, no technology, no archontic being that can prevent this, because the trap itself exists only within the field of consciousness that the soul generates (286).

Swaruu of Erra (9) added an important nuance. She described souls as being held captive not like a caged bird but like a person captivated by a television program. The person is not physically restrained. They are absorbed. They have forgotten that they can stand up and walk away because the program has captured their attention so completely that the room around the television has ceased to exist for them. The captivity is real in terms of experience, but it is not real in terms of structure — there are no bars, no locks, no guards. There is only attention, directed so narrowly that everything outside its focus disappears (286).

This distinction is critical. The question asks how you can trap a being that is aware it creates everything. The answer from the Cosmic Agency material is that such a being cannot be trapped — but a being whose awareness has been suppressed or redirected can trap itself through the sheer power of its own creative focus.

### The Veil of Forgetfulness: How Awareness Is Prevented

If a being aware of its creative power cannot be trapped, then the entire architecture of limitation must be designed to prevent that awareness from arising in the first place. This is exactly what the speakers described.

The veil of forgetfulness — the condition in which incarnated beings cannot remember who they are, where they came from, or what they are capable of — is not, according to the speakers, an externally imposed technology. It is a natural consequence of frequency disparity. Mari Swaruu explained the mechanism: the knowledge and memory of a soul exists at a high vibration, and it does not match the dense vibration of Earth's existential realm. The same thing happens with dreams — they are hard to remember because they occurred in a lighter existential realm. Nightmares are easier to remember precisely because their lower vibration more closely matches the waking state (S-235).

Swaruu of Erra (9) made the same point using the dream analogy directly: the mechanism by which you forget your dreams upon waking IS the veil of forgetfulness of incarnation on Earth. You can see it at work with this example, she told Gosia. It is not a device. It is not imposed by an external agent. It is a natural consequence of shifting between frequency ranges. You do not need a machine to make someone forget a dream — you only need them to wake up into a denser frequency (390).

Athena Swaruu confirmed that the veil is the result of frequency disparity between what the soul is and what the biological body can carry — not a mechanical device or amnesia machine. She was explicit: machine soul traps as popularly described do not exist. What exists is the natural gap between densities, which is then deepened by additional mechanisms — but those additional mechanisms also work through frequency, not through physical containment (286).

This is the first layer of the answer. The being in the question — the one that is "aware they create everything" — would not be subject to the veil of forgetfulness in the way most incarnated beings are, because the veil operates through frequency disparity, and a being with that level of awareness would have resolved the disparity. The trap depends on the forgetting, and the being has already remembered.

### Perception Manipulation: Reinforcing the Forgetting

For beings who have not yet achieved that awareness — the vast majority of incarnated souls — the natural veil of forgetfulness is reinforced by active perception manipulation on a scale the speakers described as total.

Yazhi and Aneeka described the Federation's management of the 3D experience as involving systematic memory implants: false memories inserted before birth to provide behavioural context, altered documents and photographs to reshape perceived personal history, and media-controlled narratives to maintain collective agreement about what has happened and what is real. Aneeka detailed how the Federation creates entire personal histories for individuals — not just broad strokes but specific photographs, documents, and contextual memories that anchor the person in a particular identity. People who cannot remember events in their supposed past are told they have PTSD or simply bad memory, and before the evidence of documents and photographs they fold their hands and accept that something happened even if they do not remember anything about it (111).

Yazhi was explicit about the scope. Everything in 3D is created, artificial, managed. Time is not linear there — the Federation has assembled everything artificially to give the illusion of linearity. Personal histories are altered, sometimes totally non-existent — memory implants only. She was clear this is not interference in a natural process. It is how 3D functions. Without it, the 3D experience collapses (111).

This is the second layer. Even if a being begins to recover awareness through the natural thinning of the veil, the perception management system works to redirect that awareness back into the agreed-upon narrative. The being starts to remember something, and the evidence around them — documents, photographs, other people's memories, media consensus — tells them they are wrong. Most people accept external evidence over internal knowing because they have been trained to do so (111).

But this layer, like the veil itself, cannot hold a being that is genuinely aware it creates its reality. The perception manipulation works by exploiting trust in externally presented evidence. A being that understands it generates its own reality would recognise externally presented evidence as part of its own creation — not as independent proof of an external truth. The manipulation loses its power the moment the target understands the mechanism.

### Belief Systems as Self-Imposed Chains

Mari Swaruu addressed the question of forced reincarnation — one of the most feared forms of soul entrapment — and her answer illuminates the deeper mechanism. Is reincarnation forced? Her answer: it is for some souls and not for others. The determining factor is not external power but internal belief. When a soul dies, it takes all its ideas, values, thoughts, and fears with it. The body is gone, and what remains is who the person is — their frequency. That frequency then manifests whatever it is a vibrational match to. A soul that deeply believes in karmic debt will encounter beings presenting karmic ledgers. A soul that believes in judgment will find judges. A soul that believes it is free will find freedom. The afterlife is not a place with fixed geography — it is a mirror of the soul's own frequency (S-235).

This is why the controllers invest so heavily in shaping beliefs during lifetime. Mari described the mechanism clearly: the powers that be impose values, ideas, and meanings that cause incarnated souls to develop belief systems which in turn cause them to reincarnate. They also systematically isolate people from contradictory ideas — discrediting, attacking, and slandering anyone who challenges the imposed narrative. The result is a population that has internalised the very beliefs that keep it cycling through incarnation after incarnation, not because an external force physically prevents departure but because the souls themselves manifest the conditions that match their programmed beliefs (S-235).

Mari's practical resolution was direct: realising this is the first step to understanding that you are the only one who has complete control over your soul and whatever you will experience. She used the analogy of a traffic cop standing at an intersection. If you are in the area where the traffic cop operates — if your vibration matches his jurisdiction — he can direct you, stop you, redirect you. But if your vibration places you outside his range, he cannot even see you take the direction you desire (S-235).

### You Are Your Matrix

Mari's treatment of the Matrix question adds the final structural element. She argued that no one can escape the Matrix — not because the Matrix is too powerful, but because each sentient being IS its own Matrix. The Matrix is not a prison built around you. It is the world your mind creates using your perceptions, your values, your agreements with other beings. You take it with you wherever you go. You cannot escape yourself (S-045).

This reframes the question entirely. "How can you trap a being that is aware they create everything in their reality?" becomes "How can you make a being forget that it IS its reality?" — because the trap is not something added to the being. The trap is the being's own Matrix operating below the threshold of its awareness. The being IS the cage AND the prisoner AND the key. It is all one system.

But Mari also identified this as empowering rather than defeating. If you are your Matrix, then you have complete control over it. You cannot escape it, but you can evolve it — change your values, expand your awareness, integrate your ego rather than rejecting it, and the Matrix you are changes accordingly. She described a form of genuine escape: evolving past the Ego while never rejecting it, incorporating and assimilating it as part of who the subject is — not as who it is, but as a part, since it is so much more (S-045).

The being in the question — one that is aware it creates everything — has already done this work. Its Matrix is not a trap. It is a creation it consciously maintains and can consciously alter.

### The Instant of Recognition

Yazhi described what happens when awareness expands to the point where the limitations dissolve. Using the thought experiment of becoming Francine in Rome while being Gosia in Poland, she traced the logic: identity is a choice of attention. Master the astral and you stop forgetting. You become Francine, and Gosia, and Swaruu, and the cat down the road. The more you know, the less localised and focalised you are — more cosmic you become. A body in locality becomes less relevant. You are neither dead nor alive, you just are. Duality ceases to exist. You are free (390).

This is the ultimate answer to the question. The "trap" is localisation — the narrowing of infinite awareness into a single point of focus. The "escape" is expansion — the widening of that focus until the boundaries that define the individual merge back into the whole. A being that is fully aware it creates everything in its reality is a being whose awareness has expanded to the point where localisation is a choice, not a constraint. Such a being cannot be trapped because it is not localised enough for a trap to have meaning. It exists at a frequency where the mechanisms of control — veil, implants, perception manipulation, belief engineering — operate in a range it has transcended.

The speakers converged on a single practical conclusion: the work of liberation is internal, it happens while alive, and it consists of understanding who and what you are — not intellectually but as lived experience. Yazhi said getting out requires understanding who you are, not remembering who you were, combined with the firm intention not to return based on the knowledge that there is nothing more to learn in 3D (111). Mari said it through death preparation: become the best version of yourself now, face your shadows now, dissolve your attachments now, because the state you carry at death determines everything that follows (S-159). And Athena said it most simply: the instant the soul notices it is in a trap, it breaks free. The noticing IS the freedom (286).

---

## Evolution of Understanding

| Speaker / Period | Contribution |
|---|---|
| **Swaruu of Erra (9) (2018–2020)** | Soul held captive like person captivated by TV program — not caged bird; veil of forgetfulness identical to dream forgetting mechanism — natural not mechanical; duality creates opposites to every intervention — mentality must change before liberation; "it is only their own mind that traps them"; souls chose this experience and from higher level it has always been voluntary. |
| **Aneeka of Temmer (2020)** | Described Federation's 3D memory implant system: pre-birth context memories, altered documents and photographs, media-controlled narratives; personal histories systematically constructed for each individual; memory implants as behavioural reference for first-time Earth souls; people accept documents over their own memory. |
| **Yazhi Swaruu (2020–2022)** | Everything in 3D is artificial and managed — time artificially linearised; personal histories altered or non-existent; Federation management IS how 3D works not interference in natural process; the more you know the less localised you become — freedom through expanded awareness; from higher realms you can be anyone — identity is choice not constraint; getting out requires understanding who you are plus firm intention not to return. |
| **Athena Swaruu (2022–2023)** | Soul cannot be trapped — IS Source itself — infinite creator cannot be contained; soul only tricked into believing it's trapped — instant it notices, breaks free; machine soul traps do not exist as popularly described; veil of forgetfulness is frequency disparity not mechanical device; basic beliefs — not machines — cause re-incarnation cycling. |
| **Mari Swaruu (2023–2024)** | No one can escape the Matrix because each being IS its Matrix — cannot escape yourself — but can evolve it; forced reincarnation depends on belief systems — exists for some not others; controllers shape beliefs during lifetime to generate self-trapping reincarnation patterns; traffic cop analogy — outside his frequency he cannot detect you; Mahasamadhi as genuine liberation through conscious death; heavy spiritual work must be done while alive; escape by being congruent to own ideas and brave enough to create own belief systems. |

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Key Relevance |
|---|---|
| 286 | Soul cannot be trapped — IS Source — only tricked into believing trapped — instant it notices breaks free; soul held like captivated TV viewer not caged bird; machine soul traps do not exist as described; veil of forgetfulness is natural frequency disparity; beliefs cause re-incarnation not machines |
| 184 | Soul IS Source — cannot be acquired/trapped/destroyed/sold; measuring tape analogy — soul is self-imposed limitation within Source; veil of forgetfulness intrinsic to being a person; nothing outside Source to do the trapping |
| 111 | Federation 3D management through memory implants — pre-birth context, altered documents/photographs, media control; everything in 3D is artificial/managed; time artificially linearised; personal histories constructed; people accept external evidence over internal memory; getting out through understanding who you are |
| 390 | Veil of forgetfulness identical to dream forgetting — natural not mechanical; "it is only their own mind that traps them with or without mind control of the negatives"; duality creates opposites; mentality must change before liberation possible; more you know less localised you become — identity dissolves into freedom |
| S-045 | No one can escape Matrix because each being IS its Matrix — cannot escape yourself; personal Matrix taken wherever you go; but full control because you ARE it — evolve self to evolve Matrix; escape through evolving past Ego while assimilating it; even higher planes have perception agreements |
| S-235 | Forced reincarnation depends on belief systems — for some not others; soul after death manifests vibrational match; controllers shape perception/values during life to generate self-trapping beliefs; full control over soul rests with the individual; traffic cop analogy — outside his frequency he cannot detect you |
| S-159 | Prison planet perspective valid from one angle; Mahasamadhi as true escape — absorption into cosmic nature; vibration at death determines afterlife experience; heavy spiritual work must be done while alive; become best version of yourself now; state at death is product of entire lifetime |
