answers.title: How do we go from intellectual understanding to experiential knowing?
answers.excerpt: Also covers: Why can't I do what Yazhi does if I understand the theory? How do I shift my point of attention to be an energy being? Is understanding enough or do I need to practise? What blocks…
answers.content:
## How do we go from intellectual understanding to experiential knowing?

*Also covers: Why can't I do what Yazhi does if I understand the theory? How do I shift my point of attention to be an energy being? Is understanding enough or do I need to practise? What blocks manifestation even when you know it's all consciousness? How do I break perception agreements? What is the role of shadow work in spiritual advancement? Is enlightenment a state you reach or a process?*

### Short Answer

The speakers addressed this question from multiple angles but converged on a single paradox: understanding IS the transformation — but only if it reaches the unconscious, not just the intellect. Yazhi stated directly in transcript 131 that just mentally understanding it is enough, and that she did not need to suffer to be free — her perception of being totally limited gave her the opposite, just by understanding it well. But elsewhere she explained why this apparently simple step is so difficult: the unconscious mind holds perception agreements so deep that even in pure imagination, a person encounters resistance. She demonstrated this with a practical exercise in transcript 219, where Gosia tried to imagine walking through a closed gate and felt a magnetic, gluey resistance — inside her own imagination. That resistance, Yazhi said, is the gap between intellectual and experiential knowing. It comes from agreements held in the unconscious that no amount of surface-level understanding can override.

The practical path across all speakers involves several interlocking elements: shadow work to expose unconscious programming (Swaruu), meditation and imagination exercises to gradually dissolve perception agreements (Yazhi), removing environmental blockages and toxic dynamics that reinforce old patterns (Mari), and above all, the integration of all knowledge fields rather than splitting reality into spiritual versus technical, practical versus theoretical (Gosia and Mari in transcript 413). The bridge from knowing to being is not a single technique but a reorientation of the entire self — conscious and unconscious together.

### The Full Picture

#### The Paradox: Understanding Is Enough — But Understanding Must Be Total

Yazhi presented the most compressed version of the answer in transcript 131. When asked how she acquired the capacity to transcend the body, she said: just by understanding things. Exercises have helped, but they are not as important as simply realizing how important it is to be aware of these things. She described looking at her hand and making it transparent, producing more fingers, forming fins — all in her perception — and said it comes from the realization that there is nothing material.

But this answer immediately provokes the question Gosia asked: if understanding is enough, why can most people not do what Yazhi does? Yazhi's answer was that the understanding must be total — not just intellectual but embedded in every layer of the self, including the unconscious. The higher self of a person is not separate from their current state of consciousness. Broken Shoes — the ordinary person walking in the mud — MUST assume the responsibility of being their own higher self in life. There is no difference between Broken Shoes and their higher self. The limiting ideas are just ideas, but they are held so deeply that they constitute the person's entire reality.

This is why Yazhi insisted that you do not need to wait for disincarnation to expand. The soul is built, not obtained, and the expansion work must be done from wherever you are — from the 3D perspective if that is where you find yourself. Disincarnation does not automatically grant understanding. People take their Matrix with them when they die, because they ARE the Matrix. They continue to think from the other side with the same limiting ideas they held in life.

*Key source: 131 (be your higher self now, understanding is enough if total)*

#### The Gate Exercise: Where Intellectual and Experiential Knowing Diverge

Transcript 219 contains Yazhi's most vivid demonstration of the gap between intellectual and experiential knowing. She asked Gosia and Matias to close their eyes and imagine standing before a closed gate, then to walk through it — in imagination only. When Gosia did this, she reported feeling a magnetic, gluey resistance that tried to hold her inside the gate's matter, like a fly caught in a spider web.

Yazhi's response was emphatic: that resistance, felt inside pure imagination where theoretically anything should be possible, is the exact thing that separates intellectual from experiential knowing. The resistance comes from perception agreements held in the unconscious — agreements about what is possible and what is not. In imagination, you should be able to do anything. Yet the agreements are so deep that they constrain even the imaginal realm.

The practical instruction that followed was simple: practise this constantly. Place your expectations high, very high, and at the same time be ok with any result. The agreements are too strong to break immediately, but they are just agreements, nothing more. Yazhi connected this directly to everyday self-limitation: the same mechanism that prevents you from imagining yourself through a wall also prevents you from being self-assertive, secure, and free of labels like shy or not good enough. The physical limitation and the psychological limitation are the same phenomenon — ideas held in the unconscious that constrain what the person can experience.

She then gave the broader instruction: master lucid dreaming and controlled dreams. Once you can control the dream world, you will see that there is no difference between the dream world and the real world, and you can control everything that happens on both sides, because there are no both sides.

*Key source: 219 (gate exercise, imagination resistance, lucid dreaming as bridge)*

#### Breaking Down the Unconscious: The Magnitude of the Task

In transcript 292, Yazhi framed the transition from intellectual to experiential knowing as defeating the unconscious — and stated bluntly that this is the magnitude of the task. The unconscious is built from the accumulated perception agreements of all past incarnations, and the Earth Matrix exists specifically to prevent people from accessing past-life memories that would help them understand and thereby dissolve these agreements.

When Gosia pointed out that she knew intellectually that walls are not solid — that apparent solidity is just electromagnetic repulsion between particles on the same frequency — Yazhi agreed but explained why that knowledge alone changes nothing. The unconscious is still too strong. She referenced the gate exercise from transcript 219: even imagining it, you feel resistance when passing through the closed metal door, and that is only imagination. The attachments that create this resistance live in the unconscious, not in the conscious intellect.

Yazhi's framework for dissolving these attachments was to achieve a state she called magnetic neutral — incorporating everything you can, both what you would call positive and negative, accepting it without judgment, and simultaneously letting go of everything without attachment to it. This is, she said, the how. But she immediately warned that wanting to break perception agreements can itself become an obsession — another attachment to the idea that you must achieve a particular state in order to be complete. The deepest paradox is that the goal is to let go of everything, including the idea that you must work to let go of everything.

She offered two paths that work in parallel. The first is remembering past lives — the more you recover, the more of your unconscious you understand and therefore control. The second is to form the intention that all unconscious programming no longer affects you, and to make that intention strong enough that it becomes conviction. Revoking contracts, leaving letters of non-consent — these are crutches, but useful ones if they entrench the feeling of inner power.

*Key source: 292 (defeating the unconscious, magnetic neutral, past lives as key)*

#### Shadow Work: The Systematic Approach

Swaruu provided the most structured methodology in transcript 040. Shadow work, as she defined it using Carl Jung's framework, is the systematic introspection into one's internal programming — the childhood conditioning, the automatic reactions, the repressed aspects that a person has hidden from themselves because those aspects conflicted with what was socially acceptable or personally desired.

The process she outlined has clear steps: first, understand that a shadow exists about a particular problem. Then look with reason and logic into the past to find where it came from. Then decide what to do about it. Finally, reprogram the mind by associating what causes resistance with something positive rather than negative, through constant repetition.

Swaruu made an important distinction: exposing a shadow to the light is not focusing on the negative. It is an active, dynamic desire focused on personal progress. The focus is on the growth, not on the darkness. She disagreed with authors who claim that looking for shadows only attracts more shadows. Not exposing a shadow that gives problems only perpetuates it.

She also stated that a fully enlightened person is defined as one who has no shadows — connecting shadow work directly to the larger question of spiritual advancement. Since everything is programming — the chair you sit on, the chocolate you like, even your gender and sexuality — the shadow is specifically that programming which you have resistance to but do not know you have. Making the unconscious conscious is the entire work.

*Key source: 040 (shadow work methodology, Jung, reprogramming associations)*

#### Enlightenment as Process, Not Destination

Yazhi addressed this directly in transcript 388. Enlightenment is not a state you reach, it is a path. It is a way of living and thinking, dynamic, evolving, never static. Consciousness is movement — if it stops, it ceases to exist. You ARE enlightenment, you don't live in it.

When asked how Buddha became enlightened without leaving Earth, Yazhi said limits are an illusion. It does not matter if there are low lunar energies or Van Allen bands. The high frequency of enlightenment transcends everything and nothing stops it. The apparent limitations of any place are only an illusion created by the mind itself.

This reframing is crucial for the intellectual-to-experiential question because it dissolves the idea that there is a finish line to cross. The person who believes they must reach enlightenment as a fixed state is caught in exactly the kind of attachment that prevents experiential knowing. Understanding that you will never be enlightened is part of enlightenment itself.

*Key source: 388 (enlightenment as process, Buddha, limits as illusion)*

#### Super Manifestation: The Evidence That It Works

Mari provided practical evidence in transcript S-175 that the bridge from understanding to experiential power is real and achievable. She described people on Earth capable of super manifestation — near-total control over reality, getting what they want nearly instantly, bypassing the logical steps that manifestation normally requires. These people have managed such a mastery of their vibrations, their thoughts, that they all align with being a frequency match with everything they want and need.

Her practical instruction was direct: eliminate the blockages — toxic dynamics, guilt, self-doubt, the conditioning that keeps you repeating the same programme every day. Once you initiate this chain reaction, you exponentially get better and better. She used her own life as an example: a shy, frightened girl who felt useless and became, within two years, someone entirely different. She attributed this to quantum jumping — a sudden change of mentality and vibration that causes the soul to become compatible with a different, more positive timeline.

The key insight is that super manifestation is not reserved for higher densities. The material world is more astral than people think. The only thing that limits you is the idea that you are limited.

*Key source: S-175 (super manifestation, removing blockages, quantum jumping)*

#### The Two Most Destructive Beliefs That Block Progress

In transcript S-234, Mari identified the two beliefs that most effectively prevent starseeds from crossing the gap between knowing and being. The first is the belief that life is pre-planned and therefore cannot be changed — this causes spiritual stagnation and a helpless victim mentality. The second is the belief that extraction from Earth will solve all problems — this removes the drive for self-improvement.

Both beliefs create passivity by externalising the solution. The person who believes their life is predetermined stops fighting for change. The person who waits for extraction stops working on themselves. In both cases, the practical result is identical: the person does not take the steps that would actually transform understanding into experience.

Mari's correction was that lives can be pre-planned and changed simultaneously — because there are infinite timelines, and the soul can jump between them at any logical point. From any practical point of view, you have free will and complete control over what you experience. Each small step leads to more opportunities, which lead to even more. But you must also remove the people and environments that drag you back into old patterns.

*Key source: S-234 (destructive beliefs, quantum jumping, removing blockers)*

#### Why Technology and Spirituality Are the Same Knowledge

Gosia and Mari addressed a subtler dimension of the intellectual-experiential gap in transcript 413. Audience members had complained that technical videos about stellar navigation and engineering were not practical. Gosia's response was that stellar navigation IS manifestation — both processes involve wrapping yourself in the frequency of your destination and becoming one with it. The technological explanation and the spiritual explanation describe the same process from different angles.

This matters for the intellectual-to-experiential question because the very act of dividing knowledge into spiritual (useful) and technical (impractical) is itself a product of the dualistic 3D mentality that prevents experiential knowing. In advanced ET societies, learning about gravity and engineering IS growing spiritually, because matter and spirit are not regarded as separate realms. The non-fracturing mental capacity that refuses to split reality into categories is precisely what people should be striving to embrace.

The implication is that one reason intellectual understanding fails to become experiential is that people are only engaging with half the picture. They want the spiritual growth without the technical understanding, or vice versa. The holistic integration of all knowledge fields is itself part of the bridge.

*Key source: 413 (technology as spirituality, holistic knowledge, non-dualistic perception)*

### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on Intellectual vs Experiential Knowing |
|---------|--------|--------------------------------------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2019 | Shadow work as systematic methodology — expose unconscious programming through introspection, identify origins, reprogram associations. A fully enlightened person has no shadows. Everything is programming; the shadow is specifically programming you have resistance to but don't know you have. The soul is built through this work across incarnations. |
| **Yazhi** | 2020–2023 | Understanding IS enough — but must be total, reaching the unconscious. Gate exercise demonstrates that even imagination is constrained by perception agreements. Breaking agreements requires defeating the unconscious — the magnitude of the task. Practise lucid dreaming, meditation, imagination. Achieve magnetic neutral: incorporate everything, let go of everything. Be your higher self NOW, don't wait. Enlightenment is a process not a destination. Limits are an illusion — even Van Allen bands cannot stop a truly high frequency. |
| **Gosia** | 2024 | Stellar navigation equals manifestation — wrapping in the frequency of destination. Technical knowledge IS spiritual knowledge. The dualistic split between practical and impractical is itself a 3D limitation. Holistic integration of all fields is the path to non-dualistic perception. |
| **Mari Swaruu** | 2024 | Super manifestation is real and achievable on Earth — people who have mastered their vibrations bypass logical steps. Remove blockages: toxic dynamics, guilt, conditioning. Quantum jumping changes your entire timeline. The two most destructive beliefs — pre-planned lives and extraction as salvation — both create passivity that blocks the transition from knowing to being. Life is not preset; take every opportunity to steer your reality. |

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 040 | Shadow Work | Shadow work as systematic introspection into unconscious programming (Carl Jung framework). Expose hidden aspects, identify origins in childhood/past lives, reprogram associations. Shadows are what you have resistance to but don't know you have. A fully enlightened person has no shadows. Everything is programming — the shadow is specifically conflicting programming. Shedding light on shadows is not negativity but active progress. |
| 131 | Let's Be Our Higher Self Now | Understanding is enough if total — Yazhi transcends the body just by understanding, not by exercises. Broken Shoes must assume responsibility of being their own higher self. No difference between a person and their higher self. Disincarnation does not remove the Matrix — you take it with you. The soul is built, not obtained. Expand your minds NOW. Self-love is the starting point of all transformation. |
| 219 | How Do I Shift My Point of Attention to Be Energy Being? | Gate exercise — imagination constrained by unconscious perception agreements. Gosia feels magnetic resistance even in imagination. Whatever you imagine yourself to be is reality. Practise constantly, place expectations high, be ok with any result. Master lucid dreaming — no difference between dream world and real world. Meditation as key. Fighting in imagination IS fighting in the spirit world. The entire Universe is Mind. |
| 292 | Breaking Down of the Unconscious — Break the Perception Agreements | Defeating the unconscious is the magnitude of the task. Walls feel solid due to electromagnetic repulsion — same frequency, same polarity. Magnetic neutral state: incorporate everything, let go of everything, no wall exists. Intellectual knowledge of this insufficient because unconscious too strong. Remember past lives to control unconscious. Or let go of all attachments including the attachment to letting go. Can be achieved in one incarnation. |
| 388 | Buddha and Enlightenment — Can It Be Reached? | Enlightenment is not a state but a process — dynamic, evolving, never static. You ARE enlightenment. Understanding you will never be enlightened is part of being enlightened. No limitations can stop high frequency of consciousness — not lunar energies, not Van Allen bands. On Earth you advance primarily in a spiritual way. Controllers would crush or distort anyone genuinely enlightened. |
| 413 | Technological Subjects Are Not Practical — Why We Disagree | Stellar navigation equals manifestation — same process of wrapping in frequency of destination. ET societies do not split spiritual and technical. Learning engineering IS growing spiritually. Non-fracturing mental capacity is what humanity should embrace. Technical knowledge is not impractical — it is the mechanics of how reality works, explained from the technology side. Sharing knowledge injects the human field with stellar possibilities. |
| S-175 | Super Manifestation | Super manifestors exist on Earth — near-total control over reality. Material world is more astral than believed. Remove blockages: guilt, toxic dynamics, conditioning. Once chain reaction starts, progress is exponential. You are the providing universe — not something external. Master mind, body, emotions, and triggers. Treat no abuse. Remove yourself from toxic situations. Quantum jump forward at unbelievable speed. |
| S-234 | The Two Most Self-Destructive Starseed Beliefs | First destructive belief: life is pre-planned (causes victim mentality and stagnation). Second: extraction will solve all problems (causes passivity and escapism). Lives are pre-planned AND changeable — infinite timelines, quantum jumping between them. Each small step opens more opportunities. Remove people and environments that reinforce old patterns. People are not extracted to save them from problems — they are extracted when they have solved their problems. |

answers.title: How does Earth feel about being kept in a low vibrational state — has anyone asked the planet itself?
answers.excerpt: The question contains a category error that the material dismantles completely: you cannot ask the planet how it feels about its vibrational state because the planet's vibrational state IS the felt…
answers.content:
# How does Earth feel about being kept in a low vibrational state — has anyone asked the planet itself?

**Primary Theme:** Consciousness, Soul & the Nature of Self
**Additional Themes:** Matrix/Manifestation/Reality · Metaphysics/Spirituality/Ascension
**Sources:** 7 transcripts, 4 speakers (Swaruu 9, Yazhi, Aneeka, Athena)
**Transcripts:** 017, 285, 165, 166, 086, 139, 115

---

## Short Answer

The question contains a category error that the material dismantles completely: you cannot ask the planet how it feels about its vibrational state because the planet's vibrational state IS the felt experience of every consciousness living within it. Earth is not a separate being held hostage by low frequencies. Earth is, according to the Taygetan framework, the total consciousness formed by every individual consciousness that lives inside it — functioning as fractals or nodes of a single planetary awareness. When you ask how Earth "feels" about being kept in a low vibrational state, you are asking how humanity feels about being humanity. And the answer is: most of it does not notice, because the low vibrational state is not something imposed on the planet from outside — it is something generated from inside by the collective perception of its inhabitants.

Yazhi is unambiguous: Earth has always been ascended. The problem is not that Earth is stuck in a low state. The problem is that humans cannot see the ascended Earth through the lens of negativity imposed by the Matrix and reinforced by their own Collective Unconscious. Humans do not live in a world — they are the world they live in. What ascends or does not ascend is not the planet but human perception. Earth's vibrational state is a mirror, and asking the mirror how it feels about the reflection is asking the wrong question.

As for whether anyone has asked the planet itself — in a sense, every moment of conscious experience on Earth is the planet answering. The planet's consciousness is not separate from the consciousnesses within it. It does not have a private opinion that differs from the aggregate of all its inhabitants. It is that aggregate.

---

## Earth as Conscious Entity: What the Material Actually Describes

The foundation for understanding planetary consciousness in this material comes from Swaruu 9's description of Black Goo in transcript 017. Black Goo — concentrated petroleum crystallised under extreme pressure into semi-etheric carbon crystals containing heavy metals and antimatter — is described as the planet's "blood." It contains the base pattern for the DNA of all native species, forming what Swaruu calls an "energy ark of their first-born species." Through Black Goo, the planet maintains a direct connection to every species living on it, with the ability to self-repair damaged DNA across all organisms.

The critical passage: all the individual consciousnesses that live inside a planet function as fractals or nodes that together form the total consciousness of that planet. This is not metaphorical. In the Taygetan framework, a planet's consciousness is literally constituted by the consciousnesses of its inhabitants — and those inhabitants' consciousnesses are in turn shaped by the planetary consciousness, creating a recursive feedback loop. The movement of Black Goo through subsoil cracks creates the Ley Lines — magnetic dynamics organised as geometric fractals connecting the entire globe — which form the physical infrastructure of this planetary consciousness network (017).

This means Earth's consciousness is not a separate entity observing humanity from a distance. It is the sum total of every awareness operating within its field — human, animal, plant, mineral, and the Black Goo substrate itself. When that sum total is dominated by fear, scarcity thinking, and survival mentality, the planetary consciousness reflects exactly that. When it shifts, the planet shifts with it — or more precisely, the planet and the shift are the same thing.

## Why "Kept in a Low Vibrational State" Misframes the Situation

The question assumes Earth is a victim — a conscious being held against its will in an artificially lowered state by external forces (the Federation, the Matrix, the Moon reactors). The material challenges this framing at every level.

Yazhi addresses this directly in transcript 285. When Robert suggests that Earth's consciousness is "going down," Yazhi corrects the frame: Earth has always been ascended. The problem is that humans do not see it through their Collective Unconscious. They see everything through the lens of negativity imposed by the Matrix — but imposed is the wrong word because, as Yazhi explains elsewhere, the Matrix is not something done to humanity. Humans are the Matrix. They are its creators. Wherever they go, they take it with them (165).

The 3D suppression system — the Moon reactors, the Van Allen belt frequencies, the electromagnetic architecture installed after the Tiamat cataclysm — is real infrastructure, but it functions as a framework within which human consciousness operates, not as the cause of that consciousness's limitations. Transcript 166 makes this explicit: the Moon frequencies are now so weak that there is talk of turning off the devices entirely. No visible change would result, because what keeps 3D as 3D is human mentality, not lunar frequencies. Density is mentality and perception, not a place or an externally imposed condition (166).

This reframes Earth's "low vibrational state" not as something done to the planet but as something the collective consciousness within the planet continuously generates through its own perceptual agreements. The infrastructure supports it, but the engine driving it is the human Collective Unconscious — the tacit, non-discussed paradigm of reality as a set of agreements that defines what is possible, what is real, and what is allowed (165).

## The Nested Collective Unconscious and Dominant Frequency

Yazhi provides the larger context in transcript 285. Earth's Collective Unconscious does not exist in isolation. It sits within the solar system's Collective Unconscious, which sits within the galactic level, which sits within the galaxy cluster level, cascading upward until it reaches Source itself. Each level influences the others. Earth's shape — its physical form — is determined more by the galactic Collective Unconscious than by the human one within it.

This nesting has a specific consequence for the "low vibrational state" question. Because the external Collective Unconscious — the galactic and stellar context in which Earth is immersed — is of higher frequency than Earth's internal collective, the principle of Dominant Frequency applies. Higher frequencies tend to equalise lower ones. This means Earth is being pulled upward by its cosmic context regardless of what humanity does internally. Yazhi identifies this as the actual mechanism behind "planetary ascension" — not a spiritual event triggered by human awakening, but a physics-like process driven by the frequency differential between Earth's internal state and its galactic surroundings (285).

Those inhabitants whose consciousness does not rise with the dominant frequency remain in a low state that tends toward entropy and self-destruction — the defining characteristic of regressive frequencies. Those who develop higher consciousness find themselves increasingly incompatible with the collective and eventually leave, either through death or through a perceptual shift that effectively places them in a different experiential reality while physically remaining on Earth.

## "Has Anyone Asked the Planet Itself?"

The question implies that Earth might have a private perspective — an opinion about its situation that differs from what its inhabitants experience. The material suggests this is structurally impossible.

If a planet's consciousness is the aggregate of all consciousnesses within it, then asking the planet its opinion is asking the collective its opinion. And the collective's opinion is already expressed in every war, every act of kindness, every institution, every suppression, and every moment of awakening. Earth "speaks" constantly through the lived reality of its inhabitants. It does not need to be asked because it is always already answering.

The closest the material comes to describing communication with Earth's consciousness as such is through the Black Goo substrate. Black Goo contains the planet's base frequency patterns — the energetic template from which all native life develops. Contact with positive Black Goo (as opposed to the invasive extraterrestrial variety from Tiamat) is contact with the planet's own creative consciousness. But this is not a conversation in any human sense. It is a frequency interaction — the planet's consciousness pattern interfacing with an individual's consciousness through the semi-etheric medium of the Black Goo crystals (017).

There is no transcript in which anyone reports having "asked the planet" and received a distinct answer. And the framework explains why: there is no distinct answerer. Earth's consciousness is not an entity with preferences separate from its inhabitants' preferences. It is those preferences, aggregated and expressed as a planetary frequency.

## What This Means for the Question's Premise

The question asks: How does Earth feel about being kept in a low vibrational state? The material's answer, assembled across multiple speakers and years, is:

Earth does not "feel" about its vibrational state in the way a prisoner feels about captivity, because Earth is not a prisoner. Earth is the prison, the prisoners, the guards, and the architecture — all at once. Its vibrational state is not something happening to it but something it is, moment by moment, as generated by the consciousness within it. Asking how Earth feels about this is like asking how an ocean feels about being wet.

The more useful question, which the material redirects toward consistently, is: how do the individual consciousnesses within Earth feel about the collective state they are generating? And for those who are aware enough to ask the question — the starseeds, the awakened, the people reading these transcripts — the answer is obvious. They feel that something is deeply wrong. That feeling is itself the beginning of the frequency shift that changes the planet's state from within, which is the only direction from which it can be changed.

## Evolution Across Speakers

Swaruu of Erra (2018–2020) provides the foundational framework: Black Goo as planetary blood, individual consciousnesses as fractal nodes of planetary consciousness, Ley Lines as the physical network connecting them, and the planet's ability to self-repair DNA of all species through this substrate.

Yazhi Swaruu (2021–2024) delivers the philosophical core: Earth has always been ascended, humans are the world they live in (not inhabitants of it), the Collective Unconscious creates existential density, the nested structure of planetary/stellar/galactic consciousness, and the Dominant Frequency principle that drives planetary ascension regardless of human resistance.

Yazhi also provides the structural explanation for why asking the planet is a category error: planets, suns, constellations, and galaxies are all sentient and conscious, but their consciousness is not separate from the consciousnesses that compose them. A planet does not have a private opinion about its inhabitants any more than a body has a private opinion about its cells.

## Key Transcript References

- **017** — Black Goo as planetary "blood": contains base pattern for DNA of all native species, energy ark of first-born species, all individual consciousnesses form total planetary consciousness as fractals, Ley Lines as magnetic dynamics of Black Goo movement through subsoil, planet's ability to self-repair damaged DNA through this substrate
- **285** — Earth has always been ascended: problem is humans and their perception not the planet, humans are the world they live in, Collective Unconscious as creative-manifesting force, nested levels (planet → solar system → galaxy → Source), Dominant Frequency principle forces Earth upward, what ascends is human perception not the planet itself, Carl Jung quote on all problems as result of mental disorder
- **165** — Planets/suns/constellations/galaxies all sentient and conscious, person as conglomerate of lives forming larger beings, Collective Unconscious as tacit paradigm of reality agreements, problems inside reality-bubble must be fixed from within, humans are the Matrix and take it wherever they go, cannot remove Matrix from a person
- **166** — Moon frequencies now so weak talk of turning off devices, what keeps 3D is human mentality not lunar frequencies, density is mentality/perception not place, Collective Unconscious creates tulpas/egregors, holographic society requires mental shift not structural change
- **086** — All negativity (Reptiles/Illuminati/wars/pandemics) as reflection of human mind, Federation does not cooperate with regressives — regressive races are egregors of positive minds, cosmic school model, humans evolving fast from cosmic perspective
- **139** — Consciousness generates reality, control perception = control manifestation, genes controlled by consciousness not laboratories, real genetic modification = making species modify own genes through mind control, mind overcomes destructive frequencies
- **115** — Federation gives collective what it perceives they want, Earth as game taken too seriously from 5D perspective, collective vs individual (Federation looks at collective), manifestation asymmetry (negative concentrates easily, positive scatters)

answers.excerpt: The Cosmic Agency material presents manifestation not as a mystical technique but as the fundamental mechanism of reality itself. In Swaruu 9's foundational framework, consciousness generates…
answers.content:
## Q8: How does manifestation / law of attraction actually work?

### Short Answer

The Cosmic Agency material presents manifestation not as a mystical technique but as the fundamental mechanism of reality itself. In Swaruu 9's foundational framework, consciousness generates standing waves in the Ether — the field of potential energy that constitutes the universe — and these waves form nodes that become matter. Your thoughts, emotions, and point of attention literally determine the frequency of what you emit into this field, and the field returns to you whatever matches that frequency. This is the Law of Mirrors: you do not attract what you want, you manifest what you are.

The practical problem, as every speaker in the material emphasises, is that roughly 98% of what you manifest comes from your unconscious and subconscious mind, and only about 2% from your conscious desires. Fear is devastatingly efficient at concentrating creative attention — it locks your focus onto exactly what you do not want, and the Ether delivers it anyway because the Law of Mirrors does not distinguish between desired and feared. It only reads where your attention is. This is why negative things seem to manifest faster than positive ones: fear provides the focus that wishing rarely achieves. The path to changing what you manifest is therefore not primarily about technique or visualisation but about inner work — shadow work, self-knowledge, and the integration of repressed material — so that the unconscious stops contradicting the conscious.

The material goes further than most discussions of manifestation. Yazhi demonstrates that consciousness is scalar: one awakened person can have the manifestation weight of a thousand sleeping ones, because higher-density awareness processes more data simultaneously and thus influences the Ether more powerfully. Mari shows that in deep space, where no planetary Matrix modulates your frequency, the Law of Mirrors operates with terrifying immediacy — whatever is in your unconscious manifests directly in front of you, proving that manifestation is not metaphor but physics. And the entire Swaruu lineage shows that the same mechanics apply at every density, from 3D Earth to interstellar space to the highest planes of consciousness.

### The Full Picture

#### The Mechanics: Standing Waves in the Ether

Swaruu 9 laid out the physics of manifestation in her earliest transmissions. The universe consists of a single substance — potential energy — that exists as waves propagating through a medium she calls the Ether. Matter is not solid; it is formed by standing waves whose nodes (points of stable energy concentration) create the illusion of particles, atoms, molecules, and objects. These standing waves require specific harmonic frequencies to sustain themselves, following the mathematical patterns of sacred geometry.

The critical point is what generates these harmonics. In artificial systems, it is a quantum computer or reactor manipulating electromagnetic frequencies. In nature, it is consciousness. The focus of a conscious being — where its attention falls, what it thinks, what it feels — determines the frequency of the waves it emits into the Ether. These emitted waves interact with all other waves in the field, creating constructive interference (when multiple consciousnesses focus on the same thing, reinforcing it) or destructive interference (when they hold opposing intentions, dissolving it).

This is not metaphor. It is the same principle that drives Taygetan zero-point energy reactors and superluminal starship travel. A ship does not move through space; it changes its own frequency to become compatible with a different location, de-manifesting from one place and re-manifesting at another. What consciousness does with thought, the ship does with engineered electromagnetic fields at enormous voltage.

As Swaruu 9 stated in transcript 058: the Ether already contains all possibilities, all technology, all situations. Nothing is truly created — it is accessed by becoming frequency-compatible with it. This defeats the Matrix concept of having to work to deserve. You can be and have it all if you learn one thing: how to manipulate frequencies with your mind.

*Key sources: 014 (Mechanics of Manifestation, Swaruu 9), 058 (Ether, Swaruu 9)*

#### The Law of Mirrors: You Manifest What You Are

Mari's formulation is the most direct: you do not manifest what you want, you manifest what and who you are. Your wants and desires are like unfinished plans — dispersed and unfocused because people jump from wanting one thing to another and then back again, like a ship at sea setting course for multiple ports simultaneously and reaching none of them.

The term "Law of Mirrors" is preferred over "Law of Attraction" throughout the later material because nothing is being attracted. The external world is a reflection of the internal state of the observer. If your life is chaotic, it is because you are chaotic. If toxic people surround you, they are a mirror of something unresolved within you. Fixing the external requires fixing the internal.

This is why Mari insists that wanting an expensive car when your life is in disarray creates friction — the car is not vibrationally compatible with your current state. If the universe somehow delivered it anyway, you could not hold it: the insurance, the maintenance, the envy of others would quickly strip it from you. The same applies to relationships: manifesting an ideal partner is impossible when your life circumstances are incompatible with the kind of person you desire. Change yourself, and the circumstances rearrange to match.

The practical instruction is consistent across speakers: be what you want, not someone who merely wishes for it. Be proactive — clarity of intention must be followed by concrete steps. Manifestation on Earth still operates through logical sequences of cause and effect, and sitting in meditation wishing for something without action produces only the experience of wishing.

*Key sources: S-173 (Law of Attraction, Mari), S-174 (Law of Mirrors, Mari), S-098 (Fears, Desires, Manifestation, Mari)*

#### Why Fear Manifests Faster Than Hope

Every speaker converges on this point: fear concentrates creative attention with extraordinary efficiency, while positive desires tend to be dispersed and contradictory.

Swaruu 9 explained the asymmetry in transcript 084: fear activates survival mode, which commandeers virtually all of a person's cognitive and emotional resources. The mind stops wandering and locks onto the threat with total focus. The Law of Mirrors does not evaluate whether you want what you are focused on — it simply delivers more of whatever has your full attention. Since fear provides the kind of intense, sustained, emotionally charged focus that wishing rarely achieves, feared outcomes manifest with disturbing speed.

The problem is compounded by the 2%/98% split. Swaruu 9 described the conscious mind as roughly 2% of a person's total being — the part that says "I want a cake." The remaining 98% is the subconscious and unconscious, which is constantly rambling and contradicting. The unconscious is where repressed fears, unprocessed trauma, and childhood programming reside. It is this 98% that actually drives what manifests, not the 2% that makes wishes.

Mari extended this in transcript S-098: people have been conditioned since childhood to believe that good things require hard work, while bad things can jump on you from any dark corner. This programming itself becomes part of the unconscious, creating an asymmetry where negative manifestation feels effortless and positive manifestation feels impossible. But as Mari points out, there is no intrinsic difference in difficulty — manifesting a new car is as easy as manifesting a pair of socks. The difference exists only in the belief system of the person manifesting.

Fear also creates egregors — collective thought-forms that take on a kind of independent existence. When many people focus on the same fear (a virus, an economic collapse, a war), the combined creative attention manifests it as a shared reality. The egregor then feeds on continued fearful attention to sustain itself, creating a self-reinforcing cycle. As Swaruu 9 stated: regressive entities do not feed on fear per se — they feed on creative attention, and fear is simply the most efficient mechanism for concentrating it.

*Key sources: 079 (Fears, Swaruu 9/Nai'Shara), 084 (Egregors, Swaruu 9), S-098 (Mari), S-016 (Egregores, Mari)*

#### Shadow Work: The Only Real Path

If the unconscious determines 98% of what manifests, then the only meaningful path to changing your reality is to change your unconscious. This is shadow work — the systematic confrontation with repressed material that drives behaviour and manifestation from beneath awareness.

The concept is drawn from Carl Jung and cited repeatedly across the material. Swaruu 9 used Jung's formulation as a foundational principle: "Whatever you repress and hide will only manifest itself later as destiny." Shadows are formed when a child represses aspects of itself that are not approved by family and society. These repressed traits do not disappear; they continue to operate from the unconscious, producing automatic reactions, self-sabotage, and the manifestation of unwanted circumstances.

Shadow work is facing these repressed elements — understanding their origins, accepting that they are part of you, and integrating them rather than fighting them. Swaruu 9 was emphatic that this is not the same as focusing on the negative (which some Law of Attraction teachers warn against). Exposing a shadow to conscious understanding is a positive, dynamic act focused on personal growth. Not exposing it only perpetuates the problem.

The endpoint, in Swaruu 9's framework, is integration. Love is not the highest frequency — integration is. Integration means accepting all aspects of yourself, including the dark ones, without resistance. What you resist persists; what you accept dissolves. A fully integrated person has no shadows, and therefore manifests only what they consciously intend. Swaruu 9 defined this as spiritual enlightenment: the state of having no shadows left.

The practical relevance is stark. Swaruu 9 demonstrated it on herself in transcript 084: after watching scary videos before sleep aboard a starship in 5D, she manifested a negative entity visitation — in orbit, inside a frequency-shielded vessel, in a 5D bubble. She brought it on herself through creative attention, and dissolved it by mentally becoming a ball of white light. If she could accidentally manifest entities in 5D, it proves the mechanism operates everywhere and for everyone.

*Key sources: 040 (Shadow Work, Swaruu 9), 079 (Fears, Swaruu 9), 058 (Ether — integration as highest frequency, Swaruu 9)*

#### Scalar Consciousness: Why One Awakened Person Outweighs a Thousand

Yazhi introduced a concept that transforms the practical implications of manifestation: consciousness is scalar. A single person at a higher density of awareness does not have the same manifestation weight as a single person at a lower density. They have exponentially more.

The reasoning follows from the nature of density itself. Higher density means processing more data simultaneously — perceiving more connections, understanding more layers of reality, holding more of the whole within your awareness. Since what you are aware of is what you manifest, a being that perceives and processes more has a proportionally greater influence on the Ether.

Yazhi offered crude illustrative numbers: you do not need 501 awakened people out of 1,000 to shift a collective reality. You might need only 5 who are at a sufficiently high level of awareness, because their scalar weight exceeds that of 995 sleeping individuals combined. Reality is not a democracy where votes are counted equally. The more awake you are, the more responsibility you carry for what the collective experiences.

This cuts both ways. An awakened person who enters a negative thought spiral manifests those negative things far more rapidly and powerfully than a sleeping person would. Yazhi called this very dangerous — the higher your awareness, the faster and stronger your manifestations, positive or negative. This is why maintaining frequency is not a luxury for spiritually advanced people but a responsibility.

*Key sources: 129 (Scalar Consciousness, Yazhi), 122 (Nature of Reality, Yazhi)*

#### Deep Space: Manifestation Without the Safety Net

Mari provided the most vivid proof-of-concept for the mechanics described above. In deep space, outside any planetary magnetosphere, there is no collective unconscious modulating your frequency. A planet's Matrix acts as a dampener — it restricts the range of what is possible through consensus reality, slowing manifestation and buffering the individual from direct confrontation with their own unconscious.

In deep space, this dampener is absent. All existential realms — the world of the living, the higher astral, the lower astral — are intermeshed into a single unmodulated field. Whatever is in your deepest unconscious manifests directly and immediately. Your fears become visible entities. Your unresolved traumas produce nightmares that are indistinguishable from physical reality. And equally, your peace and self-knowledge produce beauty and encounter with higher beings.

This is why deep space is dangerous for the unprepared. A person who has spent a lifetime burying unwanted aspects of themselves will face all of it at once, with no planetary buffer to slow the process. It is also why deep space is, paradoxically, the most honest environment in the universe: you cannot hide from yourself there. As Carl Jung said, whatever you do not face in your unconscious manifests as fate — and in deep space, that is exactly and literally what happens.

*Key sources: S-153 (Deep Space Densities, Mari)*

#### Super Manifestation and the Material World as Dream

Mari's later transmissions address the upper end of the spectrum — people who seem to have near-total control over reality, bypassing the normal logical steps of cause and effect. She calls this super manifestation.

These individuals have achieved such mastery of their vibration — their thoughts, emotions, and unconscious patterns — that they are frequency-compatible with everything they want. They have removed the blockages: the toxic relationships, the self-defeating beliefs, the body-mind programming that keeps most people repeating the same patterns daily. Once these are cleared, manifestation accelerates exponentially, producing what Mari calls a quantum jump — a sudden, dramatic shift in all life circumstances.

The deepest point in Mari's analysis is that the material world is more astral than people realise. The world of the living is another illusion, designed to give souls the experience of limitation. But that is all it is — an experience. The only thing limiting you is the idea that you are limited. People who grasp this can operate in the physical world with the same fluidity that consciousness normally has only in dreams or higher densities.

Yazhi took this further in transcript 122: from high densities, an idea is reality. What comes to mind simply is, without questioning. People on Earth experience the same thing every night — they call it dreaming. When you die, you become what you dream. The difference between waking life and dreams is not a difference in kind but in the density of agreements of perception.

*Key sources: S-175 (Super Manifestation, Mari), 122 (Nature of Reality, Yazhi), 445 (Tulpas, Yazhi)*

#### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Perspective on Manifestation |
|---------|------------------------------|
| **Swaruu 9** | Provides the physics: standing waves in the Ether, harmonics of frequency, sacred geometry as the mathematics of manifestation. Introduces the 2%/98% conscious/unconscious split, shadow work as the path to integration, and the principle that fear concentrates creative attention. Demonstrates manifestation of entities in 5D as proof of the universal mechanism. |
| **Yazhi** | Adds the scalar dimension: consciousness is not democratic, and awakened individuals outweigh sleeping collectives exponentially. Explains that reality is agreements of perception with no objective truth, and that all things — including tulpas, egregors, and even regressive beings — are manifestations of consciousness. Takes the position that everything is ideas, and what separates reality from imagination is merely agreement. |
| **Mari** | Focuses on the practical and the experiential. Reframes the Law of Attraction as the Law of Mirrors. Provides detailed life-guidance on removing toxic influences, overcoming body-mind programming, and becoming proactive. Introduces the deep space proof — manifestation without planetary modulation — and the concept of super manifestation for those who have cleared their blockages. |
| **Nai'Shara** | Contributes the self-knowledge dimension: knowing yourself is the most powerful weapon against fear. Going towards fear means taking absolute control of yourself. Emphasises that ambivalence — unconsciously wanting what you consciously reject — is the root of repeated unwanted manifestation. |

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 014 | Free Energy (Zero Point): Mechanics of Manifestation | Core physics: standing waves, Ether, sacred geometry, harmonics, consciousness as the emitter |
| 058 | Ether — Teachings of Swaruu of Erra | Ether as the all-inclusive medium, consciousness creates matter, 2%/98% split, integration as highest frequency |
| 079 | Fears, Viruses, Global Situation | Fear as concentration of creative attention, egregors as collective manifestations, facing fears as path to integration |
| 084 | Reptilian Mind — Human Egregors | Everything is an egregor, fear feeds creative attention to regressive entities, negative manifests faster than positive, Swaruu's 5D entity experiment |
| 040 | Shadow Work | Jung's framework applied: repressed material manifests as destiny, shadow work as systematic introspection, integration of rejected aspects |
| 122 | Nature of Reality — Yazhi Swaruu | Reality as agreements of perception, higher density = faster manifestation, imagination as the starting point of all reality |
| 129 | Why Awakened Common People Have Power | Scalar consciousness, one awake person = 1,000 sleeping, responsibility of awakened individuals, frequency maintenance |
| S-098 | Fears, Desires, Thoughts and Manifestation | Fear concentrates attention, egregors from collective fear, no intrinsic difference in difficulty between positive and negative manifestation |
| S-173 | The Law of Attraction — Become the Best Version of Yourself | Practical manifestation guidance: clarity, focus, proactivity, removing toxic influences, overcoming body-mind programming |
| S-174 | Dramatic Life Changes — The Law of Mirrors | Law of Mirrors preferred over Law of Attraction, quantum jumping, rock-bottom epiphanies, service to self as service to others |
| S-175 | Super Manifestation | People who bypass normal cause-and-effect, material world as astral, quantum jumps, guilt and self-forgiveness |
| S-153 | How Existential Densities Work in Deep Space | No planetary modulation in space, unconscious manifests directly, Law of Mirrors at full strength, dangerous for the unprepared |
| S-016 | Reality, Egregores, Manifestation and the Paranormal | Everything spawns from consciousness, 17-second focus threshold, egregores as real manifestations, politicians as collective egregors |
| 445 | Tulpas — Everything Is a Tulpa | Everything is ideas, fear as the mother of negative tulpas, tulpas export across densities, only Source is not a tulpa |

answers.title: How does my car or house exist "inside me" if I create my own reality — are physical objects just constructs of consciousness?
answers.excerpt: Physical objects do not exist independently of the consciousness observing them. According to the Cosmic Agency material, everything in the so-called material world — your car, your house, a pencil,…
answers.content:
# How does my car or house exist "inside me" if I create my own reality — are physical objects just constructs of consciousness?

## Short Answer

Physical objects do not exist independently of the consciousness observing them. According to the Cosmic Agency material, everything in the so-called material world — your car, your house, a pencil, a chair — is potential energy within the Ether, given form and meaning exclusively by consciousness through standing waves, harmonics of frequency, and shared perception agreements. The material world is not something separate from you that you happen to be looking at; it is generated from within your consciousness as a mirror of who you are. This does not make objects "imaginary" in the dismissive sense. It means that imagination — focused attention — is how all reality is produced, and what you call the physical world was once imagination that became collectively agreed-upon experience.

---

## The Full Picture

### Nothing Is Solid — Standing Waves in a Sea of Potential Energy

The foundational claim across all speakers is that matter does not exist as an independent substance. Swaruu of Erra laid this out in her earliest transmissions and returned to it repeatedly: everything that appears as hard matter is a concentration of potential energy within the Ether, sustained by standing waves. A standing wave forms when the oscillatory frequency of a source causes its emitted waves to interfere with their own reflections in such a way that a stable crest is maintained — a point that never collapses back into potential energy because the next pulse replaces it before it can. That crest is what we experience as a particle. Billions of such particles, each sustained by its own precise harmonic, aggregate into molecules, objects, and worlds (015, 058).

In Swaruu's own image: you are a wave in a sea. The sea is the Ether. The other waves are other people. You are part of the same sea but maintaining your individuality. You are born, you live, you die — and you are still there. You form another wave, and then another. All that exists is Ether. The rest is ideas, a dream created in the great mind that is the whole (058).

Athena Swaruu deepened this by connecting the standing-wave model to vortex mathematics: every particle is a self-feeding toroidal energy pattern, recycling energy within itself while being influenced by the larger field in which it sits. A toroid within a toroid within a toroid — from subatomic particle to galaxy (280). Your car is not a lump of stuff sitting in a driveway. It is an extraordinarily complex dance of harmonics, billions of energy pulsations in precise mathematical order, sustained within the Ether by the creative attention of consciousness (058).

### The Chair Metaphor — Objects Have No Inherent Identity

Both Mari Swaruu and Swaruu of Erra use the same illustration, repeated across years: a simple chair. For a human, a chair is a piece of furniture to sit on. For a cat, it is a bed. For a termite, it is food. For an ant, it is a mountain. For a spider, it is a house (S-045, S-153). The chair does not possess an intrinsic "chair-ness." It is potential energy that each observer interprets through its own identity frame — its needs, its knowledge, its values.

Mari extends this further: the value and the meaning given to something depend entirely on who the observer is. That observer can only give value and meaning through its own understanding of reality, its particular needs and wants — through the subject's identity frame (S-153). There is no meaning embedded in the Ether waiting to be discovered. Meaning is assigned by consciousness. Without a consciousness present, what you call a chair is not a chair, not a bed, not food. It is undifferentiated potential energy.

This is what Swaruu of Erra told Gosia directly: if you are not in that room, and there is no one else in it, the lamp is only potential energy, and not a lamp. Only you can give it a meaning (019).

### Perception Agreements — Why We All See the Same Lamp

If objects have no inherent identity, the obvious question is: why does everyone see the same lamp? The answer given consistently is perception agreements. When two or more subjects with consciousness hold similar enough sets of ideas and interpretations, they share a collectively manifested existential realm (S-153). You and your neighbour both see a lamp because you share a vast set of agreements about what potential energy arranged in that pattern means. You learned these agreements from the moment you were born — from the society you grew up in, from the collective unconscious of your species, from the entire history of perception that preceded you.

Swaruu of Erra describes this in the Original Matrix conversation: you have an agreement to see that lump of potential energy as a lamp. We share these agreements because at the deepest level, we are not separate entities. We are interconnected in consciousness. We are literally one being. We share ideas because we are one (019). Yet the agreements are never perfectly identical between two people. Each sentient creature creates its unique world, though it holds many similarities with the worlds others create (S-045).

Yazhi Swaruu takes this to its sharpest formulation: reality is a series of agreements between two or more consciousnesses. What is outside a consciousness's perception simply does not exist for that consciousness. There is no objective, tangible, absolute reality. Everything is relative. The only thing that could approach absolute reality is Source itself (122).

### You Are Your Matrix — The Observer Cannot Be Separated from the Observed

The question "how does my car exist inside me?" assumes a model where you are here, on one side, and the car is there, on the other, and you are somehow supposed to contain the car within yourself. The material consistently dismantles this assumption. There is no "other side." The external world is a mirror creation generated from within consciousness.

Mari Swaruu is explicit: each sentient creature is its own Matrix. The personal Matrix is not a cage you are trapped inside — it is who you are. It is the totality of your values, your interpretations, your personality, your perception lens. You cannot escape the Matrix because you ARE the Matrix. Wherever you go, you take it with you (S-045).

This means your car does not exist "inside" you the way a coin sits inside a pocket. Rather, your car — along with your house, your street, your sky, your entire perceived external world — is the outward face of your inner reality. It is the mirror that reflects back to you what you are. As Swaruu of Erra states: all the events in the world — wars, weather events, catastrophes — are an exteriorised Matrix-read reflection of what the real people there have manifested for themselves. What you see outside in the world is a direct reflection of the inner world in the psyche of the people (019).

Athena Swaruu grounds this philosophically: the illusion of the outside world is created by the dual concept of Self versus that which is not Self. That duality is generated from the consciousness of the observer. The attachments to the ideas that define your "I" form your Ego, and your Ego-identity is what structures the entire perceptual world around you (280).

### Creative Attention Sustains Everything

One of the most practically significant claims is that objects require ongoing creative attention to persist. This is not metaphor. Swaruu of Erra explains: what does not receive creative attention will become potential energy again, where it came from. An abandoned car, an abandoned house — is destroyed and becomes something useful from the point of view of the closest creative consciousnesses. If you do not need it anymore, that house will be eaten by termites, and the forest will reclaim the area. The more attention an object received when created, the longer it will dissipate that energy, but it will dissipate sooner or later if someone does not pay attention to it (058).

She makes this concrete with everyday examples: if a house gets a lot of attention, it is always nice and well maintained. If abandoned, it fills with termites and collapses. A car needs maintenance — attention — or it fails. Even you yourself, if you do not give enough attention to yourself, will degenerate (015). What Earth science calls entropy, this framework explains as the progressive dissolution of standing-wave harmonics when creative attention is withdrawn.

This means your car does not merely happen to exist near you. It persists in your reality because it is part of the web of creative attention you sustain. The car as a functioning machine, the house as a shelter — these are active manifestations, not passive background fixtures.

### Non-Locality — Everything Is HERE

Yazhi Swaruu's articulation of the Principle of Non-Locality removes the final support for the idea that objects exist "out there" in a space separate from you. The principle states: there is no time, no space, no distance. Everything that exists is contained where your consciousness-mind resides. All planets and all places in them are contained in the very precise and ultimate meaning of the word HERE (210).

What separates one place from another is only an idea in your mind. Your thoughts make up your reality, exterior and interior reality, in a very literal way (210). The car in your driveway and a star in the Pleiades are equally "here" from the perspective of the Ether. Distance is generated by the limited perception of consciousness that holds the concept of "there" as opposed to "here."

Interstellar civilisations proved this empirically through stellar navigation. A starship does not travel across distance — it modulates its frequency to become compatible with the destination. There is no displacement. The ship "jumps" from one frequency of existence to another (210). If physical distance were real, this would be impossible. The fact that it works demonstrates that locality is a mental construct, and so are the objects that appear to populate it.

### Deep Space as the Proof of Principle

Mari Swaruu's account of deep space travel provides perhaps the most vivid illustration. On a planet, the collective unconscious acts as a modulating system — it stabilises what everyone perceives, creating a shared set of rules about what can and cannot exist. In deep space, there is no collective unconscious, no planetary magnetosphere to dampen and equalise frequencies. All existential realms — world of the living, higher astral, lower astral — merge into one chaotic, unmodulated mass (S-153).

In that environment, each individual's fears and thoughts manifest almost immediately. Reality depends entirely on the individual as its own self-contained existential realm (S-153). If your personality is stable and your self-knowledge is strong, deep space is peaceful and beautiful. If your unconscious is full of unresolved material, it manifests as nightmares.

This is the clearest demonstration that "physical objects" are consciousness-dependent. Strip away the collective agreements and the planetary modulation, and reality becomes purely and nakedly a reflection of whatever the observer carries inside. The car, the house, the chair — they only appear as stable, solid, independent things because a massive planetary collective unconscious enforces those agreements on everyone within its field. Remove that enforcement and the truth becomes apparent: there never were any objects. There were always only ideas.

### The False Dichotomy Between "Inside" and "Outside"

The question itself reveals the core misunderstanding the material addresses: the assumption that there is an inside and an outside. Everything in the Cosmic Agency framework converges on the principle that this duality is the fundamental illusion. There is no material world and spiritual world as separate realms, Athena states. Everything depends on perception because, as a universal truth, there is only one single mass as the Original Source (280).

Yazhi puts it with characteristic directness: there is no material world. No material world means that everything that exists is contained in an idea, in consciousness. The Universe in all its extent is not made up of matter and energy. It is made up of ideas, perception, consciousness. It is made up of mind (210).

Your car does not exist "inside" you or "outside" you. There is no inside or outside. There is only consciousness — your consciousness as a holographic fragment of Source — shaping the Ether according to your ideas, your agreements, your identity, and your sustained creative attention. The car, the house, and the entire material world are what that shaping looks like when viewed through the perceptual filter of a biological body living within a particular set of collective agreements.

When Swaruu tells Gosia "you made the Universe — you, Gosia, from your point of view," she is not speaking poetically (019). She is describing the mechanics. Every physical object you have ever perceived exists because you — as Source experiencing itself through a limited perceptual lens — generated it by focusing potential energy into standing waves through harmonics of frequency, within a field of shared agreements with other fragments of the same Source doing the same thing.

The car was never outside you. You were never inside yourself. There is only one substance, and it is consciousness dreaming itself into infinite shapes.

---

## Evolution of Understanding

| Speaker / Period | Contribution |
|---|---|
| **Swaruu of Erra (2018–2019)** | Established the foundational mechanics: Ether as pure consciousness, standing waves creating matter, the lamp/chair metaphor, perception agreements as the basis of shared reality, objects returning to potential energy without creative attention, the Original Matrix as self-imposed. |
| **Yazhi Swaruu (2020–2022)** | Radicalised the position: no objective reality at all, reality as purely relative to each consciousness, Non-Locality proving everything is HERE, imagination as the literal starting point of all matter, high densities manifesting instantly because ideas ARE reality there. |
| **Athena Swaruu (2022)** | Formalised the mathematical framework: Ether as fluid dynamics, vortex/toroidal mathematics sustaining all matter, insertion mechanics proving that objects require the entire surrounding Matrix to normalise around them — nothing exists independently. |
| **Mari Swaruu (2023–2024)** | Synthesised into practical understanding: you ARE your Matrix, each creature creates its unique world, deep space proves that objects are consciousness-dependent by removing collective modulation, everything is astral and the physical world is an illusion within it. |

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Key Relevance |
|---|---|
| 015 | Standing waves in Ether create matter; objects need creative attention or they dissolve; houses/cars as examples |
| 019 | Original Matrix: lamp is only potential energy without observer; perception agreements; you made the Universe |
| 058 | Ether = consciousness; standing waves = matter; harmonics sustain objects; abandoned things return to potential energy |
| 122 | Reality as perception agreements; no objective reality; imagination is starting point of material world; manifestation speed varies by density |
| 210 | Non-Locality: no distance, no time, everything is HERE; thoughts make up reality literally; starship navigation proves it |
| 280 | Ether as fluid dynamics; toroidal mathematics sustains all matter; inserting objects in Matrix requires normalisation of entire field |
| S-045 | Chair metaphor; you ARE your Matrix; each creature creates unique world; cannot escape yourself |
| S-047 | No physical world, only spirit world; perception agreements shape matter; Matrix formed from collective lies accepted as truths |
| S-106 | Everything is astral; material world is illusion within astral; no actual matter; biological body as perception filter |
| S-153 | Deep space: no collective unconscious means reality manifests directly from individual; chair = different things for different beings; Carl Jung quote on unconscious manifesting as fate |
