answers.title: How Long Before the Matrix Re-Asserts Itself After a Genuine Spiritual Experience?
answers.excerpt: The speakers never give a specific timeline because the question contains a misconception. The 3D Matrix does not re-assert itself after a spiritual experience as though it had been temporarily…
answers.content:
# How Long Before the Matrix Re-Asserts Itself After a Genuine Spiritual Experience?

## Short Answer

The speakers never give a specific timeline because the question contains a misconception. The 3D Matrix does not re-assert itself after a spiritual experience as though it had been temporarily switched off and then switched back on. It is always asserting. The Moon's frequency suppression system operates continuously, the collective unconscious exerts constant pressure toward the average, and lower astral entities actively target anyone whose frequency rises above the norm. A spiritual experience is a moment when a person's frequency spikes above the dominant frequency of the environment — but the environment never stops pulling. How long the elevated state lasts depends entirely on the individual: how deeply the experience altered their unconscious structures, how sustained their effort is afterward, and whether they understand that awakening is not a destination but a continuous process. Swaruu of Erra said it directly — you must live in the state of mind as if the change has already occurred, or it will not stick. Yazhi framed it as enlightenment being a way of living, not a place you reach. The Matrix re-asserts because it never stopped asserting; the real variable is whether the person's frequency holds or drops.

---

## The Full Picture

### The Dominant Frequency Principle: The Mechanism of Reassertion

The most technically precise explanation for why spiritual experiences fade comes from the dominant frequency principle, which is described across numerous transcripts. When a weaker frequency is immersed in a stronger one, the stronger one will force the weaker to become more of the same. On Earth, the average frequency of the collective unconscious — reinforced by Moon-based electromagnetic suppression, media, social conditioning, and the sheer weight of billions of consciousnesses operating at 3D levels — constitutes the dominant frequency.

A starseed or an awakened person who holds a higher frequency is, in Arien's words from Z-007, a conscious being immersed in a soup of frequencies that is always influencing them and their state of mind, at the same time as they influence it. When the negative part of that soup is much more present, the accumulation of negative energy pulls on the person, trying to eliminate what it perceives as a frequency that is not in accordance with its own. This is not malice in the conscious sense — it is a principle of physics, the same principle that governs how a ship's engines work or how the Moon suppresses natural 5D frequencies. The stronger frequency dominates.

Mari Swaruu described this in S-103 as the core starseed problem: by the dominant frequency principle, the starseed will be constantly forced to comply and become more of the average on Earth. Maintaining one's own frequency, which is the same as maintaining one's individuality, takes great effort. It is not something you do once and are done with. It is a continuous fight.

### DNA Reverts Without Mental Reinforcement

One of the most technically specific claims in the material comes from Yazhi in transcript 227, where she explained the 12,500-year-old plan for perceptual control. Genetic changes made to humans — whether in a laboratory or through natural activation — are inherently unstable without mental reinforcement. The DNA tends to revert to its original state unless the person's consciousness is held in the corresponding frequency. The Moon's frequency suppression system was designed precisely to maintain the mental state that prevents DNA from reverting to its natural, fully activated configuration.

This has direct implications for spiritual experiences. If a profound experience temporarily activates dormant DNA — as the speakers say happens when consciousness expands — that activation will not persist unless the person sustains the corresponding state of awareness. The moment the person falls back to their habitual frequency, the DNA begins reverting. The experience was real, the activation was real, but the structure is not self-sustaining without the consciousness to hold it in place.

### The Collective Unconscious as Constant Pressure

Za'el and Arien provided a particularly clear description in Z-011 of how the 3D Matrix affects even those who are not on Earth. Arien explained that it is not necessary to be orbiting or immersed in human society to be compatible with the Matrix's functioning — under the principle of non-locality, a trauma on Temmer can lower a person's frequency to Earth-like stages. The 3D Matrix radiates outward as a kind of smoky cloud of frequencies that affects everyone who is connected to Earth, even by thought alone.

For someone on Earth, this pressure is constant and comes from every direction: the media they consume, the people they interact with, the very infrastructure of the cities they live in (which are, according to Aneeka in transcript 006, over fifty percent Matrix-generated constructs). Every interaction with the collective unconscious tends to pull the individual back toward the average. Za'el described in Z-028 how dominant frequencies from negative people or environments drag a person gradually toward a reality that is increasingly hard and difficult, moving them away from what they want to manifest.

This means that a spiritual experience — a meditation retreat, a near-death experience, a psychedelic breakthrough, an encounter with higher consciousness — takes place against a background of unrelenting pressure. The moment the experience ends and the person re-enters their normal life, every element of that life begins exerting its pull. The question is not how long before the Matrix reasserts but how prepared the person is to resist the reassertion.

### Lower Astral Entities Actively Target Rising Frequency

The pressure is not only passive. Mari explained in S-103 that lower astral entities notice when someone's frequency rises above the average and actively work to bring it back down. These entities have little to no connection to Source and need to feed from the creative power of people with souls. A person in a high vibratory state is untouchable — useless to them — so they look for indirect methods.

The most common method is manipulating the people who surround the awakened person: family members, friends, and co-workers who can trigger emotional responses that lower frequency. There is almost always at least one person in the starseed's life who is constantly creating friction, and this is not coincidence but a function of the astral ecosystem. After a spiritual experience, when a person returns to their daily environment, these dynamics intensify precisely because the frequency gap between the person and their surroundings has widened.

### Enlightenment Is Not a Destination

Yazhi addressed the timing question most directly in transcript 388, though from an oblique angle. She stated that enlightenment is not a state you reach — it is a way of living and thinking. It is dynamic, evolving, never static. Consciousness is movement; if it stops, it ceases to exist. Understanding that you will never be enlightened is part of enlightenment itself.

This reframes the original question entirely. The person asking how long before the Matrix reasserts is imagining enlightenment or spiritual awakening as a threshold — you cross it and then you are on the other side. The speakers consistently deny this model. Swaruu said in transcript 074 that ascension is not something that happens to you — it is something you must be. One of the biggest lies of the New Age, she said, is that ascension is happening to you. You must roll up your sleeves and live in the desired state of mind as though it has already occurred. The phrase she used was blunt: fake it until you make it.

This means that a spiritual experience that does not translate into sustained daily practice will inevitably fade — not because the Matrix reasserted on a timer, but because the person stopped maintaining the frequency. The experience opened a door, but they must walk through it continuously.

### The Unconscious as the Real Battleground

Yazhi's most technical answer came in transcript 292, where she explained that the reason spiritual experiences do not automatically persist is that they typically operate at the conscious level while the unconscious remains unchanged. The unconscious — formed from the accumulated attachments, beliefs, and unresolved dynamics of countless past lives — is what actually governs a person's baseline frequency. A spiritual experience can temporarily override the unconscious, but unless it reaches deep enough to restructure those unconscious patterns, the person will revert to their baseline.

This is why, Yazhi said, simply knowing that the wall is only electromagnetic repulsion does not allow you to walk through it. The conscious mind may understand, but the unconscious still holds the agreement that walls are solid. Defeating the unconscious is, as she put it, the magnitude of the task. It requires letting go of limiting concepts of the Ego, integrating everything — the good, the bad, the beautiful, and the horrible — without attachment. It can be achieved in one incarnation if the person truly wants it, but for most people, the unconscious is simply too strong to be overridden by a single experience, however profound.

### Vulnerability and Immunity: The Two Phases

Mari's observation in S-189 introduced an important distinction between two phases of the awakening process. People at the beginning of their path are the most vulnerable. They can easily fall into Matrix-controlled mechanisms such as religions, New Age traps, and alternative ideologies that were placed there intentionally as snares for the newly awakened mind.

But people who have been on the path for a long time and already hold a great deal of awareness become almost immune to the tricks of the Matrix. Far from being pulled back, the Matrix's attempts to reassert itself only end up reassuring them that they are on the right path. At this stage, the Matrix's reassertion mechanisms — the social pressure, the media bombardment, the emotional manipulation from those around them — serve as confirmation rather than as disruption.

This suggests an informal answer to the timing question: for someone early in awakening, the reassertion can be nearly immediate. A powerful experience might hold for days or weeks before daily life erodes it. For someone deeply established in expanded awareness, the reassertion may barely register — they have restructured enough of their unconscious that the dominant frequency of the environment no longer has enough leverage to pull them back.

---

## Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on Matrix Reassertion |
|---------|--------|-------------------------------|
| **Swaruu of Erra (9)** | 2018–2019 | Ascension is not something that happens to you — you must be it. Fake it until you make it. Live in the desired state as if it has already occurred. DNA changes revert without mental reinforcement. The dominant frequency principle means weaker frequencies are pulled toward the average. Positronic galactic energies raise the baseline gradually but do not override individual effort. |
| **Aneeka** | 2018–2022 | Monitors Earth's frequency map 24/7 — the suppression system never stops. Only four of twelve lunar reactors functional, but enough to maintain the dominant low frequency. Cities are over fifty percent Matrix constructs, constantly reinforcing the 3D frequency environment. |
| **Yazhi Swaruu** | 2022–2023 | Enlightenment is not a destination but a process — dynamic, evolving, never static. The unconscious governs baseline frequency and is not changed by a single conscious experience. Defeating the unconscious is the magnitude of the task. Attachments to ideas form the real prison, and these persist below the level of awareness. The dominant frequency of Earth is the normalising pressure of the Matrix — to overcome it you must vibrate higher and stay strong. A genuinely enlightened person would be crushed or distorted by the controllers. |
| **Arien (Za'el channel)** | 2023 | You live immersed in a frequency soup that constantly influences your state of mind while you influence it. The law of dominant frequencies means negative accumulation pulls you down. Fear is the opposite of love and the greatest brake. Not necessary to be near Earth to be affected — non-locality means thought-connection is sufficient. Part of the 3D Matrix inevitably remains impregnated in you as a fingerprint. |
| **Za'el** | 2023 | Dominant frequencies from negative people or environments drag you toward harder reality. The same power that manifested those negative situations can dissolve them — the power is always yours. If negative people cannot get to you, the situation shifts naturally. The goal is maintaining happiness and high frequency regardless of circumstances. |
| **Mari Swaruu** | 2023–2024 | Dominant frequency principle forces starseeds to comply with Earth average — a constant fight. Lower astral entities actively target those with rising frequency, using surrounding people as weapons. Early awakening is the most vulnerable phase; established awareness becomes almost immune. You and your vibration are the average of the people you spend time with and the content you consume. The Matrix battle is for your mind. |

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Speaker(s) | Key Contribution |

| 074 | Swaruu (9) | "Fake it until you make it" — ascension is not something that happens to you, you must live in the desired state; positronic galactic waves raise Schumann resonance but do not replace individual effort; dominant frequency principle governs how higher frequencies affect lower ones |
| 056 | Swaruu (9), Aneeka | Three methods of Matrix generation including dominant frequency suppression from Moon; Schumann resonance as oscillatory index of 3D reality; the system operates continuously |
| 227 | Yazhi | DNA reverts without mental reinforcement — genetic changes are unstable unless consciousness maintains the corresponding frequency; the Moon's suppression system was designed to prevent this reversion from occurring naturally |
| 292 | Yazhi | Defeating the unconscious equals spiritual mastery; the unconscious governs baseline frequency; conscious understanding alone does not change the unconscious; attachments to ideas form the real prison; can be achieved in one incarnation but requires letting go of everything |
| 388 | Yazhi | Enlightenment is not a state you reach but a way of living — dynamic, evolving, never static; the dominant frequency on Earth normalises you toward the average; someone genuinely enlightened is a danger to the controllers and would be crushed or distorted |
| S-103 | Mari Swaruu | Dominant frequency principle forces starseeds to comply with Earth average — constant fight to maintain frequency/individuality; lower astral entities actively target rising frequency; use surrounding people as triggers for emotional lowering; starseed's vibration is average of people around them and content consumed |
| S-189 | Mari Swaruu | Early awakening is the most vulnerable stage — easy to fall into Matrix-controlled traps; established awareness becomes almost immune — Matrix tricks serve as confirmation; there is a battle for the mind between materialist and consciousness-based worldviews |
| Z-007 | Arien | Conscious beings immersed in frequency soup constantly influencing and being influenced; dominant frequency principle means negative accumulation pulls on higher-frequency individuals; fear is the greatest brake; frequency of Earth collective pushes starseeds to vibrate on the same line |
| Z-011 | Arien | Not necessary to be near Earth to be affected by 3D Matrix — non-locality principle means thought-connection is sufficient; trauma can lower frequency to Earth-like stages regardless of physical location; part of 3D Matrix remains impregnated as a fingerprint |
| Z-028 | Za'el, Arien | Dominant frequencies from negative people/environments drag you toward harder reality; same power that manifested them can dissolve them; Law of Mirrors — external situations reflect internal state; if negative situations cannot affect you, they shift naturally |

answers.filename: How long does it take to change the memory of water.md
answers.title: How long does it take to change the memory of water?
answers.excerpt: The Cosmic Agency speakers never directly addressed this question in terms of a specific timeframe, but the material they did share reframes the question itself. Within their framework, water is not…
answers.content:
# How long does it take to change the memory of water?

## Short Answer

The Cosmic Agency speakers never directly addressed this question in terms of a specific timeframe, but the material they did share reframes the question itself. Within their framework, water is not a passive substance that happens to store information — it is Ether at low density, the very medium through which consciousness creates reality. When they said water can be programmed, they were not describing a secondary property of water but its fundamental nature. Everything the material says about water's response to frequency input — from immediate cleansing effects during a shower, to DNA reproduction in hours, to continuous frequency suppression by nuclear plants — suggests that water responds to frequency change as fast as the frequency itself changes. The more precise question, from the speakers' perspective, would not be how long it takes to change water's memory, but how strong and sustained the frequency input is relative to what is already there.

---

## The Full Picture

### Water Is Not What Human Science Says It Is

Swaruu of Erra made the foundational claim that reframes this entire topic: water is Ether at low density. The Ether — the fundamental substrate of all existence — is a super-high-frequency vibrational potential energy field that obeys fluid dynamics. Normal water is this same substance at a lower frequency. It is not merely H2O, a molecule made of hydrogen and oxygen atoms. It is the closest thing to a universal diluent — the medium through which everything is dissolved, transmuted, and created. Observing water as just H2O, Swaruu stated, is a simplistic example of how human science breaks down something of incredible importance into seemingly worthless simple things (211).

This means water does not simply "have" memory in the way a hard drive has data. Water IS the medium of information. It carries frequency because carrying frequency is what it is. The Ether passes all information as a medium of potential energy, from a harmonic of coherent frequency that emanates from an intention of a consciousness — and normal water is simply Ether at low density, still participating in the same process (211).

Swaruu also stated that water has a very high frequency, very close to Source. Contact with water in its natural state — swimming, rain, waterfalls, the seashore — elevates frequency powerfully and immediately. This was not described as a gradual process requiring time to take effect, but as an inherent property of water's frequency interacting with the person's frequency on contact (013).

### Evidence for Rapid Response

Multiple speakers described water responding to frequency input in ways that imply rapid or immediate effect.

Mari Swaruu described how good-quality speakers make the entire body vibrate with music, and the frequencies travel through the body programming each cell and all the water in the individual's body to conform to the vibrational influence of the music. This programming occurs during the listening experience, not after a delay — the water in the body conforms to the frequency as it is received (S-133).

Mari also described running water as an extremely powerful frequency and vibration elevator, which she connected to why a person feels so good after taking a shower. The effect is experienced immediately upon contact. Water in its natural flowing state acts as a cleanser of lower frequencies including astral entities — Yazhi confirmed this, recommending baths, showers, swimming, and especially waterfalls as methods for removing parasitic entities (S-081, 204).

In a different context, when asked whether DNA could be transmitted through water by frequencies, Swaruu confirmed that scientists had reproduced DNA in water by sending coded frequency information to it, with copies appearing a few hours later. All the genetics that exist are produced this way, Swaruu stated — water is the medium and the harmonic of the frequency determines where matter will form (211).

### Evidence for Continuous Input Requirements

Athena Swaruu's description of nuclear power plants provides the other side of the picture. She described how radioactive materials permeate the water passing through the cooling system, lowering its frequency, and this low-frequency water then disperses through the environment and across Ley lines, lowering the existential frequency of the whole Earth. She stated plainly that water can be programmed, and that this principle is already known and exploited by those controlling Earth's frequency (258).

Critically, the nuclear plants operate continuously. They do not program the water once and walk away — they maintain constant frequency input. This suggests that while water responds to frequency input rapidly, maintaining a particular frequency state requires ongoing input, especially when that state is different from water's natural high-frequency baseline. The nuclear plants must continuously impose their low frequency because water's natural tendency is toward its high frequency close to Source (258, 013).

This has an important implication for the question. If water's default state is high frequency, then lowering its frequency requires sustained effort — the moment the frequency input stops, water would tend to return to its natural state. Conversely, raising water's frequency toward its natural baseline would encounter less resistance and might require less sustained input.

### The Question Reframed

Within this framework, asking how long it takes to change the memory of water is like asking how long it takes to change the shape of a stream by placing a rock in it. The answer is: immediately, for as long as the rock is there. The water reshapes itself around the new input as fast as the input is applied, and returns to its prior configuration when the input is removed — unless the change becomes self-sustaining through some other mechanism.

The speakers' consistent position is that frequency determines reality. Water, as Ether at low density, responds to frequency because that is its nature. The DNA experiment showed material manifestation in hours. Music programs the body's water during listening. Showers cleanse on contact. Nuclear plants must operate continuously to maintain their effect.

What the speakers did not address — and what the question implicitly asks — is whether water can be given a lasting frequency change that persists without ongoing input. The nuclear plant example suggests not, or at least not without sustained effort. The natural-water-as-cleanser examples suggest that water in its free-flowing state tends to return to its high-frequency baseline. But the flood example from the previous question introduces a complicating factor: if Earth's entire water supply was dramatically altered by a single catastrophic event 12,500 years ago, the question becomes whether the sheer volume and the ongoing conditions (the 3D Matrix, nuclear plants, electromagnetic suppression) constitute the sustained input that keeps that water in an altered state.

### What the Speakers Would Likely Say

Although no speaker addressed this timing question directly, the internal logic of their framework provides a probable answer: water responds to frequency change immediately, but the duration of the change depends on what maintains it. Water in its natural state has a high frequency close to Source. Any deviation from that baseline requires energy to sustain. The more the imposed frequency differs from water's natural state, the more sustained input is required to maintain the change.

This means the practical answer to the question depends on what is meant by "change the memory." If it means imposing a temporary frequency — as music does, or as a shower does — the change is immediate and lasts as long as the input lasts, plus whatever residual effect persists afterward. If it means a permanent alteration — changing the water's baseline frequency itself — the framework suggests this would require either continuous frequency input or a change so fundamental that it becomes self-sustaining.

The Cabal's approach, as described by the speakers, assumes the first model: continuous input through nuclear plants, electromagnetic systems, and the Moon's frequency suppression. They do not appear to believe they can change water's memory once and leave it changed. They must keep pushing.

---

## Evolution of Understanding

| Speaker / Period | Contribution |
|---|---|
| **Swaruu of Erra (2018–2020)** | Water is Ether at low density; universal diluent; carries frequency as fundamental property; DNA transmitted through water by frequency in hours; water has very high frequency close to Source; contact with water elevates frequency powerfully and immediately. |
| **Athena Swaruu (2022–2023)** | Water can be programmed — already known and exploited; nuclear plants continuously lower water frequency to terraform Earth; low-frequency properties permeate water and disperse across Ley lines; continuous operation required to maintain effect. |
| **Mari Swaruu (2024)** | Music programs all the water in the body during listening; frequencies travel through body conforming each cell to vibrational influence; running water as extremely powerful frequency elevator; immediate cleansing effect of showers and natural water contact. |

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Key Relevance |
|---|---|
| 211 | Water as Ether at low density; DNA transmitted through water by frequency (reproduced in hours); water as medium and universal diluent; Ether passes all information as potential energy; observing water as H2O is reductionist |
| 258 | Water can be programmed; nuclear plants lower water frequency continuously to terraform Earth; low-frequency properties permeate water through cooling system; sustained operation required; water becomes heavy water through exposure |
| 013 | Water has very high frequency close to Source; contact with water elevates frequency powerfully; swimming, rain, waterfalls recommended |
| S-133 | Music frequencies program each cell and all the water in the body during listening; body needs to vibrate with music for full benefit; water in body conforms to vibrational influence |
| S-081 | Running water as extremely powerful frequency elevator; showers cleanse astral entities; natural flowing water acts immediately; reason people feel good after showers |
| 204 | Water as spiritual cleanser; taking a bath removes lower-frequency entities; high-vibration music serves same function; cleansing methods work through frequency elevation |

answers.filename: How long will it take to undo the brainwashing.md
answers.title: How long will it take to undo the brainwashing that has been foisted upon humanity for thousands of years?
answers.excerpt: Swaruu of Erra stated that deprogramming depends on each person, and what works on one may not work on another. It is part of the spiritual path and as such it is individual. She described the…
answers.content:
# How long will it take to undo the brainwashing that has been foisted upon humanity for thousands of years?

**Short answer:** The material does not provide a specific timeframe for undoing the brainwashing. The consistent position across all speakers is that deprogramming is individual rather than collective, varies enormously from person to person, and cannot be given a fixed duration. However, the material does offer a framework: the brainwashing operates through mind control and perception management rather than irreversible genetic modification, which means it is fully reversible in principle through individual expansion of consciousness. The practical difficulty is that thousands of years of engineered programming — embedded in religion, science, media, education, and social structure — must be undone one person at a time.

---

## Individual Not Collective

Swaruu of Erra stated that deprogramming depends on each person, and what works on one may not work on another. It is part of the spiritual path and as such it is individual. She described the process in terms of shadow work — understanding how survival mechanisms from childhood create a duality in a person, where acceptable traits are exaggerated and unacceptable ones repressed, and this internal division must be consciously examined and resolved (040, Swaruu of Erra).

This framing implies there is no collective "switch" that can be flipped. The brainwashing was imposed collectively — through religion, through the 3D Matrix frequency suppression, through media, through education — but undoing it is an individual process of recognising and dismantling each layer of programming.

## Reversible Through Consciousness

The material's most important claim on this topic is that the limitations imposed on humanity are not genetic but perceptual. Swaruu stated in transcript 138 that human DNA is complete — twelve strands and twenty-four chromosomes — but it is only deactivated through mind control, not through laboratory genetic editing. The spiritual awakening of humanity will return the full DNA expression because it is already there, only suppressed by the manipulation of consciousness. The only thing that limits humans is the idea or belief that they are limited (138, Swaruu of Erra).

Mari Swaruu echoed this in transcript S-003, stating that the understanding of Taygeta and the Swaruunians is that any genetic alteration in Earth humans was done, at least mostly, through the use of mind control and perception control, and therefore it is reversible individually as a consequence of each person's expansion of consciousness (S-003, Mari Swaruu).

## The Scale of What Must Be Undone

Alenym addressed the depth of the programming indirectly in transcript 447, stating that the collective unconscious has been fed engineered information for thousands of years and that this is what creates the Matrix. She described reprogramming humans at an unconscious level and imbuing it with higher values as key to the process, and identified this as partly her group's contribution (447, Alenym of Temmer).

The material also describes the programming as operating on multiple simultaneous levels — from the 3D frequency suppression projected by the Moon, through institutional religion, through the scientific method that functions as a self-contained belief system, through media manipulation, through the educational system, and through social pressure. Each of these layers reinforces the others. This multi-layered architecture is why the material consistently warns against expecting a quick or uniform awakening process.

## No Timeline Given

Nowhere in the available material does any speaker provide a specific estimate — whether years, decades, or generations — for how long collective or individual deprogramming takes. The question was proposed by a community member in October 2024, but no transcript has addressed it with the specificity the question implies. The closest the material comes to a timeline is the recurring observation that consciousness is expanding, the Matrix is weakening, and things are moving at great speed from a cosmological perspective — even if from inside the Matrix the process appears painfully slow.

---

**Sources:** Transcript 040 (Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 138 (Swaruu of Erra), Transcript S-003 (Mari Swaruu), Transcript 447 (Alenym of Temmer)

**Speakers cited:** Swaruu of Erra, Mari Swaruu, Alenym of Temmer

answers.filename: I make decisions every moment so how could my life be ruled by destiny.md
answers.title: I make decisions every moment — so how could my life be ruled by destiny?
answers.excerpt: Both are true simultaneously, and the apparent contradiction dissolves only when you stop treating them as opposites. The speakers in the Cosmic Agency material addressed this question from multiple…
answers.content:
# I make decisions every moment — so how could my life be ruled by destiny?

## Short Answer

Both are true simultaneously, and the apparent contradiction dissolves only when you stop treating them as opposites. The speakers in the Cosmic Agency material addressed this question from multiple angles across years of transmissions, and their answer is consistent: from a limited point of view — the one you experience as a person making choices — free will is real and your decisions genuinely shape your life. From a more expanded point of view, everything is fixed, and what you experience as choice is the illusion created by not remembering what comes next. Both perspectives are valid at their level, and neither cancels the other. Yazhi Swaruu used the analogy of watching a movie: the first time you watch, the characters appear to have choices. The second time, you know the plot is fixed. The movie did not change — your awareness of it did. Mari Swaruu added the crucial practical dimension: the amount of free will any person has is not binary but graduated — it depends directly on their level of consciousness and awareness, and on how much they can identify and override the unconscious programming, circumstantial limitations, and telepathic field influences that constrain their choices without their knowledge (S-215). Za'el of Erra offered the resolution most directly: if it does not matter what you do now because in the end you will always be within what you planned, then what does it matter what you planned if you can live today what you decide? You are not ruled by destiny — you ARE your destiny, writing it in every moment, and simultaneously discovering that what you write was always what was going to be written.

---

## The Full Picture

### The Movie Analogy: Free Will as a Function of Awareness

Yazhi Swaruu's most sustained treatment of the free will question begins with a deceptively simple observation: you think you have a choice, but that is only because you are not aware of what is going to happen next. The analogy she returned to repeatedly was cinema. When you watch a movie for the first time, every character appears to have genuine choices — you do not know the plot, so every possibility seems open. When you watch it the second time, you see that nothing was ever going to go differently. The film did not change between viewings. Your perception of it changed (137).

This maps onto the relationship between limited and expanded awareness. A consciousness with limited perception sees multiple options ahead and experiences genuine uncertainty about outcomes. This experience is real — it is not fake or illusory in any dismissive sense. But a consciousness with more expanded awareness begins to see the connections between events that make outcomes inevitable. Every decision you made was the only decision you could have made, given the sum total of everything that preceded it — not just in your visible history, but across countless timelines interfering with and defining one another (137).

Yazhi was precise about the mechanism. She described all timelines — all possible sequences of events — converging into a single point like a black hole. That point is the conscious observer in the present moment. Everything from every variant of the past feeds into this singularity, and from it, every variant of the future radiates outward. From the point of view of that singularity — which is you — you have infinite choices ahead. From above, seeing all the timelines and how they interact, each choice was the only possible outcome of the combined influence of all the others (137).

### You Are Your Destiny — Not Subject to It

Swaruu of Erra made the critical distinction in her discussion of temporal manipulation: you do not HAVE a destiny. You ARE your destiny. It is not external to you. You generate it because you are it (072).

This is not a poetic restatement. It is a precise claim about the nature of frequency. Within the Cosmic Agency framework, every person is a standing wave in the Ether — a specific frequency. That frequency determines what you are compatible with, what events you attract, what experiences you will have. Swaruu demonstrated this with the story of a scientist repeatedly saved from being hit by vehicles — each time he was saved, a different vehicle would hit him days later, because the harmonic of his frequency remained the same. The creative energy dynamics that define a person persist regardless of external intervention (072).

This means destiny is not something imposed on you from outside. It is the natural expression of who you are — your frequency, your accumulated experiences, your level of awareness. Change yourself and your destiny changes, because they are the same thing. But from within the experience of being yourself, your choices feel free precisely because you are making them from the inside, from a perspective that cannot see the full picture of why those choices are the only ones available to you.

### Free Will as a Graduated Spectrum

Mari Swaruu addressed the free will question with a different emphasis than the earlier speakers, focusing not on the metaphysical resolution but on the practical reality of how much free will any given person actually exercises. Her central argument is that Earth's polarised thinking treats free will as all-or-nothing — either you have it or you do not — when the truth is that free will exists on a spectrum, and where you fall on that spectrum depends on your level of consciousness and awareness (S-215).

Mari identified several layers of limitation that reduce free will in practice. The first is circumstantial: your choices at any moment depend on the consequences of your previous decisions and on the resources available to you. A person who wakes up wanting to swim in the ocean but lives in Kansas City cannot do so without a series of prior steps. Free will is constrained by where you stand when you try to exercise it (S-215).

The second layer is deeper: the unconscious and subconscious mind. Mari described these as operating like an if-then-else algorithm — pre-programmed responses that fire automatically when triggered, often against the conscious will of the person. Traumatic experiences create especially strong automatic reactions that are extremely hard to override, and even ordinary socialisation installs countless minor programs that collectively exert enormous influence on behaviour. The person believes they are choosing freely, but much of their behaviour is running on automatic programming they are not aware of (S-215).

The third layer is the telepathic field. Mari drew on her earlier work describing how many of our thoughts and emotions are not ours at all — they are picked up from the shared telepathic field of people in similar vibrational states. If you are making decisions based on thoughts and emotions you did not generate but absorbed from others without realising it, your free will is compromised at its root. The more you can detect which thoughts are yours and which are picked up from the field, the more genuine free will you can exercise (S-215).

This framework does not contradict Yazhi's metaphysical resolution — it complements it from below. Yazhi showed that from the most expanded view, all choices are fixed. Mari showed that from the most limited view, even what appears to be free choice is often constrained by programming the person does not know they are running. True free will, Mari concluded, would only be achievable at the level of Source itself — operating outside of time, distance, and duality. For everyone else, the amount of free will available is directly proportional to the depth of self-knowledge and consciousness the person has attained (S-215).

### The Etheric Life Plan: Pre-Incarnation Design

Yazhi introduced a further layer by describing the process of pre-incarnation planning. Before entering a physical life, souls design their experience — establishing a basic frame of memory, intention, and circumstance that will shape the incarnation. This includes etheric memory implants — not machine-imposed, but self-generated through intention and frequency compatibility — that provide the scaffolding for the desired experience (112).

From this perspective, the question's framing shifts. Your life is not "ruled by" destiny in the sense that an external force imposes a path on you. Rather, you designed the general parameters of the experience before entering it, and the choices you make within it are the lived expression of that design. The design is flexible — Swaruu was clear that life scripts can be overridden by switching from "automatic life mode" to "manual mode" (004) — but the general trajectory was established by you, from a broader perspective, before the game began.

Mari Swaruu addressed this directly and with urgency, identifying the belief that life is entirely pre-planned as one of the two most self-destructive ideas held by starseeds. She traced the belief largely to Dolores Cannon's hypnotic regression work, which she described as valid but incomplete. People interpret Cannon's findings as though there is only one life plan per soul — a fixed script that defeats free will entirely. This interpretation, Mari argued, causes spiritual stagnation and a helpless victim mentality: if everything is predetermined, why fight for anything? (S-234).

Mari's resolution was precise: a soul does plan its incarnation, and from a timeless pre-incarnation perspective it can foresee what it will experience. But the plan is not a single timeline. There are an infinite number of timelines, each one a fixed sequence of events, and the soul can jump from one to another at any logical point through what she called quantum jumping — a sudden shift in mentality, frame, or vibrational state that makes the soul incompatible with its current timeline and compatible with a different, potentially much more positive one. The life plan is real AND free will is real, because the soul can shift between plans (S-234).

This creates the paradox the question identifies. From within the incarnation, you experience genuine decision-making. From the pre-incarnation perspective, the general shape of the experience was planned. Both are you. The decisions are real precisely because the plan included making real decisions — the plan does not dictate every detail but establishes the frequency range within which you will operate. And as Mari emphasised, treating the plan as an immovable cage is not merely intellectually wrong but practically dangerous — it kills the drive to change, to seize opportunities, to steer the rudder of your life in the desired direction (S-234).

### Za'el's Resolution: The Liberating Paradox

Za'el of Erra offered what may be the most practically useful resolution of the paradox. Using the example of a fortune teller who predicts you will eat a cake within three days, he traced the scenarios through which a person might resist or succumb to the prediction — and then delivered the key insight (Z-004).

Even if your decision to fight your so-called destiny was itself your destiny, this should not frustrate you. It means the opposite of what it appears to mean. If everything you do is ultimately within what was planned, then what does it matter what was planned? You are free to live today what you decide. Destiny is not a cage — it is the name you give, after the fact, to the sum total of what you freely chose.

Za'el's practical message was direct: if you are living a repetitive situation that seems inescapable, it is probably a problem of ideas — conscious or unconscious shadows — that cause you to live and relive the same pattern until you change its value, its meaning. You have all the strength and power needed because you are everything. Destiny is not fixed by an external authority; it is being written by you constantly in a constant present (Z-004).

### The Unified Timeline: Why Free Will and Determinism Coexist

The deepest layer of the answer came from Yazhi's description of how timelines relate to one another. From a limited perspective, there appear to be many separate timelines — many possible paths, many choices. But as awareness expands, formerly separate timelines merge into one because the observer can now see the connections between them. What appeared to be separate possibilities were always aspects of a single, unified reality (137).

This means free will and determinism are not competing theories about the same phenomenon. They are descriptions of the same reality at different levels of resolution. At low resolution — limited awareness — you see many choices and experience genuine freedom. At high resolution — expanded awareness — you see that all choices were aspects of one fixed whole. But the crucial point is that having infinite choices within a fixed whole is functionally equivalent to having free will. You cannot tell the difference from inside the experience, and the experience is all there is from your perspective.

Yazhi connected this directly to manifestation. When you manifest something — bring a possibility toward you through frequency match — this is valid from the limited perspective as a genuine creative act. From the expanded perspective, what you manifested was the logical consequence of everything that preceded it. But since you ARE the sum of everything that preceded it, your manifestation IS the universe expressing itself through you. You are not choosing between pre-set options. You are being yourself, and what follows from that is simultaneously free and inevitable (137).

### The Practical Takeaway

The speakers converged on a single practical conclusion across all these discussions: stop trying to resolve the paradox intellectually and instead live as if your choices matter — because from the level at which you are living, they do. The knowledge that everything may be fixed from above does not reduce your responsibility. If anything, it increases it, because it means you cannot blame external forces for your circumstances. Your destiny is not happening to you. You are generating it through who you are, what you know, and what you choose to attend to.

As Yazhi put it: manifestation is not creating something external. You ARE what you create. Change your awareness — know yourself more deeply, expose your shadows, understand why you react as you do — and your timeline changes automatically, not because you forced a different outcome, but because you became a different frequency. And from the expanded view, even that transformation was always going to happen. Which means you were always going to be free.

---

## Evolution of Understanding

| Speaker / Period | Contribution |
|---|---|
| **Swaruu of Erra (2018–2020)** | Established "you ARE your destiny" — frequency determines compatibility with events; harmonic persistence reasserts despite intervention; individual past-revision works but only for the one who does it; pre-incarnation scripts with option to switch to "manual mode." |
| **Yazhi Swaruu (2020–2022)** | Movie analogy for free will as function of awareness; all timelines converge into singularity point (the observer); from limited view infinite choices, from expanded view everything fixed; both valid simultaneously; manifestation is frequency match within fixed whole; etheric memory implants as pre-incarnation scaffolding. |
| **Za'el of Erra (2023)** | Cake analogy for destiny paradox; if fighting destiny IS destiny, then destiny is no constraint; repetitive situations indicate unconscious shadows not inescapable fate; you write destiny constantly in the present; practical empowerment through changing meaning and value of experiences. |
| **Mari Swaruu (2024)** | Free will as graduated spectrum depending on consciousness level; circumstantial, unconscious/subconscious, and telepathic field limitations on choice; true free will only at Source level; identified "life is pre-planned" as most self-destructive starseed belief; quantum jumping between fixed timelines as resolution — plan is real AND changeable; warned deterministic interpretation causes spiritual stagnation and victim mentality. |

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Key Relevance |
|---|---|
| 137 | Core free will treatment: movie analogy; timelines converge into singularity; from limited view free will exists, from expanded view everything fixed; both valid; manifestation as frequency match within fixed whole; identity across timelines |
| 072 | "You do not have a destiny, you ARE your destiny"; frequency determines event compatibility; harmonic persistence; scientist repeatedly run over despite interventions; timeline changes only serve the jumper |
| Z-004 | Cake analogy for destiny paradox; if escaping destiny IS destiny, then planning is irrelevant to present freedom; repetitive situations as shadow problems; destiny written constantly in present; practical empowerment message |
| 112 | Etheric memory implants: souls design experience scaffolding before incarnation; memories implanted through intention and frequency compatibility; rules of the game accepted by each soul; distinction between artificial and etheric simulation dissolves |
| S-215 | Free will as graduated spectrum: depends on consciousness and awareness level; circumstantial limitations (resources, location); unconscious/subconscious if-then-else programming; telepathic field influence (shared thoughts mistaken for own); true free will only at Source level; Earth's polarised all-or-nothing thinking on free will is itself the problem |
| S-234 | "Life is pre-planned" identified as most self-destructive starseed belief; Dolores Cannon's work valid but incomplete; quantum jumping between infinite fixed timelines; soul can shift plans through vibrational change; deterministic interpretation causes spiritual stagnation and victim mentality; for all practical purposes life is not preset |

answers.content:
# If 3D is a manifestation training arena (like practising with ankle weights), would it be ethical for the Federation to save us from our own bad manifestations?

## Short Answer

This question sits at the absolute centre of one of the longest-running debates in the Cosmic Agency material. The speakers never reached a single settled position on it — because the answer changes depending on which level of reality you are analysing from. The Federation's official position, presented most systematically in the Gori'el Report, treats Earth as a voluntary training ground: souls enter knowing the difficulty, and removing the difficulty would eliminate the purpose of entry, perpetuating dependence and stagnation rather than growth. From this view, saving humanity from its own manifestations is not ethical — it is counterproductive. But Swaruu of Erra, Yazhi, and Athena all challenged this position from different angles, arguing that the Federation uses the "school" framework as a convenient justification for what amounts to criminal neglect — or, in Swaruu's memorable image, handing a baby a box of matches because the baby found the dynamite on its own. The material does not resolve the tension. It holds both positions simultaneously, because from the speakers' perspective, both are true at different levels of perception.

---

## The Full Picture

### The Federation's Official Case: You Came Here Voluntarily

The most structured presentation of the Federation's argument appears in the Gori'el Report, which Mari Swaruu described as the Federation's formal justification for maintaining Earth's current conditions. The report advances three core arguments (S-233):

First, souls enter Earth voluntarily for consciousness expansion through resistance and challenge. The difficulty is the point. The 3D environment provides friction that accelerates spiritual growth in ways that comfortable higher-density existence cannot. Removing the friction would defeat the purpose of incarnation.

Second, Earth's current collective mentality — characterised by destructiveness, aggression, and a tendency toward domination — must be isolated from the broader galactic community. The 3D Matrix serves as a containment field. Allowing unprocessed human consciousness unrestricted access to interstellar society would export the problem rather than solve it.

Third, direct communication or open intervention would collapse the Matrix itself, eliminating the very training ground that souls entered to experience. If everyone knew the game was a game while playing it, the game would cease to function as a developmental tool.

Athena Swaruu reinforced this framework in her own terms: the Federation is not interested in solving Earth's problems because that is what Earth is for. It exists as a school — or, depending on your perspective, a prison — and the souls within it chose the experience for their own expansion (327). Many extraterrestrial races enter Earth specifically to test their courage, expertise, and inner strength, training there before returning home (A-045).

### The Ankle Weights Principle: Growth Through Resistance

The training-arena framing maps directly onto the question's ankle-weights metaphor. Swaruu of Erra established early in the transmissions that the 3D Matrix functions as a kind of resistance environment. Souls who can maintain their identity, remember who they are, and navigate through manipulation and deception while under the full weight of 3D limitation emerge with capacities they could not have developed in easier conditions (004).

The Federation's logic extends this principle: if you remove the ankle weights for the runner mid-training, you have not helped them — you have interrupted their development. The difficulty is not an accident or a malfunction. It is the curriculum.

Yazhi Swaruu pushed this further by observing that the Federation treats Earth like a video game where difficulty increases with each level, and where the players themselves requested the difficulty setting before entering. From the broader context of soul agreements made before incarnation, the suffering is not imposed — it is selected. Real people design their life scripts carefully and for personal reasons, setting clear limits to suffering before entry. Pain is pain while in 3D, but from the other side it is a wanted experience (004).

### The Fundamental Paradox: Victim and Creator Simultaneously

The sharpest articulation of the ethical knot came from Athena Swaruu in her discussions about human responsibility. She identified the core paradox directly: humanity is undoubtedly a victim — manipulated by intellectually superior races, deceived by institutions, poisoned by systems they did not consciously choose. But on the other hand, everything is created by them as individuals and as a collective (283).

This is not a contradiction within the Cosmic Agency framework — it is the defining feature of the 3D experience. Both statements are true at different levels simultaneously. At the 3D experiential level, humans are genuinely suffering under genuine oppression. At the metaphysical level, that oppression is a manifestation of the collective consciousness, and the souls experiencing it chose to enter precisely this environment.

Athena used the teaching metaphor directly: you can give someone a fish or teach them to fish. The Federation's position is that simply removing the oppression — giving the fish — perpetuates the victim mentality that is generating the problem in the first place. The Federation cannot free humans from oppression because they are the ones generating the oppression themselves. Liberating them without them understanding why they created it would simply restart the cycle (166, 283).

### Where the Speakers Break with the Federation

Despite laying out the Federation's logic clearly, the Taygetans — and especially Swaruu of Erra — did not simply accept it. Swaruu's critique was blistering. She compared the Federation's approach to letting a baby play with dynamite and a box of matches in the name of free will and learning from hardship. When the baby found the dynamite on its own, the Federation handed it the matches because the baby exercising its free will needed them. This, Swaruu declared, was going a lot too far (099).

Her objection was not that the training-arena principle is wrong in theory. It was that the Federation applies it without ethical limits, using the school framework to justify passivity in situations where the danger has escalated beyond anything the training metaphor can reasonably cover. The Prime Directive, she insisted, is a guideline and a philosophy, not an unbreakable law. It can and should be broken when the result brings a greater good for all (004).

Swaruu identified a specific institutional failure: the 5D Federation had placed non-emotional, non-Lyrian races as mentors of humanity — a new and highly emotional species. Logical races that do not experience emotion the way humans do were making decisions about an emotional civilisation's development, and their assessment of acceptable suffering was fundamentally miscalibrated. This was not wisdom; it was incompatibility disguised as policy (099).

Swaruu also pointed out that the training-arena argument contains a hidden assumption: that humans can, at this point, solve the problem on their own. Her assessment was blunt — at this point we are way too far off the cliff for humans to be able to solve this problem with no direct intervention. The ankle weights had become an anchor dragging the runner to the bottom of the ocean (099).

### The Higher Federation Perspective: Intervention as Free Will

Swaruu introduced a further level of complexity by describing the relationship between the 5D Federation and what she called the Higher Federation — consciousness operating from densities above 5D where physicality, separation, and linear time no longer apply.

From this higher perspective, the apparent conflict between intervention and free will dissolves. The higher Federation does not see intervention as a violation of human will because from higher planes it IS the free will of the Earth. At that level, both the desire for the experience and the desire for liberation are understood as expressions of the same expanding consciousness. The conflict between them is visible only from the lower planes where perception is fragmented (099).

The higher Federation acts not through ships and technology but through changes of perception in key people — what lower densities experience as epiphanies, realisations, downloads. It works through the 5D Federation the same way the 5D Federation works through its starseeds on Earth: by imposing not commands but consequences, making the lower level aware of the results of its own actions and omissions (099).

This creates a multi-level picture that no single ethical framework can contain. At the human level, suffering is real and help is desperately needed. At the 5D Federation level, the suffering is a chosen training experience and intervention would be counterproductive. At the higher Federation level, both perspectives are integrated, and intervention happens naturally as consciousness expands — not as an external rescue but as the collective itself evolving past its own limiting conditions.

### The Stagnation Problem: Why Rescue Creates Dependency

Even among the speakers who criticised the Federation, there was acknowledgement of a genuine danger in rescue. Swaruu herself identified it: if humans ever discovered that external forces had intervened to save them, they would start another round of adoration of non-humans and also enter a stagnation comfortable point where they could stay forever. Humans, she observed, tend towards stagnation a lot more than other races (099).

This is the deepest ethical problem with saving someone from their own manifestations. Within the Cosmic Agency framework, manifestation is not accidental — it is the continuous creative act of consciousness. If an external force removes the negative manifestation without the manifesting consciousness understanding what it created and why, nothing has changed at the causal level. The same consciousness will simply manifest the same conditions again, or worse, will now expect to be rescued and lose whatever capacity for self-determination it had developed.

Athena Swaruu framed this in terms of responsibility. The human tendency is to externalise both cause and solution — to identify oppressors and then demand that someone else remove them. But if everything is ultimately manifested by the collective consciousness, then the only real solution is a change in that consciousness. External intervention addresses the symptom while reinforcing the disease (283, 327).

### The Unresolved Tension

The Cosmic Agency material does not resolve this question. It holds the tension deliberately. The speakers' collective position could be summarised as: the Federation's training-arena justification contains a legitimate principle taken to an unethical extreme by beings who are not qualified to make the judgment calls they are making, but whose fundamental insight — that consciousness must free itself — cannot simply be dismissed because it is inconvenient.

Swaruu of Erra's final position was that covert intervention should happen — turning the dynamite into a candy stick without the baby ever knowing it was about to explode — combined with structural changes imposed through consciousness rather than technology, with humans never learning that anyone but themselves solved the problem. This preserves the growth mechanism while preventing catastrophic harm (099).

Whether this solution is itself ethical — manipulating reality without the knowledge or consent of those affected — is a question the speakers acknowledged but did not fully resolve. It is, as Gosia observed, multi-level chess. And the game is still being played.

---

## Evolution of Understanding

| Speaker / Period | Contribution |
|---|---|
| **Swaruu of Erra (2018–2020)** | Established Prime Directive as guideline not dogma; identified the baby-with-dynamite problem; argued humans are too far gone for self-rescue; proposed covert intervention as ethical middle path; described Higher Federation acting through consciousness changes; identified non-emotional races as unqualified mentors. |
| **Yazhi Swaruu (2020–2022)** | Contextualised suffering as chosen experience from soul level; described Earth as video game with escalating difficulty; argued that from higher planes intervention IS free will; emphasised that even the training-arena framing is ultimately an agreement, not an absolute. |
| **Athena Swaruu (2022–2023)** | Articulated the victim-and-creator paradox most directly; framed the teach-to-fish argument; identified human tendency to externalise cause and solution; stated Federation sees Earth's problems as Earth's purpose. |
| **Mari Swaruu (2023–2024)** | Presented Gori'el Report — the Federation's three formal arguments for non-intervention; described Earth as voluntary entry for consciousness expansion; framed containment and Matrix-collapse arguments. |

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Key Relevance |
|---|---|
| S-233 | Gori'el Report: Federation's three official arguments — voluntary entry, containment of destructive mentality, Matrix collapse if intervention is open |
| 004 | Prime Directive as guideline not dogma; souls incarnate for the experience; intervention justified at one level, counterproductive at deeper level; most suffering people are programs; real people design their scripts |
| 099 | Baby-with-dynamite analogy; Higher Federation acting through consciousness; covert intervention proposal; intervention IS free will from higher planes; humans too far gone for self-rescue |
| 166 | Federation cannot free humans because humans generate their own oppression; liberating them perpetuates victim mentality |
| 283 | Humanity simultaneously victim and creator; teach-to-fish vs give-fish; responsibility and externalisation |
| 327 | Earth important because of its souls; Federation not interested in solving Earth's problems because that is its purpose |
| 100 | Federation perpetuates 3D as training ground; every density including 5D is another cage; difficulty increases like video game levels |
| A-045 | Extraterrestrial races enter Earth to test courage and inner strength; Earth as training and return home |
