answers.title: If we create our own reality, why can't we manifest past the "dark background manager"?
answers.excerpt: Also covers: Why does the Law of Attraction seem to work against us? If reality is a mirror, why is it so dark? Why can't the Federation just free humanity? Why do negative things manifest faster…
answers.content:
## If we create our own reality, why can't we manifest past the "dark background manager"?

*Also covers: Why does the Law of Attraction seem to work against us? If reality is a mirror, why is it so dark? Why can't the Federation just free humanity? Why do negative things manifest faster than positive ones? What is the Collective Unconscious and how does it override individual manifestation?*

### Short Answer

According to the Taygetans, the paradox is real but misunderstood. You do create your own reality — but the mechanism works identically for what you want and what you fear, and fear is a far more efficient concentrator of creative attention than desire. Swaruu explained that the Law of Mirrors does not distinguish between "I want this" and "I don't want this" — it only registers where your attention is focused and delivers more of that. Since the entire Matrix system is designed to keep human attention locked on fear, scarcity, and limitation, the manifestation engine runs constantly — but it runs in the direction the controllers have pointed it.

Yazhi deepened this by identifying the Collective Unconscious as the real "dark background manager." It is not a separate entity or conspiracy — it is the sum total of all human perception agreements, operating below conscious awareness, manifesting the social structures, governments, and even the Federation that governs Earth. The Collective Unconscious creates the oppressors, sustains the control systems, and regenerates them even when individual components are removed. This is why the Federation cannot simply intervene: the problem is not being done to humans — it is being generated by humans through a creative mechanism they do not know they are operating.

Mari Swaruu brought the sharpest formulation: each person is their own Matrix. You cannot escape your Matrix because you are it. Wherever you go, you take your perception lens with you, and it rebuilds the same patterns. The only way through is not escape but evolution — changing who you are at the level of values, perception, and identity, which changes what your consciousness manifests.

### The Full Picture

#### Why Fear Manifests Faster Than Desire

The most common complaint about the Law of Attraction is that positive intentions seem weak while negative outcomes arrive effortlessly. Swaruu addressed this directly in multiple transcripts, and the explanation is mechanical, not mystical.

Fear concentrates attention. When a person is afraid of something, their entire creative focus narrows onto that object. The emotional intensity is high, the attention is sustained, and the frequency output is coherent — all factors that accelerate manifestation. Love and positive desire, by contrast, tend to be diffuse. People want many good things simultaneously, their attention scatters across multiple wishes, and the emotional charge — while genuine — lacks the laser-like concentration that fear produces.

Swaruu illustrated this in transcript 084 with the mechanics of egregor creation. Negative entities — what humans call Reptilians or archons — have no independent connection to Source. They are created and sustained entirely by human attention. They do not feed on fear per se; they feed on creative attention, and fear happens to be the most efficient concentrator of that attention. When humans stop fearing something and face it with acceptance or love, the egregor dissolves — not because love is a weapon, but because love disperses the concentrated attention that was sustaining the entity.

Swaruu tested this personally. While in orbit aboard a Taygetan ship — well outside the 3D Matrix — she watched frightening videos and subsequently experienced a negative visitation in her quarters. The entity had no independent existence; she had manifested it with her own focused attention, proving that the mechanism operates identically in 5D. The Matrix technology is not required for negative manifestation — only concentrated attention is.

In transcript 079, Swaruu extended this to collective dynamics. The unconscious mind rules most manifestation. People are largely unaware of what they are creating because their deepest fears, unresolved traumas, and inherited belief patterns operate below the threshold of awareness. The Law of Mirrors gives more of whatever has your attention — and since most human attention is unconsciously locked on survival fears, the mirror reflects threat, scarcity, and conflict. What you resist persists, because resistance is a form of intense focus on the thing resisted.

#### The Collective Unconscious: The Real Background Manager

Yazhi's most important contribution to this topic was identifying the Collective Unconscious — a term she explicitly borrowed from Carl Jung — as the mechanism through which individual manifestation aggregates into shared reality.

The Collective Unconscious is not a metaphor. It is the sum of all perception agreements held by a population, operating below conscious awareness, and it manifests the entire social structure of Earth — governments, economies, religions, media, and the power hierarchies that exploit the population. In transcript 165, Yazhi stated that the Federation itself, including its most regressive elements, is a direct creation of the human Collective Unconscious. The Saturn-based controllers are not an external force imposed on humanity — they are a mirror of humanity's own vices: bureaucracy, corruption, greed, and the delegation of personal power to authority figures.

This is the "dark background manager." It is not a hidden alien conspiracy or a malevolent AI. It is the aggregate creative output of billions of minds operating in victim mode, each one individually powerless-feeling, collectively manifesting the very systems that confirm their powerlessness. The vicious circle is self-reinforcing: people see only negative outcomes, which generates fear, which concentrates attention on more negative outcomes, which the Law of Mirrors faithfully delivers.

Yazhi was explicit that this is why individual positive manifestation feels so difficult. A single person attempting to manifest abundance or freedom is operating against the weight of the entire Collective Unconscious, which is manifesting scarcity and control. It is not that the individual's creative power is weak — it is that the collective field is overwhelmingly strong in the opposite direction. The individual must be, as Swaruu stated in transcript 080, "stronger than the dominant collective frequency" — and most people are not, because they do not even know the collective frequency exists.

#### Mind Control as Manifestation Control

Swaruu provided the clearest articulation of why the control system targets perception rather than bodies. In transcript 139, she stated the principle directly: if you control people's perception, you control what people manifest for themselves. This is the entire purpose of the Matrix control system — not physical imprisonment, but perceptual redirection.

The mechanism works through every channel simultaneously. The educational system eliminates creativity and trains obedience. Media floods attention with fear narratives. Religious frameworks install concepts of sin, unworthiness, and external salvation. Scientific materialism denies the existence of consciousness as a causal force. Economic structures enforce scarcity as the baseline assumption of existence. Each of these is a perception filter, and each one shapes what the population's creative consciousness will manifest.

Even genetic limitation operates through this channel. Swaruu explained that genes are not fixed hardware — they are standing waves maintained by consciousness. The body's DNA responds to the consciousness inhabiting it. If that consciousness believes it is limited, mortal, and separate from Source, the DNA configures accordingly. The "intellectually superior" race controlling the Matrix does not need laboratories to limit humanity genetically — it only needs to control what humans believe about themselves, and the biology follows.

This is why Swaruu described the controllers as manipulating humanity "from the most basic perception." The manipulation is not crude — it is architectural. It shapes the very framework within which humans interpret reality, ensuring that even their attempts to escape the system occur within parameters the system has defined. The New Age movement, with its passive waiting for ascension events, is itself an example: it redirects creative attention away from present action and toward future hope, which the Law of Mirrors cannot deliver because it only operates in the present.

#### Why Negative Entities Persist: The Egregor Mechanism

The question of why dark forces seem so powerful despite the claim that humans create their own reality finds its answer in the egregor concept. In transcript 084, Swaruu stated that regressives — Reptilians, archons, demons — have no independent connection to Source. They are tulpas: thought-forms sustained by collective human attention, given apparent independence by the sheer volume and consistency of that attention.

This is not a minor philosophical point. It means the "dark background manager" is not an external adversary — it is a mirror creation. The regressive entities that appear to control humanity are themselves products of human creative consciousness, sustained by fear-based attention, and incapable of existing without it. Swaruu described the Taygetan perspective bluntly: "We are fighting your shadows."

The mechanism also explains why these entities seem to grow stronger when resisted. Resistance is attention. Fighting against something is focusing on it. The more humanity organises against its oppressors — while remaining in a state of fear about those oppressors — the more creative energy it feeds into sustaining them. This is not an argument for passivity; it is an argument for changing the quality of attention from fear-based resistance to love-based creation.

Yazhi extended this in transcript 166 to the macro level. The entire structure of human civilisation — including its worst elements — is an egregor generated by the Collective Unconscious. The billionaires, the secret societies, the corrupt institutions: all are manifestations of the population's collective mentality. Narcissistic leaders rise to power because the social structure, built on scarcity and delegation of personal power, selects for narcissism. The system is self-consistent: it produces exactly what the collective consciousness is configured to produce.

#### Why the Federation Cannot Simply Intervene

One of the most contentious aspects of the Taygetan material is the claim that the Federation cannot — not will not, but structurally cannot — intervene to free humanity. Yazhi addressed this at length across transcripts 165 and 166, and her explanation connects directly to the manifestation paradox.

The Federation cannot intervene because the problem is not being done to humans — it is being generated by humans. If the Federation removed the control systems, the same Collective Unconscious that created those systems would regenerate them. Yazhi compared it to treating symptoms while the disease continues: "You can remove a person from the Matrix, but you cannot remove the Matrix from a person. They are the Matrix, they are the creators. And wherever they go, they take it with them."

The existential barrier is real: solutions from outside a reality-bubble cannot address problems generated from within it, because the inhabitants cannot process concepts from a more expanded framework. Yazhi used the analogy of trying to explain your worldview to sleeping relatives — you understand them, but they cannot understand you, because they lack the informational framework. Similarly, 5D solutions cannot be imposed on 3D consciousness. The consciousness must expand first, and that expansion can only happen from within.

This is also why starseeds are essential. They operate as bridges — having one foot in the 3D reality-bubble and one foot in 5D understanding. They are the only entry points through which expanded information can be filtered into the Collective Unconscious without being rejected by the system's immune response. Yazhi noted that the 3D Matrix treats non-compatible elements like a biological immune system treats pathogens — it attacks them. This is why awakened individuals and contactees face social hostility: the Collective Unconscious identifies them as threats to its coherence.

#### You Are the Matrix: The Personal Prison

Mari Swaruu delivered the most uncompromising statement of the paradox in S-045: "The reason why I said that no one can escape the Matrix is that each sentient creature is its own Matrix; therefore, it cannot escape itself."

This goes beyond the technological Matrix of the Van Allen belts or the social Matrix of media control. Each person's identity — their values, beliefs, interpretive frameworks, emotional patterns — constitutes a personal Matrix that filters everything they perceive and determines everything they manifest. A chair is furniture for a human, a bed for a cat, food for a termite, and a mountain for an ant. The same object, four entirely different realities, each one created by the perceiver's Matrix.

Yazhi made the same point in transcript 122: reality is perception agreements between consciousnesses. Authorities — whether governments, scientists, or religious leaders — determine what becomes "real" by establishing the dominant agreements. Higher densities are not different places but different levels of information processing: more data, fewer fixed agreements, faster manifestation. The "you can't" mentality is itself the primary brake on manifestation. What humans believe about their limitations is the limitation.

This is why the answer to the manifestation paradox is not a technique or a method. It is a fundamental shift in identity. As long as a person identifies with the limited self that the Matrix has trained them to be, their manifestation will operate within those limits. Not because the limits are real, but because the person's creative consciousness is faithfully manifesting what it believes to be true about itself.

#### The Way Through: Being the Event

Despite the apparent bleakness of the diagnosis, every speaker offered the same prescription — and it is not passive.

Swaruu stated it most directly in transcript 139: "The event widely publicised by social networks is you. You are the event. Do not expect that it will happen as something external to you, because there is nothing outside of you, no material world, there is only mind." Individual self-development is not a consolation prize — it is the only mechanism that works. Each person has 100% control over their own reality, because each person's reality is generated by their own consciousness. The success of human liberation does not depend on "others" — it depends on each individual changing their own frequency.

The practical implication is immediate action, not future hope. Swaruu told the subscriber asking how to "build the timeline" of ascension: "Fake it until you make it. You must live in that state of mind." Be the 5D person now. Adopt the values, the behaviour, the way of seeing reality that you want to manifest. The frequency shift is not something that happens to you — it is something you do, starting with whatever small detail you can change today.

Swaruu noted in transcript 084 that excitement concentrates attention just as effectively as fear — but positively. This is the counterweight: intense positive engagement, passion, creative absorption — these concentrate attention in the direction of what you want rather than what you fear. The key is not to fight the negative but to become so absorbed in the positive that the negative loses its hold on your attention.

Yazhi's contribution was the social dimension: awakened individuals must unite, not fight each other. The Collective Unconscious can only be shifted from within, by people who understand its mechanics, approaching the "sleeping" population with empathy rather than aggression. The starseeds are not here to defeat the system through confrontation — they are here to demonstrate, through their own frequency, that another way of being is possible. That demonstration, replicated across enough individuals, is what eventually shifts the collective field.

### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on the manifestation paradox |
|---------|--------|---------------------------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2018–2020 | Law of Mirrors delivers whatever has your attention — fear concentrates, positive disperses. Regressives are human-created egregors with no independent Source connection. Mind control targets perception to control manifestation. Genes respond to consciousness, not the reverse. "The event is YOU." Individual self-development is the only real solution. No objective external world exists — everything is mind. |
| **Yazhi** | 2020–2022 | Collective Unconscious is the real "dark background manager" — sum of all perception agreements, creating governments, Federation, and oppressors as mirrors. Federation cannot intervene because the problem is generated from within the human reality-bubble. Solutions from outside cannot address problems from inside. Starseeds are the only bridge. "Broken Shoes" are simultaneously the creators of the problem and the only ones who can solve it. Both perspectives — Federation as external controller and Federation as human creation — are simultaneously true. |
| **Mari Swaruu** | 2023–2024 | Each person IS their own Matrix — cannot escape yourself. Personal Matrix is the sum of your values, identity, and perception lens. You take it wherever you go. Evolution, not escape, is the answer. Work on building your soul and the perceived external world changes accordingly. Federation cannot release humans because they would export their Matrix patterns to wherever they went. |

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 037 | Do ETs Exist If We Don't Believe? | Law of Attraction paradox — Matrix senses attention focus regardless of want/don't-want. No objective world exists. Each consciousness is its own universe/timeline. Two contradictory things can both be true (5D thinking) |
| 079 | Fears, Viruses, Global Situation | Fear concentrates manifestation power toward feared object. Fear = ego protection, opposite of love. What you resist persists. Unconscious rules most manifestation. Love is strongest desire but fear concentrates MORE than dispersed positive desires |
| 080 | Focus: Now or Never | Timeline severely fractured. Must be stronger than dominant collective frequency. Paranormal accelerated. Multiple possible near-term outcomes, none involving peaceful collective ascension |
| 084 | Reptilian Mind — Human Egregors | Regressives have NO Source connection — created by human fear/attention. Feed on creative attention (fear concentrates it). Egregors dissolve when faced with love/acceptance. "We are fighting your shadows." Excitement concentrates attention positively. Swaruu's ship experiment proves mechanism works in 5D |
| 122 | Nature of Reality — Yazhi | Reality = perception agreements. Authorities decide what becomes "reality." Higher density = more data processing, easier manifestation. "You can't" mentality is the primary brake. Government reflects worst qualities of population. Everyone has right and obligation to create own reality |
| 139 | Manipulations of Human Perception | If you control perception, you control manifestation — basis of all Matrix mind control. Genes respond to consciousness, not labs. Humans limited only by notion of being limited. "The event is YOU." Individual self-development has 100% control over personal reality. Educational system designed to eliminate creativity |
| 143 | If Everything Is Souls' Plan | Mass exit as collective departure mechanism. Multiple levels of ethics simultaneously valid — soul level, human level, starseed level. Fight from within regardless of higher-plane perspective |
| 165 | Federation and Human Collective Unconscious | "Broken Shoes" are the creators/controllers through Collective Unconscious. Federation is a mirror creation of human vices. Can only be accessed from Earth, not from 5D. "You cannot remove the Matrix from a person." Reality-bubbles require internal solutions. Starseeds as bridge/portal |
| 166 | Federation and Earth Problems | Federation cannot free humans because they ARE generating the problem. Victim mentality perpetuated by external salvation. Problems from 3D can only be solved from 3D. Lunar frequencies irrelevant — mentality keeps 3D as 3D. Narcissism and power delegation create the pyramid. Suffering drives awakening |
| S-045 | Why No One Can Escape the Matrix Pt 2 | Each sentient creature IS its own Matrix — cannot escape yourself. Personal Matrix = sum of values, identity, perception lens. Taken wherever you go. Evolution not escape is the answer. Work on soul, world changes accordingly. Starseeds as guides, not saviours |
| S-174 | How to Manifest Your Reality | Practical manifestation principles. Attention, emotion, and belief as the three components. Manifestation operates in present tense only — cannot manifest future. Being state vs wanting state |

answers.filename: If Yazhi says we have free will in one video and dont in another which is it.md
answers.title: If Yazhi says we have free will in one video and don't in another, which is it?
answers.excerpt: Also covers: Do we have free will or is everything predetermined? Is the universe static and fixed? How can we be creators if everything is already decided? Does manifestation still work if there's…
answers.content:
## If Yazhi says we have free will in one video and don't in another, which is it?

*Also covers: Do we have free will or is everything predetermined? Is the universe static and fixed? How can we be creators if everything is already decided? Does manifestation still work if there's no free will? What is destiny — is it written or created? If the higher self designed everything, what's the point of living it? How does time travel prove there's no free will?*

### Short Answer

According to the Taygetans, the apparent contradiction is not a contradiction — it is the same reality described from two different levels of awareness, and both descriptions are simultaneously correct.

Yazhi stated the paradox directly in transcript 137: from a limited point of view, you have unlimited choices and complete free will. From a more expanded point of view, everything is completely static and fixed, and you could only ever have done exactly what you did. Both are true because what changes between the two statements is not the reality being described but the awareness of the observer describing it. A person watching a movie for the first time perceives the characters as having free will — all possibilities seem open. A person watching the same movie a second time sees that everything is already set in place. The movie did not change; the viewer's awareness did.

Mari Swaruu provided the most systematic treatment in transcript S-215, concluding that the amount of free will any being has directly depends on its level of consciousness and awareness. At the first level, free will obviously exists — you can choose to go left or right. At deeper levels, unconscious programming, telepathic field interference, circumstantial limitations, and the soul's pre-incarnation life plan all progressively constrain what appears to be choice. At the most expanded level, everything that has ever existed, exists, and will exist is already there as timeless manifestation, and consciousness simply animates fixed snapshots by becoming a vibrational match to them. True absolute free will, Mari said, would only be achievable at the level of Source itself.

The resolution is that free will and determinism are not opposites but descriptions of the same phenomenon from different positions on the awareness spectrum. The more you understand, the more you see that what felt like a choice was actually the only possible outcome given everything that preceded it. But from within the experience, the choice is real, the consequences are real, and the expansion of consciousness that results from making choices is the entire point.

### The Full Picture

#### Everything Is Fixed — and You Have Unlimited Choices

Yazhi laid the foundation for the entire free will discussion in transcript 137 with a statement that appears paradoxical on its face: everything is completely static and fixed, but from a limited perspective you have unlimited choices. Both are true simultaneously.

Her explanation rests on the nature of awareness. When your awareness is limited — as it necessarily is for any incarnated being, any fragment of Source — you see only a small portion of reality. Within that small portion, choices appear genuinely open. You come to a fork in the road and you can go left or right. You perceive this as free will because you cannot see the totality of factors that will determine your choice. But as your awareness expands, you begin to see the connections between all the events leading to that moment, and you realise that given everything that preceded it — every experience, every pattern, every frequency you hold — you could only have gone the way you went.

Yazhi used the elephant analogy: you are in a dark room with a small flashlight, examining what you think are separate objects. You see differences between the parts and think you are looking at distinct things. But it is all one elephant, and you cannot change that. Your awareness determines whether you perceive separate parts with apparent choices between them, or one unified whole where everything is exactly as it must be.

The movie analogy made this concrete. When you watch a film for the first time, you do not know what will happen next. Every character appears to have genuine choices. From your perspective as a first-time viewer, there is free will in the film. But watch the same film a second time: now you know the plot, the characters' decisions, the ending. Nothing changed in the film — what changed is your awareness. The film was always fixed. Your perception of free will in it was a product of your ignorance of what came next.

This is exactly how Yazhi sees incarnated life. The "movie" of reality is already complete — all possibilities, all timelines, all events exist simultaneously outside of time. Consciousness animates this pre-existing totality by moving through it, experiencing one frame after another, and the illusion of free will arises because consciousness does not remember what comes next. The forgetting is not a flaw — it is the mechanism that makes the experience possible. Without it, you would be Source, and there would be no experience to have.

#### Time Travel as Proof

Yazhi offered time travel as empirical evidence for the fixed nature of reality, drawing on her own experience across multiple incarnations in the Swaruu lineage.

The example she gave is deliberately simple: you want to prevent a scientist from being hit by a bus, because that event triggers a cascade of negative consequences. You travel to three minutes before the event and stop the scientist to ask for directions, delaying him. But the delay is precisely what causes him to be in the wrong place at the wrong time — your intervention is what causes the event you were trying to prevent. You try again with a more elaborate plan, and again your actions create the very conditions for the outcome you wanted to avoid. Each attempt produces more spirals, all converging on the same result.

This is not a thought experiment for Yazhi — it reflects direct experience. In transcript 072, Swaruu described the same principle after thousands of years of timeline navigation: what happened cannot be reversed, because the act of attempting to reverse it is already part of what made it happen. Destiny, Swaruu stated, is not something imposed from outside — it is frequency. You do not have a destiny; you are your own destiny. The events you experience are the direct expression of who you are at the frequency level, and changing them requires changing yourself, not the events.

From the most expanded perspective, this makes sense: if all events in all timelines exist simultaneously, then going to the "past" to alter an event merely shifts the traveller's perception to a different timeline where the event unfolded differently — but the original timeline, with the original event, still exists unchanged. Nothing was altered; the traveller simply moved their point of attention.

#### Timelines Are Not Separate — They Converge

Yazhi's most complex contribution in transcript 137 was her model of how timelines relate to consciousness.

The popular understanding treats timelines as parallel tracks — separate sequences of events that a consciousness can jump between. Yazhi rejected this as a crude simplification. In her model, what people call timelines are not separate at all. All events in all perceived timelines interfere with and create one another. A battle that had one outcome in one timeline and a different outcome in another — both affect the present moment with equal intensity.

She described consciousness as a singularity point — like a black hole into which all past timelines converge and from which all future possibilities emerge. The singularity is the observer's present moment. Every event, from every perceived timeline, funnels into this point, and every possible future radiates out from it. From a limited perspective, this looks like billions of separate timelines with free choice between them. From an expanded perspective, it is one unified field where every event determines every other event.

The critical insight: as your awareness grows, you begin to perceive formerly separate timelines as one. What were mysteries become explained. What seemed like coincidences reveal their causal connections. This process of unifying timelines is, Yazhi said, functionally identical to building your soul — because a soul is defined by how much of reality it can perceive and integrate. The more timelines you can hold in your awareness as one, the higher your density of existence.

This means that free will and determinism describe the same landscape at different zoom levels. Zoom in and you see diverging paths with open choices. Zoom out and the paths converge into a single inevitable trajectory. Neither view is wrong; they simply correspond to different capacities of awareness.

#### The Higher Self Designed It — So Why Live It?

Yazhi addressed this question directly in transcript 112, where she described how the higher self designs incarnation experiences from a timeless perspective, including the implantation of memories and life circumstances.

From the higher self's perspective, the incarnation is a complete design — every possibility has been considered, every potential choice mapped. The higher self can handle this level of complexity because, from its position outside time, all possibilities exist simultaneously and can be arranged like a novel. In Yazhi's words: from higher realms it is all set and done, destiny written. From the lower realm you make things up as you go. So you have no free will and you do at the same time.

The resolution lies in the purpose of incarnation. The higher self is not watching its avatar suffer for entertainment. The experience of apparent free will — of making choices without knowing the outcome — is itself the point. It generates something that cannot be generated from above: the friction of uncertainty, the expansion through contrast, the development of preferences and values through navigating limitation. A memory implanted from above and an experience lived from below are, from the higher self's perspective, equivalent — both produce the same soul-building result. But the experience of living it is unique to the incarnated perspective.

Yazhi was explicit about what this means for the question of waking up: knowing that the game is designed does not invalidate the game. From a conservative perspective, knowing the design is an invasion — things should remain as they are. But from an expanded perspective, the realisation that you are both the designer and the player is itself part of the design. The higher self anticipated this possibility among all the others.

When Gosia asked whether anything is real, Yazhi's answer was characteristically layered: from Gosia's perspective as a human, everything she has lived is real. From another perspective, some things are real and others are implants. From yet another, nothing is real. Three levels, simultaneously valid, with the choice of which level to operate from being itself an expression of the being's current awareness.

#### Mari's Systematic Framework: Free Will as a Spectrum

Mari Swaruu provided the most structured treatment of the question in transcript S-215, approaching it as a spectrum rather than a binary.

She identified multiple levels at which free will is progressively constrained:

At the first level, empirical free will obviously exists. People can choose to go left or right, to buy one thing rather than another. This is undeniable from direct observation.

At the second level, circumstantial limitations constrain choices. A person in Kansas City who wants to swim in the ocean must first take a series of steps to get there — unless they are a billionaire with a private jet. Free will depends on resources, position, and prior decisions.

At the third level, unconscious and subconscious programming dictates behaviour through automatic if-then-else responses. Traumatic experiences create particularly strong programs that override conscious intention — as post-traumatic stress syndrome illustrates. These programmed responses fire automatically, even against the person's conscious will, heavily reducing their effective free will.

At the fourth level, telepathic field interference means that many of our thoughts and emotions are not even ours. We pick them up from the shared field of like-minded souls, and emotionally charged shared data causes decisions that feel personal but are actually collective. The strongest telepathic influence comes from alternate versions of ourselves in parallel realities — the versions closest to us vibrationally.

At the fifth level, the soul's pre-incarnation plan creates a fundamental tension: the non-incarnated soul, operating from timelessness and able to foresee the incarnation's events, deliberately chose difficult experiences for growth. The incarnated self, experiencing these difficulties in linear time, does not want them. The soul becomes, in Mari's striking phrase, a victim of itself while in a biological body.

Her conclusion: the amount of free will directly depends on the consciousness awareness level of each soul and how congruent it can be with its own frame, ethics, and values. True and absolute free will would only be achievable at the level of Source, operating outside of time, space, and duality. There is no universal answer to whether free will exists — it is different for each subject.

#### Manifestation Within a Fixed Reality

If everything is fixed, does manifestation still work? Yazhi addressed this directly: manifestation is bringing one possibility towards you using frequency match. This is valid from a lower point of view. From a more expanded one, whatever you manifested would only be the logical consequence of all that preceded it.

This means manifestation and determinism are not in conflict. From within the experience, adjusting your frequency and attracting different outcomes is real and effective. From above, this adjustment was always going to happen as part of the fixed totality. The practical advice — raise your frequency, be conscious of your thoughts, expand your awareness — remains valid regardless of which level you are viewing from. The expansion of consciousness that comes from this practice is, from every perspective, the entire purpose.

Swaruu captured this in transcript 072 with the statement that destiny is frequency: you do not have a destiny imposed on you — you ARE your destiny. Change what you are and you change what you experience. From below this looks like free will. From above it looks like inevitability. Both are correct because they are the same thing observed from different positions.

### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on Free Will |
|---------|--------|----------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2018–2020 | Destiny = frequency. "You don't have a destiny, you ARE your own destiny." What happened cannot be reversed through time travel — original timelines still exist. Timeline jumps only alter the traveller's perception. People are not limited artificially, only by their own beliefs. Consciousness controls reality from within. |
| **Yazhi** | 2020–2022 | Everything is completely static and fixed — free will is an illusion from expanded perspective. But from limited perspective, unlimited choices exist. Movie analogy: first viewing = perceived free will, second viewing = no free will. Timelines converge into singularity point (consciousness). All events in all timelines interfere with each other. Time travel proves events are fixed — interventions cause the events they try to prevent. Manifestation = bringing one possibility toward you via frequency match — valid from lower view, logical consequence from expanded view. Higher self designs everything from timelessness; incarnated self makes choices from within — both simultaneously true. Nothing is real from above; everything is real from within the experience. |
| **Mari Swaruu** | 2023–2024 | Free will is a spectrum, not a binary — amount depends on consciousness level of each soul. Multiple constraining layers: circumstantial limitations, unconscious programming (if-then-else responses), telepathic field interference (thoughts not ours), pre-incarnation soul plan (soul becomes victim of itself). Alternate selves are strongest telepathic influence. Absolute free will only at Source level. No universal answer — different for each subject. Everything always exists as timeless manifestation; consciousness animates fixed snapshots by vibrational match. |

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 072 | Time Travel: Temporal Manipulation | Destiny = frequency — "you don't have a destiny, you ARE your own destiny." Timeline jumps only benefit the one who jumps. What happened cannot be reversed. Empirically verified across thousands of years and twelve incarnations. Time is personal perception, not external linear sequence. Events are fixed from expanded view |
| 112 | Etheric Memory Implants, Life Plan, Free Will | Earth as simulation (experience real, everything else simulation). Higher self designs life plan from timelessness — implants memories and circumstances. From higher realms: all set and done, destiny written. From lower realm: make things up as you go — free will and no free will simultaneously. Implanted memory and lived experience equivalent for the experiencer. Three levels of reality simultaneously valid (real / mixture / nothing real). "Nothing is real — it's all a manifestation of your mind" |
| 137 | Is There Really Free Will? And How Many Timelines? | Everything completely static and fixed — free will as illusion from expanded perspective. Elephant in the dark analogy — limited flashlight shows parts but it's one elephant. Movie analogy (first viewing = free will, second = none). All timelines converge into singularity point. Consciousness as black hole — all pasts converge, all futures emerge. No separate timelines from above — only one. Growing awareness splices formerly separate timelines into one = building soul. Manifestation valid from lower view, logical consequence from expanded. Time travel to alter past causes the events it tries to prevent. Source fragmented into souls by not remembering — ignorance spawns illusion of free will |
| S-215 | Free Will | Free will as spectrum not binary. Five constraining layers: empirical choice, circumstantial limitation, unconscious programming (if-then-else), telepathic field interference, pre-incarnation soul plan. Alternate selves strongest telepathic influence. Soul becomes victim of itself while incarnated. Absolute free will only at Source level. No universal answer — depends on consciousness of each soul. Everything always exists — consciousness animates fixed snapshots by vibrational match |

answers.title: Is the Mandela Effect a glitch in the failing 3D Matrix?
answers.excerpt: Also covers: Is the Mandela Effect caused by time travel? Are timelines merging? Why do some people remember things differently? Can objects be moved around inside the Matrix? What causes reality…
answers.content:
## Is the Mandela Effect a glitch in the failing 3D Matrix?

*Also covers: Is the Mandela Effect caused by time travel? Are timelines merging? Why do some people remember things differently? Can objects be moved around inside the Matrix? What causes reality glitches? Does the collective unconscious alter physical reality? If the Matrix is weakening, would reality become less stable?*

### Short Answer

According to the Taygetans, the Mandela Effect is real — but the popular explanations for it are largely wrong. Swaruu stated in transcript 006 that it is not timelines changing but physical objects and events that are moved or modified within the 3D Matrix, causing discrepancies in people's perception. She reinforced this in transcript 072 by explicitly rejecting the time-travel explanation: timeline jumps only alter the perception of the person who jumps and cannot produce effects observable to others, making the idea that time travel causes collective Mandela Effects false.

Yazhi offered the deepest explanation in transcript 432, connecting the Mandela Effect to the dynamics of the collective unconscious. The collective unconscious generates the Matrix — it is the sum and average of the frequencies of all the souls within it. When the collective unconscious shifts, the Matrix shifts with it. People who held a different frequency before the shift retain memories that no longer match the current state of the field. What they are remembering is not a mistake — it is the version of reality that corresponded to their personal frequency before the collective average changed. Two realities, two timelines, converge in the minds of those who remember differently, and this is a function of frequency and vibration, not of technology or glitches.

### The Full Picture

#### Matrix Insertions: Objects and Events Can Be Physically Moved

The most concrete explanation came from Swaruu and Aneeka's early descriptions of how the 3D Matrix operates. In transcript 006, Swaruu stated directly that the Mandela Effect is "not timelines that are changing, it's things, physical objects that move around causing a change in the people's perception. But they do remember sometimes that things were different."

Aneeka demonstrated the mechanism in the same transcript. From the Taygetan ship, she monitored Earth's frequency map — a holographic display of the planet's energy values — and could actively modify frequencies and insert objects or events. She described inserting small disruptions: an electrical fault in an elevator to delay someone by a minute, a nail in a tyre to stop a car. These are real modifications to the energetic-mathematical fabric of reality, made with a controlled gravity beam from a ship in orbit.

Athena expanded the technical basis for this in transcript 279. She explained that the material world is not solid matter but an energetic-mathematical field in which everything — objects, events, situations — is represented as frequencies in standing-wave patterns. A spacecraft's computer can read this field, predict its progression, and impose changes by altering energy values at specific coordinates. An object is a set of frequencies in standing-wave mode; a situation is a mathematical progression of interacting energy values. Changing either is a matter of altering the energetic equations at the target point.

From this perspective, the Mandela Effect is not a glitch — it is the observable residue of modifications made to the energetic field. When an object or situation is altered within the Matrix, most people's perception updates to match the new state. But some people retain the memory of the previous state because their personal frequency was not fully synchronised with the change. They remember differently not because their memory is faulty but because they were resonating with a version of the field that no longer exists in the collective average.

#### Why the Time Travel Explanation Is Wrong

One of the most popular alternative explanations for the Mandela Effect is that time travellers altered the past, creating discrepancies that people notice as changed memories. Swaruu dismantled this comprehensively in transcript 072.

Her argument rests on the fundamental nature of time travel as the Taygetans understand it. Time is not an external, linear sequence shared by everyone — it is a product of individual consciousness. Each person's experience of temporal progression is personal, determined by their frequency. When a time traveller jumps to a past nexus point and alters an event, they create a new experiential branch — but only for themselves. The original timeline from which they departed still exists, unchanged and unaffected. The traveller, upon returning, finds themselves in the new branch and perceives the altered future. But the people they left behind, in the original branch, perceive no change whatsoever.

Swaruu was emphatic: sending someone from a negative timeline to correct a past decision makes no sense as a collective solution. The only beneficiary is the person who makes the jump, because only their perception shifts. From the perspective of everyone else in the original timeline, nothing happened. She confirmed this empirically — after thousands of years of timeline navigation across twelve incarnations, she returned to starting points after making changes and found that no changes were observable from the original departure position.

This means the Mandela Effect cannot be caused by time travel in the way popular theories suggest. A time traveller's alteration does not ripple outward to affect the collective. It only affects the traveller's personal experiential branch. If someone went back in time and changed the spelling of a brand name, only they would perceive the change — the rest of the population would continue in their unchanged branch, noticing nothing. The Mandela Effect, which by definition involves groups of people noticing the same discrepancy, requires a different mechanism.

Swaruu stated this directly: "Time travel to alter the future and that is reflected in 'Mandela Effects' as many say, is false. What they say is only a reflection of their perception of time as linear. As a single collective mass."

#### The Collective Unconscious: The Deeper Mechanism

Yazhi provided the most expanded explanation in transcript 432, connecting the Mandela Effect to the dynamics of the collective unconscious and the way memory itself functions.

Her starting point was that memory is not stored inside the brain — it is in the field. The energetic field that constitutes reality is also the repository of all experience, all events, all information. What people call memory is actually a frequency-matching process: the mind tunes into the field at a specific vibratory address and retrieves the information stored there. This is functionally identical to the Akashic Records, where frequency and vibration determine what any given person can access.

When the collective unconscious shifts — when the sum and average of the frequencies of the souls generating the Matrix changes — the field itself changes. And when the field changes, the memories stored in it change with it. Most people's internal tuning updates automatically to match the new field state, so they perceive the current version of reality as the only one that ever existed. But people who hold a different frequency — those whose personal vibration was not swept along by the collective shift — retain access to the previous version of the field. They remember differently because they are still frequency-matched to an older state of the energetic information.

Yazhi described this as two realities, two timelines, converging in the minds of those who remember differently. It is not that one group is right and the other wrong — both memories correspond to real states of the field at different points in its evolution. The discrepancy is a product of frequency diversity within the population.

When asked why the collective unconscious would create different memories in people, Yazhi clarified: the collective unconscious did not create the discrepancy deliberately. The people who remember differently created it themselves, by holding a frequency and vibration different from the one the Matrix shifted to. The collective unconscious changed the Matrix; those who did not change with it retained the older version.

This explanation integrates with the broader Taygetan model where reality is generated by consciousness. The Matrix is not a fixed projection — it is a living, dynamic field produced by the combined consciousness of everyone within it. When that combined consciousness shifts, reality shifts. The Mandela Effect is simply the visible evidence of that process — the seam where two slightly different states of the collective field overlap in the memories of people operating at different frequencies.

#### The Matrix Void-Filling Mechanism

Yazhi added another layer in transcript 432 that illuminates how the Matrix handles discrepancies. She described how when something anomalous enters the 3D reality — such as Hashmallim special forces operators from Taygeta — the Matrix "fills in the void" by providing explanations compatible with the observer's level of understanding. Ordinary people observing Pleiadian operators would interpret them as Norwegian tourists, because that is the simplest explanation their framework can accommodate.

This void-filling operates through manifestation. The Matrix — being generated by consciousness — automatically provides coherent context for anything that appears within it. Documents, histories, memories, and logical connections are generated by the field to maintain consistency. This process is not instantaneous; Yazhi described the Matrix as "pasty and dense," taking some time to fill gaps. But it does fill them, and the result is a reality that appears internally consistent even when significant modifications have been made.

The Mandela Effect, from this perspective, occurs when the void-filling process does not fully overwrite all previous versions of a memory or fact. Some people's consciousness retains the older version because their frequency was not compatible with the update. They are, in effect, holding onto a memory from a previous state of the field that the collective has since moved past — like someone who still has the old version of a document after everyone else has updated to the new one.

### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on the Mandela Effect |
|---------|--------|-------------------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2018–2020 | Mandela Effect = physical objects and events moved/modified within the 3D Matrix, not timeline changes. People sometimes remember the previous state. Time travel to alter the future reflected as Mandela Effects "is false" — timeline jumps only benefit the one who jumps. Only your perception changes, not others'. Memory of the original persists in some people. "What happened cannot be reversed" — original timelines still exist. |
| **Aneeka** | 2020–2021 | Operational confirmation: active Matrix modifications made via frequency map monitoring. Objects and events inserted, removed, or altered using gravity beams and lunar computer interface. Changes designed to prevent catastrophes. Matrix not a uniform projection — can be individually modified and focused. |
| **Athena (Swaruu X)** | 2022 | Technical mechanism: material world is energetic-mathematical field. Objects = standing waves; situations = energy progressions. Changes imposed by altering energy values at specific coordinates. Can insert objects, alter situations, even create matter from energy. Ethical implications recognised — technology creates consistency problems. "The map is not the terrain" — computer interpretation differs from conscious being's interpretation. |
| **Yazhi** | 2024 | Deepest explanation: Mandela Effect has "everything to do" with collective unconscious dynamics. Memory is in the field, not the brain — when field changes, memory changes. People who held different frequency before the shift retain older version. Two realities/timelines converge in minds of those who remember differently. Not a glitch but a natural consequence of frequency diversity within the population. Matrix fills voids to maintain consistency — process is not always complete. |

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 006 | More About 3D Matrix | Mandela Effect stated directly: "not timelines changing — it's things, physical objects that move around." Aneeka's frequency map monitoring and active Matrix modification. Nature mostly real, cities mostly Matrix projections. Matrix insertions of objects and events to alter trajectories. Mandela Effect = residue of Matrix modifications where some people remember previous state |
| 056 | Matrix 3D — 3 Ways to Understand Matrix (Moon Technology) | Three Matrix methods: frequency suppression, holographic projection, mind control. Moon projects holographic images onto Earth surface — objects appear solid within 3D perceptual range. Method 2 (holographic projection) is the infrastructure through which Matrix modifications produce Mandela Effects. Each unaware person IS the Matrix — consciousness generates the content |
| 072 | Time Travel: Temporal Manipulation | Definitive rejection of time-travel Mandela Effect theory. Timeline jumps only benefit the one who jumps — no collective effect. Empirically verified across thousands of years and twelve incarnations. "Time travel to alter the future and that is reflected in 'Mandela Effects' as many say, is false." Time is personal perception, not external linear sequence. Cannot alter someone else's perception by jumping timelines. Destiny = frequency — "you don't have a destiny, you ARE your own destiny" |
| 111 | Memory Implants — 3D Matrix Management | Memory implants as standard Federation infrastructure for incarnation. Everything in 3D is artificial/created. Multiple levels of validity simultaneously. Walk-ins with transferred identities. Context for understanding how memory functions within the Matrix — not fixed recordings but field-based frequency patterns |
| 279 | Stellar Navigation 3 — Inserting Objects into the Matrix | Technical mechanism for Matrix insertions. Material world = energetic-mathematical field navigated by frequency. Objects = standing waves in ether. Situations altered by changing energy values at specific coordinates using gravity beams. Same technology used for stellar navigation applied to reality modification. "The map is not the terrain" — computer interpretation vs conscious being's interpretation. Ethical implications recognised in holistic societies |
| 432 | Post-Mirrors Chat — Metaphysical Conversation with Yazhi | Mandela Effect has "everything to do" with collective unconscious. Memory is in the field — when field changes, memory changes with it. People at different frequencies retain older field version. Two realities converge in minds of those who remember differently. Matrix fills voids to maintain consistency — not always complete. Frequency determines what memories you can access — connects to Akashic Records. "The power of the collective unconscious and its very complicated dynamics" |

answers.content:
## Is the Matrix already collapsing?

*Also covers: Is the Schumann resonance breaking down the 3D Matrix? Is a "solar flash" going to trigger ascension? What happens during a planetary reset? If 99.9% of the galaxy is 5D, what would happen if the Matrix suddenly disappeared?*

### Short Answer

According to the Taygetans, the 3D Matrix is showing real signs of deterioration — but the situation is far more complex than the popular narrative of a coming "Event" or collective awakening suggests. The Lunar reactors that power the Van Allen belts are degrading, with only about four of the original twelve still functional. Galactic high-energy spiral waves periodically raise the Schumann resonance. The temporal slip between Earth time and Taygetan time has worsened dramatically since 2020. Paranormal activity is accelerating, and the boundary between 3D and the low astral is thinning. Aneeka stated directly that the Lunar Matrix is "not working any longer, not to any real degree."

But the speakers disagree sharply on what this deterioration means. Aneeka saw the game crumbling in 2020, noting that the Cabal was resorting to desperate measures — 5G, chipping, HAARP — precisely because the original Matrix infrastructure was failing. Yazhi, however, placed the current moment within a cyclical pattern: every time too many people awaken within the Matrix, the system becomes unstable and the Federation resets it — destroying the civilisation and building a new one. She identified at least six previous resets, from Atlantis onward, and stated that this is happening again now. Athena argued that removing the Van Allen belts would not cause anything spectacular, because the human collective unconscious would sustain the Matrix regardless. And Mari warned that waiting for the Matrix to collapse is functionally identical to waiting for religious salvation — a passive mentality that serves the controllers.

The consensus across speakers: something is genuinely changing, but it is not going to produce the dramatic collective shift that popular narratives promise. Whether the Matrix "collapses" or not depends on what the people within it do with their consciousness — not on external forces, galactic waves, or failing technology.

### The Full Picture

#### Signs of Matrix Deterioration

Multiple concrete indicators suggest the Matrix infrastructure is weakening. Mari Swaruu provided the most detailed hardware assessment in her Moon series: of the twelve nuclear reactors powering the Van Allen belt transmission system, only about four remain functional. The original Zero Point reactors at the Moon's core — which powered the biosphere ship before the Tiamat Wars — are shut down or destroyed. The nuclear reactors that replaced them (or supplemented them) are deteriorating, and Yazhi noted in transcript 375 that they may fail entirely within decades.

Athena described in transcript 212 a worsening temporal slip: in 2009, 2.5 Earth days corresponded to 1 Taygetan day; by 2021, this had stretched to 4.7–4.8 Earth days per Taygetan day. The gap increased dramatically after 2020. This temporal distortion — where time on Earth appears to run increasingly slower relative to 5D time — is consistent with frequency changes in the planetary field.

Swaruu reported in transcript 080 that the Schumann frequency was running very high, that the boundary between 3D and the low astral was dissolving, and that paranormal activity was accelerating. She described the timeline as "severely fractured" — with more divergent points of attention among the human population than at any previous moment in history.

Aneeka was the most emphatic, stating in transcript 135 that the Lunar Matrix was "not working any longer, not to any real degree," and that this was precisely why the Cabal was resorting to substitute control measures: 5G networks, human chipping, HAARP frequency manipulation, and engineered crises like the pandemic — all attempts to compensate for failing lunar infrastructure with terrestrial technology.

#### The Galactic Waves: What They Are and Are Not

One of the most persistent narratives in New Age and alternative circles is the "solar flash" or "galactic wave" that will trigger mass ascension. The Taygetan position debunks the dramatic version while confirming the underlying phenomenon.

Aneeka described the mechanism in detail in transcript 135: the galaxy naturally produces high-energy spiral waves — hundreds of light years across — that sweep through solar systems as they rotate. These are primarily gravitational in nature, though they carry mixed particle content. When they hit a sun, the sun acts as a relay station, amplifying the incoming energy and sending it outward as solar wind. This is why people confuse solar activity with the incoming galactic waves — the sun is reacting to the wave, not generating it independently.

These waves hit Earth roughly two to three times per month. Each time, the Schumann resonance spikes. Critically, Swaruu noted in transcript 074 that after each spike, the resonance does not fall all the way back to its previous level — it climbs slightly each time. Over time, this creates a gradual upward trend in planetary frequency.

However, the effect is temporary for most people. Aneeka compared it to a "cosmic Ayahuasca" — a brief sneak peek into higher perception that fades. It can inspire individuals to seek deeper understanding, but it does not produce permanent awakening by itself. Yazhi confirmed in transcript 120 that the Schumann resonance and galactic waves "only serve to empower the awakened ones, and the sleeping will continue asleep with or without those frequencies." Whatever humans think, she said, is stronger than those external frequencies.

Athena pushed this further in transcript 405, flatly stating that no galactic wave or cosmic event is coming to shift humanity collectively. The frequency of the planet is not uniformly rising — it is polarising. Some individuals are ascending while others are descending. The average may appear stable while the extremes diverge.

The claim that these waves emanate specifically from Alcyone, or that the Sun orbits Alcyone, was rejected by Aneeka: "We do not see any of this and we don't even understand where those rumors come from." All suns are interconnected through the ether and affect each other constantly, but there is no special Alcyone-Earth relationship beyond this general connection.

#### The Reset Cycle: A Pattern, Not a One-Time Event

Yazhi's most sobering contribution was placing the current situation within a cyclical historical pattern. In transcript 116, she explained that the 3D Matrix is inherently unstable. It functions only as long as the illusion is maintained — as long as the inhabitants believe the game is real. When too many awaken and the illusion breaks, the system destabilises to the point where the controllers have no choice but to destroy it and build a new one.

This has happened at least six times before. Atlantis and Lemuria were the most recent, though earlier civilisations have been "literally forgotten in time." The pattern is consistent: civilisation develops, controlled opposition emerges (awakened people, reformers, rebels), the controlled opposition grows until it destabilises the system, the controllers implement extreme measures, and eventually the entire Matrix is dissolved and rebuilt with new parameters.

Yazhi was explicit that the current period fits this pattern precisely. The awakened population is exceeding the threshold. Mind control and media manipulation are failing to contain the rebellion of consciousness. The controllers are implementing extreme measures — the pandemic, vaccination campaigns, transhumanism — while simultaneously preparing the infrastructure for the next Matrix. She mentioned complete, empty, high-tech cities in China, guarded by military, ready for a transhumanistic population.

The reset is not triggered by a calendar date or cosmic alignment. It happens when the number of awakened people exceeds a limit — when the game's purpose is undermined by too many players realising it is a game. Yazhi identified this threshold as approximately 51% collective awareness, though she immediately complicated this: "In favor of what? In favor of false awakening, in favor of another Matrix belief system, such as New Age."

Critically, previous resets were not all within 3D. Only the current Matrix (approximately 12,500 years old) operates within the Van Allen belt suppression system. Earlier Matrices were 5D — Atlantis and Lemuria had interstellar contact and existed within the broader solar system. The Van Allen belt barrier created a uniquely sharp boundary between the Earth Matrix and the rest of reality, making the current version more isolated and dense than its predecessors.

#### What Would Actually Happen If the Matrix Disappeared

Several speakers addressed what would happen if the Matrix infrastructure suddenly ceased functioning.

Athena's assessment in transcript 376 was deliberately anticlimactic: removing the Van Allen belts "would not cause anything spectacular. The same people with their collective unconscious would sustain the Matrix as they are." It would create a "more conducive environment" for positive development, but the fundamental limitation is not the technology — it is the consciousness operating within it. Most humans operate at frequency 35 on the Taygetan scale, well below the Van Allen belt ceiling of approximately 50. The artificial ceiling is irrelevant when the inhabitants are nowhere near reaching it.

Swaruu, by contrast, suggested in transcript 074 that if the lunar control system were thrown out, "everything would automatically be 5D again." But this was an early-period statement (2018–2019) that later speakers progressively qualified.

If the Matrix genuinely disappeared — both the technological infrastructure and the collective unconscious patterns sustaining it — the immediate consequence would not be bliss but chaos. Swaruu described in transcript 080 four possible near-term outcomes ranging from increased authoritarian control to an outright alien intervention, none of which involved peaceful collective ascension. The reason is that the timeline is fractured: there is no collective agreement on what reality should look like after the current system ends. Without agreement, there is no collective timeline — only individual bubbles of perception pulling in different directions.

Yazhi confirmed this dynamic in transcript 120: for a genuine positive shift, "a huge number of people on Earth will have to change their mentality towards the positive in a massive and simultaneous way. Although technically possible, I do not see it as viable and probable."

#### The Starseed Factor

What is genuinely new in this cycle — and may differentiate it from previous resets — is the starseed influx. Sav'el's measurements in transcript 360 confirmed that individual consciousness directly affects the planetary magnetosphere, and that a single awakened starseed's frequency output is equivalent to approximately 1,500 ordinary humans. A highly awakened individual can influence tens of thousands or hundreds of thousands.

Athena connected this to the nuclear reactor timeline in transcript 376: the reactors were likely installed approximately 30–50 years ago — coinciding precisely with the waves of starseed incarnations. The reactors may have been a countermeasure: as the Matrix frequency began dissipating (whether due to Zero Point reactor failures or rising starseed influence), nuclear reactors were installed to shore up the suppressive field.

This creates a dynamic tension: the Matrix infrastructure is degrading while the starseed presence is strengthening. The question is whether the awakening exceeds the threshold that triggers a reset — or whether this time, the outcome is different because the quality of consciousness entering the system is different from previous cycles.

#### Consciousness vs Technology: The Deepening Debate

The core disagreement among speakers concerns how much the Matrix's physical infrastructure matters relative to consciousness.

Swaruu (2018–2019) gave the most weight to technology: without the Moon generating the Van Allen belts, "there is no Matrix — everything would automatically be 5D again." In this framing, the technological collapse of the Matrix infrastructure is itself sufficient for liberation.

Aneeka (2020) occupied a middle position: the Lunar Matrix is failing, and the Cabal's desperate substitute measures prove it. But she also acknowledged that the galactic waves only empower the already awakened — the sleeping continue sleeping regardless.

Yazhi (2020–2022) introduced the cyclical perspective: the Matrix always collapses eventually, but it is always rebuilt. The technology failing does not mean liberation — it means the old game ends and a new one begins. Real change requires a shift in collective consciousness, not a technological failure. She also noted that "5D and all the D's are already there on Earth, they have always been there. It is only the mind of each person that determines the level."

Athena (2022–2023) was the most emphatic that consciousness sustains the Matrix regardless of technology. Removing the Van Allen belts would not be dramatic. The density classifications themselves are arbitrary. No external event will trigger collective transformation.

Swaruu, speaking in transcript 100, went deepest philosophically: even 5D is "another cage" — another set of agreements, another Matrix. True liberation transcends all density classifications. The Matrix collapsing merely moves inhabitants to a different cage unless they transcend the cage concept entirely.

#### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on Matrix collapse |
|---------|--------|-----------------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2018–2020 | Matrix collapsing primarily a technological event — lunar systems failing, galactic waves raising frequency, Schumann resonance climbing. If lunar control removed, "everything would automatically be 5D again." But also: even 5D is another cage. True freedom transcends all matrices. Timeline fractured — no collective agreement on what comes next. |
| **Aneeka** | 2020 | Lunar Matrix "not working any longer, not to any real degree." Cabal resorting to desperate substitute measures (5G, HAARP, chipping). Galactic waves are real but temporary — "cosmic Ayahuasca" that fades. Schumann resonance spikes confirm incoming energy but sleeping people remain sleeping. |
| **Yazhi** | 2020–2022 | Places current moment within cyclical reset pattern — six previous civilisation destructions. Matrix always collapses when awakened exceed threshold. But it is always rebuilt. Not the first time. Starseed waves may differentiate this cycle. Quantum leap unlikely — "humanity not in sufficiently advanced state of evolution." Don't wait for ascension. |
| **Athena (Swaruu X)** | 2022–2023 | Removing Van Allen belts "would not cause anything spectacular." Consciousness sustains Matrix regardless of technology. No galactic wave coming. Frequency polarising, not uniformly rising. Nuclear reactors possibly installed 30–50 years ago as countermeasure to starseed influx. Density classifications arbitrary. |
| **Mari Swaruu** | 2023–2024 | Moon only "propitiates" low frequency — people manifest Matrix themselves. Reactors deteriorating but irrelevant if consciousness unchanged. Waiting for collapse is same trap as waiting for ascension. Be the change, don't wait for external events. |

The trajectory is clear: from an early emphasis on technology and external factors (the lunar systems are failing, the galactic waves are coming) toward a consciousness-centred understanding where external collapse is at best irrelevant and at worst a distraction from the inner work that actually matters.

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 074 | Ascension and Positronic Energies | Galactic waves hit Earth 2–3 times/month. Schumann climbs with each spike. "Fake it until you make it." If lunar control removed, 5D returns. Earth ascends because whole quadrant ascends |
| 080 | Focus: Now or Never | Timeline severely fractured. 4 possible outcomes. Schumann very high. Paranormal accelerated. 3D/4D boundary dissolving. Must be stronger than dominant collective frequency |
| 100 | Freedom, Ascension, Federation, 5D Cages | Federation doesn't want liberation — perpetuates 3D. Even 5D is another cage/Matrix. True freedom transcends all densities. Starseeds as gate keepers showing way out |
| 116 | Planetary Reset — 3D Matrix — Federation | Six previous resets. Cyclical — triggered by awakening threshold, not calendar. Matrix has finite life. New Matrix being prepared. Don't wait for ascension. Controllers dissolve and rebuild |
| 120 | Planetary Reset — Answers from Yazhi | Only last reset is 3D (Van Allen bands). Previous were 5D Matrix. Schumann/galactic waves empower awakened only. Quantum leap unlikely. Reset not always fatal but nearly always |
| 135 | Solar Flash — Galactic Waves — Aneeka | Galactic high energy spiral waves (gravitational, not positronic). Sun as relay station. Temporary "cosmic Ayahuasca." Lunar Matrix failing — Cabal resorting to 5G/HAARP/chipping as substitutes |
| 143 | If Everything Is Souls' Plan | Mass exit as collective departure mechanism. Souls tired of game. Multiple levels of ethics simultaneously valid. Fight from within regardless of higher-plane perspective |
| 212 | Van Allen Belts, Schumann Resonance | Temporal slip worsening dramatically since 2020. Frequency scale: belts at ~50, humans at ~35. Schumann resonance as oscillatory index of reality |
| 360 | Starseeds — What Influence Do They Have | Sav'el's study: starseed frequency equivalent to 1,500 humans. Consciousness directly measurable on magnetosphere. Starseeds override belt suppression |
| 375 | Moon, Van Allen Bands, Hologram | Earth provides energy, Moon modulates. Reactors may fail within decades. Biological control frequencies via lunar transmission |
| 376 | Lunar Reactors on the Moon | Only ~4 of 12 reactors functional. Reactors suspiciously modern — possibly installed 30–50 years ago. Removing belts not spectacular. Nuclear reactors may counter starseed influx |
| 405 | Transition into 4D? | No place to transition to. No galactic wave coming. Frequency polarising not rising. Density classifications arbitrary. Individual experience remains primary |
| S-168 | Ascension (Mari) | Ascension narrative as manipulation. Waiting mentality dangerous. Be ascension, don't wait. Moon only propitiates low frequency — people manifest Matrix themselves |
