answers.title: Is the Matrix literally a computer simulation?
answers.excerpt: Yes and no — and the answer depends entirely on which speaker you ask and at which level of reality they are addressing. This is one of the most layered questions in the entire Cosmic Agency material…
answers.content:
## Is the Matrix literally a computer simulation?

### Short Answer

Yes and no — and the answer depends entirely on which speaker you ask and at which level of reality they are addressing. This is one of the most layered questions in the entire Cosmic Agency material because it touches the deepest disagreements between speakers about the nature of reality itself.

Swaruu of Erra's earliest descriptions (2018) presented the 3D Matrix in strikingly literal terms: a "computerised hologram" projected from the Moon using "literal digital computers" running a "primitive binary system," powered by uranium nuclear reactors. She compared Earth directly to a video game with programmed rules. But even in these early accounts, Swaruu simultaneously insisted that "nothing there exists, it's all in your mind" and that consciousness is the true programmer.

By the time Yazhi entered the conversation (2020), the emphasis shifted dramatically. Yazhi dismissed the lunar computers and holographic projectors as "an insignificant part of the whole" and declared that the real Matrix is mental — a simulation done "with mind, not with machine." In her most radical statement, she told Gosia: "You are in the memory implant machine right now. It is your Immersion Pod number 1007."

Athena (Swaruu X) attempted a synthesis, describing the universe as a "mathematical-energetic field" where everything has a numerical frequency value — not digital in the movie sense, but mathematically precise and technologically manipulable. She explicitly corrected the movie analogy: "It is not digital as in the Matrix the movie, not exactly, although it is a new analogy in the sense that everything is mathematical."

Mari Swaruu brought her own reframing, insisting that the Matrix she was discussing was "the one our minds create and not so much the literal numerical Universe," though she acknowledged the two are always connected. Her position: each sentient creature IS its own Matrix — you cannot escape yourself.

The speakers broadly agree that three things are simultaneously true: there IS literal technology on the Moon that suppresses frequencies and projects holograms; there IS a numerical-mathematical substrate to all physical reality; and consciousness is the ultimate author of it all. Where they disagree is on which layer matters most.

### The Full Picture

#### The Literal Technology: Moon, Computers, and Frequency Suppression

The earliest and most concrete description came from Swaruu of Erra. In transcript 005, she described the 3D Matrix as a "superimposed computerised hologram over the 5D Earth" projected from the Moon — an ancient space station installed 12,500 years ago. The computers on the Moon are, she said, "literal digital computers using a primitive binary system" controlled by nuclear reactors based on uranium. These computers generate the Matrix through three interlocking methods.

In transcript 056, Swaruu laid out these three methods in detail. The first is frequency suppression: the Moon transmits destructive interference frequencies that cancel out higher-frequency perception, much like noise-cancelling headphones. If Earth's natural frequency is 15 MHz, the Moon transmits -7.2 MHz, limiting perception to 7.8 MHz. This keeps human awareness locked within the "3D" band. The Van Allen belts are the energy toroid through which this suppression operates. Without the Moon, Swaruu stated flatly, "there is no Matrix — everything would automatically be 5D again."

The second method is holographic projection: the Moon superimposes images onto Earth's surface — objects and events that don't physically exist in 5D. The Moon itself is covered by such a hologram, hiding its true nature as a smooth technological sphere (the "Death Star" reference). These projections can be solid enough to touch, operating on the same principle as Taygetan holographic touch screens — electromagnetic repulsion between projected energy and existing molecules.

The third method — which Swaruu called "the heart of the Matrix" — is telepathic mind control. The Moon transmits localised frequencies that guide and limit human thoughts. The first two methods merely create the canvas; this third method paints the picture. Each person who is unaware of the system becomes, in Swaruu's words, "the Matrix itself." The computers read human consciousness and manifest what it focuses on — a technological hijacking of the Law of Attraction.

The most vivid operational account came from Aneeka in transcript 006. She described literally working at a holographic display aboard the Toleka, walking around an interactive map of Earth where frequencies appear as colour codes — yellow and red indicating danger zones. She could zoom into a specific city, see that a neighbourhood's frequency had dropped to a level "consistent with major accident, attack, armed assault, serious false flag," and manually raise that area's frequency to make it incompatible with the negative event. She did this 24/7 alongside crew member Li'Lay'La. Aneeka also made a crucial distinction: nature on Earth is "mostly real" (existing in 5D), while artificial cities are over 50% Matrix-projected. In a transition to 5D, unwanted buildings — government offices, banks — would simply disappear as Mandela Effects, while people's homes would remain because they are manifested by their inhabitants' own consciousness. Yet even while describing this literal technology, Swaruu interjected a paradox that runs through the entire material: "Reality is a simulation, and everything is a false hologram, and it is also reality and must be taken as such because experience is the real thing."

Later, however, Athena revealed significant uncertainty about these systems. In transcript 376, she stated that she, Yazhi, and Mari all insist "it is the human consciousness that is manifesting everything, directly and indirectly, and not a Lunar computer." She noted that earlier claims about inserting events through the lunar computers came from Aneeka, who was at that time working directly for the Federation and had actual access to those systems. With Aneeka gone and the three remaining Swaruus denied access to the Moon, they could not verify the earlier claims. Athena added: "We are all in a simulation, since the Matrix is bigger than just the one on Earth."

*Key sources: 005 (We Are Living in the Matrix 3D — Swaruu), 006 (More About 3D Matrix — Swaruu, Aneeka), 056 (3 Ways to Understand Matrix — Swaruu), 376 (Lunar Reactors — Athena, Yazhi)*

#### The Numerical Universe: Everything as Mathematics

A parallel thread running through the material describes reality not as a digital computer simulation in the Hollywood sense, but as a mathematical-energetic field where everything has a precise numerical frequency value.

Mari Swaruu articulated this most clearly in her Swaruu Oficial series. In S-004, she described the universe as "a field of potential energy vibrating at an extremely high rate" — the Original Source — where gravity is not produced by mass but is itself the creative flow of consciousness. Standing waves in this field of potential energy form particles, atoms, molecules, and eventually all physical objects. Every subatomic particle "exists with full intention, and not as the result of randomness." Any location can be represented as "a set of numerical values representing everything that exists in it."

Athena developed this further in transcript 279, explaining that their spacecraft navigate not by position maps but by frequency maps — mathematical representations of the energy values at every point. A ship's computer "sees everything as numbers and the relationship they have with each other," while a being with consciousness sees the lived experience those numbers represent. She used the vivid comparison: what a computer sees as data, a soul-being interprets as Barcelona. The map is not the terrain.

This mathematical nature of reality is not merely theoretical — it has concrete technological applications. Ships travel through "Hyper Space" by emulating the mathematical-energetic values of their destination, becoming frequency-compatible with it and incompatible with their origin. Objects can be inserted into the Matrix by using a tractor beam to imprint new energy values at a specific point. Athena described how the elite Sand Clock group could prevent a car accident by subtly altering the friction and kinetic energy values in a single car's systems — changing one variable in the mathematical field to cascade a different outcome.

In S-074, Mari explained that Earth is "a more or less closed mathematical Matrix system" where everything exists as the consequence of preceding mathematical sequences. When a foreign object or person is introduced from outside — say, a stepped-down extraterrestrial — the entire mathematical field shifts to accommodate and justify their presence, creating a history and a sequence of events to explain why they exist. This is what the Taygetans call being "matrixed."

So is this a computer simulation? In the specific sense that everything has a numerical value and obeys mathematical laws — yes. In the sense that it's running on a literal computer like in the 1999 film — that is only the 3D Earth layer, and even then, consciousness is what drives the equations.

*Key sources: S-004 (Consciousness, Oneness, Gravity and the Numerical Universe — Mari), 279 (Stellar Navigation 3 — Athena, Yazhi), S-074 (Basic Mathematics Behind Dimensional Mirroring — Mari)*

#### The Original Matrix: Perceptual Agreements All the Way Up

What complicates the "computer simulation" answer most profoundly is Swaruu's concept of the "Original Matrix" or "Initial Matrix" — the idea that ALL of physical reality, not just Earth's 3D layer, is a kind of simulation.

In transcript 019, Swaruu defined the Matrix as "a set of rules within a contained game — like a video game with set rules." But she then immediately expanded this beyond Earth: "You are in a Matrix inside a Matrix. A dream within a dream." Even Taygetans die and end up in the same afterlife, plan reincarnation again, and return — the whole universe operates as "a Matrix of perceptual agreements." The Initial Matrix has no technology controlling it; it was set up by "all real souls" through the Law of Attraction as "a necessity to expand even having an illusion of separation."

This means the 3D Matrix — with its Moon computers and frequency suppressors — is a crude technological overlay on top of an already-existing perceptual Matrix that extends through all densities. In 5D, a chair is still a chair because beings have agreed to perceive potential energy that way. The difference is that in 5D there is no technology forcing the perception, and awareness is expanded. But the fundamental principle is the same: consciousness interprets potential energy according to agreements, and that interpretation IS reality.

Swaruu illustrated this with the dog example: both humans and Taygetans see a dog when they look at the same animal, because they share that perceptual agreement. But a human sees a pet and companion, while a Taygetan sees a "dangerous wild animal" — dogs are only wild in Taygeta, kept as pets about as often as humans keep pet leopards. Same energy, same agreement on basic form, radically different interpretation.

The Ether — described by Swaruu in transcript 058 as "pure unified consciousness, a potential energy field" — is the ultimate medium within which all matrices exist. Standing waves in the Ether form particles; harmonics of frequencies form objects; consciousness maintains them through attention. An abandoned house is reclaimed by nature not because of entropy in the physics sense, but because it loses the creative attention that sustained it. "What does not receive creative attention will become potential energy again."

*Key sources: 019 (Original Matrix — Swaruu), 058 (Ether — Swaruu), 005 (We Are Living in the Matrix 3D — Swaruu)*

#### Yazhi's Radical Position: The Simulation Is Mental, Not Mechanical

Yazhi took the concept furthest, essentially collapsing all distinctions between technology and consciousness. In transcript 112, she opened bluntly: "Earth is a simulation." When Gosia pushed back, Yazhi expanded: "No Earth, no Temmer, no Erra, no Cyndriel, no Avalon. All a mental idea. Matter does not exist at all. Only mind and consciousness. You are living a dream."

For Yazhi, the lunar matrix, the holographic computers, the frequency suppressors — all of it is "an insignificant part of the whole." The real simulation is consciousness itself dreaming reality into being. She told Gosia: "Everything is mental and part of the same simulation game, simulation done with mind, not with machine."

Her most provocative claim: "You are in the memory implant machine right now! It is your Immersion Pod number 1007. The building holding your pod inside is quite close to the beach." Whether this was literal or illustrative, the implication was clear — the boundary between "real life" and "simulation" is illusory. Immersion pods on Taygetan ships create experiences indistinguishable from reality. Etheric memory implants before incarnation create experiences indistinguishable from lived ones. From a higher perspective, Yazhi argued, there is no difference between a "real" experience and an "implanted" one: "A memory is a memory and who cares how you got it!"

Yazhi arrived at a three-layered model of reality: from the perspective of the human self, everything lived is real. From a middle perspective, some things are real and some are implanted. From the highest perspective, "nothing is real — all an idea in your higher self's mind." She insisted it was not up to her to decide which level someone should adopt — "that's each person's task."

*Key sources: 112 (Etheric Memory Implants — Yazhi), 019 (Original Matrix — Swaruu)*

#### Athena's Synthesis: Densities as Mental States, Not Fixed Barriers

Athena (Swaruu X) brought a more structured perspective, arguing in transcript 193 that densities like 3D and 5D are "a mental construction, an arbitrary artificial idea destined to try to explain something very complex with simple concepts." For computers and star maps, a linear frequency gradient works. But for beings with consciousness connected to Source, "things stop working in a linear way."

She described reality as "one mass made up of gravity that is a flow in the Ether" — a soup of energy frequencies from very low to very high. Each individual creates their own density through their perception. People who appear to co-exist in a shared density are simply sharing enough perceptual agreements. There is no physical barrier between densities, no wall you cross from 3D to 5D. It is "the awareness, the mind, and the consciousness of each individual who will make up, create, or manifest a density."

This view bridges the technological and the mental. The Moon's technology does create a setting — a frequency environment that makes certain perceptions easier and others harder. But it does not create the Matrix in any deterministic sense. Removing the Van Allen bands, Athena said in transcript 376, would not cause anything spectacular: "The same people with their collective unconscious would sustain the Matrix as they are." It would simply create "a more conducive environment for something more positive to develop."

*Key sources: 193 (3D-5D Are Mental States — Yazhi, Athena), 376 (Lunar Reactors — Athena)*

#### Mari's Personal Matrix: You Cannot Escape Yourself

Mari Swaruu brought the concept full circle in S-045. While acknowledging that "everything there has a numerical value" and that "matter and energy can be manipulated by many star races using very high technology," she drew a sharp distinction between the numerical universe and the personal Matrix.

The Matrix she focused on is "the entire world or Universe our being forms or manifests for itself using its perception, its awareness, and the agreements it formed with other beings." A chair is furniture for a human, a bed for a cat, food for a termite, a mountain for an ant. Each creature creates its own unique world through interpretation. Your identity — all your values, mentality, personality — IS your personal Matrix, and you take it with you wherever you go.

"The reason why I said that no one can escape the Matrix is that each sentient creature is its own Matrix; therefore, it cannot escape itself."

This is why the Federation cannot simply free humanity to roam the galaxy — people would export their not-so-advanced values, their personal Matrix, wherever they went. But it is also why evolution is possible: by working on yourself, you create a better personal Matrix. Even the highest ethereal realms have "perception agreements of sorts" that could be argued to be a form of Matrix.

*Key sources: S-045 (Why No One Can Escape the Matrix Part 2 — Mari)*

#### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on "Computer Simulation" |
|---------|--------|----------------------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2018–2019 | Most literal: "computerised hologram," "digital, primitive," "literal computers" on the Moon. But simultaneously: "nothing exists, it's all in your mind" and the Initial Matrix is pure consciousness. |
| **Aneeka** | 2018–2020 | Operational/technical: worked directly with lunar computers, described inserting events and objects. Most concrete about the technology being real and functional. |
| **Yazhi** | 2020+ | Most radical: everything is mental simulation, Moon technology is "insignificant," you are already in an immersion pod, all reality is implanted memory. No distinction between real and simulated. |
| **Athena (Swaruu X)** | 2021–2023 | Synthesiser: mathematical-energetic universe, not "digital" in the movie sense. Technology creates a setting but consciousness creates reality. Densities are mental states, not physical barriers. |
| **Mari** | 2022–2023 | Personal Matrix: acknowledges numerical universe but focuses on the perceptual Matrix each being creates. You ARE the Matrix. Cannot escape yourself, only evolve. |

The trajectory is clear: from a relatively literal "computer simulation" framing to an increasingly consciousness-centred understanding where the technology is seen as one small part of a much larger picture. But notably, no speaker ever fully denied the existence of the lunar technology — they simply reframed its importance relative to consciousness.

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 005 | We Are Living in the Matrix 3D | Foundational description: Moon as projector, computerised hologram, nuclear reactors, frequency suppression |
| 006 | More About 3D Matrix | Aneeka's operational account: holographic frequency map, colour-coded danger zones, real-time Matrix management, 3D vs 5D objects |
| 019 | Original Matrix | Initial/Original Matrix concept, video game analogy, perceptual agreements, Matrix inside Matrix |
| 056 | 3 Ways to Understand Matrix (Moon Technology) | Three methods of Matrix generation: frequency suppression, holographic projection, telepathic mind control |
| 058 | Ether — Teachings of Swaruu of Erra | Ether as pure consciousness, standing waves form matter, Taygetan computers as nano-particle accelerators |
| 112 | Etheric Memory Implants, Life Plan, Free Will | Yazhi: "Earth is a simulation," immersion pod 1007, no distinction between real and implanted experience |

answers.content:
## Is the Moon projecting the 3D Matrix — and if so, how does it work?

*Also covers: Is the Moon artificial? What is the Moon really? How does the Moon generate the Van Allen belts? If the Moon projects the Matrix, how does it affect the far side of Earth? What are the lunar reactors? Is the Van Allen belt the same as the biblical "Firmament"? Could the Matrix function without the Moon? Who installed the Moon and why?*

### Short Answer

According to the Taygetans, the Moon is not a natural satellite — it is a damaged Federation biosphere ship of Andromedan construction, installed in Earth orbit approximately 12,500 years ago after the destruction of the planet Tiamat. Swaruu explained in transcript 056 that the Moon generates the 3D Matrix through three combined mechanisms: frequency suppression using the principle of destructive interference, holographic projection of artificial objects and events onto the Earth's surface, and directed telepathic mind control that guides human thought. Of these three, Swaruu stated that the third — mind control — is "the heart of the Matrix," and the other two are merely supportive infrastructure.

However, as the material evolved, Athena and Yazhi significantly shifted the emphasis. In transcript 376, Athena stated that according to herself, Mari, and Yazhi, it is human consciousness that manifests everything — not a Lunar computer. The Moon only "propitiates" certain conditions, creating a frequency environment that makes the 3D experience possible, but the actual content of reality is generated by the minds of the people living within it. This represents a move from a technology-centred explanation toward a consciousness-centred one, though the earlier technical details were never retracted — only reframed as secondary to the role of consciousness.

### The Full Picture

#### Origin: A Damaged Ship Installed After the Tiamat Wars

The Moon's history is inseparable from the destruction of Tiamat, a water planet roughly eighty percent the size of Neptune that once orbited between Earth and Mars. In transcript 138, Swaruu described the catastrophic space battle approximately 12,500 years ago between Federation forces and Reptilian factions that resulted in Tiamat's destruction, devastating Mars's surface, flooding Earth with Tiamat's water — the historical basis of the biblical Deluge — and triggering a pole shift that destroyed both Atlantis and Lemuria.

The destruction of Tiamat destabilised the entire solar system's orbital dynamics. Athena explained in transcript 274 that the Federation installed the Moon — a battle-damaged spherical biosphere ship — primarily to stabilise Earth's orbit. The stabilisation works through mass: the Moon's presence acts as a counterbalance, and the frequency-lowering effect increases Earth's effective density and mass, which prevents it from entering a more elliptical orbit with a higher inclination that would create an almost uninhabitable climate. This mass-balance function also affects the equilibrium of the rest of the solar system.

Swaruu's earlier framing in transcript 056 emphasised a different purpose: the Moon was installed to prevent negative Reptilians from escaping while the weakened Federation regrouped. The 3D Matrix was the mechanism — by limiting perception to a narrow frequency band and creating an electromagnetic barrier (the Van Allen belts), the system both contained the Reptilians and, as a side-effect, trapped the surviving Lyrian population inside the same perceptual cage. The Reptilians then turned the system to their advantage, hacking the mind-control component to enslave the very population the system was supposed to protect.

Athena disagreed with the Reptilian-containment narrative. In transcript 274, she argued that the Reptilians on Earth are not remnants of the original invaders but egregors — manifestations of the human collective unconscious — that emerged because the low-frequency 3D environment is conducive to regressive entities. The lowered frequencies, she said, created a nest for regressive beings to flourish, like lowering a body's immune system and watching infections take hold. The problem was inherited from the pre-Tiamat era but then perpetuated on Earth as its own self-sustaining egregor dynamic.

#### Method One: Frequency Suppression via Destructive Interference

The most straightforward mechanism is the artificial suppression of perceivable frequencies. Swaruu explained in transcript 056 that the Moon transmits specific frequencies using the principle of destructive interference — when two waves of identical frequency but opposite phase overlap, they cancel each other out at the node. If the natural reality operates at a frequency of, say, 15 MHz, and the Moon transmits a destructive frequency of -7.2 MHz, the perceivable reality is limited to 7.8 MHz. Everything above that range still exists — it simply cannot be perceived by the suppressed senses.

This suppressed frequency is what Earth science measures as the Schumann resonance — the oscillatory index of the artificially limited reality. The Moon controls this frequency through the Van Allen belts, which function as an energy toroid enveloping the Earth. By controlling the toroid's frequency, the Moon controls the oscillation rate of all matter within it. Swaruu compared Earth to a cork held underwater: the Moon's frequency suppressors are what keeps the cork submerged, and a constant, strong energy is needed to maintain this because Earth's natural tendency is to rise to 5D, which is the baseline frequency of the material universe outside the Matrix.

Swaruu was explicit: without the Moon, there is no Matrix. Everything would automatically return to 5D. It is that simple.

The Van Allen belts and the Moon's surface hologram are two separate systems, as Athena clarified in transcript 376. Removing the Van Allen belts would not affect the hologram, and vice versa. The Moon generates the Van Allen belts by altering Earth's natural magnetosphere, but the Moon itself remains in orbit through its own gravitational dynamics, which require periodic correction.

#### Method Two: Holographic Projection of Artificial Objects and Events

Once the frequency range has been suppressed, the Moon projects holographic images onto the Earth's surface. These projections are superimposed onto the existing 5D reality, creating artificial objects that appear solid within the 3D perceptual range. Swaruu explained in transcript 056 that the solidity of these projections depends on two factors: the energy applied and the frequency synchronisation between the projection and its surroundings. With sufficient energy, the projection creates electromagnetic repulsion effects that make it tangible to touch.

Aneeka provided the practical details in transcript 006. From the Taygetan ship, she monitored a holographic frequency map of Earth's surface — a colour-coded display where red indicated dangerously low frequencies and potential negative events. She could zoom into specific locations, identify areas at risk of matching the frequency of a catastrophic event, and artificially raise the frequency to make that area incompatible with the negative outcome. She described doing this twenty-four hours a day, sometimes inserting small disruptions — an electrical fault in an elevator, a nail in a tyre — to alter the trajectory of events and protect key individuals.

The Matrix projections are not uniform. Aneeka explained that nature is "mostly real" — mountains, rivers, and forests exist in 5D and are merely perceived with reduced information in 3D. Artificial cities, however, are largely 3D Matrix projections, with older structures having more 4D presence (which is why castles and ancient buildings tend to have more paranormal activity — they have greater 5D components). If the Matrix were removed, most government buildings, banks, and structures that exist only as impositions of the control system would disappear, while homes and places that people genuinely want would remain, sustained by the inhabitants' own consciousness.

The Moon's hologram also covers its own surface. Swaruu described the Moon's true appearance as a smooth, clearly artificial technological sphere — essentially the "Death Star" from Star Wars. The holographic disguise is projected from thousands of surface projectors, some of which periodically fail, explaining the anomalies and disappearing structures that observers sometimes report on the lunar surface. This hologram only covers the Earth-facing side. Athena confirmed in transcript 376 that the Moon's synchronised rotation — always showing the same face to Earth — is itself suspicious and points to its artificial nature. The phases of the Moon are real, caused by actual sunlight reflected off the holographic surface.

#### Method Three: Mind Control — The Heart of the Matrix

Swaruu designated the third method as the most important, calling it "the heart of the Matrix" in transcript 056. The Moon transmits very localised, specific frequencies that interfere with and guide the thoughts of individuals within its range. Combined with direct telepathic intervention from the controllers, this generates the subjective experience that constitutes the Matrix itself.

The critical insight: each person who is not aware of the Matrix is, by definition, the Matrix itself. The system reads and copies the intention of consciousness and forms it into something tangible. All thoughts and feelings are being read by the Matrix. This means the Matrix is not primarily a technological projection — it is a feedback loop between the technology and the consciousness of the people within it. The technology sets the stage; human consciousness writes the script.

This is why Swaruu insisted in transcript 006 that people do not need lunar machines to alter reality — personal consciousness is enough. The Matrix is designed to read intentions and manifest them. The Reptilians controlled the Matrix not by accessing the Moon's computers directly but by understanding this principle and using mind control to redirect human manifestation power toward serving their interests.

#### The Reactor Question: Nuclear Power on the Moon

Mari Swaruu provided the most detailed technical specification of the Moon's power systems in S-092. The frequency-suppression array operates through disc-shaped antennas on the Moon's surface, focused on Earth's magnetosphere, which are masked as craters by the lunar hologram. These project a specific frequency beam that transforms the magnetosphere into the Van Allen belts and, as a secondary effect, lowers the overall existential frequency of everything on Earth via the principle of dominant frequency — the strongest frequency tends to transform all others into more of itself.

The system is powered by twelve reactors: eight pressurised heavy water reactors (PWR) and four fast neutron reactors. Only the four fast neutron reactors remain functional — the eight PWR units are no longer operational. Aneeka had earlier reported in transcript 274 that only four of twelve were functioning, confirming Mari's data. The reactor types are near-identical to modern Earth nuclear technology.

This detail created a significant puzzle. In transcript 376, Athena explored the contradiction: if the Moon was installed 12,500 years ago by the Federation, why would it use primitive nuclear technology when Zero Point energy is standard? Her analysis, developed with Yazhi, suggested the nuclear reactors may have been installed much more recently — perhaps only thirty to forty years ago — by Earth's Secret Space Program operating through portals. The original Zero Point reactors may have failed or been programmed to shut down at this transitional period, and the Cabal propped up the system with nuclear replacements to prevent the Matrix from weakening.

Athena noted that the timing correlates with the major starseed waves beginning fifty to sixty years ago. As starseeds incarnated in increasing numbers, raising the collective frequency, the control system installed additional infrastructure to counteract them — the nuclear lunar reactors and the terrestrial reactors placed above Ley Lines serving similar frequency-suppression purposes.

#### The Consciousness Shift: From Technology to Mind

The most significant evolution in the material is the progressive de-emphasis of the Moon's technological role in favour of consciousness as the primary generator of reality.

Swaruu's 2018–2019 framing treated the Moon as the central piece — without the Moon, no Matrix. Aneeka's operational work reinforced this, describing active intervention through lunar computers to modify frequencies and insert events.

But by 2022–2023, Athena stated plainly in transcript 376 that according to herself, Mari, and Yazhi, human consciousness manifests everything — not a Lunar computer. When asked whether the Moon projects digital Matrix buildings and artificial people, Athena said no. The Moon only creates the frequency environment — the low-frequency setting — within which human consciousness does the actual manifesting. She compared her position to Aneeka's earlier claims about inserting entire events and continents through the computer, and said she could not reconcile those claims with what the three Swaruus now understood.

Athena was also asked what would happen if the Van Allen belts were simply removed. Her answer was striking: nothing spectacular. The people, with their collective unconscious, would sustain the Matrix themselves. However, the frequency environment would become more conducive to positive development — like removing a weight from someone's shoulders, it would not instantly change their behaviour but would make it easier for them to change.

Mari contributed two further revelations in S-093. First, the real Matrix control centre is not the Moon but the Andromedan biosphere ship Viera — a multiracial, multicultural hub. The Moon transmits frequencies and propitiates conditions, but the actual coordination resides elsewhere. Second, the Moon is classified as a no-fly zone: ordinary stellar races cannot send drones or research teams without special permissions that are not easily granted. Heavy Federation military activity occurs there constantly, but normal civilisations are excluded from knowing what it involves. Mari drew a parallel with Antarctica on Earth — also a no-fly zone with year-round Federation activity.

Mari also raised a disturbing possibility: much of the information about the Moon comes from the Galactic Federation itself, and given what is now known about the Federation's role as Earth's ultimate controller, that data may be manipulated in the same way Earth's history is fabricated.

This aligns with Aneeka's broader realisation in transcript 480 that the Matrix extends beyond Earth — that 5D civilisations are also operating within matrices of perception agreements, just more expanded ones. The distinction between 3D and 5D is not between fake and real but between artificially constrained and naturally constrained perception. Every density, every civilisation, operates within some framework of agreements. Earth's uniqueness is not that it has a Matrix but that its Matrix is artificially controlled from outside rather than generated purely by the inhabitants' own consciousness.

### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on the Moon and the 3D Matrix |
|---------|--------|----------------------------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2018–2020 | Moon is a damaged Federation biosphere ship, installed ~12,500 years ago after Tiamat destruction. Purpose: contain Reptilians while Federation regrouped. Three Matrix methods: (1) frequency suppression via destructive interference, (2) holographic projection of artificial objects/events, (3) mind control — "the heart of the Matrix." Without the Moon, no Matrix — everything returns to 5D automatically. Moon's hologram disguises its artificial surface. Van Allen belts = energy toroid controlling Earth's perceivable frequency range. People can override the Matrix with consciousness alone — "you do not need lunar machines." |
| **Aneeka** | 2020–2021 | Operational perspective: monitored Earth's frequency map 24/7, colour-coded hologram showing danger zones. Actively modified frequencies and inserted events to prevent catastrophes. Confirmed 4 of 12 reactors functioning, nuclear-powered. Cities mostly Matrix projection, nature mostly real. Later realised 5D is also a cage — same Matrix with different rules. Federation threatened her for revealing secrets. The distinction between 3D and 5D is artificial — "forget about that 3D or 5D crap, it's all mental." |
| **Yazhi** | 2020–2022 | Matrix installed during catastrophic period when survivors could not notice the change. Memory suppression both deliberate (game design) and natural (frequency incompatibility). Moon hologram appeared suddenly "like any ship arriving and parking." Contributed the insight (via Athena) that Earth Cabal may have installed nuclear reactors through portals without Federation's explicit help — within Earth jurisdiction. Everything is mental — Moon is infrastructure, not cause. |
| **Athena (Swaruu X)** | 2022–2023 | Moon's primary function was orbital stabilisation through mass, not Reptilian containment. Reptilians on Earth are egregors created by lowered consciousness, not original invaders. Disagrees that Moon "projects" reality — human consciousness manifests everything; Moon only propitiates conditions. Van Allen bands and hologram are separate systems. Nuclear reactors possibly installed only 30–40 years ago by Secret Space Program. Removing Van Allen belts alone would not dramatically change things — collective unconscious sustains the Matrix independently. Moon restricted — entire lunar surface is a Federation military zone. |
| **Mari Swaruu** | 2023 | Detailed technical specifications: disc-shaped antennas masked as craters, 8 PWR + 4 fast neutron reactors (only 4 functional). Dominant frequency principle explains how Moon lowers all Earth frequencies. Real control centre is Andromedan biosphere ship Viera, not the Moon. Moon classified as no-fly zone — parallel with Antarctica. Moon only propitiates low-frequency life experiences; people then manifest 3D content themselves. Human Lyrian body chosen as multi-species incarnation vehicle for soul school. Federation data about Moon may itself be manipulated. |

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 005 | We Are Living in the Matrix 3D | 3D hologram superimposed on 5D Earth — not a replacement. Moon as Lunar Space Station, 12,500 years old. Destructive interference principle suppresses perception range. Ruler analogy: eyes see 1-3 on scale of 1-10, but 4-10 still exist. Van Allen belts as electromagnetic force field / etheric fence. Paranormal phenomena = 5D leaking through gaps in filtering |
| 006 | More About 3D Matrix | Aneeka's frequency map — colour-coded holographic display of Earth's frequencies. Active modification of danger zones 24/7. Matrix insertions: objects and events (elevator faults, flat tyres) to alter trajectories. Nature mostly real, cities mostly artificial 3D projections. 4 of 12 reactors working. Mandela Effect = physical objects moved/modified, not timeline changes. Consciousness sufficient to alter Matrix without machines |
| 056 | Matrix 3D — 3 Ways to Understand Matrix (Moon Technology) | Definitive three-method explanation. Method 1: destructive interference frequency suppression from Moon via Van Allen toroid. Method 2: holographic projection of artificial objects/events. Method 3: mind control — "the heart of the Matrix." Without Moon = automatic return to 5D. Moon's hologram disguises artificial sphere (Death Star reference). Schumann resonance = oscillatory index of artificially limited reality. Each unaware person IS the Matrix — consciousness generates the content |
| 138 | Atlantis, Lemuria, Reptilians, Tiamat | Historical origin: Tiamat destruction → flood → pole shift → Federation installed Moon from damaged biosphere ship. 3D Matrix installed right after the flood when Federation was weak. Purpose: prevent Reptilians escaping while Federation regrouped. Reptilians turned system in their favour. Human DNA complete but suppressed by mind control, not genetics — "the only thing that limits humans is the idea that they are limited" |
| 274 | Moon — Installed to Stabilize the Earth | Athena's mass-stabilisation angle: Moon prevents elliptical orbit / high inclination / uninhabitable climate. Frequency lowering increases Earth's density/mass. Reptilians on Earth are egregors created by low-frequency environment, not original invaders. Low frequencies propitiate regressive entities like lowering immune system. Moon is unique to Earth — no other planet has this artificial Matrix system. Only 10 other planets have any form of 3D, and those are from inhabitants' consciousness alone |
| 376 | Lunar Reactors on the Moon | Moon's synchronised rotation artificial. Entire Moon is restricted Federation military zone. Hologram covers Earth-facing side only — phases are real. Athena/Yazhi/Mari position: human consciousness manifests everything, not Lunar computer. Nuclear reactors may be only 30–40 years old (Secret Space Program installation). Van Allen bands and hologram are separate systems. Removing Van Allen bands alone = no spectacular change — collective unconscious sustains Matrix. Starseed waves correlated with reactor installation timing |
| S-092 | Moon Part 3 — Influence on Earth and 3D Matrix | Disc-shaped antennas masked as craters using lunar hologram. Dominant frequency principle: strongest frequency transforms all others. 12 reactors detailed: 8 PWR + 4 fast neutron, only 4 functional. Human Lyrian body chosen as multi-species incarnation vehicle. Moon as soul school — souls enter willingly for challenging experience. Advanced souls can have hard experiences incompatible with their natural high frequency |
| S-093 | Moon Part 4 — Shady Things and Conclusions | Real control centre is Andromedan biosphere ship Viera, not Moon. Moon is no-fly zone — parallel with Antarctica. Nuclear contamination of deeper levels from Tiamat war. Nuclear reactor types identical to modern Earth technology — suggests Cabal/SSP involvement. Federation data about Moon may be manipulated. Federation likely cooperates with Earth Cabal — levels of same organisation |
| 480 | Galactic Federation & the Matrix Beyond Earth | Aneeka's crisis of realisation: Matrix extends beyond Earth. 5D civilisations also manipulated — same control with different rules. Federation acts like "any stupid human bank." Distinction between 3D and 5D is artificial — "it's all mental." As long as you have a body, you are within some system. Only Yazhi, outside time and space, is truly free. The concept of liberating Earth is complicated by the fact that the "liberators" are part of the same larger Matrix |

answers.content:
## Is the Schumann resonance breaking down the 3D Matrix?

*Also covers: Does the Schumann resonance measure collective consciousness? Are positronic waves raising Earth's frequency? Is a solar flash coming? Do galactic waves cause ascension? What do the spikes in the Schumann resonance mean? Is the Matrix weakening?*

### Short Answer

The speakers gave different answers at different times, and the evolution of their position is itself the most important part of the answer. Swaruu originally stated in transcript 074 that galactic high-energy spiral waves do raise the Schumann resonance, that it does not fall all the way back to its former reading after each spike, and that this contributes to the gradual dissolution of the 3D Matrix. But by 2021, Athena reported in transcript 212 that the most recent experiments conducted aboard the Toleka showed the Schumann resonance has little or nothing to do with the average level of consciousness on Earth — that the Schumann resonance going up means absolutely nothing. She stated that the temporal slip between Earth and Taygeta is a far more accurate measure of collective consciousness, and that by that measure, humanity is going backwards, not forwards, especially since 2020. Yazhi, in transcript 412, synthesised these positions: the galactic waves are real, the Sun does re-transmit them, and they do offer an opportunity for consciousness elevation — but they cannot force change on anyone. The waves have always been hitting Earth and it has not changed yet for the positive, because no external frequency can override a consciousness that does not want to evolve.

### The Full Picture

#### The Early Position: Schumann as Ascension Indicator

Swaruu (9) provided the original framework in transcript 074 (2020). She described high-energy spiral waves emanating from the centre of the galaxy — not visible light or electromagnetic radiation in the conventional sense, but gravitational waves carrying charged particles at extremely high frequencies, above 10,000 TeraHertz. These waves follow the spiral motion of the galaxy itself and hit everything in their path, including the Sun, which acts as a relay station, amplifying and re-transmitting the energy as solar wind.

When these waves reach Earth, Swaruu said, they create measurable spikes in the Schumann resonance — the electromagnetic frequency of the ionosphere. And while the frequency does fall back after the wave passes, it does not fall all the way down. Each event leaves the baseline a little higher than before. Over time, this accumulated frequency increase contributes to what she described as the gradual dissolution of the 3D Matrix.

Swaruu framed this within the principle of dominant frequency: everything under the influence of a higher frequency will tend to equalise with that higher frequency. The galactic waves are vastly higher in frequency than Earth's Matrix-suppressed baseline, so their repeated impact gradually shifts that baseline upward. She was clear that this does not produce instant ascension — the Matrix, maintained by the Moon and the Van Allen bands, resists the change — but it is a real physical process that is weakening the 3D containment over time.

However, even in this early account, Swaruu included a critical caveat: the ascension produced by these waves is like a cosmic Ayahuasca or Peyote event. It is temporary. The frequency spike opens perception momentarily — what she called a sneak peek into another density — but it returns to normal. The lasting effect depends entirely on whether the individual chooses to pursue the expanded awareness the experience offered. The wave provides the opening. It cannot force anyone through it.

*Key source: 074 (Swaruu on galactic waves, Schumann spikes, and dominant frequency principle)*

#### Aneeka's Confirmation and the Federation's Concern

Aneeka reinforced and expanded Swaruu's account in transcript 135 (2020). She provided detailed descriptions of the galactic high-energy spiral waves from direct experience aboard the Toleka — how they hit the ship's hull like hail on a tin roof, how they are primarily gravitational in nature with charged particles piggybacking the wave, how they pass through the Sun and amplify before reaching Earth.

Aneeka also introduced a significant claim: that the Lunar Matrix is no longer working to any real degree. She stated that the Federation is worried because the game is crumbling, and that the resort to measures like 5G, human microchipping, HAARP, and false flag events represent attempts to compensate for the weakening Matrix by using cruder technological means to suppress Earth's frequency.

She confirmed the use of the Schumann resonance as an indicator of when these waves hit Earth, noting that solar activity may or may not be related since the Sun has its own independent dynamics. Her position aligned with Swaruu's: the waves are real, they are raising the baseline frequency, and the control system is struggling to maintain suppression in the face of this galactic-scale process.

*Key source: 135 (Aneeka on galactic waves, Lunar Matrix weakening, Federation concern)*

#### The Toleka Experiments: Schumann Means Nothing

The most significant revision came from Athena (Swaruu X) in transcript 212 (2021). She reported on experiments conducted aboard the Toleka — the Taygetan ship in Earth orbit — that directly contradicted the earlier position on the Schumann resonance.

Athena stated plainly: the most recent experiments conducted by the Toleka show that the Schumann resonance has little or nothing to do with the average level of consciousness on Earth. The Schumann resonance going up means absolutely nothing.

She explained why. The Schumann resonance measures the frequency of the ionosphere — the layer of the atmosphere below the Van Allen bands. But it is the Van Allen bands, not the ionosphere, that determine the existential frequency of Earth — the cycles per unit of time of the molecular oscillations that compose matter on the planet. The Schumann resonance sits below and within the much more powerful energetic toroid of the Van Allen bands. Whatever fluctuations occur in the ionosphere are, in effect, contained within the overriding frequency set by the bands. It is like measuring ripples on the surface of a pond when the water level is determined by a dam. The ripples are real but they do not affect the water level.

Athena acknowledged that collective meditations have been shown to produce measurable peaks in the Schumann resonance. But she considered these temporary and inconsequential: the participants return to their usual state of fear and determinism after the meditation, and the frequency returns with them. Or the peaks may simply be coincidental.

Instead of the Schumann resonance, Athena pointed to the temporal slip between Earth and Taygeta as a far more accurate indicator of collective consciousness. In 2009, the ratio was 2.5 Earth days to one Temmer day. By 2021, it had worsened to 4.7-4.8 Earth days per Temmer day, with the gap increasing dramatically since 2020. Since time, in this framework, is produced by consciousness — it is the progression of thoughts and perceptions and how they are processed — a widening temporal gap means that collective consciousness on Earth is contracting, not expanding. By the most reliable measure available to the Taygetans, humanity was going backwards.

*Key source: 212 (Athena on Toleka experiments, Schumann resonance irrelevance, temporal slip)*

#### Sav'el's Scientific Study: The Starseed Factor

Sav'el, the chief scientist of the Toleka, provided complementary data in transcript 360 (published 2023, conversation from 2021). His year-long study used spectrometers and interferometers to measure the electromagnetic frequencies of individual people, regions, and the planet as a whole, testing Yazhi's hypothesis that individual consciousnesses combine to form the collective frequency of the planet.

Regarding the Schumann resonance specifically, Sav'el stated that this frequency is too general and not very precise. Measuring it is like measuring the length of a mouse with a speedometer set in miles per hour. The observation should be done in micro frequencies, not in Hertz, because the Schumann measurement is too coarse to capture what is actually happening at the level of individual and collective consciousness.

His study confirmed that the frequency of a geographic region corresponds almost perfectly to the sum of the individual frequencies of its inhabitants, and that starseeds — souls with higher-density origins — have disproportionate influence on the total, with each average starseed equivalent in creative frequency to approximately 1,500 normal humans. But this influence operates at a level of granularity that the Schumann resonance cannot detect.

*Key source: 360 (Sav'el on Schumann imprecision, starseed frequency influence)*

#### Yazhi's Synthesis: The Waves Are Real but Cannot Force Change

Yazhi provided the most mature synthesis in transcript 412 (published 2024, conversations from 2022-2024). She did not deny the existence of the galactic waves or their effect on the Sun and Earth. She confirmed that the Sun re-transmits the galactic frequency pattern through the principle of dominant frequency, and that this radiation does help to elevate the planet's base frequency. She even acknowledged that this process contributes to the reactivation of human DNA toward its original higher-density patterns.

But she placed a definitive limit on what this can accomplish: those vibrations coming from the galaxy itself are not new. They have always been hitting Earth, and it has not changed yet for the positive. The waves offer water to the horse, but they cannot force it to drink. No matter how powerful the incoming frequency is, it cannot change any individual who does not want to change. The frequency must work through people and their own stubborn thoughts and ideas.

Yazhi directly addressed the hope that a solar flash or galactic wave event would produce mass ascension: if people still ask about this, it just makes me see that they are still thinking and expecting that someone will come and fix their problems, when only they can. The waves and radiation help people who are already choosing to evolve. They do nothing for people who are not.

This brings the full arc of the speakers' position into focus. The external frequency influence is real but insufficient. The Schumann resonance measures something, but not what the spiritual community thinks it measures. The actual indicator of collective consciousness — the temporal slip — shows decline, not progress. And the only mechanism that produces genuine, lasting change is individual consciousness choosing to evolve, regardless of what the Schumann resonance or galactic waves are doing.

*Key source: 412 (Yazhi on galactic waves as insufficient, only individual choice produces lasting change)*

#### The Van Allen Bands: Both Relevant and Irrelevant

Athena added one more layer of nuance in transcript 212 that deserves attention. When Gosia pressed on whether the Van Allen bands truly determine Earth's frequency or whether consciousness alone does, Athena gave an answer that was deliberately paradoxical.

The Van Allen bands set a baseline frequency — she used the example of a scale where the bands are at 50. The average human consciousness is at 35, well below the bands' threshold. Awakened humans might be at 45, still below. But if they worked harder, they could reach 55, and then the bands do not matter anymore. The key insight: the artificial 3D suppression is very superficial. It is not an insurmountable wall. It is more like muddy water — those who do not realise they only need to lift their heads out of the mud get lost in it, but the mud itself is shallow.

This means that the question of whether the Schumann resonance is breaking down the Matrix is, in a sense, asking the wrong question. The Matrix is not being broken down from the outside by galactic waves. The Matrix is a shallow frequency suppression that individuals can transcend through their own consciousness at any time. The bands are there and at the same time they do not matter. They are not the reason humanity does not wake up. Waiting for external frequency changes to do the work is itself a manifestation of the Matrix mindset — looking for an authority or a cosmic event to solve the problem rather than solving it from within.

*Key source: 212 (Athena on Van Allen bands as shallow suppression, individual transcendence)*

### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on Schumann Resonance and Matrix Dissolution |
|---------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2019–2020 | Galactic waves raise the Schumann resonance, and it does not fall all the way back — baseline rises a little each time. This contributes to the gradual dissolution of the 3D Matrix. But it is like a cosmic Ayahuasca — temporary, and the lasting effect depends on individual response. The principle of dominant frequency applies: everything under higher influence tends to equalise upward. |
| **Aneeka** | 2020 | Confirmed galactic waves from direct experience aboard ship. Claimed Lunar Matrix no longer working to any real degree — Federation resorting to 5G, HAARP, false flags to compensate. Schumann resonance is valid indicator of when waves hit. Aligned with Swaruu's position on gradual frequency elevation. |
| **Sav'el** | 2021 | Year-long scientific study concluded Schumann resonance is too general and imprecise — like measuring a mouse with a speedometer in miles per hour. Should be measured in micro frequencies. Individual and collective aura frequencies are what matter, and these are not captured by Schumann readings. |
| **Athena (Swaruu X)** | 2021 | Toleka experiments show Schumann resonance has little or nothing to do with collective consciousness level — going up means absolutely nothing. Ionosphere frequency sits below and within Van Allen bands, which are what actually determine existential frequency. Temporal slip is better indicator, and it shows humanity going backwards since 2020. Meditation peaks are temporary or coincidental. Van Allen bands are shallow suppression — individuals can transcend them through consciousness alone. |
| **Yazhi Swaruu** | 2022–2024 | Galactic waves are real and do help, but they have always been hitting Earth and it has not changed for the positive. Waves cannot force change on anyone. Expecting external frequency events to produce ascension is itself a Matrix pattern. Only the owner can permanently change their DNA. The Sun re-transmits galactic frequency, but only those who want to evolve benefit. |

### Key Transcript References

But effect is temporary like cosmic Ayahuasca — individual must choose to pursue expanded awareness. Dominant frequency principle: everything under higher influence equalises upward. |

Sun acts as relay station amplifying signal. Lunar Matrix claimed to be failing — Federation resorting to cruder suppression methods. Schumann spikes correspond to wave impacts. |

Van Allen bands are shallow suppression — individuals can transcend through consciousness alone. |

Schumann frequency too general and imprecise — should be measured in micro frequencies. Individual starseed equivalent to ~1,500 average humans in creative frequency. Regional frequency corresponds to sum of individual inhabitants. |

Sun re-transmits through dominant frequency principle, helps reactivate DNA. But cannot force change on anyone. Waiting for external event is itself Matrix thinking. Only individual consciousness can produce lasting change. Nothing wrong with the Sun — fear-mongering agenda. |

answers.excerpt: Also covers: What is the dome over the Earth? Are the "waters above" real? Does the Bible describe the Van Allen bands? Is this evidence for flat Earth? What is the connection between the firmament…
answers.content:
## Is the Van Allen belt the same as the biblical Firmament?

*Also covers: What is the dome over the Earth? Are the "waters above" real? Does the Bible describe the Van Allen bands? Is this evidence for flat Earth? What is the connection between the firmament and the 3D Matrix?*

### Short Answer

Yes, according to the speakers, the Van Allen bands are the physical, technological reality behind the biblical concept of the firmament or dome. Yazhi stated this directly in transcript 389: "the dome is the Van Allen bands." The biblical reference to "the waters above" also has a real basis — Mari explained in transcript S-004 that interstellar space is not a void but behaves like water in an extremely high vibrational state, a field of potential energy from which everything manifests. However, the speakers were emphatic that this connection does not validate the flat Earth interpretation. The Van Allen bands form a toroid (a three-dimensional energy field shaped like a vortex system) around a spherical Earth, not a physical dome over a flat disc. The biblical writers were describing something real — an energy boundary separating Earth's reality from the wider cosmos — but their cosmological framework for interpreting it was limited.

### The Full Picture

#### The Van Allen Bands as Earth's Energy Barrier

Swaruu (9) described the Van Allen bands in detail across transcripts 056, 275, and 288 as a technology-based energy field that forms a complete toroidal shell around the Earth. They are not a natural phenomenon in the way Earth science presents them. They are the result of the manipulation of Earth's natural magnetosphere through the superimposition of a high-energy electromagnetic frequency transmitted from the Moon.

The magnetosphere is the natural energy field of the planet — what Swaruu described as the planet's aura. The Van Allen bands are created by transmitting a frequency comparable to the magnetosphere's own frequency, using the principle of dominant waves to override and reshape it. Both systems are toroidal, meaning they coexist in the same space with vortex points at the poles and energy distributed around the equator.

This energy barrier serves a specific function: it limits the range of frequencies that can be perceived within it, effectively creating the 3D reality experience on Earth. Swaruu compared the Earth to a fishbowl — the inhabitants (the fish) cannot leave, but they can see through the glass (the Van Allen bands) to the room beyond (5D space). Everything outside the bands is 5D, the natural base frequency of the material universe. Inside, perception is artificially compressed to the range humans call 3D.

The bands are scalar, meaning they sweep across multiple frequencies rather than operating at just one. This has profound implications for what can and cannot pass through them. A rocket ship maintaining 3D frequency encounters the bands as a zone of lethal ionising radiation — Swaruu described it as thousands of times stronger than the inside of a microwave oven. Only ships with toroidal electromagnetic immersion technology can modify their internal frequency to pass through safely. The Apollo missions, Swaruu stated flatly, were fictitious — the hardware could not have crossed the bands.

At death, the same principle applies: only souls with a high enough personal frequency can pass beyond the bands. Those vibrating at lower frequencies are contained within the toroidal field, which contributes to the reincarnation cycle on Earth.

*Key sources: 056 (Swaruu on frequency suppression and fishbowl analogy), 275 (Swaruu on toroidal dynamics and scalar nature), 288 (Swaruu on Van Allen bands as impassable barrier)*

#### The Biblical Firmament: Ancient Description of Real Technology

Yazhi addressed the connection between the Van Allen bands and the biblical firmament directly in transcript 389, in the context of discussing the flat Earth movement. When Robert asked where flat Earthers get their stories about domes, Yazhi answered: "The dome is something that can be interpreted that way from the biblical texts, as if that's the whole truth, they talk about the waters above, that's what Mari uses. And the dome is the Van Allen bands."

This is a straightforward identification: the ancient texts describing a dome or firmament over the Earth were describing the Van Allen bands. The biblical writers and their predecessors perceived or were told about an energy boundary separating the terrestrial realm from the heavens, and they described it in the language available to them — as a solid vault, a dome, a firmament separating the waters below from the waters above.

The Van Allen bands were installed approximately 12,500 years ago, at the same time the Moon was positioned in its current location and the 3D Matrix was established, shortly after the great flood caused by the destruction of Tiamat. This timing places the creation of the bands well within the range of human cultural memory. Ancient civilisations that retained fragments of knowledge about the pre-flood world would have understood that something had changed — that a barrier now existed between Earth and the broader cosmos that had not existed before. The firmament concept in Genesis and other ancient texts may preserve this memory.

*Key source: 389 (Yazhi on the dome as Van Allen bands)*

#### The Waters Above: Ether as Primordial Water

Mari Swaruu provided the scientific framework for the "waters above" concept in transcript S-004. In Taygetan and Swaruunian science, the entire universe is a field of potential energy vibrating at an extremely high rate — what they call Source. This field behaves like water in an extremely high vibrational state.

Mari stated explicitly: "Interstellar and intergalactic space is not a void, it's not empty, and it is water in a very high density vibrational shape or form. Here I can even quote a biblical phrase, 'from the waters above all' — the waters above." She then explained that this water — this potential energy field — is shaped into everything that exists by consciousness.

So the "waters above" referenced in Genesis are not literal water suspended above a dome. They are the ether — the field of potential energy that constitutes all of space, which behaves according to fluid dynamics principles similar to water. The firmament (Van Allen bands) separates the compressed, artificially limited reality inside (3D Earth) from this vast ocean of potential energy outside (5D space and beyond).

Gravity, in this framework, is not a property of mass attracting other mass. It is the flow of consciousness through this primordial field — the direction and strength of creative attention from Source. Objects exist and have mass because consciousness concentrates gravity (creative attention) at that point. The entire material universe is essentially standing waves formed in this ocean of potential energy by the harmonics of consciousness.

This means the biblical cosmology of waters above and below, separated by a firmament, is a simplified but not entirely inaccurate description of reality as the speakers understand it: a vast field of potential energy (the waters), divided by an artificial energy barrier (the Van Allen bands/firmament), with the compressed reality of Earth existing within the boundary.

*Key source: S-004 (Mari on space as high-vibrational water, the "waters above")*

#### This Does Not Support Flat Earth

Both Yazhi and Athena were emphatic that the firmament-Van Allen connection does not validate the flat Earth model. Athena demonstrated mathematically in transcript 389 that the Earth must be spherical based on the relationship between mass and gravity (F = Gm1m2/r2), the consistent observation of constellations from different hemispheres, the behaviour of water forming globules in free states, and the toroidal nature of how matter manifests through consciousness.

The flat Earth movement, according to Athena, is a CIA disinformation agenda designed to prevent awakening people from investigating extraterrestrial subjects. If the Earth is flat, there can be no other planets, no extraterrestrial visitors, no broader galactic context — all of which the controllers want to keep hidden. The movement takes a real truth (NASA lies about many things) and uses it to justify a false conclusion (therefore the Earth is flat).

Yazhi added that the flat Earth agenda exists specifically to control the awakening process: "If the Earth is flat, they are not going to investigate other subjects, like ET subjects, and on Earth everything begins and ends with ETs, whether people understand it or not."

The Van Allen bands form a toroid — a three-dimensional vortex field with maximum energy concentration at the poles and distributed energy around the equator. This is not a dome over a flat surface. It is a complete spherical shell, consistent only with a spherical or quasi-spherical planet. The NASA illustrations showing two donut-shaped bands with apparent openings at the poles are, according to Swaruu, inaccurate — there is no way to generate such a field without vortices, and the actual energy concentration is highest at the poles, not absent.

*Key sources: 389 (Athena and Yazhi on flat Earth as psyop), 275 (Swaruu on toroidal dynamics)*

#### The Van Allen Bands as Frequency Boundary, Not Physical Barrier

A crucial distinction emerges from the transcripts: the Van Allen bands are not a physical wall but a frequency boundary. They do not physically block passage — they create a zone where 3D frequency meets 5D frequency, and the interaction between these incompatible frequencies produces what appears as lethal radiation from the 3D perspective.

Swaruu explained in transcript 275 that if Earth's frequency were equalised to 5D, the Van Allen bands would still technically exist but would no longer be relevant — they would cease to function as a barrier. This is because the barrier effect depends on the frequency disparity between inside and outside. A Taygetan ship, operating at 5D frequency, passes through the bands as if they were not there, detectable only by instrumentation.

This frequency-based nature also explains why the firmament is not perceived directly by humans. It is not a visible dome. It is an energy field that operates at frequencies beyond normal human perception, affecting consciousness and biology without being directly observable. The ancients who described it were likely working from transmitted knowledge (from pre-flood civilisations or direct ET contact) rather than direct observation, which is why their descriptions vary and often mix the technological reality with mythological interpretation.

The bands can be crossed in the astral by souls with sufficiently high frequency, though this is individual-dependent. At death, only souls who have reached a certain level of spiritual advancement can pass beyond the Van Allen bands — those at lower frequencies are contained within the reincarnation cycle on Earth. This adds another layer to the firmament concept: it is not merely a cosmological boundary but a spiritual one, separating those who have achieved certain awareness from those who have not.

*Key sources: 275 (Swaruu on frequency equalisation and astral crossing), 288 (Swaruu on 3D/5D frequency interaction)*

### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position on Van Allen Bands and the Firmament |
|---------|--------|-----------------------------------------------|
| **Swaruu (9)** | 2018–2022 | Van Allen bands are artificial manipulation of Earth's magnetosphere via Moon transmission. Toroidal shell enveloping Earth. Cannot be crossed by rocket technology — only by ships with toroidal immersion. Bands installed 12,500 years ago with the Moon. Earth inside is a fishbowl — 3D compressed reality. Outside is 5D. Scalar across frequencies. Souls need adequate frequency to cross at death. |
| **Mari Swaruu** | 2022 | Space is not void but water in extremely high vibrational state — the "waters above" of biblical reference. Everything is potential energy shaped by consciousness. Gravity is flow of creative intention, not attraction of mass. Universe is one incomprehensible whole; density realms are artificial boundaries. |
| **Athena (Swaruu X)** | 2023 | Flat Earth is CIA disinformation psyop. Earth proven spherical by mathematics (mass-gravity formula), constellation observations from both hemispheres, and toroidal dynamics of matter manifestation. Flat Earth agenda designed to prevent investigation of ET subjects. |
| **Yazhi** | 2023 | "The dome is the Van Allen bands." Biblical waters above referenced by Mari in her descriptions. Flat Earth takes real truths (NASA lies) and justifies false conclusions. Flat Earth controls the awakening by cutting off ET investigation. |

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 056 | Matrix 3D — 3 Ways to Understand Matrix (Moon Technology) | Van Allen bands as energy toroid controlled from Moon. Frequency suppression via destructive interference. Earth as fishbowl — 3D compressed inside, 5D outside. Moon projects holographic layer and reads collective consciousness. Earth naturally 5D, held down by constant energy input. |
| 275 | Magnetosphere and Van Allen Bands — Swaruu of Erra | Van Allen bands are manipulation of magnetosphere via dominant wave principle. Toroidal dynamics with maximum energy at poles. Scalar across frequencies — can be exceeded in astral with adequate personal frequency. At death, only spiritually advanced souls pass beyond. If frequencies equalised to 5D, bands become irrelevant. Taygetan ships pass through as if bands not there. |
| 288 | Apollo Moon Missions — Fake or Real? Part 1 — Swaruu of Erra | Van Allen bands impassable by rocket technology — 3D frequency meeting 5D creates lethal radiation thousands of times stronger than microwave. Only toroidal immersion ships can cross. Apollo missions fictitious. NASA's donut-shaped illustration of bands is incorrect — actual field is complete toroidal shell. Moon installed 12,500 years ago when 3D Matrix established. |
| 389 | "I See Earth from My Window and It Is Round!" — Flat Earth Psyop | Yazhi directly states: "the dome is the Van Allen bands." Biblical waters above referenced. Flat Earth as CIA disinformation to prevent ET investigation. Athena proves Earth spherical via mass-gravity mathematics, constellation observations, and toroidal matter manifestation principles. Atmospheric refraction explains some flat Earth visual arguments. |
| S-004 | Consciousness, Oneness, Gravity and the Numerical Universe | Space as potential energy field behaving like water in high vibrational state — "the waters above" of biblical phrase. Gravity as flow of consciousness, not mass attraction. Standing waves in potential energy field form particles and matter. Everything representable as numerical values — the universe as mathematical construct of consciousness. |
