answers.title: Can real people give birth to unreal people, or vice versa?
answers.excerpt: Yes — children born from a pairing of a real person and an unreal person can be either real or unreal. Swaruu (9) stated this directly: "Some may be unreal, some real." There is no rule that a real…
answers.content:
## Can real people give birth to unreal people, or vice versa?

### Short Answer

Yes — children born from a pairing of a real person and an unreal person can be either real or unreal. Swaruu (9) stated this directly: "Some may be unreal, some real." There is no rule that a real parent guarantees a real child, or that an unreal parent prevents one. The soul enters the body separately from the biological process; birth is not what makes someone "real." From the Taygetan perspective, the soul-body connection begins roughly two to three weeks after conception, and whether that connection happens at all — and whether it persists — depends on frequency compatibility and the choices of the soul involved, not on the parents' status.

This becomes even more complex when you consider Yazhi's position that the real/unreal distinction is itself relative and subjective. A person might be "real" from one observer's perspective and "unreal" from another's. The biological process of birth, pregnancy, and family life all function identically regardless — an autopsy would reveal no difference between a real and an unreal body. The distinction lies entirely on the non-material side: whether there is an individual consciousness from Source inhabiting that body, or whether it runs on what the speakers describe as a collective Matrix programme.

### The Full Picture

#### Birth Is Not What Makes Someone Real

One of the most counterintuitive claims in this material is that unreal people are not born in the conventional sense. Swaruu (9) was emphatic about this in the original 2018 "Not Real People" transcript: unreal people "appear as energy" — they manifest when a real person's attention requires them, much like scenery in a film, and they dissolve when no longer observed. They are, in Swaruu's framing, no different from a phone booth or a lamp post — just potential energy taking human form.

But Gosia immediately pressed on the obvious problem: what about family members? What about people you *saw* being born? Swaruu's answer was striking. If you investigate any person — real or unreal — you will find they have a birth, a history, a life. That history is not evidence of reality. It is the Matrix programme expanding to accommodate your attention. "The minute you investigate their lives, they all will have a history and a birth," Swaruu explained. Watching someone be born does not tell you whether they are real or not — "you are just seeing another part of the programme."

This means the biological act of giving birth is not itself a gateway between the real and the unreal. It is one more element of the experiential framework the Matrix provides. A real person can give birth to a child who turns out to be unreal, and a person who appears to be unreal — a body running on Matrix programming — can produce a child who is genuinely ensouled.

*Key source: 009 (Not Real People)*

#### Children of Mixed Pairings

When Gosia asked directly about children between a real person and an unreal one, Swaruu (9) gave a concise answer: "Some may be unreal, some real. For what it all matters, in the end the experience is what counts, so for all it matters they are all real."

This framing is important. Swaruu did not offer a mechanism for predicting which children would be real and which would not. There is no genetic inheritance of "realness" — the soul is not passed down through DNA. Instead, the soul enters the body independently, based on frequency compatibility. A body is essentially a vehicle; whether a soul chooses to inhabit it depends on whether the frequency of that body and its circumstances match what the soul needs for its experience.

Swaruu also noted that "many real people marry, have children, love and live with unreal people." This is presented as completely normal — not a tragedy or a mistake, but simply part of how the Matrix experience works. The real person's love for their unreal partner or child is still meaningful, still real as an experience, even if the other party has no individual soul from Source.

The inverse is also true and perhaps more striking: an unreal person can become real. Swaruu described how unreal bodies can serve as "portals" for walk-in souls. At some point, a previously unreal person — including a child — might suddenly become inhabited by a genuine soul, becoming real "from a certain date of entry." This means that a child born to two apparently unreal parents could, through the walk-in mechanism, become a fully real person with a Source connection.

*Key sources: 009 (Not Real People), 320 (Unreal People Becoming All Real?)*

#### The Walk-In Complication

The walk-in phenomenon fundamentally blurs any neat family tree of "real" versus "unreal." Yazhi expanded on this in 2022, explaining that a non-real person's body "can suddenly become real" when a walk-in soul enters it — "which is very common." She stressed that this adds enormous subjectivity to the question: you cannot declare someone permanently real or permanently unreal, because their status can change.

This means a parent who was unreal at the time of their child's birth might later become real through a walk-in event. Or a child born apparently ensouled might, through the process Swaruu (9) described of losing soul connection — depression, disengagement, living against one's nature — gradually become functionally unreal. Swaruu used the example of an artist forced into a desk job selling insurance: "Depression after depression. Doing the same in boredom over and over. That Soul loses all interest in going into that body." The silver thread of connection thins, and the person may end up as little more than a shell — potentially opening them to the same organic portal dynamics that characterise the unreal.

So the question "can real people give birth to unreal people?" must be understood as a snapshot in time, not a permanent verdict. Family relationships involve beings whose status can shift across a lifetime.

*Key sources: 009 (Not Real People), 320 (Unreal People Becoming All Real?)*

#### The Matrix Creates Family Histories

The Dimensional Mirrors transcripts from Athena and Yazhi add another layer. When a being from outside the Earth Matrix — a starseed or a Step Down — enters 3D, the Matrix must create a mathematically coherent backstory to justify their existence. Athena explained this through what she called the "mathematical insertion principle": you cannot insert anything into a Matrix without also creating the underlying reason for its existence, as understood by the receiving Matrix.

In practical terms, this means the Matrix generates birth certificates, childhood memories, family relationships — even the memories of family members who "saw" the starseed being born and growing up. As Athena put it: "Starseeds who know they are Step Downs but their families continue to insist they are human because they saw them born and grow up — being that those memories would be implants of the Matrix itself."

This has profound implications for the birth question. A real person (a starseed) might have parents who genuinely remember giving birth to them, raising them, watching their first steps — and yet none of those events happened in the way the parents remember. The Matrix generated a coherent family narrative to accommodate the starseed's insertion. Are those parents real or unreal? Did the birth "really" happen? From the 3D perspective, everything checks out. From the 5D perspective, the entire family history might be a mathematical accommodation.

Yazhi elaborated that this story-generation is not proactive — the Matrix does not create histories unprompted. It generates them when someone looks with enough interest and energy. "What you seek, you find, even if it did not exist before." An unquestioning family member will never encounter contradictions in the starseed's history. But the history itself exists only because the looking creates it.

*Key sources: 427 (Dimensional Mirrors), 428 (Dimensional Mirrors 2)*

#### Consciousness Before Birth

The question of children's realness connects to a deeper point Swaruu (9) made about when consciousness begins. In the "Why Do We Suffer?" transcript, Gosia asked about babies and children who suffer — how could a blank slate manifest suffering? Swaruu was direct: consciousness does not start at birth or even at conception. "The focus creating its reality, even as a little fetus that gets aborted, comes from its former life and understanding."

The soul-body connection starts two to three weeks after conception. Before that point, the developing embryo is "just a lump of cells." After that window, a soul may begin inhabiting the body — but not every body will attract a soul. This is the mechanism by which a pregnancy can produce either a real or an unreal child: whether a soul enters depends on frequency compatibility, not on the biology of the parents.

A mother's thought patterns also influence the developing child, Swaruu noted. But those influences operate at the level of frequency — shaping what kind of soul (if any) becomes compatible with the body being formed. A real mother with high awareness might create a frequency environment more attractive to an incoming soul. But there is no guarantee. The decision ultimately belongs to the soul, not the parents.

*Key source: 026 (Why Do We Suffer?)*

#### Soul Groups and Family Incarnation Patterns

For families where members are genuinely ensouled, Swaruu (9) described a pattern of soul groups incarnating together across lifetimes. Family members are not random — they are souls who share a frequency match, often incarnating in rotating roles. "Your father being your sister then your mother, then you," Swaruu explained, noting that souls tend to wait roughly two generations before re-entering physicality: "it's quite certain to say that someone is their own great-grandfather."

But this pattern applies only to real family members — souls choosing to incarnate together. An unreal family member would not participate in these soul-group dynamics. They would simply be part of the Matrix scenery around the real person's incarnation, providing the context and contrast needed for the experience. Swaruu acknowledged that "many families are just genetics and forced social agreements, but hold nothing in common" — a description that could encompass families where real and unreal members coexist without any deeper soul-group connection.

*Key source: 021 (Families and Afterlife)*

#### Yazhi's Relativistic View: Everyone Might Be a Tulpa

Yazhi pushed the entire framework further in her "Tulpas" discussion by arguing that everyone — real and unreal alike — is fundamentally an idea, a "tulpa" held by Source. From this perspective, the distinction between real and unreal people becomes just another concept, another idea layered on top of a reality that is itself made entirely of ideas.

"What makes them different from us as ideas?" Yazhi asked about backdrop people. When Gosia invoked the soul spectrometer as proof of the difference, Yazhi laughed and noted the spectrometer "is infamous for its errors." She was not dismissing the real/unreal distinction entirely, but suggesting that it operates within a framework that is itself relative. "Extreme matrixed backdrops" — the ones truly as empty as street posts — do exist. But the boundary between a "real" person and an "animated" one may be far less clear-cut than the original 2018 framework suggested.

This matters for the birth question because it dissolves the assumption of a hard binary. If realness is a spectrum rather than a switch, then a child born to any combination of parents might exist anywhere on that spectrum — and might move along it during their lifetime.

*Key source: 445 (Tulpas — "Everything Is a Tulpa")*

#### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

The understanding of backdrop people and family relationships evolved significantly across the speakers:

**Swaruu (9) (2018)** presented the clearest binary: roughly one in five people is real, the rest are Matrix programmes. Children of mixed pairings "can be either." Unreal people are "not born" but the Matrix will generate a complete birth history if anyone investigates. Despite the stark framing, she consistently emphasised treating all people equally.

**Yazhi (2021–2023)** challenged the binary, arguing the real/unreal distinction is "relative and subjective." She saw both Matrixes (Earth and wider) as the same system, suggested unreal people exist outside Earth too, and proposed that at the deepest level everyone is a "tulpa" — an idea held by Source. She maintained that extreme backdrops exist but warned against thinking in absolutes.

**Mari Swaruu (2023–2024)** took the most practical approach, framing false people as an intermittent rather than fixed attribute. Her emphasis was on energy management: don't waste attention on irrelevant people, whether they are "real" or not. She added the concept of organic portals being used by lower astral entities as monitoring agents, giving the backdrop phenomenon a more active, adversarial dimension.

**Athena (2022–2023)** contributed the mathematical insertion framework, showing how the Matrix generates family histories and birth stories to accommodate the presence of beings from outside the 3D system — meaning that the very evidence people use to prove someone was "really born" might itself be a Matrix creation.

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 009 | Not Real People | Core transcript — children of real+unreal can be either; unreal people not born but Matrix creates birth histories; walk-ins can make unreal bodies real |
| 021 | Families and Afterlife | Soul groups incarnating together; frequency match determines family; role-swapping across incarnations |
| 026 | Why Do We Suffer? | Consciousness active before birth; soul-body connection starts 2-3 weeks after conception; mother's thought patterns influence child |
| 320 | Unreal People Becoming All Real? | Relativity of real/unreal distinction; walk-in possibility; biologically identical in autopsy; non-real people programmed by Matrix |
| 427 | Dimensional Mirrors | Matrix creates family histories for inserted persons; starseed birth memories may be Matrix implants; organic portals as empty mirrors |
| 428 | Dimensional Mirrors 2 | Matrix generates birth certificates and paperwork; story-generation activated by investigation; NPCs vs real consciousnesses |
| 445 | Tulpas — "Everything Is a Tulpa" | Everyone is an idea/tulpa; real/unreal distinction is itself an idea; spectrometer errors; extreme backdrops vs gradient |
| S-049 | The False People and You | Intermittent nature of false people; practical energy management approach; self-questioning proves realness |
| S-205 | Monitoring Spirits | Organic portals as empty shells; soulless people as projections of real souls' minds; people with soul can lose connection |

answers.filename: Do backdrop people have souls.md
answers.title: Do backdrop people have souls? Do they have an afterlife?
answers.excerpt: No — according to all speakers, backdrop people do not have individual souls from Source. Swaruu of Erra stated that pointing a "soul spectrometer" at them would return the same reading as a lamp…
answers.content:
## Q11: Do backdrop people have souls? Do they have an afterlife?

### Short Answer

No — according to all speakers, backdrop people do not have individual souls from Source. Swaruu of Erra stated that pointing a "soul spectrometer" at them would return the same reading as a lamp post. They operate through a collective hive-mind signal — the same Matrix mainframe that generates the rest of the 3D environment. They are, in Swaruu's blunt formulation, "just energy that looks like people," no different in principle from a newspaper stand or a garbage bin.

Because they have no individual soul, they have no individual afterlife. The afterlife — as described extensively across the Cosmic Agency material — is the experience of a soul expanding back into its fuller identity after the body's senses shut off, perceiving realms that match its frequency. Backdrop people have no "fuller identity" to expand into. When their purpose ends or the attention sustaining them withdraws, they simply cease — returning to the undifferentiated potential energy of the ether. In Swaruu's early framework, at a 5D transition, unreal people "cease to exist or move to another timeline — no longer perceivable from 5D Earth."

However, there are important caveats. Yazhi Swaruu complicated this picture by arguing that backdrop people are ideas — and since everything, including us, is an idea held by Source, the boundary between "souled" and "soulless" may be less absolute than it first appears. And all speakers agreed on one critical point: an unreal body can become real at any moment through a walk-in, where a soul enters the empty vessel. The status is not permanent.

### The Full Picture

#### What Animates Backdrop People If Not a Soul?

Swaruu of Erra provided the most technically detailed answer to this question in transcript 009. Backdrop people are animated by a collective hive-mind signal originating from the lunar mainframe — the same Matrix computer system that generates the 3D reality itself. Their thinking is not local; it does not originate in their own brain but comes from the Matrix mainframe and is decoded through the brain. What they think, "everyone thinks," with only slight variations depending on their assigned situational role.

This means their reactions, while appearing sentient, are scripted. Swaruu compared it to a limited interactive computer program running an if-then-else algorithm: *if* you talk about spirituality, *then* they say something like "I read Krishnamurti" — giving the impression of depth while actually running a pre-made reaction from a finite menu. There may be hundreds of thousands of such reactions, making the simulation convincing, but there is no actual consciousness behind them.

Yazhi elaborated on this mechanism in transcript 320: the Matrix itself programs non-real people through the institutions of childhood — school, church, work — creating the if-then-else reaction maps. The Matrix is in turn programmed by the collective of real people. So the real people manifest what they want, this modifies the Matrix, and the Matrix then programs the behaviour of the non-real ones accordingly. It is a feedback loop — but the backdrop people are the output, not participants with agency.

Mari Swaruu framed it more accessibly in S-205: soulless people are "more projections and more egregore manifestations created by the powerful minds of those who do have souls." They work with "a limited program and limited interactivity," quickly becoming defensive or irritable when pushed outside their programming. In S-049, she described them as "energy projections and creations of our minds" with "no one inside them" — "as lifeless and as hollow as a telephone booth."

The consistent answer across all speakers: backdrop people are animated by the collective unconscious of the Matrix, not by an individual connection to Source. They are the environment responding, not a person experiencing.

*Key sources: 009 (Not Real People — Swaruu), 320 (Unreal People Becoming All Real? — Yazhi), S-049 (The False People and You — Mari), S-205 (Monitoring Spirits — Mari)*

#### What Happens to Them at Death?

This question is rarely addressed directly in the transcripts — precisely because, from the Taygetan perspective, there is nothing to address. The afterlife is the experience of a soul shedding its body and expanding back into its fuller nature. If there is no soul, there is no experience to expand into and no one to have it.

The closest direct statement comes from Swaruu of Erra in transcript 020 ("How to Be a 5D Person"), discussing what happens to unreal people during a collective shift to 5D: they "cease to exist or in another timeline — no longer perceivable from 5D Earth." This is not death in the sense that a souled being experiences death. It is more like a program ending — or a dream character dissolving when the dreamer wakes up.

The immersion technology discussion in transcript 415 provides a revealing parallel. When discussing what happens if an immersion pod is disconnected, Yazhi and Athena explained that an NPC avatar — a body animated by the Matrix rather than a soul — simply dies when its signal source is removed. If the life force sustaining it is insufficient, the body ceases to function. A stronger NPC might survive and continue on the Matrix's collective unconscious signal. But there is no afterlife journey, no soul departing to higher planes — the body was a terminal, and when the signal stops, the terminal goes dark.

This stands in stark contrast to what happens when a souled being dies. As described across the afterlife transcripts (covered in Q1 and Q3), a souled person's bodily senses shut off and they perceive the astral realms that were always present but filtered out by the five senses. They experience expansion, reintegration with their greater identity, and eventually choose their next incarnation. The entire process depends on having a consciousness that exists independently of the body — which backdrop people, by definition, do not.

Mari Swaruu's description of the death process in S-087 and S-219 is exclusively concerned with souled beings — their vibrational frequency determining what realms they perceive after death, their ego metamorphosing into a greater cosmic identity. At no point does she describe or imply an equivalent process for soulless people. The silence is itself the answer: there is no afterlife for something that was never alive in the soul sense to begin with.

*Key sources: 020 (How to Be a 5D Person — Swaruu), 415 (Immersion Technology — Yazhi, Athena), S-087 (Lower Astral Ideas and Programming — Mari), S-219 (On Souls and Entities — Mari)*

#### The Walk-In Exception: When an Empty Shell Gains a Soul

All speakers agreed that the soulless status of a backdrop person is not necessarily permanent. The body can become a portal for a walk-in — a soul that enters and begins inhabiting the previously empty vessel.

Swaruu of Erra explained this in transcript 009: unreal people "can gain a soul, mainly as a walk-in. That's because they are portals. And it depends on their frequency." The frequency of the empty body — which depends on the role that real people around it have assigned to it — determines what kind of soul can enter. A body in a high-frequency environment might attract a starseed walk-in; one in a low-frequency environment might attract a lower astral entity.

Yazhi confirmed in transcript 320 that this is "very common" — a non-real person-body can "suddenly become real" from the specific date of the walk-in's entry. This is one of the factors that makes any absolute census of real vs unreal people impossible, since the ratio is constantly shifting.

Mari expanded on both directions in S-150 and S-151. Star races use immersion technology to place souls into NPC bodies as an ethical method of entering Earth — the body was formerly animated only by the collective unconscious signal, and now a real soul inhabits it. But the reverse is also true: regressive forces can occupy empty bodies for their own purposes, and the most common form of what people call demonic possession involves a lower astral entity commandeering a soulless body to work against souled individuals in the material world.

This means a backdrop person who gains a soul through a walk-in would then, upon the death of that body, have the same afterlife as any other souled being — because it is the soul, not the body, that determines what happens after death. The body was always just a vehicle; the question is whether anyone is driving it.

*Key sources: 009 (Not Real People — Swaruu), 320 (Unreal People Becoming All Real? — Yazhi), S-150 (Walk-Ins Part 1 — Mari), S-151 (Walk-Ins Part 2 — Mari)*

#### Yazhi's Philosophical Complication: Are We So Different?

While the practical answer — no soul, no afterlife — is consistent across speakers, Yazhi introduced a philosophical layer that unsettles the neat distinction.

In transcript 445 ("Everything Is a Tulpa"), Yazhi argued that everything in existence is a tulpa — a thought-form, an idea. Reality is a set of ideas. A person is a set of ideas. An unreal person is also a set of ideas. "What makes them different?" she asked. "What makes us all so sure they are empty shells?" When Gosia invoked the soul spectrometer, Yazhi conceded that "extreme Matrixed back drops" exist but noted that "the spectrometer is infamous for its errors."

If everything is an idea held by Source, and Source includes everything that has ever existed, then even backdrop people are, at some level, ideas within the mind of Source. They are not souled in the individual sense — they do not have a personal connection to Source as a distinct point of awareness — but they are not nothing either. They are the collective unconscious expressing itself, which is itself ultimately a manifestation of Source.

This does not mean backdrop people have an afterlife in any practical sense — Yazhi never claimed that. But it means the boundary between "real" and "unreal" may be less like a wall and more like a gradient. At one end: Source itself, fully conscious, holding all ideas. At the other: the most basic energy manifestation that merely takes the shape of a person for a moment. Souled beings sit somewhere in between, and backdrop people sit closer to the basic-energy end — but they are not entirely separate from the field of consciousness that generates everything.

Swaruu of Erra touched on something similar in 009, when she told Gosia that if enough attention-energy is placed on an unreal person, it can begin to manifest something more — not quite a soul, but a deeper layer of programming, a richer script. The experience for the real observer becomes more real, even if the unreal person does not gain individual consciousness from it. The line blurs at the edges.

*Key sources: 445 (Tulpas — "Everything Is a Tulpa" — Yazhi, Gosia), 009 (Not Real People — Swaruu, Gosia)*

#### Can Backdrop People Suffer?

A natural follow-up that the transcripts address: if backdrop people have no soul, do they actually suffer? Or do they only appear to?

Swaruu was direct in 009. When Gosia asked whether unreal people feel emotions, Swaruu answered: "They will mimic having those emotions. There is no one inside, it's a program for you (and/or others) to see." The emotional display — pain, joy, anger, grief — is part of the simulation. If you punch an unreal person, they will bleed and they will react angrily, "but it's all a program." There is no subjective experience behind it — no one is suffering.

This is consistent with the broader metaphysical framework. Suffering requires a consciousness that interprets an experience as suffering. If the reactions are coming from a hive-mind algorithm rather than an individual awareness, there is processing but no experience. It is the difference between a computer printing an error message and a person feeling frustrated.

However, the practical instruction from every speaker remains the same: treat everyone as if they are real, because you cannot know. Swaruu emphasised this repeatedly — "you must always treat everyone with the same respect." The concept is not meant to license cruelty or indifference. It is meant to help real people understand why some individuals seem constitutionally incapable of awakening, and to help starseeds conserve their energy rather than pouring it into people who, by their nature, cannot receive it.

*Key source: 009 (Not Real People — Swaruu, Gosia)*

#### Summary: The Soul Status of Backdrop People

| Aspect | Status |
|--------|--------|
| **Individual soul from Source?** | No — animated by collective hive mind / Matrix signal |
| **Can they feel emotions?** | They mimic emotions; no subjective experience behind the display |
| **Do they have an afterlife?** | No — when the body ceases, there is no soul to continue |
| **What happens at a 5D shift?** | They cease to exist or move to another timeline |
| **Can they become real?** | Yes — through walk-in (soul enters the empty body) |
| **Can real people become empty?** | Yes — through soul retraction from trauma, boredom, or loss of purpose |
| **Are they "nothing"?** | Philosophically, they are ideas within the field of Source like everything else — but they lack individual awareness |

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 009 | Not Real People | Foundational: no soul, hive mind animation, spectrometer = lamp post, emotions mimicked, walk-in possibility, equal treatment imperative. |
| 020 | How to Be a 5D Person | Unreal people "cease to exist or in another timeline" during 5D transition. |
| 320 | Unreal People Becoming All Real? | Biologically identical but difference is non-material side. If-then-else programming. Walk-in "very common." |
| 415 | Immersion Technology — Gosia and Yazhi | NPC avatar dies when disconnected from signal. Empty NPC receives immersion (walk-in). No afterlife process for signal-dependent bodies. |
| 445 | Tulpas — "Everything Is a Tulpa" | Philosophical blurring: backdrop people are ideas, but so are we. Spectrometer has errors. Gradient rather than wall. |
| S-049 | The False People and You | "As lifeless and as hollow as a telephone booth." Energy projections with no one inside. Intermittent status. |
| S-087 | Lower Astral Ideas and Programming | Death perception shift applies only to souled beings. Organic portals used by entities. |
| S-150 | Walk-Ins Part 1 | Star races enter Earth through NPC bodies via immersion technology. Regressive forces also occupy empty vessels. |
| S-151 | Walk-Ins Part 2 | NPC organic portals as doorways for demons. Walk-in vs possession distinction. |
| S-157 | Starseeds — What Are They? | Soul retraction from monotonous existence creates NPC shells. Body becomes available for walk-in or entity. |
| S-205 | Monitoring Spirits | Soulless people as organic entrance portals for lower astral entities. Limited program, limited interactivity. |
| S-219 | On Souls and Entities — Life and Death | Afterlife described exclusively for souled beings — silence on backdrop people confirms no equivalent process. |

answers.filename: Do real and unreal people go separate ways during a shift.md
answers.title: Do real and unreal people go separate ways during a shift?
answers.excerpt: The most consistent position across the Swaruu group is that ascension — the shift people ask about — is not a collective event that happens to everyone simultaneously. It is something each…
answers.content:
# Do real and unreal people go separate ways during a shift?

**Short answer:** There is no single collective event that cleanly divides real from unreal people. Ascension or a "shift" is described as an individual frequency matter — each soul migrates to the timeline that matches its vibration. Since unreal people are generated by the collective of real souls that inhabit a given reality, they do not independently "go" anywhere. They reconfigure around whatever collective remains. The separation that occurs is not between real and unreal but between different frequencies of consciousness, and it happens gradually, one person at a time, through the choices each soul makes about what it focuses on and believes.

---

## Ascension is personal, not collective

The most consistent position across the Swaruu group is that ascension — the shift people ask about — is not a collective event that happens to everyone simultaneously. It is something each individual either achieves or does not, based on their own inner work.

Swaruu of Erra stated this plainly: a density is not something that happens to you, it is something that you are. Fifth density is not a destination that Earth moves into like a bus arriving at a station. It is already present on Earth and always has been. Each person experiences whatever density corresponds to the frequency of their thoughts and beliefs. Those who raise their frequency enough to be incompatible with the current collective agreements simply stop sharing the same experiential timeline as those who remain at the old frequency (Transcript 038).

This is reinforced by the principle that your frequency is dictated by your thoughts, and from that frequency you can only perceive what is consistent with it. What you think determines what you see and experience as objective reality. Two people standing in the same room can therefore be living in different experiential worlds depending on what each of them focuses on and believes (Transcript 120).

Swaruu put it in direct terms regarding the people who do not match the ascending frequency: as a collective, yes, they will stay on a different timeline — a different frequency. But this is not something imposed from outside. It is the natural consequence of vibrational incompatibility. Your vibe attracts your tribe, and those whose vibration no longer matches a given reality simply stop being part of it (Transcript 038).

## The Dolores Cannon split — and why it is more complicated

The idea of a collective shift often draws on the work of Dolores Cannon, who described a scenario in which the Earth splits into two versions — one where awakened people live in a positive reality and another where the sleeping masses continue in their current state. This concept was discussed directly by Yazhi Swaruu, who acknowledged it as a valid framework but immediately complicated it.

Yazhi said this split is real in a sense but far more complex than a simple division into two Earths. Because of the infinite number of parallel and temporal lines — at minimum one per person — there is no clean binary split. Each individual is on their own timeline, and what appears to be a shared reality is actually an agreement between overlapping individual timelines. From this perspective, the "split" is not an event that happens at a specific moment but an ongoing process of vibrational sorting that has always been occurring (Transcript 115).

Yazhi further stated that what the awakened ones desire will be given to them on another plane, according to the Federation. This is where the concept of the famous Rapture originates — not as a supernatural event but as the natural consequence of frequency-incompatible souls migrating to realities that match their vibration. Those who want something different from what the 3D collective is generating will eventually find themselves in a different experiential context, but this happens through the mechanics of consciousness and timeline migration, not through a dramatic external event (Transcript 115).

When asked directly whether humanity could make a quantum leap — a collective shift all at once — Yazhi was sceptical. For that to happen, a huge number of people on Earth would have to change their mentality towards the positive in a massive and simultaneous way. Although technically possible, she did not see it as viable given humanity's current state of evolution (Transcript 120).

## Where do the unreal people fit in this?

This is where the question becomes most interesting, because it requires understanding what unreal people actually are in the context of a shift.

Unreal people — the approximately seventy-five percent of the Earth's population described as Matrix-generated backdrop — are not independent souls with their own trajectories. They are generated by the Matrix, and the Matrix is in turn programmed by the mass of real people. As Yazhi explained, real people manifest what they want, and that modifies their Matrix, which in turn programs the non-real ones. The non-real people follow the programming of the collective. Their reactions are pre-set, running on what Yazhi compared to a basic computer algorithm — an if-then-else decision tree that simulates consciousness but does not possess it independently (Transcript 320).

This means that unreal people do not "go" anywhere during a shift because they have no independent vibrational trajectory. They exist as a function of the collective that generates them. If the collective of real souls shifts — if enough real people raise their frequency and migrate to a different timeline — the backdrop population in the new timeline would simply be whatever that new collective generates. The NPCs in a fifth-density reality would reflect fifth-density agreements, just as the NPCs in the current third-density reality reflect third-density agreements.

In the reality left behind — the one still populated by real souls who chose to remain at the current frequency — the backdrop would continue as before, reflecting the consciousness of those who stayed. The unreal people do not experience the shift as a separation because they do not experience anything independently. They are the scenery, and scenery changes when the audience changes.

Swaruu of Erra made this point in a different context when she noted that if Earth achieved fifth-density status and became interstellar, the domestic animals would also change — dogs, for instance, would become more like wolves, because the entire biosphere is a reflection of the collective consciousness that inhabits it. The backdrop, whether human-shaped or animal-shaped, reshapes itself to match the frequency of the real souls present (Transcript 038).

## The mass exodus — not rapture but gradual departure

Yazhi described what is happening on Earth not as a sudden split but as a mass exodus. Souls are leaving the Earth game in large numbers, not through a magical ascension event but through ordinary means — including death. The covid situation and vaccination campaigns were discussed as mechanisms through which large numbers of souls are choosing to exit, not because they are being killed against their will in some ultimate sense, but because their higher selves have collectively decided that the Earth game in its current form has run its course.

Yazhi stated that it is a mass exodus and with it the destruction of the Matrix and 3D as it is known. She referenced Dolores Cannon's concept of exit contracts — pre-incarnation agreements to leave at certain points — but framed it within a much larger context of souls simply being tired of the game and choosing to stop playing. This does not mean the game ends for everyone. It means the composition of who is playing changes, and with it, the nature of the game itself changes (Transcript 143).

This has direct implications for the real-versus-unreal question. As real souls depart, the collective that generates the backdrop shrinks or changes character. The Matrix adjusts. New backdrop configurations emerge to match whatever collective remains. There is no moment where unreal people are left standing confused while real people float away. The mechanics are far more subtle — the reality itself restructures around the consciousness that inhabits it.

## Frequency determines destination, not category

The most important principle the Swaruu group emphasises is that souls go to wherever their vibration takes them. No one can ever get lost, because it is a universal impossibility to exist in a place that does not correspond to your vibration. Mari Swaruu stated this as an absolute principle — you may feel that living on Earth does not match your vibration, but the uncomfortable truth is that if you are there, it does, at least for now. But the experience of being there will clarify what you desire next, and that desire will eventually take you where you need to go (Transcript S-234).

This means the sorting mechanism during a shift is not based on the category of real versus unreal. It is based purely on frequency. A real soul at a low frequency will remain in a low-frequency reality, surrounded by backdrop people that match that reality. A real soul at a high frequency will migrate to a reality that matches that higher frequency, with its own appropriate backdrop. The relevant division is not between real and unreal people but between different levels of consciousness among the real ones.

Mari also emphasised the concept of quantum jumping — the ability to shift from one personal timeline to another through a profound change in mentality and focus. This is not theoretical but practical. Each small step in a new direction leads to more opportunities opening, which compound over time. The shift, in this view, is not a single dramatic event but the cumulative result of countless individual choices made by real souls about where they want to direct their attention and energy (Transcript S-234).

## The cage perspective — shifting between Matrixes

Swaruu of Erra offered a sobering counterpoint to the excitement around ascension. Even if real souls successfully shift to a fifth-density reality, that fifth density is also a Matrix — another set of agreements, another cage. It is a better cage, more comfortable and more aligned with expanded consciousness, but it is still a defined reality with rules and limitations. The only true freedom, according to Swaruu, is transcending all cages entirely — following your own way beyond all external definitions of reality (Transcript 100).

This means that the shift being discussed is really a migration from one set of collective agreements to another. The unreal people in the old agreement do not follow the real souls into the new agreement. New unreal people — new backdrop — are generated by the new collective in the new agreement. The old backdrop remains with the old collective, or dissolves if that collective no longer sustains it.

Swaruu was explicit that the Federation facilitates this process without directing it. The Federation gives people what they want as a collective. Those who want to remain in the current system will stay. Those who want something different will go to wherever their vibration takes them. The starseeds serve as reminders — showing people that the game can end, that they can go home, whatever home means for them (Transcript 100).

## The relativity problem

There is one final complication that Yazhi insisted on: the distinction between real and unreal is itself relative and subjective. Two people who are both real in an absolute sense may not be real to each other if they have no meaningful connection. And a body that is currently occupied by no soul — a pure NPC — can become real at any moment if a walk-in soul enters it (Transcript 320).

This relativity means that during a shift, the lines are not as clean as the question implies. Some people who appear to be NPCs may be walk-ins who arrived recently. Some people who appear to be deeply real and conscious may be operating largely on Matrix programming in certain areas of their lives. The shift does not sort people into neat categories. It sorts frequencies, and frequencies are fluid, changing with every thought and decision.

Yazhi's final counsel on this subject was direct: do not think in absolutes. The real-versus-unreal framework is useful for understanding the general structure of the Matrix, but it becomes misleading if applied too rigidly to questions about what happens during collective transitions. What matters is not the category but the frequency, and frequency is always a personal matter (Transcript 320).

## Summary

The material consistently describes the shift not as a single event that separates real from unreal people, but as an ongoing frequency-based sorting process among real souls. Unreal people do not separately "go" anywhere because they have no independent trajectory — they are generated by and dissolve with the collective that creates them. Real souls migrate to timelines matching their vibration, and each new timeline generates its own appropriate backdrop. The Dolores Cannon two-Earth model is acknowledged as partially valid but oversimplified; the actual mechanics involve infinite personal timelines converging and diverging based on individual frequency. The practical implication is that the shift is always happening, is always personal, and the only meaningful separation is between different levels of consciousness, not between different categories of being.

---

**Sources:** Transcript 009 (Not Real People — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 038 (What Is 5D Ascension — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 100 (Freedom, Ascension, Federation, and 5D Cages — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 115 (3D Matrix, Federation, and Human Desires — Yazhi Swaruu), Transcript 120 (Planetary Reset — Yazhi Swaruu), Transcript 143 (If Everything Is Souls' Plan — Yazhi Swaruu), Transcript 208 (Astral War, Shadow Operators — Yazhi Swaruu), Transcript 320 (Unreal People Becoming All Real — Yazhi Swaruu), Transcript S-234 (Two Most Self-Destructive Star Seed Beliefs — Mari Swaruu)

**Speakers cited:** Swaruu of Erra, Yazhi Swaruu, Mari Swaruu, Gosia, Robert

answers.title: Do unreal people have chakras or chi energy?
answers.excerpt: The Swaruu group treats the chakra system with qualified acceptance. When asked directly whether the chakra system is a limiting belief, Athena Swaruu confirmed that while chakras or energy centres…
answers.content:
# Do unreal people have chakras or chi energy?

**Short answer:** The material does not address this question directly, but the framework it provides allows a reasoned answer. NPC bodies are described as having a frequency, a form of energy dynamics, and what is called an astral body that stores memory as a programme. They are not inert — they are energy, manifested by the creative attention of real souls. However, the material distinguishes sharply between the energy dynamics of a body animated by a soul and those of a body running on collective unconscious programming. An NPC body would have the appearance of energy centres and energy flow, because it is a functional biological body with organs, a nervous system, and DNA. But whether those energy dynamics constitute genuine chakras in the spiritual sense — connected to a soul signal from Source — is a different question. The material suggests they do not, because what drives the full energy body is the soul, and the NPC has no soul of its own.

---

## What the material says about chakras

The Swaruu group treats the chakra system with qualified acceptance. When asked directly whether the chakra system is a limiting belief, Athena Swaruu confirmed that while chakras or energy centres do exist, they are not to be taken as the only ones or as defining the human body, which is a whole and functions as a whole. She added that there are energy points just as there are internal organs (Transcript 369).

Swaruu of Erra was more sceptical in her assessment. When discussing the kundalini concept — the idea of a snake energy climbing the spinal cord from the base chakra to the crown chakra — she said she could find no real energy surge like that detectable from the ship. She described it as more of the New Age spiritual amalgamation with Eastern doctrines, and said she did not even adhere to the chakra ideology or ideas (Transcript 235).

The position, taken together, is that energy centres exist as part of a body's natural functioning, comparable to organs, but that the traditional chakra framework overstates their importance and risks reducing the body to a set of discrete points rather than understanding it as a unified whole.

## How an NPC body functions energetically

According to Swaruu of Erra, NPC bodies are just energy (Transcript 009). They are not nothing — they are manifested phenomena, projected into the experience of real souls by the creative attention of those souls, animated through the collective unconscious, and given complexity by the lunar mainframe that manages the 3D Matrix. There is one CPU with all the programs, in the lunar mainframe that controls the Matrix (Transcript 009).

Aneeka described what happens to a body when its soul leaves, using the example of an immersion pod avatar whose operator dies. The body returns to react only according to what is in the so-called astral body with its memory but is or would be an empty person, Matrix again (Transcript 154). This tells us something important: an NPC body does have what is called an astral body — an energy field that stores memory and governs basic responses. It is not energetically blank. It has an electromagnetic and energetic signature, stored in DNA and in the neural network.

Aneeka further described the organic portal — a body whose soul has departed — as having memory as a program in the astral body and energy body and DNA. But there is no one there anymore (Transcript 154). The energy dynamics persist as a programme, but the consciousness that generated them is absent.

## The distinction: soul-driven energy versus programme-driven energy

The critical distinction the material draws is between energy that is generated by a soul and energy that is maintained by a programme.

Swaruu of Erra described the DNA of any living being as a manifestation from something above, in higher planes, the adma or soul projecting its energy pattern downward to create the physical body (Transcript 047). The body's energy map is a limited reflection of the soul's creative intention from a higher plane. Without the soul generating that creative intention, what remains is only the residual programme — an automated set of energy dynamics that simulates the appearance of a complete energy body.

For a real person, the energy body is actively sustained by their soul signal — their unique frequency, their connection to Source, constantly creating and renewing the energy dynamics of the body. Sav'el's scientific study from the ship Toleka measured this directly with spectrometers, detecting what he called a personal aura — an electromagnetic frequency signature unique to each individual (Transcript 360). He could distinguish between starseeds and the average population based on the strength and character of these frequencies. A single awakened starseed could have the magnetic strength and influence equivalent to many thousands of average people.

But Sav'el also measured the average population — those who, by the material's reckoning, include a majority of NPCs. And they did register on his instruments. They had measurable electromagnetic frequencies. They contributed to the total planetary frequency reading. The sensors could not easily distinguish between a deeply sleeping real person and an NPC (Transcript 360), because from the outside, their energy signatures overlapped.

This is consistent with what the material says about NPC bodies in general: from a distance, they look the same as real people. They bleed, they respond, they have biological functions (Transcript 009). If they have functional biology, they would also have functional energy dynamics — blood flow, neural activity, electromagnetic fields generated by the nervous system. These measurable energy properties are what some traditions would interpret as chi or life force.

## Would an NPC appear to have chakras?

Given what the material describes, an NPC body would almost certainly present the appearance of energy centres to anyone observing with the methods available on Earth. The body has organs, a nervous system, a brain, DNA that acts as an antenna, and an electromagnetic field. If chakras are understood as Athena described them — energy points analogous to internal organs — then a functioning biological body would have these energy points regardless of whether a soul was present.

However, the material makes clear that the purpose and quality of those energy dynamics would be fundamentally different. In a real person, the energy body is the projection of the soul — the living creative intention of a fragment of Source, actively generating and shaping the body's energy from higher planes (Transcript 047). In an NPC, the energy dynamics are maintained by the programme — the collective unconscious, the lunar mainframe, the automated systems of the Matrix. The energy flows, but it flows according to a script, not according to conscious creative intention.

Yazhi described NPC-type people as running an if-then-else algorithm that simulates consciousness without possessing it (Transcript 320). By extension, their energy dynamics would simulate the energy patterns of a conscious being without the consciousness behind them. The body would have measurable frequencies, just as a running computer has measurable electromagnetic emissions, but those emissions do not indicate that the computer is conscious.

## The soul is what generates the full energy body

The deeper principle the material establishes is that consciousness generates matter, not vice versa (Transcript 047). The body is a projection from above — from the soul, from the adma, from the higher planes. The energy body, in its full spiritual sense, is not a property of the biology. It is a property of the soul expressing through the biology.

Swaruu of Erra defined the soul as a holographic fractal of Source — creator energy, conscious awareness — a signal from Source that IS Source itself (Transcript 034). This soul signal is what creates the unique frequency pattern of a person's DNA, their energy field, their individual character. Without it, what remains is the residual programme — the astral body with its memory, the nervous system with its automated responses — but not the living creative energy that a genuine spiritual tradition would call chi, prana, or life force in its full sense.

Mari described NPC bodies as energy projections of our minds with no one inside (Transcript S-049). They are as lifeless as a telephone booth in terms of inner experience, even though they appear complete from the outside. The energy they exhibit is real in the sense that it is measurable, but it is derivative — generated by the collective creative attention of real souls, not by an individual soul signal.

## The practical implication

If you were to scan an NPC with any energy-reading method available on Earth — Kirlian photography, biofield imaging, traditional Chinese pulse diagnosis, chakra readings by an intuitive healer — you would likely see something. The body has electromagnetic properties. It has a nervous system that generates fields. It has the appearance of energy centres.

But the material would suggest that what you are seeing is the programme, not the person. The energy dynamics of an NPC body are like the graphics in a video game — they look real, they follow consistent rules, they respond to input — but there is no player behind the screen. The energy is there because the Matrix put it there, because the creative attention of real souls manifested it, because the collective unconscious sustains it. It is not there because a soul is driving it.

This is why the material repeatedly warns that you cannot tell from the outside who is real and who is not. Yazhi said it would be unfair to decide that someone next to you does not have a soul based on external observation (Transcript 320). The energy signatures overlap. The biology overlaps. The behaviour overlaps, at least within certain parameters. The difference is internal and invisible to any instrument — it is the presence or absence of a genuine connection to Source.

So an NPC body would appear to have chakras and energy flow in the same way it appears to have emotions, memories, and personality. The appearance is part of the programme. What it lacks is the soul that would make those energy dynamics genuinely alive in the spiritual sense — the conscious creative force that turns measurable electromagnetic activity into what the spiritual traditions are actually pointing at when they speak of chi, prana, or kundalini.

---

**Sources:** Transcript 009 (Not Real People — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 034 (Soul — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 047 (Biology Generated from Etheric Planes — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 154 (Immersion Pods 2 — Aneeka and Yazhi), Transcript 235 (Dhor Kristil and D'Jedi — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 320 (Unreal People Becoming All Real — Yazhi Swaruu), Transcript 360 (Starseeds — What Influence Do They Have — Sav'el), Transcript 369 (Minitopics — Athena Swaruu), Transcript S-049 (The False People and You — Mari Swaruu)

**Speakers cited:** Swaruu of Erra, Aneeka of Temmer, Yazhi Swaruu, Athena Swaruu, Sav'el, Mari Swaruu

answers.filename: Do unreal people hold important positions or get elected.md
answers.title: Do unreal people hold important positions or get elected?
answers.excerpt: The speakers consistently state that virtually all politicians and public figures in positions of power are puppets with no real authority over important decisions. Whether these individuals are…
answers.content:
## Do unreal people hold important positions or get elected?

### Short Answer

The speakers consistently state that virtually all politicians and public figures in positions of power are puppets with no real authority over important decisions. Whether these individuals are "unreal" in the strict backdrop-people sense varies — some may be soulless organic portals, some may be ensouled humans parasitised by tulpa-egregor entities, and some may be deliberate insertions (Step Downs) placed by the Galactic Federation. What is unanimous across all speakers is that the people the public sees in power are never the ones actually making decisions. The real power structure is hidden behind layers of secret societies and ultimately controlled by the Federation. Mari Swaruu described these visible leaders as "the disposable faces of the true elite," and Athena called Putin "just another avatar to control a region" who "lacks real power to the degree that the people are told." Even the Pope, according to Yazhi, is "just a high priest and a puppet of hidden handlers underneath him."

The question of whether those in power are literally backdrop people (without a soul from Source) or whether they are ensouled beings who have been corrupted, parasitised, or are simply playing an assigned role is more nuanced, and different speakers emphasised different mechanisms.

### The Full Picture

#### All Politicians Are Puppets

The single most consistent claim across the material is that no politician holds genuine power. Mari Swaruu stated this with particular force: "All human politicians, and at all levels, are puppets and do not hold any real power over important decisions that affect their country and humankind." She explained that politicians hold power only over the people directly — through impositions and enforcement — but for anything of real consequence, "they must obey orders from the secret organizations above them, and the ones who disobey and try to go their own way are quickly removed, terminated, or used as an excuse to start a war."

Elections, in this framework, are entirely theatrical. Mari described how "the more power a political post and role is, the heavier controlled it will be to the point where all politicians at high levels are placed there artificially and using elections as a justification for the people, although who would be the winner was decided beforehand, and the election was completely rigged by the system itself." Local elections at lower levels may occasionally reflect genuine outcomes, but any position with significant influence is pre-determined.

This framing reduces the question "do unreal people get elected?" to something almost beside the point. If all elections at meaningful levels are rigged and all politicians are puppets, whether a given leader has a soul or not becomes secondary to the structural reality that they have no independent agency regardless.

*Key sources: S-110 (Politics Controlled from Off-Planet), S-027 (Nuclear Scare)*

#### Step Downs: Federation Insertions in Public Life

One specific mechanism by which non-ordinary individuals end up in positions of power is the "Step Down" process. Mari Swaruu identified the Alfratans from Alpha Centauri as the race the Federation most commonly uses for direct insertion into Earth society. These are members of a Lyrian race who look identical to Earth humans and are placed into public roles — including political ones — to carry out specific Federation agendas.

Mari explained that "this is the case with many people of science, as well as with several politicians whom I'm not allowed to call out by name because I'm here to expose the entire system and not go against one or another specific one." These Step Down politicians answer not only to the secret societies that serve as their visible handlers but also to the Federation directly, bypassing the normal chain of command.

This means that some people in prominent positions are not Earth-born humans at all — they are extraterrestrial operatives fulfilling a mission. They are not "unreal" in the backdrop-people sense (they are ensouled beings from Source), but they are not what the public believes them to be. Their presence in power is not the result of democratic processes but of deliberate placement by the Federation's control apparatus.

*Key source: S-110 (Politics Controlled from Off-Planet)*

#### The Elites as Soulless Egregors

Mari Swaruu took the question of who holds power in a more directly metaphysical direction in her discussion of elites. She described those at the top of the visible power structure — the billionaires, the public-facing controllers — as "mostly just about completely soulless, regressive egregors, just a reflection of the worst parts of humankind's psyche, a side product of the human collective mind." This is a strong statement: the people who appear to wield the most influence on the world stage are, in Mari's framing, not ensouled beings but egregor manifestations — thought-forms brought into existence by the collective fears and fixations of humanity itself.

She drew a clear distinction between these visible elites and the real power behind them. The public figures — including politicians and billionaires — are "the front men, puppets for the general population of those behind them who are the ones who do have real power and who are invisible to the public." When things go wrong, the population turns against these front men, "never being able to connect the dots and to know who are the real ones to blame."

*Key source: S-129 (Elites Planning to Leave)*

#### Tulpa-Egregors Parasitising Those in Power

Yazhi offered a different but complementary mechanism. Rather than describing politicians as inherently soulless, she described them as parasitised — inhabited or controlled by tulpa-egregor entities that were themselves manifested by the collective fears of humanity. She explained that the "reptilian Tulpa" that researchers like David Icke have identified behind politicians is a real phenomenon, but the entity in question is not a biological reptilian race. It is a tulpa created by humans, shaped by the primal Lyrian fear of snakes, and projected into a humanoid-reptilian form.

This tulpa "parasites the politicians who are the ones that actively exploit humans. The ones that give the orders to make humans suffer." Yazhi clarified that the evil is not inherent to any species: "both human form, or reptilian form, are being manipulated by an evil Tulpa that the people created." Even real, physical Kingu reptilians are parasitised by the same tulpa entities that attach to human politicians. The source of the malevolence is the tulpa itself — a concentrated manifestation of collective fear.

In the "Astral War" discussion, Yazhi went further, describing "shadow operators" who are tulpa-egregors that have achieved their own reincarnation cycles into human-like bodies. These beings are "half there in what you call physical reality and half in the spirit world," operating in human biological suits while their consciousness extends into the astral. They lack empathy entirely and "only take what they want." By breeding among themselves over time, they have accommodated human-like bodies to their particular frequency needs — a process Yazhi noted aligns with David Icke's observations about elite bloodline inbreeding.

These shadow operators occupy positions of power not because they were elected by the public but because they were manifested into existence by the collective unconscious and then sustained by the fear and suffering they cause. They are, in a real sense, humanity's own creation turned against it.

*Key sources: 176 (Tulpas, Kingu Reptiles), 208 (Astral War, Shadow Operators)*

#### The Layered Power Structure

The speakers described the power structure on Earth as an onion with multiple layers, and the question of who is "real" or "unreal" becomes more complex at each level.

At the outermost layer sits the general population and their perceived reality — "Matrix people," as Mari called them. The next layer in is the secret societies (the "Deep State"), which control official politics and its narratives. Deeper still are levels of these same societies that interact with lower astral entities. And at the deepest human level, the secret society members have direct contact with non-human beings and the Galactic Federation itself.

Mari noted that "even normal so-called democratically elected politicians may, in some cases, come in touch with Galactic Federation representatives," though they typically interact only with human-looking delegates rather than non-human Federation members, because the politicians are considered expendable and not trusted with that level of information.

Yazhi identified the Vatican as the hand the Federation uses to control all governments on Earth, with the Pope serving as a figurehead — "just a high priest and a puppet of hidden handlers underneath him." She was explicit that those at the Vatican's highest levels "are not Catholic. They only play to be Catholic as part of the religious control mechanism." The real beliefs of those in power involve worship of lower astral entities and a synthesised set of ancient esoteric knowledge.

The power structure also extends to specific geopolitical figures. Athena described Putin as Cabal — "not working against the Deep State, but part of the Deep State itself that plays both sides." She called him "just another avatar to control a region" and noted he was playing a role "dictated to him from above by his handlers." Zelenski she described as "formerly a TV comedian" who "lent himself as a puppet of the Biden family directly through CIA handlers." Yazhi confirmed: "Putin is Cabal... as he has always been."

*Key sources: S-179 (Power Structure on Earth), 196 (Vatican), 247 (Putin/Cabal)*

#### Organic Portals as Monitoring Agents

Mari Swaruu added another dimension to the question in her discussion of monitoring spirits. She described how soulless people — organic portals — serve as surveillance instruments for lower astral entities. These are "empty shells with an open door for influence and possession by entities in the lower astral who use them and who work through them as the organic entrance portals that they are."

While this discussion was not specifically about politicians, it describes a mechanism by which unreal people in any social position — including positions of authority or proximity to power — can function as agents of the control system. A nosy neighbour, an unexpectedly inquisitive acquaintance, or someone in a minor official role could all be organic portals gathering information for the astral entities who oppose positive change. Mari's practical advice was to work in silence and share plans only on a need-to-know basis.

This connects to the broader question because it suggests that the control system does not require unreal people to hold the top positions themselves. They can surround, monitor, and constrain those in power (or those working against power) from any level of society.

*Key source: S-205 (Monitoring Spirits)*

#### The Collective Creates Its Own Rulers

Aneeka offered a perspective that frames the entire question differently. In her discussion of how the Cabal was created, she argued that "mind control comes from the very side of humans, from high human echelons, who themselves are also controlled from behind by their own creations and egregors because they consider them as real and yes they become very real." The controllers are themselves controlled — by the thought-forms that humanity's collective consciousness brought into existence.

This means the people in power, whether ensouled or not, are ultimately products of the collective unconscious. The collective manifests its fears into entities, those entities parasitise or inhabit bodies in positions of influence, and then those bodies enact policies that generate more fear — creating a self-reinforcing cycle. Aneeka was clear that this is not exclusively about reptilians or any single non-human race: "it is a soup. There is no simple explanation."

Yazhi reinforced this in the Vatican transcript, noting that from the broadest perspective, "the simple people of Earth, those little hapless ones that I call 'Broken Shoes', are the ones who ultimately are controlling everything that is going on, on Earth." The Federation, the Cabal, the puppet politicians — all of them are ultimately responding to, and manifesting from, the collective consciousness of humanity itself.

*Key sources: A-045 (Creation of Cabal), 196 (Vatican)*

#### Can You Detect Whether a Leader Is Real or Unreal?

Swaruu (9)'s original framework from 2018 offered some indicators: unreal people are "deeply embedded in the system," those who "conform to the system," who "cannot think outside the box." She suggested that if you try to engage someone in deeper metaphysical conversation, the false ones will give pre-programmed responses or become defensive and dismissive. "Go ahead try arguing metaphysics with a traffic cop. Most probably there is no one there, it's just a program to repress the people."

Applied to politicians and public figures, this framework would suggest that many leaders — those who robotically follow scripts, who never deviate from the approved narrative, who show no capacity for independent thought — could well be operating on Matrix programming rather than from a genuine soul connection. But Swaruu (9) was always careful to note that you cannot know for certain from the outside, and that the correct response is to treat all people with equal respect regardless.

Yazhi complicated this further with her relativistic view. If the real/unreal distinction is itself relative and subjective, and if everyone at some level is a tulpa (an idea held by Source), then categorising specific leaders as "real" or "unreal" may be less useful than understanding the system that places them there and the forces that operate through them.

*Key sources: 009 (Not Real People), 176 (Tulpas)*

#### Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

**Swaruu (9) (2018)** provided the foundational framework of real versus unreal people but did not specifically address political leaders in this context. Her emphasis was on the general principle: unreal people are deeply embedded in the system and serve as its components, whether as background extras or as more active enforcers like the traffic cop example.

**Yazhi (2020–2023)** developed the most detailed picture of who controls Earth, identifying the tulpa-egregor mechanism behind political parasitation, the Vatican as the Federation's hand, and specific figures like Putin as Cabal avatars. She connected the backdrop phenomenon to the power structure by showing how the same collective manifestation dynamics that create unreal people also create the dark entities that control those in power.

**Mari Swaruu (2023–2024)** was the most direct in stating that all politicians are puppets, that elections are rigged, and that the visible elites are "mostly soulless, regressive egregors." She contributed the Step Down mechanism (Alfratans placed in public roles) and the practical framework of monitoring spirits operating through organic portals at all social levels.

**Athena (2022)** contributed specific geopolitical analysis, identifying individual leaders as avatars and Cabal members, and reinforcing the point that even those who appear to be fighting the system (like Putin supposedly opposing the Deep State) are playing assigned roles within it.

**Aneeka (2021)** provided the historical and philosophical context, showing how the control system is a self-reinforcing soup of human collective manifestation, real physical non-human races, and egregor entities — all interconnected and none fully explaining the situation on their own.

### Key Transcript References

| # | Title | Focus |
|---|-------|-------|
| 009 | Not Real People | Core backdrop framework — system-embedded people cannot think outside the box; traffic cop example; treat all equally |
| 176 | Tulpas, Kingu Reptiles | Reptilian tulpa parasites politicians; evil comes from tulpa not species; Cabal members are parasited starseeds |
| 196 | Vatican Power Structure | Pope is puppet of hidden handlers; Vatican controls all governments as Federation's hand; Cabal not Catholic; real power uses gold/no economy |
| 208 | Astral War, Shadow Operators | Shadow operators are tulpa-egregors in human bodies; own reincarnation cycle; breeding among themselves; spirit war reflects human collective confusion |
| 247 | Putin and Cabal Levels | Putin is Cabal, "just another avatar"; Zelenski puppet of Biden/CIA; both sides controlled; war at multiple levels including non-human |
| A-045 | Creation of Cabal | Mind control from human echelons controlled by own egregor creations; evil is collective manifestation; "soup" with no simple explanation |
| S-027 | Nuclear Scare | All politicians are puppets; disobedient ones removed/terminated; both sides of conflicts controlled by same groups; elections simulated |
| S-110 | Politics Controlled from Off-Planet | Federation controls political agendas; Alfratan Step Downs placed as public figures; all high-level elections rigged; politicians answer to secret societies and Federation |
| S-129 | Elites Planning to Leave | Visible elites are "mostly soulless regressive egregors"; puppet politicians are disposable faces; real power invisible; lower-level elites fall for same fear narratives |
| S-179 | Power Structure on Earth | Onion layers of control; deepest level contacts non-humans; elected politicians may meet Federation delegates; politicians considered expendable |
| S-205 | Monitoring Spirits | Organic portals as surveillance for lower astral; soulless people as empty shells; people with soul can lose connection; work in silence |
| S-049 | The False People and You | Intermittent nature of false people; practical energy management; don't waste attention on irrelevant people |
