answers.title: Is the Federation helping humanity or controlling us?
answers.excerpt: Both — and neither, depending on which level of the Federation you're asking about and which speaker you listen to. This is one of the most fiercely debated questions within the Taygetan crew itself.…
answers.content:
# Is the Federation helping humanity or controlling us?

**Theme:** Galactic Federation | **Priority:** High
**Sources:** 12 transcripts across all 4 series | **Speakers:** Yazhi Swaruu, Alenym (Swaruu 11), Athena Swaruu, Aneeka of Temmer, Mari Swaruu, Swaruu (9)

---

## Short Answer

Both — and neither, depending on which level of the Federation you're asking about and which speaker you listen to. This is one of the most fiercely debated questions within the Taygetan crew itself. The early position (Swaruu 9, ~2018–2019) framed the Federation as playing cosmic roles in a vast game, with both helpful and obstructive factions. The middle period (Aneeka, Alenym, 2020–2021) grew increasingly critical, with Alenym calling the Federation "criminally permissive" and later declaring it was actively working against humanity. Yazhi offered the most radical reframe: that the Federation's inaction isn't a choice but a structural impossibility — humans themselves, through their Collective Unconscious, are blocking the very intervention they demand. And Mari Swaruu's later work (2023) traced the control architecture from Earth's oligarchs upward through secret societies to off-planet Federation management, arguing the entire political structure on Earth is controlled from outside.

There is no single Taygetan position on this. The answer depends on where you stand.

---

## The Spectrum of Views

### 1. "They're Playing Cosmic Roles" — Swaruu 9 (2018–2019)

The earliest framing comes from Swaruu (9), who saw the Federation's behaviour as part of an enormous cosmic dance where every participant — helpful or obstructive — fulfils a necessary role. In transcript 099, she stated: "Speaking of the Federation, the Earth, and higher planes, everything is roles, roles to be fulfilled in the cosmic dance." In her view, accusing the 5D Federation of wrongdoing was itself part of the game: the role of Taygeta was to report what wasn't working, to push back, to hold the Federation accountable. But she also warned that humans must never know they're being protected, because that knowledge would create dependency and stagnation. People would stop growing and start worshipping non-human saviours.

Meanwhile, she confirmed that races were actively helping behind the scenes — the rescue of children from DUMBs (deep underground military bases) was 99% Antarian military operating for the Federation, though the credit would go to the 1% of US Navy Seals who participated. But this help must remain invisible. Starseeds are described as "all the help that the Federation will give to humans. They are the engine of everything, inspiration, and their divine protection."

This is the most philosophical position: the Federation isn't exactly helping or controlling. It's participating in a structure where human growth requires friction, and that friction has to feel real.

### 2. "Criminally Permissive" — Alenym (2020–2022)

Alenym's position hardened dramatically over time. By 2020–2021, she was openly calling the Federation "criminally permissive" — hiding behind non-intervention laws while humans suffered. Her argument was blunt: the Federation absolutely has the capacity to fix things on Earth. They have the military power, the technology, the numbers. They simply choose not to, wrapping their inaction in the Prime Directive and Free Will as philosophical justifications for what amounts to abandonment.

She pointed out the hypocrisy: the Federation is heavily militarised (contradicting the "love and light" image promoted by Earth contactees), and it observes "Space Law" and "Free Will" selectively — honouring the collective mass-desire of sleeping humanity (which, being manipulated, asks for more of the same) while ignoring the desperate wishes of the awakened minority who can see what's happening.

Her most damning observation: the Federation treats the human Collective Unconscious as the democratic voice of humanity. But that Collective Unconscious has been shaped by millennia of manipulation — poisoned food, false education, weaponised religion, controlled media. So the Federation is effectively respecting a "vote" that was rigged from the start, then using that rigged vote to justify doing nothing.

From Alenym's perspective, the Federation can be perceived as an evil controlling entity, and from the point of view of someone living an incarnation on Earth, that interpretation is entirely valid.

### 3. "They Control Everything Off-Planet" — Mari Swaruu (2023)

Mari Swaruu took Alenym's critique further by mapping the actual control architecture. In her account, every government on Earth is controlled from behind by secret societies — and those secret societies answer to the Federation. Politicians are "discardable front men and women" for the real power structure, which prefers to remain invisible. Elections are theatre. The entire political apparatus — left, right, all parties — is managed from off-planet.

She described a system where the Federation uses "Step Down" politicians — figures who are placed, not elected — and where the real decisions about Earth's direction are made at Federation council level, far from any human awareness. The overt government is a mask; the secret societies are the mechanism; and the Federation is the hand that moves the mechanism.

Her 2023 video on how to control society (S-149) laid out the oligarchic playbook in chilling detail, written partly from the point of view of the oligarch themselves. The method: keep the population in survival mode with the lowest possible salary; contaminate the food supply with chemicals that attack the brain, justified as "necessary conservatives and flavor enhancements"; invert the food pyramid so people eat the wrong things; twist medical science to keep the population sick and dependent on false medicine; erase real history and replace it with a false narrative pushed through schools "incapable of teaching nothing more than obedience to a long list of cruel lies"; weaponise religion to cut people off from genuine spirituality, always imposing fear, guilt, and soul-destruction; compartmentalise everything so nobody sees the full picture; and exploit civil rights movements to fragment society further — "weaponizing legitimate efforts to fight for people's rights."

Mari contrasted this with how holistic societies work: the percentage of ethically advanced people is so large that a regulating government is no longer necessary, because every individual has their own internal guide in the shape of personal advanced ethics. But on Earth, the very political dynamics needed to control a population with low ethics also prevent spiritually advanced people from reaching positions of power — "mostly because their very ethics prevent them from doing and fulfilling all that is needed to attain those jobs."

From Mari's perspective, the Federation isn't just passively allowing humanity's suffering. It's architecturally managing it. And the oligarchs live in fear: "if they would realize and be conscious of what you have done to them in the past, of your plans and everything you are doing to them, they would chase you to the end of the world until you are found."

### 4. "They Can't Intervene Even If They Wanted To" — Yazhi (2021)

Yazhi offered the most philosophically radical position in a remarkable group chat with Gosia, Lina, Estel·la and Cristina (transcript 166), and it challenges everyone else's framing. Her opening words set the tone: "I understand well why people feel like this, angry at the Federation and all that. And from many points of view, they are right, it's true, the Federation is permissive and just as retrograde as the regressives. But from a more expanded point of view, everything comes out of the human mind."

Her core argument: the Federation literally cannot free humanity, because the problem originates in the human Collective Unconscious and can only be solved from within it. The Federation cannot free humans from oppression because humans are the ones generating the oppression themselves. If they are "saved," the victim mentality that created the problem gets perpetuated — they will only fall back into the same cycle as a culture and species. The problem isn't happening to them; they are generating it.

Her reasoning goes deeper than simple blame. The forgetting that comes with 3D frequencies creates a feeling of loneliness, which produces the separate "I" that degrades into destructive ego. This creates a victim mentality and survival mindset, which creates dependencies — first on the mother, then father, then family, school, religion, and government. Humans progressively delegate their internal power and independence, leaving the race in what Yazhi called a "little boy" mentality of pure dependence on authority. They desperately want outside help, perpetuating the same authority-dependency pattern that created the problem. When the same humans already have within them all the tools to solve things by themselves.

Everything in the human 3D experience — including the Federation, the Reptilians, the Cabal, the Pleiadians — is generated as a projection (or "tulpa") of the human Collective Unconscious. The Federation doesn't exist within the average human's reality framework. For the Federation to intervene, it would first need to be part of that Collective Unconscious, which it isn't. As Yazhi put it, it would be like asking a ghost for help to move heavy boxes — it cannot. The Federation must become part of the reality of the collective so that the realities, timelines, or densities become compatible. Meanwhile, humans do believe in demons and dark forces (calling them Gins, Demons, Entities — many names, same things), which is why those entities have access.

This creates a paradox that Gosia pushed back on hard, arguing the game is disproportionate: humans are born into oppression they didn't design, hit from all sides, their souls and bodies submerged in manipulation, unable to tell truth from lies — and then told they created all this. Yazhi acknowledged the suffering but held firm: the solution can still only come from within because the problem comes from within.

The only entry point is starseeds — Federation members incarnated inside the human Collective Unconscious. Yazhi was explicit: "I cannot affect the human Collective Unconscious alone, it does not work, it does not link, there is no entry point. That point are the starseeds. I need to use starseeds below so that from the dual understanding, 3D and 5D, that they have, they can serve as a bridge so that what I say can be filtered to the people of Earth." Starseeds are the cavalry that will solve the problem — but the problems of the Earth can only be solved from the Earth plane, from within, being humans who fix them.

She also added a devastating twist through what she calls the mirror phenomenon: the part of the Federation that obstructs help for Earth is generated directly by the human Collective Unconscious. The humans themselves are blocking the Federation. When Gosia asked whether this means the Federation can be influenced through these mirrors, Yazhi confirmed: "Yes. That is why humans with their low collective consciousness stop the Federation. In other words, the humans themselves are blocking the Federation." The Saturn Federation's obstructiveness isn't separate from humanity's problem — it's a reflection of it.

Even the Federation's own explanation for non-intervention is muddled, Yazhi admitted. The Federation itself doesn't fully understand why it can't intervene — "they go around with other kinds of reasons, like Karma." The Andromedans use the Karma concept (if you notice the ant, you now have obligations to it). But Yazhi saw it more simply as an existential barrier: you cannot fight fire with fire without fanning the flames.

Her summary was stark: "The Federation cannot intervene as humans would wish. It is not that they do not want to, but that they cannot." And the only practical advice for starseeds: "Accept what you can do and accept what you cannot do equally. Understand that it is not your responsibility to solve the problem even though you are the last hope." Lead people to understanding through visible evidence they can process — not complex metaphysics they'll reject.

### 5. "The Federation as Psy-Op" — Athena Swaruu & Yazhi (2021)

Athena and Yazhi's joint analysis in transcript 183 added a dimension the other speakers didn't explore: the weaponisation of the Federation concept itself. Athena saw clearly that the most visible "liberation" narratives on Earth — QAnon, White Hats, the Galactic Federation of Light — are CIA-managed psy-ops designed to control the spiritually awakened population. As she put it: "All you need to do is replace the word Federation with the word Jesus there and you will see what I mean."

Her argument: the CIA created the New Age movement to control human awakening, and what's happening now in the UFO/ET community is more of the same. A network of researchers and contactees — some knowingly cooperating, others just being used — reinforce each other's narratives under CIA-Jesuit-Illuminati management. They function as the "Mainstream Media" of the ET community. Anyone who challenges the "Federation of love and light" narrative gets attacked, censored, and silenced — just like the Taygetans experienced directly when the Federation placed a gag order on their communications.

Most provocatively, Athena laid out a prediction: the Cabal is preparing a fake alien contact event — not a military invasion, but a "benevolent" Federation appearing to "save" humanity. The fake aliens would offer solutions to the pandemic, free energy, and a new economic system (NESARA/GESARA) — all at the cost of delegating human freedoms to a New World Order disguised as cosmic benevolence. The real Federation, she argued, would not step in to correct this because they see it as part of the "game" and would remain permissive as always.

Yazhi confirmed: the Federation is running the Cabal-Illuminati, and the Illuminati are the Federation's ambassadors to Earth. The Federation recognises human governments as authorities over the people "by consent." When Gosia asked whether the Federation actively promotes its own positive image, Yazhi's answer was layered: the Federation itself doesn't care how it's seen, but the Cabal-level operatives do care, because they need the population to trust the Federation concept for when they deploy the fake contact scenario.

On starseeds, Athena framed them not as passive recipients of salvation but as the cavalry itself — the Federation's actual response to Earth's crisis. The help isn't coming from outside. The help is already here, incarnated, living human lives. But the system is designed to keep most starseeds from remembering who they are.

### 6. "Memory Implants and Low-Tech Control" — Aneeka of Temmer (2020)

Aneeka provided the technical perspective on how Federation control actually operates at the individual level. She described memory implant technology — not high-tech neural devices, but rather a low-tech system where the Federation manages what information enters and exits Earth's 3D framework. The Van Allen belts, the lunar matrix, the frequency fence — these aren't just passive barriers but active management tools.

Her key insight was that "everything in 3D is created/artificial." The entire Earth experience is a managed environment, and the Federation is the entity doing the managing. Whether you call that "helping" (providing a controlled school environment) or "controlling" (trapping souls in a frequency prison) depends entirely on whether you believe the school model is real or just the cover story for something darker.

---

## The Core Tension

What makes this question so difficult within the Taygetan framework is that the speakers aren't just disagreeing about facts — they're disagreeing about the nature of reality itself.

If Yazhi is right that the human Collective Unconscious generates everything (including the Federation's behaviour), then blame is meaningless. The Federation isn't helping or controlling — it's reflecting. Change the collective, and the Federation changes automatically.

If Alenym and Mari are right that there's a real control architecture extending from Earth's oligarchs through secret societies to the Federation, then the Federation is an active oppressor using non-intervention philosophy as a fig leaf.

If Swaruu 9 is right that it's all cosmic roles, then the question itself is part of the game — a question designed to generate exactly the kind of friction that drives growth.

The speakers themselves are acutely aware of this tension, and transcript 166 captures one of the most emotionally charged exchanges in the entire Cosmic Agency archive. Gosia pushed back hard on Yazhi's position with a vivid analogy: "If my dog is being abused because he enters a trap, I help him, it does not matter if what has led him to that trap were his own legs." Lina expressed frustration that starseeds are attacked every time they start "joining up" — "it's like building a castle and being attacked every year." Estel·la asked the devastating question: if everyone's awakening must come from within, and that requires friction, does that mean what's happening is okay?

Yazhi didn't flinch: "Unfortunately, the friction causes them to change, because it takes them out of their comfort zone and forces them to take action. You learn by suffering." But she also acknowledged it wasn't inevitable — "it is not necessary to suffer to learn, but that is something that you can apply, not them, because their minds are very basic." Her final assessment was grim: "I see that they get out of the problem as a group, but at a very great cost in lives."

---

## What They Agree On

Despite the disagreements, there are points of convergence across all speakers:

**Starseeds are the key mechanism.** Whether you frame them as the Federation's cavalry (Athena), the entry point into the Collective Unconscious (Yazhi), or the only help humanity will get (Alenym), every speaker agrees that awakened humans living on Earth are where the real action is. The Federation's most significant intervention is not military or political — it's incarnational.

**Information is the primary tool.** The Taygetans consistently describe their mission as providing information, not military rescue. As Yazhi put it, you can lead a horse to water but you can't make it drink. The transcripts themselves — the entire Cosmic Agency project — are framed as this informational intervention working through the starseed channel.

**The Prime Directive is problematic.** No speaker defends the Prime Directive without reservation. Even Yazhi, who argues the Federation can't intervene, doesn't claim the non-intervention policy is morally clean. It's structurally necessary in her model, but she acknowledges the suffering it permits.

**Liberation from outside doesn't work.** This is perhaps the deepest consensus. Even Alenym, who's angriest at the Federation, doesn't argue for a military invasion to free Earth. The concern is that external liberation would create dependency and repeat the cycle. The disagreement is about degree: how much help is too much? Where's the line between offering a hand and doing someone's homework?

**Earth's control systems are coordinated, not random.** All speakers agree that what looks like chaos on Earth — wars, pandemics, financial crises, political divisions — is orchestrated from above. Whether "above" means human oligarchs, secret societies, or the Federation itself varies by speaker, but the idea that Earth's suffering is accidental is rejected by everyone.

---

## Speaker Evolution Table

| Speaker | Period | Position | Shift |
|---------|--------|----------|-------|
| Swaruu (9) | 2018–2019 | Cosmic roles; Federation part of the game | Philosophical, balanced |
| Aneeka | 2019–2020 | Technical control mechanisms; managed environment | Increasingly critical |
| Alenym | 2020–2022 | Criminally permissive → actively hostile | Major hardening over time |
| Yazhi | 2021 | Structural impossibility; Collective Unconscious blocks intervention | Most radical reframe |
| Athena | 2023 | Liberation narratives are controlled opposition; starseeds are the cavalry | Tactical, grounded |
| Mari Swaruu | 2023 | Full control architecture from oligarchs to Federation | Most politically explicit |

---

## Transcript Reference Table

| # | Transcript | Title | Series | Key Content |
|---|-----------|-------|--------|-------------|
| 1 | 099 | Federation Races and Earth (Swaruu) | Main | Cosmic roles, Federation as game participants |
| 2 | 086 | Extraterrestrial Races and Their Role | Main | Starseeds as help, Federation won't do homework |
| 3 | 182 | Federation, Free Will, and Earth Problems | Main | Alenym: criminally permissive, militarised Federation |
| 4 | 165 | Yazhi on Federation Inaction | Main | Federation perceived as evil from human standpoint |
| 5 | 166 | Federation and Earth Problems – Humans Are the Key | Main | Yazhi: Collective Unconscious blocks Federation, starseeds as entry points |
| 6 | 265 | Liberation Doesn't Work as Expected | Main | Alenym: liberation backfires, refugee problems, mentors approach |
| 7 | 225 | Liberation from Within | Main | Athena: QAnon/White Hats as Illuminati, starseeds as cavalry |
| 8 | 111 | Memory Implants | Main | Aneeka/Yazhi: memory technology, low-tech control, "everything in 3D is artificial" |
| 9 | S-110 | Politics Are Controlled Off-Planet | Swaruu Oficial | Mari: Step Down politicians, elections as theatre, Federation controls all politics |
| 10 | S-149 | How to Control Society on Earth | Swaruu Oficial | Mari: oligarch playbook, secret societies, holistic society contrast |
| 11 | S-126 | Galactic Federation Overview | Swaruu Oficial | Federation structure and council levels |
| 12 | 183 | Galactic Federation, CIA Control of UFO Communities, Fake Alien Invasion | Main | Athena/Yazhi: CIA controls ET narrative, Federation as new religion, fake benevolent invasion planned |

---

*Answer compiled from 12 transcripts spanning 2018–2023, representing all four Cosmic Agency series. Speakers quoted include members of the Taygetan crew aboard the Toleka and Mari Swaruu broadcasting independently. Views represent the Taygetan perspective and do not necessarily reflect positions held by other Federation races.*

answers.excerpt: According to the material, the Federation is not "planning" a reboot — it is executing one, and you are living through it. Every speaker who addresses this topic treats civilisational resets not as…
answers.content:
# Is the Federation planning a "reboot" of mankind?

**Primary Theme:** Galactic Federation & Earth Control
**Additional Themes:** Human History & Ancient Civilisations · Cabal, Earth Control & Current Affairs
**Sources:** 10 transcripts, 4 speakers (Yazhi, Mari, Aneeka, Swaruu 9)
**Transcripts:** 116, 120, 138, 149, A-008, A-042, S-115, S-181, S-223, S-265

---

## Short Answer

According to the material, the Federation is not "planning" a reboot — it is executing one, and you are living through it. Every speaker who addresses this topic treats civilisational resets not as hypothetical future events but as an established historical pattern that has happened at least six times before and is observably in progress right now. The mechanism has two forms. Hard resets involve physical cataclysms — the destruction of Tiamat, the Great Flood, the erasure of Atlantis — events that wipe the surface and allow the controllers to rebuild from scratch. Soft resets are slower, subtler, and arguably more effective: the gradual manipulation of perception, values, and historical memory across one or two generations until the population has been reshaped into accepting a new social paradigm without realising the old one was deliberately destroyed. The material argues that Earth's current situation is a soft reset in its final stages, with multiple converging agendas — population reduction through medical, social, and reproductive engineering, the monopolisation of information through digital platforms, and the systematic erasure of historical evidence that contradicts the official narrative. What makes this particularly disturbing, according to the speakers, is that the Federation is not merely allowing it to happen. The Federation is the architect. Its fingerprints appear on every layer, from the destruction of Tartaria in the historical record to the false timelines in its own archives. Mari Swaruu goes further than anyone by arguing that even the date of the last great flood may be wrong — that it occurred not twelve thousand years ago but possibly as recently as two hundred years ago, with the time-slip differential between planets used to conceal the true timeline from other star races.

---

## The Full Picture

### The Pattern: Civilisations Rise, Flourish, and Are Destroyed

The foundational claim across all speakers is that what is happening on Earth is not new. Yazhi states in transcript A-008 that "Earth has experienced the rise of an advanced civilization, then it flourishes, decays and is destroyed over and over again in cycles of about 5000 to 10,000 years." She describes this as an eternal pattern, not confined to Earth — though on Earth it is "very intentional and artificial, under ideas and values against the world population."

In transcript 116, Yazhi provides the mechanism. The 3D Matrix exists to provide souls with a specific class of experiences — dramatic, isolated, dense with contrast. But the system is imperfect. Over time, more people begin to remember what they are not supposed to remember. Starseeds arrive who do not accept the rules. The "awakened" population grows exponentially. When this population exceeds a threshold, the Matrix can no longer maintain its illusion. The game is revealed. The controllers are left with no choice but to "dissolve the entire game and start over."

This is not driven by a fixed calendar. The twenty-five-thousand-year cycles recorded in ancient cultures — Mayan Calendar, Kali Yuga — are approximate reflections of the pattern, but the actual trigger is not time. It is the number of awakened people exceeding a limit. The reset happens when the system becomes an impossible knot that cannot be resolved within its existing parameters.

Yazhi is explicit that this has occurred at least six times before the current civilisation. She has studied previous instances, including Atlantis and Lemuria, which she classifies as resets even though they occurred before the current 3D Matrix was installed.

### Before 3D: The Earlier Resets

In transcript 120, Yazhi clarifies a common confusion. The six previous resets were not all within the current 3D framework. Only the most recent one — the installation of the Van Allen bands and the current perception-limiting Matrix — is 3D. The earlier resets, including Atlantis and Lemuria, occurred within a 5D Matrix that encompassed not just Earth but the entire solar system.

This is a critical distinction. The earlier Matrix had no clear physical barrier like the Van Allen bands. It was a belief system, a perceptual framework shared across multiple planets. Atlantis and Lemuria were not isolated civilisations on one world — they had contact and flow with other planets in the system. When they collapsed, it was not because of a planetary event alone. It was because the conflict between them — "like East against West today, same formula" — created irresolvable polarity within the larger system.

The control of that larger Matrix, Yazhi notes, would have had to come from "higher than the 5D Federation because in themselves they only played another role. Role within the system." This suggests that the pattern of controlled resets extends above the Federation as we know it, into density levels that are themselves part of a still-larger game.

### Tiamat: The Defining Cataclysm

The transition from the 5D solar-system Matrix to the current 3D Earth-only Matrix was catastrophic. In transcript A-042, Yazhi provides the detailed mechanics of the event that made it possible: the destruction of Tiamat.

Tiamat was a large water planet between Mars and Jupiter. During the Orion Wars, Reptilian forces placed a holographic decoy station on Tiamat to divert Federation attention. The Federation attacked the decoy. The explosions created shockwaves across the water-covered surface that rebounded and amplified in a pendulum effect until the planet disintegrated entirely. Its remnants became the asteroid belt. Its water, which remained liquid in the vacuum of space far longer than Hollywood depicts, was eventually captured by Earth's and Venus's gravity, falling as torrential rain and causing the universal flood recorded in virtually every ancient culture.

The flood devastated Earth's surface, destroyed the civilisation of Atlantis, killed most of the population, and created what Yazhi describes as a deep psychological trauma still present in human DNA and the collective psyche — "the almost total destruction, annihilation or extinction of the human race." Survivors fled to highlands — Scotland, Ireland, South American plateaus, Japan — and from those refuges, modern civilisation slowly re-emerged.

This was the hard reset that enabled the current system. In the aftermath of Tiamat's destruction, the Moon — an artificial Andromedan sphere ship damaged in the battle — was repurposed and placed in orbit. The Van Allen bands were established. The 3D perception-limiting Matrix was installed. And the Federation took direct control of the new, smaller, more tightly contained game.

### The Federation as Architect

A recurring question across the material is whether the Federation merely allows resets or actively causes them. Every speaker who addresses this concludes that the Federation is directly responsible.

Aneeka states flatly in transcript 149 that the Federation has "controlled all resets since the great flood at least." She adds that the Federation "works with whoever truly controls planet i.e. Cabal" — framing the Cabal not as an independent force but as a local instrument of Federation policy.

Yazhi frames the mechanism in transcript 116 through the lens of the Matrix's purpose. The Federation treats 3D Earth as a training ground for souls — a controlled environment for intense experiences. When too many souls "wake up" and the illusion breaks down, the training ground loses its purpose. So they must dismantle it and build a new one with "new ideas and parameters." She is unsparing about the Federation's motivations: "They like to play to be all powerful Gods that know everything when they are only playing that being basic level consciousness, attached to their own Ego."

Mari extends this to the historical record itself. In transcript S-115, she documents that the Federation's archives contain false history — the same false history as Earth's official narrative, with the same suspicious gaps. Tartaria, for example, is missing from Federation records just as it is missing from Earth's history books, despite overwhelming physical evidence of its existence. Her conclusion: "The directive to erase Tartaria, among so many other things, came from the Federation itself and not only from the so-called Cabal on Earth." The Federation does not merely reset civilisations. It erases the memory of previous ones to prevent anyone — on Earth or in space — from recognising the pattern.

### Hard Resets vs. Soft Resets

The material distinguishes between two reset mechanisms.

A hard reset is a civilisation-ending cataclysm — flood, war, cosmic event — that physically destroys the existing society and forces a restart. The Tiamat flood is the archetypal example. These are dramatic, visible, and leave physical evidence that must then be explained away or buried.

A soft reset, as Mari defines it in transcript S-181, is "when the perception of the population is manipulated into accepting, believing, and acting whatever the controllers want to change in their society." It requires patience — at least one or two human generations — because the existing population must die out before the new narrative can be fully installed. The controllers wait because they are not human and do not operate in human time frames. They have longer lifespans, they are off-planet, and time as perceived on their worlds does not match Earth time.

The process of a soft reset follows a specific pattern. First, the current generation's memory is allowed to fade naturally while documents and evidence of the previous paradigm are progressively erased. Second, new interpretations are given to whatever physical evidence cannot be destroyed — archaeological sites, buried buildings, ancient texts. Third, a new historical narrative is constructed and installed through controlled media and education. Fourth, the values and perception of the population are reshaped through social engineering until they align with the new paradigm.

Mari argues that the controllers have perfected this technique by weaponising legitimate social movements. Genuine struggles for rights and justice are amplified and directed until their consequences serve the controllers' agenda — specifically, population reduction through multiple converging vectors: reproductive disruption, medical intervention, food supply manipulation, and the destruction of family structures. Each agenda appears unrelated to the others. Only when viewed together does the pattern emerge.

### The Current Reset

According to the material, what you are experiencing right now is the final stages of a soft reset that has been in progress since approximately the mid-nineteenth century.

Mari states in transcript S-223 that Earth's current situation is not the beginning of a new reset but "the latter stages of that same one" that began between 1750 and 1850. The evidence she cites includes buried buildings worldwide with consistent late-eighteenth to early-nineteenth century architecture, the suspicious proliferation of orphan children in the later nineteenth century, the systematic destruction of historical cities through wars, and the ongoing monopolisation of information through digital platforms.

She frames the internet as the key weapon: sold to the public as a means of free communication, it has become the primary tool for erasing previous knowledge and installing the new narrative. Paper books become obsolete. Digital information can be altered or deleted at will. The controllers achieve what she calls "the monopolisation of truth itself."

In transcript 116, Yazhi identifies the endgame in more concrete terms. The controllers already have the replacement infrastructure ready. She describes "ready cities in China, for example, for millions — new, gigantic, and high-tech, completely empty," guarded by military, waiting for a selected population that will live under a "completely transhumanistic world." The implication is that the current population is being reduced to make way for a new, more controllable one.

### The Timeline Question

Perhaps the most provocative claim in the material comes from Mari in transcript S-265, where she argues that the last great flood may have occurred not twelve thousand years ago but as recently as two hundred years ago.

Her reasoning begins with the time-slip differential. Time is perceived differently on different planets — Temmer in Taygeta experiences a 4.6:1 ratio with Earth, meaning dates cannot be straightforwardly translated between star systems. The Federation, she argues, exploits this confusion to hide the true timeline of events. If you cannot establish when something happened, you cannot establish the pattern.

She connects this to the Tartaria evidence: buried buildings worldwide with late-eighteenth to early-nineteenth century architecture, suggesting a global cataclysm within the last few hundred years, not the last few thousand. She proposes that Tiamat's water did not arrive on Earth in a single event but in multiple waves — "blobs" of water captured at different times as Earth passed through patches of debris — meaning multiple deluges, the last one possibly within recorded history.

This theory is explicitly presented as speculative — Mari calls it her "tin foil hat" theory and acknowledges she has no definitive proof. But she frames it as consistent with the broader pattern: if the Federation can fabricate history on a global scale, there is no reason to assume the timeline they provide is accurate, especially when their own archives contain the same suspicious gaps as Earth's official record.

### Why Resets Are Not Inevitable

Amid all this, Yazhi offers a striking counterpoint in transcript 116. When asked whether there is a way out that is not so tragic, she says yes: the Taygetan model. Taygeta has maintained a stable civilisation for approximately 850,000 years without resets. The difference is that Taygetan society resolved its internal contradictions — not perfectly, but sufficiently to avoid the escalating polarity that triggers collapse.

The implication is that resets are not a law of nature. They are a consequence of unresolved conflict within a civilisation — conflict that the controllers not only fail to resolve but actively cultivate, because the conflict itself serves the purpose of the Matrix. If humanity could achieve sufficient integration — enough people seeing enough perspectives to dissolve the fundamental polarities — no reset would be necessary. The game would simply evolve into something else.

Whether that is achievable within the current system, given the forces actively working against it, is the question the material leaves open.

---

## Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

**Yazhi** provides the deepest structural framework. She sees resets as an inevitable consequence of the Matrix's design — a system that depends on illusion will always be destabilised by awakening, and awakening is itself inevitable because of cosmological free will. Her six-reset historical claim and her identification of the awakening threshold as the trigger are the foundational concepts. She also provides the most metaphysically complex framing: the Federation members are "just people" attached to their egos, playing gods from 5D while unable to see what life is like from 3D. The resets are not evil from their perspective — they are maintenance of a system they believe serves a purpose.

**Mari** provides the most detailed documentary evidence. Her contributions are the soft reset mechanics (S-181), the current reset analysis (S-223), the Tartaria erasure as proof of Federation involvement (S-115), and the provocative recent-deluge theory (S-265). She is the most willing to follow the evidence into uncomfortable territory, including challenging the Federation's own timeline. Her framing is more adversarial than Yazhi's — where Yazhi sees a complex system of perspectives, Mari sees deliberate deception by identifiable actors.

**Aneeka** provides the institutional confirmation. Her statement that the Federation "controlled all resets since the great flood at least" carries particular weight because she speaks from her position as CIC Intelligence Director with direct access to Federation communications and archives.

**Swaruu 9** (referenced through transcript 138, read in a previous session) provides the historical narrative of the Lyrian colonisation, the failed Reptilian genetic experiments, the switch to mind control, and the post-Tiamat installation of the 3D Matrix — the sequence of events that created the current system within which resets occur.

The speakers broadly agree on the pattern and the Federation's role. The main difference is in tone and emphasis. Yazhi tends toward philosophical acceptance of the system's logic even while opposing it. Mari tends toward investigative exposure of its mechanics. Both arrive at the same conclusion: the reset is happening, the Federation is driving it, and the evidence is everywhere if you know how to read it.

---

## Key Transcript References

- **116** — *Planetary Reset — 3D Matrix — Federation — Human Civilization* (Yazhi): Core reset framework — triggered when awakened exceed threshold, not fixed calendar cycles, six previous resets, controlled opposition grows until system destabilises, Federation dissolves Matrix and starts over, transhumanistic replacement cities already built in China, vaccines as mass exit mechanism, "they have done it many times before"
- **120** — *Planetary Reset — Answers from Yazhi Swaruu* (Yazhi): Six resets clarified — only last is 3D, earlier were 5D Matrix encompassing solar system, Atlantis and Lemuria included as resets, previous Matrix controlled from higher than 5D Federation, resets "simply happen because there is no other option given the chaos," civilisations that reach sufficient advancement without basic problems do not collapse (Taygeta as 850,000-year example), Federation is reflection of humanity — "fix humanity from within it and it will also be reflected in the Federation"
- **138** — *Atlantis, Lemuria, Reptilians, Adam and Eve, Tiamat* (Swaruu 9): Full historical sequence — Great Expansion, Lyrian colonisation of Earth, Reptilian containment zones, failed genetic experiments, switch to mind control, Tiamat destruction, 3D Matrix installation by Federation post-flood
- **149** — *Questions for Aneeka — Live Q&A* (Aneeka): Federation "controlled all resets since great flood at least," does not intervene as humans wish, works with whoever truly controls planet (Cabal), sees hardship as experience generated by population
- **A-008** — *Destruction of the Matrix and Manipulation of History* (Yazhi): Civilisational cycles of 5,000–10,000 years, current reset "very intentional and artificial," controllers "believe they are doing the right thing," destruction of historical buildings and records as deliberate erasure, Library of Alexandria contents preserved in Vatican vaults, "history books today are controlled lies with agendas"
- **A-042** — *Great Flood and Tiamat Wars* (Yazhi): Detailed Tiamat destruction mechanics — Reptilian holographic decoy, Federation attacked fake base, pendulum shockwaves disintegrated water planet, water floated in space then captured by Earth's gravity causing universal deluge, almost total extinction, survivors fled to highlands (Scotland/Ireland/plateaus), post-flood emergence of modern civilisation from Ireland, deep psychological trauma in human DNA to this day
- **S-115** — *False History in Space and on Earth — Tartaria* (Mari): Official history is fabrication not mere alteration, dating methods conflict with official timeline, Federation archives contain same false history as Earth's, Tartaria erased from both Earth records and Federation archives, "the directive to erase Tartaria came from the Federation itself," civilisation resets are Federation-orchestrated with memory erasure on Earth and in space
- **S-181** — *Soft Social Resets — Mind Control* (Mari): Soft reset defined — perception manipulation across 1–2 generations, veil of forgetfulness exploited, legitimate social movements weaponised for population reduction, controllers not human and not in same time frame, "all our data indicates that the last one occurred somewhere in the middle of the 19th century," complete reset takes approximately 150 years, "it is the Galactic Federation who are controlling everything down there"
- **S-223** — *Last Stages of a Total Cultural and Social Reset* (Mari): Current situation is "latter stages" of reset begun 1750–1850, internet as tool for monopolisation of truth, systematic destruction of cities and archaeological sites, previous civilisation was "perhaps even interstellar," Lemurian starship as evidence, Federation blocks research into true history, "the controllers of Earth are not human and are not in the same time frame"
- **S-265** — *Did the Last Global Deluge Happen Less Than 200 Years Ago?* (Mari): Time-slip differential exploited to hide true timeline, Tiamat water arrived in multiple waves not single event, last deluge possibly as recent as 200 years ago, buried buildings worldwide with consistent 18th–19th century architecture, orphan children anomaly, Federation archives match Earth's false narrative, "something really big happened 200 years ago"

answers.content:
# Is the Federation's non-intervention policy identical to how we watch animals struggle in the wild?

**Q36 · Primary Theme: Galactic Federation · Additional Themes: Consciousness/Soul, Cabal/Earth Control**

---

## Short Answer

The analogy is closer than most Federation members would admit — but it is also more disturbing than the questioner may realise. The sources describe an arrangement that goes well beyond passive observation. The Federation does not simply watch Earth as a nature documentary. It designed the enclosure, controls the food supply, censors anyone who tries to talk to the animals, and then claims the animals are choosing their own experience. Multiple speakers across the material — Yazhi, Athena, Mari, Aneeka, and Za'el — agree on the broad structure but disagree sharply on whether it is justified, whether the "animals" consented, and whether the observers have a moral obligation to intervene.

---

## The Full Picture

### The "Cosmic School" Narrative

The Federation's official justification for non-intervention rests on what virtually every speaker calls the "cosmic school" or "cosmic playground" framework. In this view, Earth is a place souls enter voluntarily for an intense experience in duality and contrast. Suffering exists because it is the mechanism of growth. The Federation monitors and contains, but does not direct, allowing the incarnated souls to manifest whatever reality they collectively choose.

Mari Swaruu presents this framework in its clearest institutional form: "The Federation views and sees Earth as a school and a playground, not only for the people and the souls that have incarnated there but also for the countless stellar races who visit Earth or have something specific to do there" (S-063). She extends this beyond a simple school metaphor — Earth is also a playground for visiting extraterrestrials who come to play their assigned roles. "Some souls play to be humans on Earth, others play to be extraterrestrials on Earth, and others play to be extraterrestrials that have something to do with Earth. They are all levels of the same game" (S-063).

Athena gives the personal-experience version: "The real reason... I feel that people don't believe it. They interpose their own values. The reason why the Earth is very important is because of its population, because of the people, because of the souls that are in there. And the reason is also to sustain and continue the learning that it gives those souls" (327). She adds that Earth became what it is because it concentrated thousands of races playing at being human — "a soup of thousands of races in there all playing at being human. This is what doesn't happen easily on other planets" (327).

Aneeka frames it as a training ground: "Many extraterrestrial races enter Earth to test their courage, their expertise, their inner strength as people, and then with what they have learned they return to their places of origin. It is the norm, enter Earth, train there and then return home" (A-045).

### The Zoo Analogy: Why It Fits

The "watching animals" comparison is more accurate than the "school" metaphor in several important respects.

First, the Federation designed and maintains the enclosure. The 3D Matrix is not a natural phenomenon — it was installed, maintained, and reinforced by the Federation itself across millennia. The Moon was positioned to generate the frequencies that sustain it. The Van Allen belts function as a containment barrier. The veil of forgetfulness is imposed, not chosen. When Swaruu 9 describes Earth as having been placed under a "dome controlled realm" (100), she is describing a zoo enclosure, not a classroom.

Second, the Federation controls the food supply. As Mari documents in detail (S-063), the Federation controls all money on Earth — "above Federal Reserve, World Monetary Fund, old families... the ultimate controller of all the money on Earth is the Galactic Federation." It "appoints and dictates its value and the amount each region on Earth can have or work with." This extends to funding visiting races through grants, giving the Federation "full control over all the movements and operations of all those human-looking stellar races" operating on Earth. A zoo controls what the animals eat, when, and how much.

Third, the Federation restricts communication with the outside. As documented in Q35, all communication into Earth passes through the Viera hub with AI filters. Typing only — no voice, no video, no photographs. Anyone who tries to tell the "animals" about the world outside the enclosure is censored, threatened, or financially strangled.

Fourth, the Federation observes and documents but does not intervene. Mari describes how the Federation "monitors statements and data" to determine what the collective wants (115). Yazhi puts it more bluntly: "The Federation as such will never step into the plate to help and liberate humans from oppression... because the Federation knows well this is not the case and not what is really going on. So they will do nothing" (185).

### Where the Analogy Breaks Down — and Gets Worse

The analogy to watching animals in the wild actually understates the problem in three critical ways.

**The souls are not a different species.** A nature documentary involves humans watching animals. But the Federation's own members — Taygetans, Andromedans, Arcturians — are the same Lyrian races whose members are incarnated on Earth. Aneeka explicitly states this: "Humans are not a race, it is a bio suit for many races to work or coexist as one" (A-045). This is not watching animals. This is watching your own relatives through one-way glass while they suffer, having agreed to forget they had a family outside.

**The observers manufactured the danger.** In a nature documentary, the predators evolved naturally. On Earth, Aneeka suggests "the Federation itself has imposed or engineered the entry of evil into Earth on purpose for the sole intent of increasing the level of difficulty of life there" (A-045). This is not observing natural selection — it is introducing predators into an enclosure and calling it "enrichment."

**The experience changes value depending on vantage point.** Yazhi identifies the deepest problem: the souls who planned the suffering view it differently once they are inside it. "While someone is having an experience on Earth, while inside the game Matrix of Earth, they do not want that suffering and hardship experience. It becomes no less than torture" (185). And once outside again, "they don't see their incarnation there as horrible, having lived a life of poverty and violence. All they see is wow, what a thrill, let's do it again!" (185). This creates a permanent imbalance: the version of you that is suffering never voted for this; the version that voted for it is not the one suffering.

### The Two-Person Problem

Mari delivers what may be the sharpest philosophical critique in the entire material. She argues that the soul in higher realms and the person living on Earth are effectively two different people:

"As the same soul does not hold the same point of attention as when it is in the higher realms, it cannot be seen as the same person because it has two points of attention — one in the physical and another in the ethereal realms. Therefore, concluding that they are indeed two persons. Therefore, the one in the ethereal realms would only be cruelly exploiting the one in the physical" (S-044).

This demolishes the consent argument. If the higher self that agreed to the experience and the physical person enduring it are effectively two different beings, then the "consent" of the higher self does not constitute consent of the person who is actually suffering. The zoo analogy becomes even more disturbing: the animals did not agree to be in the zoo — a different version of themselves, with access to information the animals do not have, made that decision.

### The Contradictions the Speakers Cannot Resolve

Every major speaker reaches a point where the framework breaks down and they acknowledge it honestly.

**Yazhi's contradiction:** "I do see the point that the Earth should remain as it is, problems and all, I agree with that perspective. But, at the same time, I am aware of the suffering and injustices at the population level and I don't agree with that. So I am kind of in a contradictory situation where I see and perceive both points of view simultaneously" (327). She holds both positions without resolving them.

**Yazhi on the moral core:** "It is, in my opinion, completely immoral only to observe the wants, needs and rights, of people outside Earth and not while they are inside Earth living a human experience. Even if they signed for it knowingly" (185). This is Yazhi explicitly rejecting the "they agreed to it" justification — even from her expanded vantage point outside the Matrix.

**Za'el's frustration:** "I can understand, and very well, that it can be very frustrating or exhausting to be constantly hearing that everything is for your own good, that everything is as it should be, that you have decided this for yourself. Because, even if it is so from other planes, the truth is that right now you want to change things" (Z-018). He then delivers his verdict: "My honest opinion is that I am not in favor of the 3D Earth Matrix, and I believe very strongly that it is not at all necessary" (Z-018).

**Za'el on the observer's duty:** "The observer has a moral obligation to help, since the person suffering from their point of view will be manifesting that help that made them stand up again" (Z-018). This directly challenges the "hands off" doctrine.

**Za'el on the carrot-and-donkey trap:** "On the one hand, the Galactic Federation is right here. It is the people themselves who choose to follow that path... However, if you put a carrot in front of a donkey from the moment it leaves the stable until it returns, it will only see the carrot and its bed" (Z-024). The Federation claims people choose freely — but the choice occurs inside a system designed to restrict awareness of alternatives.

**Mari's "criminal negligence":** "The Federation not intervening with this can only be seen as criminal negligence" (S-044). She reaches this conclusion even while acknowledging the higher-self framework.

### The Nightmare Video Game

Athena offers perhaps the most revealing single metaphor in the material. She describes how the souls in higher planes view their Earth incarnations: "They don't change anything on Earth because that's the way they want to have it. And they want to have it that way because that is what the souls in there are asking for in bulk. They want their nightmare level video game" (327).

This metaphor is more honest than "school" or "playground" because it acknowledges that the difficulty is artificially calibrated, that the experience is designed for emotional intensity rather than practical learning, and that the designers are detached from the suffering of the characters they are playing. A video game designer does not feel the pain of the character on screen.

But Athena immediately qualifies this: "The starseeds must realize that much of that nightmare level is just an illusion. The 'trick' is to learn to cope with that, the fear and the hopelessness. Learning to control emotions so that they serve you and not you serving them" (327). The practical advice to the person inside the game is always the same regardless of the metaphysical framework: master your inner state.

### What This Means for Non-Intervention

Yazhi articulates why she continues to act despite understanding the framework: "We could understand that it's not our problem. But if we remain here is because we still hurt for the people who are suffering while inside an incarnation regardless of how they view things once they are out, and regardless of their plans" (185).

This is the ethical position that separates the Taygetans, the Swaruunians, and the Urmah from the Federation mainstream. They accept that the cosmic school framework may be metaphysically accurate — but they reject the conclusion that it justifies non-intervention. Empathy overrides metaphysics.

Yazhi states this as a matter of identity: "I don't agree because unlike most Federation members I can see and understand what it is like to be a human, never having been one myself, because I have lived so many lifetimes as an ET interacting with humans, so I have a little thing called empathy" (185).

Za'el frames it as a test of the observers themselves: "Whomever wants to give you a choice to learn on your own offers, lets you be. Whomever wants to guide your perception imposes, censors, will tell you not to listen, not to speak, not to act, not to follow your heart" (Z-024). The Federation does the latter while claiming to do the former.

### The Mirror Turned Inward

Yazhi's final move is to turn the question back on itself. When asked why we are a vibrational match to a corrupt Federation, she answers: "Because we obviously made it, collectively. And so can we dissolve it. Some of us came for the experience, others to fix what is wrong. It is a reflection of us all" (402).

This reframes the zoo analogy completely. If the Collective Unconscious of the incarnated souls is generating the Federation's behaviour through manifestation — if the "animals" are unconsciously designing their own enclosure — then the question is no longer "why won't they help us?" but "why are we asking to be caged?"

The answer, according to multiple speakers, is that most souls trapped in the reincarnation cycle have forgotten there are alternatives. As Yazhi explains: "A soul that is very attached to being 'human' is in the afterlife — they will not be able to see, or to consider the possibility that for the sake of their soul's expansion there are countless other places all over the Universe where to have experiences" (185). The cage persists because the animals cannot see the door.

---

## Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

| Speaker | Period | Position |
|---------|--------|----------|
| **Swaruu 9** | 2018–2019 | Earth is a "sick playground" the Federation perpetuates; they dissolve one cage to build another (100) |
| **Aneeka** | 2019–2021 | Training ground with manufactured danger; Federation "imposed evil on purpose" to increase difficulty (A-045) |
| **Yazhi** | 2020–2023 | Holds both perspectives simultaneously; suffering is real even if illusory from above; empathy is the deciding factor (185, 327, 402) |
| **Athena** | 2022–2023 | "Nightmare level video game" for souls; most threats are media-generated illusions; starseeds must master emotions (327) |
| **Mari** | 2023 | School AND playground for all races; Federation is monitor not director; but higher self exploiting physical self is "criminal negligence" (S-044, S-063, S-110) |
| **Za'el** | 2023 | Explicitly against the 3D Matrix — "not at all necessary"; observer has moral obligation to help; Federation guides perception while claiming non-interference (Z-018, Z-024) |

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Title | Key Content |
|------------|-------|-------------|
| 100 | Freedom, Ascension, Federation, and 5D Cages | "Sick playground," entertainment for souls, Federation increases difficulty |
| 143 | Souls' Plan From Above | "You cannot kill millions in the name of a higher perspective" |
| 185 | Federation and Earth — ET Reality vs Humanity | Federation sees Earth as experiment; suffering changes value once outside; empathy argument |
| 316 | White Hats — Message from Yazhi | "Cosmic game would end," learning from friction, self-contained Matrix |
| 327 | Earth — Why Is It Important for the ETs? | "Amusement park," nightmare video game, souls repeating 3rd grade, Yazhi's contradiction |
| 402 | Why Are We a Vibrational Match to Corrupt Federation? | Collective creation, shadow work, boredom in higher realms |
| A-045 | Creation of the Cabal — Reptiles and Human Manifestation | Training ground, Federation imposed evil, "bio suit for many races" |
| S-044 | Conclusions 01, Galactic Federation | Higher self as two persons, "criminal negligence," restrictions prevent positive manifestation |
| S-063 | Money and the Galactic Federation | Earth as school AND playground for all, Federation controls all money, ET funding system |
| S-110 | Politics Controlled from Off-Planet | Souls control from above but victims from below, Federation shapes events to match soul demands |
| Z-018 | Is the Experience on Earth Positive? | Frustration with "everything is for your own good," 3D Matrix not necessary, observer's moral obligation |
| Z-024 | The Sickness of Earth's Society | Starseed suffering, carrot-and-donkey trap, Federation censors those who expose lies |

answers.content:
# Is there a difference between the Federation and the "Federation of Light"?

## Short Answer

Yes, and the speakers consider the confusion between them one of the most damaging distortions in the New Age movement. The Galactic Federation — also called the United Federation of Planets — is a physical, political organisation made of biological people in bodies who need chairs, councils, and starships. It exists in what is loosely called 5D, a slightly higher vibratory state than 3D Earth but still very much material. Above this, in vastly higher existential realms, there exists a conglomerate of light beings — higher selves, spirit guides, the most expanded aspects of consciousness — who operate outside space and time in near-total unity with Source. These beings do not call themselves a federation and have no need for one. The New Age "Federation of Light" is, according to the speakers, an idealised mashup of these two completely different things: the loving messages of etheric light beings grafted onto the political structure of a physical organisation that behaves, in practice, much like any other government. This conflation is not accidental — the speakers argue it was deliberately designed by the controllers of Earth as a perception-management tool for the awakening population.

---

## The Physical Federation: Politicians Who Need Chairs

Mari Swaruu, who has walked the corridors of the Federation headquarters in the Andromedan biosphere Viera and also lived on Earth's surface as a Step Down, insists repeatedly on the material reality of the Federation. It is a physical multi-racial conglomerate established after the Great Expansion from Lyra, founded by Andromedans, Arcturians, and Lyrians. Its internal structure is a holistic step council system with chain-of-command hierarchies, Council meetings held every other Saturday in the Viera, and military forces belonging to specific member races tasked with policing and enforcement (S-034, 447, S-044).

The people who attend these councils are biological beings in bodies. They eat, they rest, they go to the bathroom. They have all the qualities and defects of any group of political actors. Some are deeply ethical. Others abuse their power in ways that mirror the behaviour of Earth politicians — extortion, fabrication of events, manipulation, and dirty tactics (S-155, S-249). The Federation is, as Mari puts it, nothing more than more government with the same basic structure as the ones on Earth, because it is the template from which Earth's political systems were copied (S-249).

This is the organisation that imposes arbitrary restrictions on visiting races, applies the Prime Directive selectively, monitors all communications through centralised hubs, and buries its real decision-making behind layers of inaccessible bureaucracy (S-038, 265). It is physical, political, flawed, and very much real in the material sense.

## The Higher Federation: Light Beings Who Need Nothing

Above all of this, in existential realms so expanded that the very concepts of here and there no longer apply, there is something entirely different. Mari describes it as a conglomerate of all our higher selves, of all our most expanded versions or our spirit guides. These beings exist outside space and time, blending with one another as one great mass of consciousness while retaining only a slim concept of individual identity. They communicate through full telepathy. They do not travel in starships because they have transcended distance entirely through what the Taygetans call the principle of non-locality. They do not hold councils because they do not need organisational structures — they simply are (S-041).

These beings are, by definition, positive and loving, because their frequency and vibration make them a match only to that quality of existence. As you rise in density, the Federation as an organisation dissolves into obsolescence. The higher you go, the less you need political structures, enforcement mechanisms, or even names (S-155, S-041).

Light beings influence the physical world — including the physical Federation — by working through people in lower realms. They channel ideas, implant concepts, whisper guidance. They may incarnate as normal humans, remembering everything or remembering nothing but carrying their essence as inner knowing. In a real sense, everyone who has a soul is a light being; the degree to which those attributes manifest depends on the individual's connection to Source (S-041).

## The New Age Conflation: Deliberate or Accidental?

The speakers identify three basic New Age descriptions of the Federation: a physical group of benevolent races monitoring an isolated Earth; a fighting force systematically defeating evil with liberation always imminent but never arriving; and a group of ascended masters in higher dimensions guiding humanity from above. Mari says all three contain some truth, but the subject is far too complicated for any of them (S-249).

The critical error, according to the speakers, is that the New Age mashes these together — taking the loving, transcendent qualities of the higher light beings and attributing them to the physical Federation politicians who sit in chairs in the Viera. The etheric beings do not call themselves a federation. They have no need for such an organisation. Yet the New Age concept pastes their qualities directly onto the nuts-and-bolts political body, creating an image of benevolent, all-powerful saviours that simply does not match the observed reality (S-044).

Yazhi Swaruu is the most blunt: the Federation of Light Commandos fighting on the Moon for the liberation of Earth is fiction, a direct reflection of the human mentality — the same religious good-versus-evil narrative dressed in a space suit. There is no liberation force arriving imminently. There is no cosmic battle between good and evil playing out in a way that will rescue humanity. The Matrix is a self-contained system for soul experiences, and the Federation manages it, not fights against it (316).

## The New Age as a Control Mechanism

The speakers go further than simply identifying the conflation — they argue it was engineered. Mari Swaruu's analysis is that the New Age movement was designed and imposed by the Galactic Federation itself as a perception-management tool for the segment of the population that had started to awaken, to doubt official narratives, to lose faith in politicians and institutional religion (S-239).

The mechanism works like this: as people awaken, they leave the mainstream Matrix narrative. The controllers need a secondary containment system for these people — something that validates their suspicion that they have been lied to, makes them feel they are finally discovering the truth, and gives them community with like-minded people. The New Age fills this function perfectly. It provides an alternative belief system specifically tailored to the awakening population, complete with promises of liberation that never arrive, concepts of love and light that discourage fighting for your rights, and ascended masters who will solve everything so you do not need to become proactive yourself (S-239).

The concept of vibrational compatibility — which the speakers acknowledge is a genuine cosmic truth — has been weaponised within the New Age. If you are suffering, it is because you cannot control your vibration. If liberation has not arrived, it is because the collective frequency is not high enough. This produces the same obedience and passivity that institutional religion always produced, only with a flying-saucer twist. As Mari observes, each variant is specifically tailored to the awareness level of its target audience, so everyone gets exactly the version of the trap designed for their level of awakening (S-239).

The Saturday conferences in the Viera, where Federation representatives show atrocity images from Earth's wars to attending star races, reveal the same propaganda strategy applied upward — not just to humans but to the member races themselves. The Federation manages perception at every level, always controlling what each audience knows and thinks about the others (S-239).

## Why This Distinction Matters

The practical consequence of confusing the two Federations is paralysis. If you believe that an all-powerful, all-loving light being Federation is fighting for your liberation, you wait. You sit in a high vibrational state and trust the process. You do not become proactive because the ascended masters are handling it.

But if you understand that the physical Federation is a political body with the same structural flaws as any government, the same tendencies toward corruption, the same use of propaganda and compartmentalisation — then the response is different. Then the door opens from inside, not from above. The speakers consistently insist that humanity must solve its own problems, that the physical Federation will not intervene because it is the manager of the Matrix, not the liberator from it. The higher light beings can guide and inspire, but they work through individuals, not through political or military action (S-040, S-041, S-044).

The distinction matters because it is the difference between passivity and agency. The New Age version of the Federation offers rescue. The speakers' version offers reality — flawed, bureaucratic, sometimes corrupt, but also containing genuinely ethical individuals at every level. And above it all, light beings who are not a separate organisation but the highest aspects of the very souls living through the experience.

## Evolution Across Speakers

Mari Swaruu (2023-2024) builds the most systematic case across her Federation video series, progressively separating the physical Federation from the higher light beings and identifying the New Age conflation as an engineered control mechanism.

Yazhi Swaruu (2022) provides the sharpest dismissal — the Federation of Light Commandos are fiction, everything is false from Earth's point of view, and the only real thing is the soul making the experience.

Athena Swaruu (2021) delivers the political anatomy through the mutual accusations between Taygeta and the Federation, revealing a physical organisation with all-too-human political dynamics (181).

The earlier Swaruus and the 447 overview establish the foundational framework: the Federation is a physical organisation, not an etheric one, and the New Age treatment of it is a controlled narrative flooding UFO communities with disinformation.

## Key Transcript References

- **S-041** — Higher Federation of light beings described; they do not call themselves a federation; New Age as idealised mixture of both levels; everybody with a soul is a light being
- **S-044** — New Age distortion mixing etheric light beings with physical Federation politicians; light beings have no need for organisation; Federation non-intervention as criminal negligence
- **S-249** — Three New Age Federation descriptions analysed; Federation mirrors Cabal; dark forces takeover theory; Viera-level Federation as confused useful idiots
- **S-239** — New Age designed and imposed by Federation as control mechanism; weaponised vibrational concepts; Saturday conference propaganda; atrocity images to manipulate star races
- **316** — Yazhi dismisses Federation of Light Commandos as fiction reflecting human mentality; everything false except soul experience
- **447** — Federation definition as physical multi-racial conglomerate; not etheric, not Federation of Light; New Age as controlled narrative; Federation of Light as pet initiative
- **S-034** — Multiple perspectives on Federation including love-and-light view; Mari's dual perspective from orbit and surface; physical situation in orbit
- **S-040** — Physical vs astral sides of Federation; every material realm has etheric/astral side; positive twist: souls incarnated on Earth truly governing
- **181** — Mutual accusations between Taygeta and Federation; deterioration of relationship; political dynamics of physical Federation
answers.summary: The Galactic Federation (United Federation of Planets) is a physical political organisation of biological beings who need chairs, councils, and starships — existing in 5D but very much material. Above it, in vastly higher existential realms, exists a conglomerate of light beings (higher selves, spirit guides) who operate outside space-time in near-unity with Source. These beings do not call themselves a federation and have no need for one. The New Age "Federation of Light" is an idealised conflation of both — loving qualities of etheric light beings grafted onto a flawed political body that behaves like any other government. The speakers argue this conflation was deliberately engineered by the Federation itself as a perception-management tool for the awakening population, functioning like institutional religion with a flying-saucer twist. Yazhi dismisses "Federation of Light Commandos" as fiction reflecting human mentality. The distinction matters because it is the difference between passive waiting for rescue and active agency within a system that must be changed from within.
