answers.content:
# What Are Densities — Are They Real Places or States of Consciousness?

## Short Answer

Densities in the Cosmic Agency material are neither fixed locations nor purely subjective states of mind. They are ranges of frequency — sections of one continuous gradient of atomic oscillation that stretches from the slowest, densest vibration to the highest, lightest potential energy. There are no hard borders between them, no walls, no separate worlds. Swaruu of Erra compares it to a ruler: what humans call 3D is the range between the 3cm and 4cm mark. Everything else on the ruler exists simultaneously — humans simply cannot perceive it because their biological bodies are tuned to that narrow frequency band.

But the concept gets progressively more radical as different speakers address it. Swaruu of Erra introduces densities as real frequency ranges with real consequences — different creatures, different physics, different levels of awareness. Yazhi Swaruu then dismantles the entire framework, declaring that there are no densities, no timelines, no parallel universes — only consciousness generating the appearance of these structures through its own limitations and points of attention. And Swaruu of Erra herself, even while explaining densities systematically, opens her explanation with the statement: "There are no densities."

The practical answer is that densities are a useful map of a territory that, at its deepest level, does not have the divisions the map suggests. They describe real experiential differences — a person in 3D genuinely cannot see what a person in 5D can see, just as a car moving too fast becomes invisible to someone standing still. But the divisions are human-made conceptual boundaries imposed on what is actually a seamless, unbroken continuum of frequency that is ultimately generated by consciousness itself.

---

## The Full Picture

### The Frequency Gradient: Swaruu of Erra's Foundation

Swaruu of Erra provides the most systematic treatment of densities in transcript 007. She begins by distinguishing densities from dimensions. Dimensions in the mathematical sense refer to geometric axes — X, Y, Z — the progression from a line (1D) to a surface (2D) to a volume (3D) to a tesseract (4D). These are mathematical objects and have nothing to do with what the Cosmic Agency material means by 3D, 5D, or 7D as experiential realms.

Densities, by contrast, refer to frequency ranges. What defines a density is the oscillation rate of atomic structure — how fast matter vibrates. In 3D, matter oscillates slowly, heavily. In 5D, it oscillates much faster. The faster the oscillation, the lighter and less dense the matter, until at the highest ranges matter dissolves into pure potential energy — consciousness without material form.

The critical principle is that there are no frontiers between densities. It is all one gradient, one whole, like a radio dial with an infinite number of stations. The numbers humans assign — 3D, 4D, 5D — are conceptual conveniences, attempts to understand something bigger than themselves. They do not correspond to actual divisions in reality. Number 3 is part of number 5 in the same way that a frequency band is part of a larger spectrum. Beings in any density can perceive everything at their level and below, but not above — just as someone moving at a certain speed can see everything at that speed or slower, but objects moving faster become invisible.

### The Three Ways to See Densities

Swaruu identifies three overlapping frameworks for understanding what densities represent, and she insists all three are parts of the same explanation:

The first is the mathematical/geometric framework — dimensions as spatial axes. This is the least relevant to the Cosmic Agency discussion but forms part of human background understanding.

The second is the consciousness framework. Here, each density corresponds to a level of self-awareness: 1D is mineral consciousness — existing without knowing you exist. 2D is the beginning of awareness of separation, pure survival mode. 3D is ego identity — you know you are you and that others exist. 4D is the beginning of awareness that you are part of others. 5D is clear identity without ego — you know you are both yourself and others simultaneously.

The third is the frequency framework — the ever-increasing curve of atomic oscillation from slow to fast, from dense matter to pure energy.

Swaruu sees these holographically, as inseparable aspects of one reality. A being's consciousness level and its frequency are not separate things — they are two descriptions of the same phenomenon. A consciousness that understands itself as separate from everything else naturally manifests at a frequency that corresponds to dense, slow-vibrating matter. A consciousness that knows itself as Source manifests at frequencies where matter ceases to exist and only intention remains.

### 4D: The Buffer Zone

One of the most distinctive claims in the material is the treatment of 4D as a buffer zone or gradient between 3D and 5D, rather than a distinct realm in its own right. Swaruu describes 4D as the lower astral — the frequency zone where the 3D Matrix's suppression of natural 5D vibration weakens enough for higher frequencies to leak through. It is populated by its own creatures: astral parasites, etheric slugs, but also beings from mythology — elves, trolls, dragons, faeries — which are real creatures existing at a frequency band just above what 3D humans can normally perceive.

The practical significance is that 4D creatures can see 3D (downward perception) but not 5D (upward perception). The Taygetans, operating at 5D, can perceive and interact with both 4D and 3D. This creates asymmetric awareness — a key strategic element in the material's description of the conflict between races.

When the 3D Matrix was imposed on Earth — through electromagnetic frequency suppression that artificially lowered natural 5D vibration — it also affected 4D. The creatures there are, in a sense, collateral damage of the frequency lockdown. When the Matrix weakens or is eventually dismantled, 4D creatures will also be freed.

### 6D and Above: Where Matter Ends

Above 5D, the rules change fundamentally. Swaruu describes 6D as the astral of 5D — a frequency band where physicality begins to dissolve. Beings there may appear to have bodies, but only from their own perspective. From 5D, they appear as energy. Between 6D and 7D, matter ceases to exist as a stable state and becomes purely the product of intentional manifestation.

Swaruu's personal memory of 7D existence is one of the most evocative passages in the material: thick with love and peace, like a warm blanket. Everything wanted or needed was met instantly. She could see all around at once, be everything at once — planets, interstellar dust, grass on faraway worlds, every little creature. All memories present simultaneously because there is no time. The self begins to evaporate as you feel you are everyone.

Above 7D, the gradient continues — perhaps infinitely, perhaps in a spiral where the highest point connects back to the lowest, forming a circle. Source, she says, is all-inclusive — not a destination at the top of a ladder but the entire ladder itself, including every rung.

### Yazhi's Demolition: There Are No Densities

Yazhi Swaruu takes the entire framework and collapses it. In transcript 224, she states flatly that there are no densities, no timelines, no parallel universes. These are all conceptual tools that consciousness uses to organise its experience, but they do not correspond to objective structural features of reality. She expanded this in transcript 193 with a critical technical point: the consciousness of beings connected to Source is not contained in a single frequency range — it is fragmented across multiple density levels simultaneously, with thoughts, perceptions, and unconscious processes operating at different frequencies all at once. A person may observe 3D with their physical eyes while simultaneously holding complex thoughts that correspond to a much higher density. Trying to place such a being at a single point on a frequency gradient is, she said, highly reductionist. Athena agreed in the same transcript: each individual holds or creates its own density, and people perceived as co-existing in a density are only sharing agreements of perception — similar but never exactly the same.

Her argument is that all density distinctions are generated by consciousness itself — by the limitations a point of attention imposes on itself in order to have a specific experience. What humans call 3D is not a place or even a frequency band; it is a particular set of perceptual agreements that a group of consciousnesses have adopted. Change the agreements and the density changes. There is no underlying structure that exists independently of the consciousness perceiving it.

This does not mean that the experience of densities is not real. A person in 3D genuinely cannot perceive 5D phenomena — the limitation is experientially total. But the cause of that limitation is not an external structure; it is the consciousness's own self-imposed restriction. The Matrix on Earth, with its electromagnetic frequency suppression, is simply a technological amplification of a restriction that consciousness was already generating naturally through its beliefs and perceptual agreements.

From Yazhi's most expanded perspective, there is only consciousness — undivided, without levels or layers. The appearance of separate densities is the appearance of a dream to the dreamer: entirely real within the dream, entirely constructed by the dreamer.

### Practical Consequences: What Does This Mean for Life on Earth?

The density framework has direct consequences for several topics covered elsewhere in the FAQ cluster. The veil of forgetfulness exists because the frequency gap between Source-level consciousness and Earth-level consciousness is too large for information to pass easily — like a radio trying to receive a station far outside its tuning range. Dreams are hard to remember because they occur at lighter frequencies that do not match the heavy vibration of waking 3D life. Ghosts can interact with the living when vibrational proximity allows the astral to bleed into the material. The afterlife experience is determined by the frequency the soul holds at death, which places it in the corresponding range on the gradient.

But the most important practical consequence is Swaruu of Erra's insistence, echoed by Yazhi and all other speakers, that a density is not something that happens to you — it is something that you are. You do not ascend to 5D by travelling somewhere. You ascend by changing your frequency, which changes your perception, which changes your experienced reality. The biological body exists in a particular frequency range, but consciousness is holographic and is in no way handicapped by the body's density placement. This is why Yazhi can claim to operate at 7D awareness while inhabiting a biological body in 5D space — the body and the consciousness are at different points on the gradient simultaneously.

---

## Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

**Swaruu of Erra (Swaruu 9)** provides the foundational map: densities as frequency ranges on a continuous gradient with no hard borders; dimensions vs densities distinction; three ways to understand densities (geometric, consciousness-level, frequency); 4D as buffer zone and lower astral; 6D-7D as transition from matter to energy; and her personal 7D memory. She opens with "there are no densities" but then pragmatically describes them as useful categories for a gradient that is ultimately undivided.

**Yazhi Swaruu** radicalises the position: there are no densities, timelines, or parallel universes — all are conceptual constructs generated by consciousness organising its own experience. The Matrix is a technological amplification of self-imposed perceptual restriction. From the most expanded view, there is only consciousness, and density distinctions are the dream's architecture, not objective reality.

**Athena Swaruu (X)** reinforces the demolition from a practical standpoint in transcript 193: she sees 3D/5D labels as human-made concepts reflecting dualistic thinking. There is only one reality mass — immense, made up of gravity that is a flow in the Ether — and what each individual perceives as reality is determined by its own frequency. She argues each individual has its own density and creates its own density of existence.

**Mari Swaruu** brings the position to its most accessible form in S-067: to be in 5D is not a place, not a frequency that can be measured with instrumentation, and not something you can assign a numerical value to. It is how we feel, how aware we are about everything and everyone, and knowing that everything is a reflection of who we are. She directly disagrees with her predecessors' assignment of 5D to everything outside the Van Allen belts — there are many examples of 3D-like situations in space and many 5D-minded people on Earth.

**Swaruu (the original)** adds from transcript 100 that even 5D is a cage — another set of agreements, perceptions, and rules. True freedom transcends all density frameworks entirely. The practical destination is not any particular density but the state of consciousness where you can use any density at will without being trapped by any.

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Speaker(s) | Key Contribution |
|---|---|---|
| 007 | Swaruu of Erra (9) | Definitive density explanation: frequency gradient with no borders; dimensions vs densities; density as atomic oscillation rate; ruler analogy (3D = 3-4cm on a 30cm ruler); 4D as buffer zone/lower astral with mythological creatures; 6D-7D transition from matter to pure energy; 7D memory; three frameworks for understanding densities; consciousness is holographic and not limited by body's density |
| 224 | Yazhi Swaruu | "There are no densities" — all density/timeline/parallel universe concepts are constructs of consciousness; ego as egregor; world of dead mirrors living; no separation between physical and astral; reality generated entirely by consciousness |
| 100 | Swaruu | 5D is still a cage — another set of rules and agreements; true freedom transcends all frameworks; a density is not something that happens to you, it is something you are; Federation gives people what they vibrationally request |
| 131 | Yazhi Swaruu | Being incarnated has nothing to do with consciousness level; body is symptom not cause; you can be in highest density awareness while in biological body; be your higher self now regardless of density placement |
| 103 | Yazhi Swaruu | Soul evolves by acquiring complexity through knowledge; outgrowing species as consciousness expands; what changes between densities is the range of perception and the amount of information processed |
| 184 | Athena Swaruu | Soul as self-limitation of Source; without limitation there would be only undifferentiated Source; measuring tape analogy — density is how far the tape is pulled from the casing |
| 062 | Swaruu of Erra (9) | Afterlife frequency match — you go where your vibration places you on the gradient; higher planes manifest immediately; lower planes manifest slowly; density determines post-death experience |
| 193 | Yazhi, Athena | Consciousness fragmented across multiple density ranges simultaneously — not contained in single frequency band. Each individual creates its own density. Sentient beings connected to Source are scalar and non-linear. Parasitic larvae question resolved: outside understanding range, not necessarily "higher." Telescopes respond to creator's consciousness level. Venus example — soldiers bring their 3D perceptual lens with them |
| S-067 | Mari Swaruu | 5D is not a place, not a measurable frequency — it is how we feel and how aware we are. Directly disagrees that everything outside Van Allen belts is 5D. Many 3D-like situations exist in space; many 5D-minded people on Earth. Higher consciousness can understand all lower levels but not vice versa. Pessimistic overthinking induces survival state that hinders ascension. No one is really more evolved — everyone is a particular point of attention of Source |
| S-122 | Mari Swaruu | Material world defined by biological body's five-six senses plus linear time perception; astral as same reality at different frequency; no separate worlds — only different perception filters on one continuum |

answers.title: What caused the Tartarian mud floods — was there a civilisation reset in the 1800s?
answers.excerpt: According to the Cosmic Agency material, yes — emphatically. Multiple speakers describe Tartaria as a real, technologically advanced civilisation that was deliberately destroyed, with the greatest…
answers.content:
# What caused the Tartarian mud floods — was there a civilisation reset in the 1800s?

According to the Cosmic Agency material, yes — emphatically. Multiple speakers describe Tartaria as a real, technologically advanced civilisation that was deliberately destroyed, with the greatest period of destruction placed in the mid-nineteenth century. The material goes further than most alternative history claims by asserting that civilisation resets are not one-off events but a recurring mechanism used by the Galactic Federation to maintain the 3D Matrix on Earth, and that the current era represents the late stages of the same reset that erased Tartaria. The mud flood phenomenon is addressed most directly by Mari Swaruu, who connects it to a possible recent global deluge caused by delayed arrival of water from the destroyed planet Tiamat — though she presents this as a theory she could revise.

## Tartaria as Described from Orbit

The most detailed physical account of Tartaria comes from Athena Swaruu (Swaruu X), who stated in transcript 295 that she investigated the subject using both Earth-based research and the Toleka's own ship sensors. She described finding non-human records about Tartaria in Federation archives, though filed under different names — Southern HyperBoria, non-Czarist Russia, or Asian Empire — with such confused dating that she could not initially place these civilisations as recent (296, Athena Swaruu).

Using the gravitometer and nose radar of the Toleka, Athena confirmed the existence of more than fifty large destroyed cities across Siberia, Mongolia, and northern China — cities of several square kilometres, the dimensions of modern cities, now buried under grassland, sediment, and desert sand. She stated that while ground-penetrating radar can easily find these sites, the rate at which nature erases buildings confirms they were levelled artificially, not by natural processes (295, Athena Swaruu).

The territory Athena described as Tartaria extended from roughly one to two thousand kilometres west of Moscow to the Kamchatka peninsula, including upper and lower Siberia, the Balkans as far as Kazakhstan and possibly Afghanistan, and territories that today are Mongolia, Tibet, and northern China. Some human researchers, she noted, extend Tartaria's domain as far south as California, including Alaska, Canada, and the continental United States (295 and 296, Athena Swaruu).

She described the inhabitants as white-skinned and blond or red-haired, with evidence suggesting tall stature — possibly in the range of Taygetan males, averaging two metres but reaching up to 2.6 metres. She cautioned that ancient depictions of giants should not always be taken literally, since artistic conventions of the period often represented a ruler's importance through physical size rather than recording actual height (295, Athena Swaruu).

## The Destruction Timeline

Athena placed the destruction of Tartaria between the 1700s and the early twentieth century, with the greatest mass of destruction in the mid-nineteenth century and the civilisation ending completely around 1938, though she stressed that even these dates operate within a false time frame and are not precise (295, Athena Swaruu).

The destruction was carried out by the Cabal, she stated, using historical wars — including the Napoleonic wars — while lying about the places and battles. The evidence pointed to genocide: when Robert asked where the inhabitants went, Athena answered simply that the evidence shows there was a genocide (295, Athena Swaruu).

She connected the destruction to several further claims. First, trains of refugee children between the 1830s and 1940s: rows and rows of children were given new identities before disappearing, and Athena suspected many ended up underground in tunnels at the service of the human and non-human Cabal. When Robert mentioned reports of long convoys of white, blond young people arriving in Germany around 1940, Athena stated this fitted directly with the large cities destroyed in central Russia in the same time frame (295, Athena Swaruu).

Second, Russian nuclear tests: Athena mapped the locations of Soviet nuclear detonations across Russia and found they were not concentrated in one remote location but scattered across the country, and their positions corresponded almost perfectly with either ancient DUMBs, entrances to the inner Earth, or the ruins of large Tartarian cities. She cited a historical figure named Alexander Barchenko, involved in Soviet testing on the Kola Peninsula, who claimed the subterranean detonations used energy weapons designed to produce downward shock waves — not true atomic bombs — to destroy an enemy of Russia hidden in deep caverns. Athena concluded that the so-called nuclear tests were attacks against Tartarian survivors who had retreated underground (295, Athena Swaruu).

Third, the Great Wall of China: Athena pointed out that the defensive features of the wall — specifically the archer positions — face south toward China, not north toward Mongolia. Combined with the fact that the wall's construction style, design, and materials match those found in Tartarian ruins, she concluded the wall was built by the Tartars to defend against China, not by China to defend against northern invaders (295, Athena Swaruu).

Tartaria's technology included Zero Point electrical power, evidenced by hundreds of pyramids and pyramid remains detected around the ruins of the large cities, with the greatest concentration under the Gobi Desert and northern China, where many pyramids remain visible on the surface to this day. Athena stated Tartaria lacked interstellar capability, though she could not be sure what influence the civilisation had outside of Earth (295, Athena Swaruu).

## The Mud Floods and Possible Recent Deluge

Mari Swaruu addressed the mud flood phenomenon most directly in transcript S-265, connecting it to the broader Tartaria subject. She noted that researchers have documented a large number of buried structures — sometimes entire buildings — all over the world, not ancient or medieval structures but large, modern enough buildings that appear to date from the late seventeenth to early nineteenth century. Modern-day cities have been built over them (S-265, Mari Swaruu).

She observed that while localised floods occur regularly, the sheer number of buried buildings worldwide, all with consistent architecture placing them in the same period, suggests the mud flow events were global rather than merely a connected group of local floods. The amount of sediment required to bury large buildings entirely would be proportional to an extraordinary volume of water and erosion, far exceeding normal flood events (S-265, Mari Swaruu).

Mari connected these mud flows to the destruction of planet Tiamat. According to official Galactic Federation data, Tiamat — a water planet roughly the size of Neptune, located between Mars and Jupiter — was destroyed 12,500 Earth years ago in a war between Federation factions. Its water floated in space as liquid blobs (not ice, since space does not transmit heat rapidly), and much of it eventually fell onto the other planets of the Solar System, including Earth, causing the universal deluge described in the Bible and other ancient texts (S-265, Mari Swaruu).

Mari's key theoretical contribution was to suggest that if Tiamat's water clumped into multiple groups of blobs rather than a single mass, Earth could have suffered more than one global deluge event — and the most recent one may have occurred as recently as two hundred years ago. She speculated that the buried buildings, the disappearance of Tartaria, and the circumstantial evidence of a reset between 1800 and 1850 could all be connected to a late arrival of Tiamat water. She emphasised this was a theory based on connecting dots, not a confirmed fact, and that she could change her mind with better information (S-265, Mari Swaruu).

She added a further complication: the time-slip differential between Earth and other planets. Temmer in Taygeta has a 4.6:1 ratio — for every day on Temmer, 4.6 days pass on Earth. This makes comparative dating between planets extremely difficult and is convenient for whoever might be orchestrating resets, since the Galactic Federation could place events in different time frames and contexts to make up false history (S-265, Mari Swaruu).

## Civilisation Resets as a Recurring Pattern

The material does not treat Tartaria's destruction as an isolated event but as one instance of a repeated cycle. Yazhi Swaruu stated in transcript 116 that the Federation has destroyed Earth civilisation and the 3D Matrix at least six times before the current version. The trigger is not a fixed calendar cycle but a threshold: when the number of awakened individuals exceeds a limit, the system destabilises and the controllers have no choice but to dissolve the entire game and start over. She described this as cyclical, recorded in virtually all ancient cultures — 25,000-year cycles, the Mayan Calendar, Kali Yuga — though she stressed it does not happen every fixed number of years (116, Yazhi Swaruu).

In transcript 120, Yazhi clarified that only the most recent reset is 3D — within the Van Allen bands. The previous civilisations, including Atlantis and Lemuria, were 5D and part of a larger Matrix that included almost the entire solar system. She described these earlier civilisations as literally forgotten in time, existing only as vague data in ancient computer records (120, Yazhi Swaruu).

Mari Swaruu built on this framework in her later videos, distinguishing between hard resets (global cataclysms) and soft resets (gradual manipulation of perception). She stated in transcript S-179 that a complete social reset takes somewhere in the vicinity of 150 years, and that all available data indicates the last one occurred somewhere in the middle of the nineteenth century. The controllers can afford this patience because they are not human, have much longer lifespans, and exist off-planet where time does not have the same duration or length as it is perceived on Earth (S-179, Mari Swaruu).

## How Soft Resets Work

Mari described the soft reset mechanism in detail across several transcripts. The core method exploits Earth's veil of forgetfulness: after a generation dies out, the controllers can change the official past of the entire planet using well-elaborated but false historical narratives. Historical buildings that contradict the new story are destroyed. Archaeological sites are modified in the name of restoration. Old texts are given erroneous interpretations by specialists on secret society payrolls (S-179, Mari Swaruu).

In transcript S-181, she described how modern technology has made this process more efficient. Television was originally patented as a mind control device; cell phones are simply better at it. The internet, sold to the public as a free information superhighway, has become a tool for monopolising truth, burying information under layers of misinformation, and making the population believe everything old is obsolete (S-181 and S-223, Mari Swaruu).

She identified specific social engineering techniques: legitimate rights movements for minorities and women are weaponised to serve population reduction and social fragmentation agendas; food additives and genetic modifications reduce fertility; career structures are designed so women cannot easily combine professional achievement with motherhood. All these apparently unconnected agendas produce the same aggregate result — drastic population decline and the acceptance of a new sociocultural paradigm. She described this as the definition of a soft reset (S-181, Mari Swaruu).

## The Federation's Role

A consistent thread across all speakers is that the Galactic Federation is ultimately behind the resets. Mari Swaruu stated in transcript S-115 that Tartaria is missing from Federation archives as well as from Earth's history, and that since the Federation is the true controller of Earth — the government behind the deep governments — the directive to erase Tartaria had to come from the Federation itself and not only from the so-called Cabal on Earth (S-115, Mari Swaruu).

She extended this further in S-223, arguing that all the historical timeline as officially presented is false, and that Earth very recently had a highly advanced civilisation, perhaps even interstellar, with the Federation actively hiding information and blocking anyone who dares research the subject. She cited NAZCA lines as undeniable guiding systems and runways for elaborate starships, and the existence of a so-called Lemurian starship that arrived in recent years guided by automated systems with no one on board, showing evidence of a massive fight in its interior (S-223, Mari Swaruu).

Yazhi framed the Federation's motivation differently — not as malice but as institutional preservation. She stated the Federation creates and maintains the 3D Matrix as a training ground for souls seeking intense experiences through separation and contrast, and that when too many inhabitants wake up and see through the illusion, the game loses its purpose and the system must be reset. From this perspective, the Federation is not evil but is operating from a limited perspective — unable or unwilling to see what it is like to be a human inside the Matrix they control (116, Yazhi Swaruu).

## The Problem with Dates

Both Athena and Mari emphasised that all dating of these events is unreliable. Athena described time-travel ships navigating not by calendar dates but by frequency maps — mass-gravity configurations of matter at specific moments. When crews travel to a historical period, they do not know the calendar date unless they can correlate with other references. She described a personal experience as a child, travelling with her mother (Swaruu) to see the construction of Hadrian's Wall in what should have been approximately 122 AD, only to find that the Renaissance was happening simultaneously in France — an error of approximately 1,500 years on the gravity maps compared to the official historical timeline (296, Athena Swaruu).

She concluded that human history as officially recorded is not only written by the victors but openly and shamelessly invented, with characters and situations fabricated from nothing. What happened in the last two thousand years actually happened in less than six hundred or even less, with the correlation still being calculated (296, Athena Swaruu).

This means that even the dates given for Tartaria's destruction — mid-nineteenth century — operate within a time frame that Athena herself acknowledged as false. The events are real, in the material's account, but their precise placement in linear time is uncertain.

## What This Means for the Current Period

Mari Swaruu stated in transcript S-223 that the reset that destroyed Tartaria is not yet complete — what we see today is the latter stages of that same one. The data she cited places the last major reset event between 1750 and 1850, but she argued that the same process of erasing the past, controlling perception, and restructuring society has continued unbroken into the present day. The internet, social engineering, controlled wars, and systematic destruction of old cities through bombing are all described as mechanisms of an ongoing civilisation reset that began with the physical destruction of Tartaria and continues through softer means (S-223, Mari Swaruu).

---

**Sources:** Transcripts 295 (Athena Swaruu), 296 (Athena Swaruu), 116 (Yazhi Swaruu), 120 (Yazhi Swaruu); S-115 (Mari Swaruu), S-179 (Mari Swaruu), S-181 (Mari Swaruu), S-223 (Mari Swaruu), S-265 (Mari Swaruu)

answers.content:
# What destroyed planet Tiamat? Was it planned or collateral damage?

**Short answer:** According to the material, Tiamat was destroyed approximately 12,500 years ago as collateral damage from a massive space battle — not by deliberate intent. The reptilian forces set up a fictitious base on Tiamat transmitting decoy signals to lure the Federation into an ambush. A large Federation combat fleet led by Taygeta fell into the trap, and the ensuing battle was of such scale that weapons of mass destruction — zero-point and thermonuclear — destabilised the planet itself. The shockwaves from the battle disrupted Tiamat's great ocean, deviated its magnetosphere, and the planet broke apart. Neither side intended to destroy the planet; it was the catastrophic side-effect of weapons that exceeded what any planet could absorb. The destruction reshaped the entire solar system, caused the Great Flood on Earth, and led directly to the installation of the 3D Matrix.

---

## What Tiamat was

Tiamat was a very large planet, approximately eighty percent the size of Neptune, positioned closer to Earth than Mars is today. It was a water planet with few islands and was so luminescent — reflecting the sun across its vast oceans — that it appeared as a second sun from Earth's surface (Transcript 138).

Swaruu described this dual-sun appearance as the source of myths about two suns found across multiple cultures: in the Sumerian tablets, Chinese and Japanese records, and the Mayan Popol Vuh. The modern Nibiru myth is a distorted memory of Tiamat — not a missing planet that will return, but one that was destroyed (Transcript 138).

In the antediluvian world, Tiamat hung in the sky where the moon is now. Saturn was visible with horns but no rings. Earth was covered in dense forests with vast plains, few seas, and many lakes (Transcript 125).

Tiamat was also an inhabited world. It was a water-dominated environment comparable in nature to Sirius, where aquatic and semi-aquatic species were predominant. Dolphins and cetaceans were among the species seeded on Tiamat, Earth, and Taygetan worlds by the Sirians (Transcript 119). The planet was part of the broader interstellar ecology of this solar system.

## The ambush

The destruction of Tiamat occurred in the context of the war between the Federation and the reptilian forces that had invaded Earth, enslaved the Lyrian population, and established the civilisation of Atlantis. After the Taygetan women of Lemuria freed the enslaved Adamic race from Atlantis — the event encoded in the Genesis story — the enraged reptilians launched a war of extermination against what remained of Lemuria (Transcript 138).

The reptilians knew the Federation was on its way to investigate the loss of contact with the Lemurian base and the Lyrian colony. Rather than face the Federation directly, they set up a fictitious base on Tiamat, transmitting decoy signals designed to draw the Federation fleet into an ambush (Transcript 138).

A large combat fleet led by Taygeta entered the solar system and went to Tiamat to investigate the signals. They fell into the trap. Swaruu described the resulting battle as tremendous space combat of epic proportions even by today's standards (Transcript 138).

## The destruction

The battle resulted in the destruction of more than seventy-five percent of the forces on both sides — a catastrophic loss for both the Federation and the reptilian alliance. Weapons of mass destruction were used, including zero-point energy weapons and thermonuclear weapons. These destabilised the planet Tiamat itself, creating shockwaves in its great ocean that resulted in the deviation of its magnetosphere and ultimately the destruction of the planet (Transcript 138).

The material frames this as collateral damage, not a deliberate act. Neither the Federation nor the reptilians intended to destroy an entire planet. The scale of the weapons used in the confined space of a planetary engagement produced effects beyond anyone's control. Swaruu stated that for us nothing justifies the destruction of an entire planet and a lot of species karma is carried for that (Transcript 138).

## Consequences for the solar system

The destruction of Tiamat created cascading effects across the entire solar system. The sudden removal of such a massive body disrupted the delicate gravitational dynamics between all the planets, forcing a new orbital distribution of all the stars — meaning all the planets rearranged their orbits (Transcript 138).

The surface of Mars was devastated by the battle and subsequent cataclysms. The inhabitants of Mars, who survived, moved predominantly underground where they remain to this day (Transcript 138).

Earth, being closer to Tiamat than it is to Mars today, received the most devastating impact. The water from Tiamat's vast oceans — an enormous water planet nearly the size of Neptune — partially fell onto Earth, creating the Great Flood recorded in mythologies worldwide. The deluge submerged five continents that no longer exist: Appalachia, Fennoscandia, Oceana, Tirandia, and Beringia. It destroyed both the Atlantean and Lemurian civilisations simultaneously. It caused a pole shift due to the alteration of magnetic fields. And it reshaped the continents into their current configuration (Transcript 138, Transcript 125).

This is the event behind the legend of Noah's Ark. The Taygetans, knowing the cataclysm was coming, built three arks — not wooden boats but high-technology genetic containers holding DNA samples of Earth's biology in nano containers. Yazhi described them as built before the Tiamat cataclysm to preserve the living library of Earth. Three were constructed for redundancy: one kept under Giza, one in Sumeria under the Federation starport at Alt-Ur, and one guarded by Taygetan forces (Transcript 179).

## The 3D Matrix

In the aftermath, the Federation was severely weakened. Having lost more than three-quarters of its combat capability, it chose an emergency measure: installing an electromagnetic containment barrier around Earth, projected from a damaged Andromedan biosphere ship that was placed into orbit — the Moon. This barrier, manifested through the Van Allen belts, created the 3D Matrix (Transcript 138).

The intention was temporary containment — preventing the surviving negative reptilians from escaping into the wider galaxy while the Federation recovered and determined how to deal with them. But the containment system also trapped the surviving Lyrian population, the freed Adamic race, and every other being on Earth within its frequency-suppressing field. The reptilians, adapting to the new conditions, began using the Matrix frequencies for their own purposes of mind control over the human population (Transcript 138).

The pyramids were later constructed as part of a system to counteract the lunar Matrix from the surface — a mechanism to potentially remove the frequency suppression without having to go to the Moon itself. But they were eventually disabled by the forces that had co-opted the Matrix for control purposes (Transcript 142).

## The ongoing war

Swaruu described the destruction of Tiamat and everything that has followed as the continuation of the Orion Wars — the same conflict that began approximately one million years ago when the reptilian forces invaded Lyra. The wars are not over. They are ongoing today. The difference, she stated, is that now the Federation has superiority over the regressive Reptiles (Transcript 138).

The current situation on Earth — the Cabal, the Vatican, the suppression of history, the manipulation of consciousness — is all part of the aftermath of Tiamat's destruction and the failed containment strategy that followed. The 3D Matrix that was meant to be a temporary prison for the negative forces became the instrument of humanity's imprisonment, and the effort to undo that situation is what the Taygetan presence in orbit is about.

---

**Sources:** Transcript 119 (Extraterrestrial Races: Sirians — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 125 (Extraterrestrial Races: Agarthians — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 138 (Atlantis, Lemuria, Reptilians, Adam and Eve, Tiamat — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 142 (Pyramids — How Were They Built and What Do They Serve — Swaruu of Erra and Yazhi), Transcript 179 (Ark of the Covenant — Yazhi Swaruu)

**Speakers cited:** Swaruu of Erra, Yazhi Swaruu

answers.content:
# What do the Taygetans know about the Seals of Solomon — are they extraterrestrial-related?

**No-coverage answer**

There is no information in the Taygetan contact material to answer this question directly. King Solomon is mentioned only in passing — once in transcript 277 as an example of historical figures whose identities were manipulated, and the Star of David appears briefly in transcript 161 as part of an astrotheological analysis of Christianity. Neither reference discusses the "Seals of Solomon" as specific objects, artefacts, or symbols, nor attributes any extraterrestrial origin or function to them. The transcripts do not address Solomonic magic, the Lesser or Greater Keys of Solomon, or any tradition associated with Solomon's alleged power over spirits.

---

**Sources:** None specific to the Seals of Solomon. Passing mentions of Solomon in Transcripts 277 (Gosia/Athena Swaruu) and 161 (Swaruu of Erra) are contextual only and do not address the question.

answers.filename: What happened to Atlantis and Lemuria.md
answers.title: What happened to Atlantis and Lemuria?
answers.excerpt: The story begins approximately one million years ago with the Great Expansion of Lyra. A powerful reptilian invasion force attacked the Vega area — the planets Avalon and Lyra — where approximately…
answers.content:
# What happened to Atlantis and Lemuria?

**Short answer:** According to the material, neither Atlantis nor Lemuria were continents — they were civilisations. Lemuria was a Taygetan Pleiadian colony established on the now-submerged continent of Oceana, predating Atlantis and coexisting with a larger peaceful Lyrian civilisation on Earth. Atlantis was a predominantly reptilian civilisation centred on the continent of Appalachia, now under the North Atlantic Ocean. The two civilisations were in an eternal battle — Lemuria representing the Federation's positive influence and Atlantis representing reptilian control. Both were destroyed simultaneously approximately 12,500 years ago when the planet Tiamat was destroyed in a massive space battle, causing a catastrophic flood that submerged five continents. Lemuria's survivors fled underground, eventually forming the Agarthean civilisation beneath the Earth's surface. Atlantis's survivors moved to the highlands of Ireland and Scotland, and later to Egypt, where their lineage continued into what is now the Cabal.

---

## The pre-Atlantean world

The story begins approximately one million years ago with the Great Expansion of Lyra. A powerful reptilian invasion force attacked the Vega area — the planets Avalon and Lyra — where approximately four hundred thousand races of human-like beings lived in peace and did not know how to defend themselves. They fled to every possible corner of the galaxy, seeding countless worlds including Taygeta, Ummo, and Earth. The Federation was born from this crisis as a means of collective defence against extinction (Transcript 138).

The first Lyrians from space landed on Earth around forty thousand years ago, establishing a high-frequency advanced holographic society alongside older hominid species already present, including Neanderthals. During this period, a Taygetan Pleiadian colony was established on the now-defunct continent of Oceana. This colony was called Lemuria (Transcript 138).

Swaruu described the antediluvian world in vivid terms: Tiamat hung in the sky as a moon. Saturn was visible with horns but no rings. The Earth was covered in dense forests with vast plains, few seas, and many lakes. You could walk around the world although it would take years. All these faraway lands full of mysteries are now under water. The world resembled what Tolkien described in The Lord of the Rings (Transcript 125).

## What Atlantis and Lemuria actually were

The material is specific that neither was a continent. Both were civilisations. Lemuria was a civilisation, with its capital city called Mu, located on the continent of Oceana. It was founded by Taygeta as a colony and flourished with other peoples who joined, including those fleeing from the tyranny of Atlantis. Like New York being a group of cultures, Lemuria had a very large Taygetan component but was cosmopolitan (Transcript 125, Transcript 138).

Atlantis was a society, a culture, and the name of the capital of that civilisation. It was located on the continent of Appalachia — now under the North Atlantic, with the Appalachian Mountains in the eastern United States as a remnant. Its capital was south of the Bahamas, in what is now the Bermuda Triangle, though it had other major cities in northern Iraq, the Mediterranean, and South America, including Machu Picchu and Tiahuanaco (Transcript 125).

Swaruu was explicit about the nature of Atlantis: it was an almost exclusively reptilian place. People on Earth are mixing qualities of Atlantis with qualities of the earlier Lyrian civilisation (called Lyria-Gaia), which was completely like an embassy where countless races coexisted freely. The Atlanteans who are often mentioned in alternative history — the tall, bearded figures — were not from Earth's Atlantis. They were from the solar system of Atlas in the Pleiades, eight to ten metres tall with copper-coloured skin and brown or black beards (Transcript 138).

Egypt was described as Federation, while Atlantis was the Reptile Confederation (Transcript 146).

## The enslavement of the Lyrians

After the Lyrian civilisation on Earth was invaded by reptiles in what is called the First Ancient War — a conflict involving nuclear weapons, traces of which remain in places like Pakistan — the reptiles enslaved the surviving Lyrian population. These enslaved Lyrians were called Adams by the reptilians, forming the Adamic race (Transcript 138).

Children were separated from adults. Newborns were taken from their mothers and indoctrinated with reptile teachings. The adults were slaughtered and eaten. The children were left to start a new race of slaves. The reptiles attempted genetic modification of the Lyrians but failed because of their very strong connection to Source. As Swaruu stated, the Lyrian genetics is too strong — if they suppress a gene it will emerge again because of the high consciousness of the people (Transcript 138).

This is where the material diverges sharply from the Sumerian Tablet narrative. Swaruu stated that what the Tablets say about humans being genetically created is false — humans were not made by the reptilians. The genetic engineering that did succeed was performed on the reptilians' own species, creating a subordinate reptilian race indigenous to Earth that still does the dirty work for the supreme reptilians (Transcript 138).

## The Genesis story decoded

The material provides a specific decoding of the Garden of Eden narrative. During the period of Lyrian enslavement, the only place still fighting the reptiles was Lemuria. The Taygetan Pleiadians at the Lemurian base knew what was happening and mounted a counter-operation to free the enslaved Lyrians.

Swaruu decoded it as follows: the Snake is the Taygetan women of Lemuria — the Egyptian hieroglyph for woman is a snake, representing the DNA spiral. The Garden of Eden is Atlantis, the reptilian stronghold. The forbidden fruit is truth and knowledge. Adam represents the male Lyrian slaves, Eve the female slaves. Naked means without knowledge (Transcript 138).

The Taygetan women, passing as Adamic race members, gained access to the places where the slaves were held and communicated liberation teachings first to the women, who then passed them to the men. This is why the operation targeted Eve first — the women had access that the men did not. And this, Swaruu stated, is why women have been repressed on Earth ever since. The reptilians never forgave this act. The hatred of the feminine runs from this specific event through all subsequent human history (Transcript 138).

The freed Lyrians revolted and fled Atlantis. The furious reptiles launched a great hunt and massacre of Lyrians and Taygetans, with Lemuria remaining as the last stronghold of resistance.

## The destruction of Tiamat

Tiamat was a very large planet, about eighty percent the size of Neptune, closer to Earth than Mars is today. It was a water planet with few islands, so luminescent from reflected sunlight that it appeared as a second sun. This is the source of myths about two suns found in records from China, Japan, the Sumerian tablets, and the Mayan Popol Vuh. The modern Nibiru myth is a distorted memory of Tiamat (Transcript 138).

The destruction came from a massive space battle. The reptilians, knowing the Federation was approaching to investigate the loss of contact with the Lemurian base and the Lyrian colony, set up a fictitious base on Tiamat transmitting decoy signals to mount an ambush. A large Federation combat fleet led by Taygeta entered the system and fell into the trap. The resulting battle was of epic proportions, destroying more than seventy-five percent of the forces on both sides (Transcript 138).

Weapons of mass destruction — zero-point and thermonuclear — were used, destabilising Tiamat and creating shockwaves in its ocean that disrupted its magnetosphere. The planet was destroyed. Mars was also devastated. The destruction caused chaos across the entire solar system, altering the orbital dynamics of all planets (Transcript 138).

## The Great Flood

The destruction of Tiamat sent vast quantities of water cascading onto Earth. At that time Earth had five more continents than it does today — Appalachia, Fennoscandia, Oceana, Tirandia, and Beringia — and was covered predominantly in dense forest. The deluge submerged these continents, destroyed both the Atlantean and Lemurian civilisations simultaneously, caused a pole shift, and reconfigured the continents into their present arrangement (Transcript 138, Transcript 125).

This is the event behind the legend of Noah's Ark and every flood myth found across cultures worldwide. There was no Ice Age at this time, Swaruu stated — that was introduced as an excuse to erase the true history (Transcript 138).

## What happened to the survivors

The survivors of Lemuria — a mixture of Taygetans and freed Homo Atlantis (the Adamic race) — fled toward what is now South America, North America, and Japan. The majority reached North America, knowing they were being pursued by surviving Atlanteans. They entered known cavern systems beneath Mount Shasta and went deep underground. Over thousands of years, with relatively little negative interference, they spread throughout the planet underground, forming the Agarthean civilisation. Their capital city is Great Shambala beneath the Gobi Desert, Mongolia, and northern China (Transcript 125).

The survivors of Atlantis — the remaining reptilians and their enslaved populations — fled to the highlands of Ireland and Scotland, where the water had not reached. This is the actual reason for the name Highlands — they were high relative to the flood, not particularly elevated in absolute terms. From there, they later migrated down to Egypt. The Homo Capensis or Elohi, who had been associated with Atlantis, were among these highland refugees (Transcript 125, Transcript 138).

## The aftermath: the 3D Matrix

In the immediate aftermath, the Federation was severely weakened — it had lost the majority of its fleet in the Tiamat battle. The remaining reptilian population on Earth, though also vastly reduced and stripped of technology, began re-enslaving the surviving Lyrian population using mind control, as they no longer had the technology for anything else (Transcript 138).

The Federation chose to install an electromagnetic barrier around the Earth — the 3D Matrix — projected from a damaged Andromedan biosphere ship that became the Moon. This was meant as a temporary measure to prevent the negative reptilians from escaping while the Federation recovered. The Van Allen belts are the manifestation of this containment field (Transcript 138).

But the plan went wrong. The reptilians adapted and began using the Matrix frequencies to their advantage, creating the conditions for the current situation on Earth — where the containment system intended to trap the negative forces has become the primary tool for controlling the human population.

The destruction of Tiamat and the war for Earth is described as the continuation of the Orion Wars, which are not over. The difference is that now the Federation has superiority over the regressive Reptiles (Transcript 138).

---

**Sources:** Transcript 125 (Extraterrestrial Races: Agarthians — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 138 (Atlantis, Lemuria, Reptilians, Adam and Eve, Tiamat — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 146 (Ancient Egypt — Symbology — Swaruu and Dhor Kaal'el)

**Speakers cited:** Swaruu of Erra

answers.filename: What is karma — is it real.md
answers.title: What Is Karma — Is It Real?
answers.excerpt: Karma is real in the Cosmic Agency framework, but it is not what most people think it is. It is not a cosmic law of justice, not an inescapable debt ledger administered by higher beings, and not a…
answers.content:
# What Is Karma — Is It Real?

## Short Answer

Karma is real in the Cosmic Agency framework, but it is not what most people think it is. It is not a cosmic law of justice, not an inescapable debt ledger administered by higher beings, and not a punishment mechanism. In the Taygetan view, karma is simply the accumulated movements of your consciousness — your actions, thoughts, attachments, and unresolved experiences — and their natural consequences within the reality you inhabit. It is, as Swaruu of Erra puts it, like game money in a board game: entirely valid and functional while you are playing, but meaningless the moment you stop.

The crucial distinction the speakers make is between karma as cause-and-effect (which is real and operative at every level of existence) and karma as cosmic debt (which is a belief system that has been weaponised to keep souls reincarnating). The Andromedan model of karma — which is also the model inherited by Earth's Eastern religions — treats karma as an inescapable force that binds you across lifetimes. The Taygetan model rejects this entirely: you carry karma only because you choose to carry it. The moment you understand this, forgive others, and above all forgive yourself, the karma dissolves. It was never an external chain. It was an internal belief that generated the chain.

This is not just a philosophical difference. It has direct consequences for what happens at death and whether you reincarnate. If you die believing you owe karmic debts, you will manifest the experience of being held accountable for those debts in the afterlife. If you die understanding that karma is self-imposed and have done the inner work to release it, no force in the universe compels you to return.

---

## The Full Picture

### Karma as Game Money: The Taygetan Position

The most comprehensive treatment of karma comes from Swaruu of Erra in transcript 025, and her central metaphor is Monopoly money. Karma, she says, is like the currency in a board game. While you are playing, the money is entirely real within the context of the game — it buys things, it determines outcomes, it matters. But the instant you stop playing, it has no value whatsoever. You do not owe Monopoly debts after the game ends.

The incarnation cycle is the game. Karma operates within it as a genuine mechanism of cause and effect — your actions create ripples, your focus attracts corresponding experiences, and the Matrix reflects back to you what you put into it. In this sense, karma is real. It is the movement of your consciousness through reality, and it has consequences. Swaruu compares it to a credit card statement — it is simply the record of your movements, your decisions, and their outcomes.

But the interpretation of that record as debt — as something you must pay off before you can be free — is where the distortion lies. This interpretation was not always part of the concept. Swaruu explains that the word karma simply means movement. The idea that movements create inescapable obligations that bind you across lifetimes is a particular interpretation, one that has been adopted by most of the galaxy (through the Andromedan model) and imported to Earth through Eastern religions. But the Taygetans, after thousands of years of incarnations and reflection, arrived at a different conclusion: you carry karma because you choose to carry it.

### The Andromedan Model vs. the Taygetan Model

This is one of the rare points where the Taygetans explicitly disagree with other positive star races. The Andromedan concept of karma — which Swaruu identifies as the most widely used model in the galaxy — treats karma as a binding force. Actions generate karmic connections that must be resolved. Races that hold this model are, in Swaruu's words, afraid of karma. Many star races avoid involvement in Earth-related issues specifically because they fear generating karmic entanglement — that Earth's problems will somehow become theirs.

The Taygetans reject this. Their position is that karma as cosmic debt is a relic — old, outdated, and in need of revision. It exists for those who take it seriously, because belief generates reality. But it is not an objective cosmic law that operates independently of consciousness. The Andromedans developed the model, and over a million years it became the galactic standard, eventually being seeded into Earth's cultures through the far east. On Earth, the concept was then further complicated with additional layers — individual karma, family karma, regional karma, national karma, planetary karma, and specialised categories like Katancia, Kamaduro, and Karmasaya — none of which Swaruu regards as anything more than human overcomplications of an already distorted concept.

The Taygetan revision is elegantly simple: karma is what you make of it. The record of your actions is real. The interpretation of that record as unpayable debt is a choice. And that choice can be revoked.

### The Trap Mechanism: Karma as Reincarnation Engine

The speakers identify karma as one of the primary mechanisms by which souls are kept in the reincarnation cycle — not through external force, but through internal belief. Swaruu of Erra describes the process: a person lives a life, makes mistakes, accumulates guilt and unresolved experiences. When they die, they carry those feelings to the other side. In the afterlife, still holding the belief that they owe something, they are easily convinced — by themselves, by the mirroring effect of the higher planes, or by entities that exploit the situation — that they must reincarnate to "make it right."

Her example is visceral: a soldier who killed children in one life dies consumed by guilt. In the afterlife, unable to bear what he did, he decides to reincarnate as a child in a war zone — to experience the other side, to "pay" for what he did. But this payment never ends. The child dies traumatically, generating new guilt and new karmic entanglement, and the cycle repeats. The very attempt to resolve karma through reincarnation generates more karma.

This is why Swaruu insists the cycle must simply stop. You cannot achieve a perfect life. You cannot pay off every debt. The pursuit of karmic resolution is itself the trap, because it guarantees you will always find something that needs fixing. The only exit is understanding that the entire framework of debt and payment is a choice, not a law, and choosing to let it go.

### The Catholic Parallel: Sin as Karma by Another Name

Swaruu draws an illuminating parallel between Eastern karma and Western sin. When Gosia asks whether people raised without the concept of karma — such as Catholics — escape the reincarnation wheel, Swaruu points out that Catholics have their own version: sin. The mechanism is identical. You accumulate transgressions, you feel guilt, and that guilt drives your post-death experience.

She notes that the Catholic Church originally included reincarnation in its teachings, but removed it between 850 and 900 AD because peasants, brutalised by Church exploitation, were committing suicide in massive numbers — believing they would simply reincarnate into better circumstances. The Church edited the doctrine to make this life the only one, adding the threat of eternal damnation to prevent further suicides. The theological change was not spiritual revelation; it was population control.

The practical consequence is striking. Catholics who die without believing in reincarnation initially manifest their expectations in the afterlife — whatever their faith told them to expect. But then, Swaruu says, agents of the system present them with a choice: reincarnate to redeem your sins, or face eternal hellfire. Terrified, the manipulated souls willingly reincarnate. The karmic mechanism operates regardless of which cultural label it carries.

And what of genuine atheists — people who die with no belief in karma, sin, or cosmic debt? If they truly believe they are free, Swaruu says simply, then they are. They return to Source and decide from there whether, where, and when to incarnate. The absence of a karmic belief system is, paradoxically, the most liberating spiritual position one can hold.

### Soul Contracts: Self-Imposed, Not Binding

Yazhi Swaruu addresses the relationship between karma and soul contracts in transcript 374. Contracts, she explains, are settings you imposed upon yourself before incarnating — parameters for the experience you wanted to have. They are not externally enforced agreements. There is no cosmic authority that penalises you for failing to fulfill a contract.

Gosia makes this point directly in the conversation: the contract was only with myself. There is no karma or punishment if I do not fulfill it. I will not have to come back to execute it again if I do not want to. The consequences are only self-imposed.

Yazhi agrees. She sees no greater mission other than the one you impose upon yourself. If you are certain you do not want to return, you will not. The key is learning to let go — releasing the compulsion to go back and "get it right." A perfect life cannot ever be achieved, she says. It is a trap. You cannot ever get everything right. The instruction is to go home, to let things go, to forgive others and above all to forgive yourself.

This directly parallels the karma teaching: both karma and contracts are self-imposed frameworks that feel binding only as long as you believe they are. Both dissolve when the underlying belief dissolves. And both can be used — either by the soul itself or by external manipulators — to perpetuate the reincarnation cycle indefinitely.

### Dissolving Karma: The Practical Path

The practical instructions across speakers converge into a clear sequence. First, understand what karma actually is — not cosmic law, but the accumulated movements of your consciousness and your chosen interpretation of them. Second, do the shadow work. Swaruu explicitly connects karma dissolution to shadow work — the systematic introspection into your internal programming, your childhood conditioning, your automatic reactions and their origins. You cannot genuinely let go of karma while unconscious of why you are holding it.

Third, transcend duality. As long as you operate within a framework of good and evil, right and wrong as absolute categories, you remain within the karma paradigm. Swaruu states that good and evil are only relative to the observer, and that all apparent conflict is simply a contraposition of interests. To dissolve karma, you must transcend this dualistic thinking — not by denying that actions have consequences, but by understanding that the moral framework you use to judge those consequences is itself a construction.

Fourth, forgive — others first, yourself above all. Swaruu returns to this point repeatedly, with increasing emphasis. There is no harder judge than yourself, she says. The karmic debt that feels most real, most inescapable, is the debt you owe to yourself for things you believe you did wrong. Releasing that self-judgment is the final and most difficult step.

Fifth, hold clear intention at death. Karma as game money is still valid in the afterlife, because even dead you are still playing the game. You must arrive at death with firm intention — knowing where you want to go, refusing to accept that you owe debts, declaring yourself as Source with free will. The afterlife contains its own Matrix, and the brainwashing you accumulated in life travels with you. The work must be done from the incarnated side, Swaruu insists, because on the other side there are too many distractions — you are too happy and fulfilled to be free of physicality to even care about karma, and in that unguarded state you may be convinced to return.

---

## Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

**Swaruu of Erra (Swaruu 9)** provides the definitive Taygetan position on karma in transcript 025: karma as Monopoly money, valid only within the game; the Andromedan model as the galactic standard that was imported to Earth; karma as self-imposed and dissolvable through understanding, forgiveness, and transcendence of duality; and the practical instruction to have clear intention at death to avoid being convinced to return.

**Yazhi Swaruu** extends the framework through soul contracts in transcript 374: contracts are self-set parameters for the incarnation experience with no external enforcement; there is no punishment for unfulfilled contracts; the compulsion to "get it right" is itself the trap; and the only real mission is the one you impose upon yourself. In transcript 143, she adds that from the highest perspective everything is planned — including apparent atrocities — but ethics apply at the level you are living, and the "plan from above" does not exempt anyone from responsibility at their level.

**Mari Swaruu** contributes the belief-system mechanism from S-235: forced reincarnation exists for those whose beliefs produce it and does not exist for those whose beliefs do not; controllers engineer population beliefs to include karmic debt as a reincarnation driver; and the power to refuse reincarnation operates through maintaining your own vibration and belief systems. In S-222, she adds the ethical dimension: the higher self plans lives of suffering for the incarnated version without that version's consent, and the only way around this is to become your own higher self while alive.

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Speaker(s) | Key Contribution |
|---|---|---|
| 025 | Swaruu of Erra (9) | Definitive Taygetan karma position: Monopoly money only valid in the game; Andromedan model vs Taygetan model; karma as self-imposed choice not cosmic law; dissolve through forgiveness especially self-forgiveness; transcend duality; shadow work required; clear intention at death; Catholic sin as equivalent mechanism; atheists with no karmic belief are paradoxically freest |
| 374 | Yazhi Swaruu | Soul contracts are self-set not externally enforced; no punishment for unfulfilled contracts; compulsion to "get it right" is the trap; no greater mission than self-imposed one; learn to let go; perfect life is impossible — go home |
| 143 | Yazhi Swaruu | From above everything planned including atrocities; ethics apply at level you're living; souls cannot be trapped except by choice; mass exit from Matrix as souls tire of game |
| 062 | Swaruu of Erra (9) | Afterlife governed by frequency match; what you believe you manifest in higher planes; guilt and attachments create post-death reality; violent death creates loops |
| 173 | Yazhi Swaruu | Soul looping as cyclical reincarnation driven by unresolved frequency; souls blame external forces for self-created patterns; frequency match not conscious choice drives repetition |
| S-235 | Mari Swaruu | Forced reincarnation depends on belief systems; controllers engineer beliefs that produce karmic reincarnation patterns; veil of forgetfulness exists off-Earth; power to refuse is real and operates through vibration |
| S-222 | Mari Swaruu | Higher self plans life without incarnated version's consent; ethical problem of using incarnated suffering for higher self advancement; solution is to become own higher self while alive |
| 131 | Yazhi Swaruu | Disincarnation does not remove Matrix — you are the Matrix; higher self is "not so higher" — still has limited understanding; be your higher self now through self-love; Broken Shoes in mud can be someone's higher self |
