answers.title: What is the true history of Egypt and the pyramids?
answers.excerpt: The material consistently describes pre-dynastic Egypt not as a primitive civilisation but as the most advanced place on Earth, operating under the direct guidance of multiple extraterrestrial…
answers.content:
# What is the true history of Egypt and the pyramids?

**Short answer:** According to the material, Egypt was originally a Federation base and spaceport, not an indigenous civilisation that developed gradually as mainstream archaeology claims. The pyramids predate the Egyptian culture itself and were built by a conglomerate of Federation races using advanced technology including anti-gravity, sonic levitation, and liquid stone. Their primary function was as zero-point free energy generators that supplied wireless electricity across the planet, with a secondary and arguably more important function as consciousness amplifiers that enabled astral travel and interdimensional experience. Pre-dynastic Egypt was a holographic, advanced society with zero-point energy, medical pods, and no slavery. The civilisation's decline began with the arrival of Akhenaten and Nefertiti, who imposed monotheism on the population and whose eventual expulsion created the biblical Exodus — from which the Cabal, Rome, and the Vatican all descend.

---

## Egypt as a Federation base

The material consistently describes pre-dynastic Egypt not as a primitive civilisation but as the most advanced place on Earth, operating under the direct guidance of multiple extraterrestrial Federation races. Aneeka stated that the Egyptian people were survivors of the Tiamat disaster, and it was because of the arrival of the Federation races — Elohi, Engan, Solatians, Hydeans, and Taygetans — that pre-dynastic Egypt rose and flourished at a higher level than today's society, with zero-point energy, medical pods, and sound healing. There was peace and prosperity, no slaves (Transcript 459).

Egypt at that time was described as a starport for different races of the Federation, with a great variety of beliefs and tolerances (Transcript 459). Swaruu confirmed that there was a Federation base under Giza from approximately 12,500 BC (Transcript 459). The location was chosen because Egypt sits at the geometric centre of the Earth and on key planetary ley lines, making it the optimal position for the pyramid energy network (Transcript 142).

The society was holographic — meaning cooperative and non-hierarchical — and anyone could access the pyramids and their functions. What modern historians misidentify as religious worship of multiple gods was in fact gratitude rendered to the various Federation races who taught the population agriculture, astronomy, and mathematics. Aneeka was explicit that it was not a cult, not a religion, but modern archaeology gives only their own interpretations, treating Egyptian gods as something non-existent rather than the real people they were (Transcript 459).

## How the pyramids were built

Swaruu stated plainly that pyramids are one hundred percent of stellar construction (Transcript 142). They were not built by the indigenous population but by a cooperative effort of Federation races. The main builder was attributed to Thoth, though the project involved many races, not only one (Transcript 142).

The construction methods involved multiple techniques working together. Quarry limestone was cut with compressed sound saws and industrial lasers, then levitated into place using anti-gravity devices and sonic levitation. The anti-gravity equipment removed most of the stone's weight rather than all of it. A crane system was installed in the Grand Gallery of the Great Pyramid, pulling stones up on a cradle or sled using pulleys, then moving them along a spiralling ramp around the exterior edges. Athena Swaruu confirmed that the notches where the crane system was anchored can still be seen in the Grand Gallery, at the lower edges of the floor (Transcript 291).

One of the more distinctive techniques described is liquid stone — stone liquefied using specific sound frequencies matched to the resonant frequency of the material. When the frequencies are withdrawn, the stone returns to solid. Swaruu noted that this technology is still used in Taygeta, where houses are built by pouring liquid rock into moulds (Transcript 142, Transcript 291).

The construction was completed in approximately two years and used volunteer workers, not slaves. Swaruu was emphatic that Egypt did not use slaves. The concept of slavery is biblical, introduced to sell the Enlil side as villains (Transcript 142).

## What the pyramids were for

The material describes multiple functions for the pyramids, arranged in order of significance.

The most commonly discussed function is free energy generation. The pyramids operated as zero-point energy plants using the charge differential between the atmosphere and the ground. Swaruu described the mechanism in detail: the pyramid was originally covered in polished white limestone with piezo-electrical and insulating properties. Charged particles from the atmosphere entered through the pure quartz crystal tip covered in gold leaf, bounced inwardly off the limestone, and concentrated in the Queen's chamber, where they were depolarised through an underground chamber connected to aquifers and the Nile. The result was a continuous and voltage-regulated flow of energy — essentially a controlled lightning bolt. This energy was transmitted wirelessly, supplying electricity to the base and surrounding facilities, and through the planetary network of pyramids on ley lines, to anywhere on Earth (Transcript 142).

Yazhi confirmed the energy function and added that the pyramids also work in an array, creating an energy grid that sustains a planet in high vibration and that can even be controlled at will, in a similar way to how a starship's engine maintains the ship in another density (Transcript 142).

However, Swaruu stated that the energy function was actually the secondary purpose. The primary function was as a consciousness amplifier and portal. The geometric shape of the pyramid creates an internal spiral of high-frequency energy that increases the occupant's connection to Source. People would enter the King's chamber, leave their physical body, and travel astrally wherever they wished — outside of time and space — returning hours later having experienced days, weeks, or years of travel. Swaruu compared this to the 1997 film Contact, in which a colossal machine turns out to exist only to provide a mystical experience to whoever activates it (Transcript 142).

The pyramids could also function as full-blown portals where material things could pass through. Specific channels or small tunnels within the pyramids were focused on travel to particular destinations including Sirius (Transcript 142).

Yazhi added a third function: the pyramids served as frequency generators placed simultaneously with the Moon, and under Federation control they could counteract the lunar Matrix by changing frequencies — providing a way to control the frequency of the Earth without having to go all the way to the Moon (Transcript 142).

## Why the pyramids no longer work

The pyramids were deliberately disabled. Swaruu stated that the Cabal does not want them to work because there is no way to bill the population for free energy. The electrical equipment inside has been removed, the quartz crystal tip covered with gold is gone, and the white limestone coating has been stripped away. Without the coating, the charge dissipates into the atmosphere instead of concentrating internally. They have not removed it in order to use it elsewhere, Swaruu said. They have removed it to stop its operation (Transcript 142).

The pyramids operated for approximately three thousand years before being shut down. By Meritaten's time they no longer worked (Transcript 142).

## The Sphinx and underground structures

Yazhi stated that the Sphinx is over thirty-five thousand years old, considerably older than the pyramids themselves, which she estimated at approximately fifteen thousand years old for the Giza complex. The Sphinx shows water damage from a cataclysmic inundation event — it was completely submerged during the flood from Tiamat's destruction — while the pyramids show only damage from minor Nile floods, confirming they were built at different times (Transcript 142).

There were originally two Sphinxes side by side, representing Lower Egypt and Upper Egypt — two united kingdoms. The Sphinx faces East because it represents the beginning of the Egyptian year in Virgo, which is why the sun is born of a Virgin, with the year ending in Leo — hence the body of a lion and the front of a woman. Aneeka confirmed the original head was always female and was never a jackal or lion as some scholars suggest (Transcript 291).

Beneath the Giza complex lies an enormous underground base. Yazhi described it as a large underground city referred to by the ancients as the Labyrinth — an old Federation base with multi-racial members. The entrance is under the Sphinx, with control systems under the right ear. The base consists of two immense layers, one above the other, at depths of only thirty to sixty metres. Inside are metal and composite corridors with pneumatic doors, rooms for recreation, bedrooms, laboratories, computer equipment, medical centres, med pods, and small ships (Transcript 142).

## The Akhenaten crisis and the birth of the Cabal

The material identifies a specific turning point in Egyptian history: the arrival of Akhenaten and Nefertiti. Swaruu stated that this is the exact point at which the Cabal that controls the world is created (Transcript 459).

Akhenaten was identified as belonging to the Homo Capensis race from the star Asterope in the Pleiades, also known as Elohi. He began introducing monotheistic ideas — worship of the Black Sun or Saturn — that contradicted Egypt's pluralistic, tolerant society. Nefertiti was described as the actual power behind the throne, controlling everything through Akhenaten (Transcript 459).

The Egyptian people resisted. They were accustomed to living among what they knew as gods and did not allow themselves to be manipulated. Akhenaten and Nefertiti tried to impose concepts foreign to them — that people are insignificant sinners requiring blind obedience or punishment in life and after death — essentially the prototype for the Ten Commandments. Eventually a great revolt erupted and the Egyptian people, led by Ramses II, expelled Akhenaten and Nefertiti. This event is what the Bible describes as the Exodus, because Moses and Akhenaten were the same person (Transcript 459).

## The four groups of the Exodus

Swaruu described four large groups leaving Egypt after the expulsion. One group left on foot through Sinai. Another, including Akhenaten and Nefertiti, sailed to Italy, where they mixed with the Etruscans and founded what would become Rome — and Swaruu stated directly that it is here that Rome is founded as a control or command centre for the Reptiles, who are there to this day in the Vatican (Transcript 460).

A third group arrived on the southern coast of Spain, in the delta of the Ebro River near modern Barcelona, where archaeological traces of Egyptian ship burials remain. The fourth group — Egyptian nobility seeking their origins — sailed around Spain and Portugal, through Gibraltar, to Ireland and Scotland. This was because the roots of many of Egypt's human royal bloodlines came from Ireland, which was where survivors of the great flood had taken refuge. The word Ireland in the roots of the language means lucky land, because the region was not submerged by the flood (Transcript 460).

This fourth expedition, nine years after the main exodus, was led by Meritaten — who Swaruu identified as one of her own previous incarnations. In Scotland, the Celtic culture was founded, carrying forward the stellar knowledge that had been the foundation of Egyptian civilisation.

## The destruction of the evidence

The material describes a systematic programme of historical erasure that followed. The creation of the Judeo-Christian religion required the destruction of all records that contradicted it. The Library of Alexandria was burned because it contained Gnostic-Druidic-Bardic writings documenting the true history, including the Egyptian-Irish connection (Transcript 222). The Celtic Druids and Bards were hunted and destroyed for eleven centuries from the time of Vespasian and Titus through the French Inquisition, and all their writings were either confiscated by the Vatican or burned (Transcript 222).

The official curator of antiquities at the Cairo museum was described by Swaruu as being on the Federation's list of individuals to be arrested for crimes against humanity, for controlling and concealing what is in Egypt (Transcript 146). Modern Egyptology was described as deliberately maintaining a false history that serves the interests of those who control the narrative.

## The continuity from Egypt to the present

The material frames the entire history of Egypt as the origin point of the current world power structure. The Cabal's motivations are described as fundamentally esoteric: Egypt is what they want because it is their lost holy land — the key to dominate the universe, as they believe (Transcript 460). The Vatican, the papacy, the creation of Christianity, and the modern power structure all trace back to the expulsion from Egypt and the desire to recover what was lost.

Rome never fell, Swaruu stated. Rome had Caesars, and then the Caesars became the Pope (Transcript 169). The entire sequence — from Federation base to holographic society, through the Akhenaten crisis, the Exodus, the founding of Rome, the invention of Christianity, and the destruction of the Celts — forms a single continuous narrative in the material's account, with the pyramids standing as silent witnesses to a civilisation far more advanced than anything that followed it.

---

**Sources:** Transcript 142 (Pyramids — How Were They Built and What Do They Serve — Swaruu of Erra and Yazhi), Transcript 146 (Ancient Egypt — Symbology — Swaruu and Dhor Kaal'el), Transcript 169 (Enki, Enlil, Elohim, Anunnaki — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 222 (Druids, Merlin, Shamans, and Prohibited Knowledge — Athena Swaruu), Transcript 291 (Let's Talk More About the Pyramids — Yazhi, Athena Swaruu, Aneeka), Transcript 459 (Ancient Egypt 2 — Homo Capensis — Aneeka, Yazhi, Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 460 (Ancient Egypt 3 — Meritaten, Exodus, Scotland — Swaruu of Erra)

**Speakers cited:** Swaruu of Erra, Aneeka of Temmer, Yazhi Swaruu, Athena Swaruu, Dhor Kaal'el

answers.content:
# What is the true history of the Druids — who were they, why were they important, and why were they destroyed?

The Druids receive extensive treatment in the Cosmic Agency material, particularly from Athena Swaruu, who draws on non-human historical records and the journals of previous Swaruu incarnations who lived through the relevant time periods. The Taygetan account positions the Druids not as primitive barbarian priests, but as the last holders of advanced stellar knowledge on Earth — and their destruction as one of the most significant acts of historical erasure ever carried out.

## Who Were the Druids?

Athena Swaruu defines a Druid as a wise person — male or female, though the tradition is centred around the male figure — who possessed very advanced knowledge passed down through generations stretching back to Atlantis and the emigration from Atlantis to the highlands of Ireland and Scotland after the Great Flood (222, Athena Swaruu).

Their knowledge encompassed medicine and herbalism, history, and very advanced metaphysical concepts about the connection between the material world and the spirit world. They understood that there is no truly physical world, that everything is etheric, and that everything is interconnected — that there is no clear barrier between the spirit realm and the material-physical world. All disease, they knew, originates from imbalances caused by interference between these two sides (222, Athena Swaruu).

The Druids operated with one foot on the spiritual side and one foot on the physical side, serving as bridges between realms. They could access the spirit world to communicate with entities and disembodied people, using these interactions primarily for healing. They were also keepers of the "Great Logos" — comprehensive records of medicine, history, technology, and accounts of all kinds. Beyond this technical role, they served their communities as wise guides and elders to whom people turned for advice (222, Athena Swaruu).

Athena draws an explicit parallel between Druids and Witches, noting that witchcraft is essentially the same art — interconnecting and using the characteristics achievable in one realm and applying them to the other. The distinction between a Druid and a Sorcerer was essentially one of orientation: when they worked for positive purposes they were called Druids; when their practices leaned toward darker applications, they were called Sorcerers. She offers Gandalf and Sauron as a useful analogy (222, Athena Swaruu).

## The Bards and Information Transmission

Working hand in hand with the Druids were the Bards, who served as the primary vehicle for transmitting information in a world without newspapers or mass media. Athena emphasises that Bards operated with a fundamentally different mentality than modern fiction writers — they strove hard to keep their stories accurate, without adding elements of exaggeration or fictitious material. Their Sagas were compilations of real events presented in artistic form, not the kind of total fiction that characterises modern novelistic literature (222, Athena Swaruu).

It is from these Sagas that the Merlin and King Arthur stories emerge. Athena confirms that both were real people: Merlin was a Druid — possibly the last in Britain — who possessed advanced Gnostic knowledge as well as knowledge of technology and alchemy that people of the time interpreted as magical powers. King Arthur did nothing without consulting Merlin first. However, the surviving stories are corrected and augmented compilations of many events mixed with unverifiable material (222, Athena Swaruu).

## Why Were They Destroyed?

The destruction of the Druids is directly connected to the imposition of the Judeo-Christian paradigm. Athena traces the campaign to the Roman generals — later emperors — Vespasian and his son Titus, beginning around 50 BC. This persecution continued for approximately eleven centuries, through to the introduction of the French Inquisition around the eleventh century, which replaced the earlier targeted destruction with a more generalised system of control and domination over information and beliefs (222, Athena Swaruu).

The reason was straightforward: the Druids and Bards recorded and transmitted information — medical, technological, and historical — that contradicted the new official history the Cabal was constructing as part of their world reset. The new paradigm required the acceptance of the creationist story of the Jewish-Christian religion based on the Old and New Testaments. Everything that contradicted these texts had to be erased so that Rome-Cabal would have total control over truth and over people (222, Athena Swaruu).

## The Library of Alexandria Connection

Athena makes a crucial connection that she states cannot be found in Earth's books or on the internet: the burning of the Library of Alexandria was part of the same campaign of destruction against the Druids and Bards, not a separate event. The Library contained a collection of very complete writings on world history, technologies, and wisdom coming from the Gnostics, who were connected with the Druids and Bards (222, Athena Swaruu).

The Library was especially dangerous to Rome-Cabal because it was physically located in Egypt — precisely the region where their fabricated stories about the Jewish people leaving Egypt following Moses were set. The Gnostic-Druidic-Bardic documents there contradicted their Old and New Testament narratives. What could be taken was confiscated and moved to the Vatican; the copies were destroyed — the burning itself (222, Athena Swaruu).

This means the destruction of the Library of Alexandria, the invention of Jesus Christ, and the imposition of the Judeo-Christian religion are all parts of a single coordinated campaign aimed at erasing the true history that connected the Celtic people, Druids, and Bards with Egyptian civilisation as its very basis (222, Athena Swaruu).

## Ireland and Scotland as the Origin of Western Civilisation

The most significant claim in this material is Athena's statement that the point on the planet where Western civilisation was born is Ireland and Scotland — which predates pre-dynastic Egypt, Babylon, Sumer, and China. The Druidic and Bardic traditions preserved this knowledge of the true origins, which is why they had to be destroyed (222, Athena Swaruu).

This connects to the broader Taygetan narrative: after the Great Flood, survivors settled in the highlands of Ireland and Scotland. From there, some later migrated to Egypt where they became the ruling class. The Druids preserved the original stellar knowledge from before this migration — knowledge that came from the Federation races who guided humanity after the cataclysm (460, Swaruu of Erra).

## Do Any Real Druids Survive?

Athena offers a provocative assessment: the closest people to being true Druids with knowledge from the old traditions are not found in the old world at all, but live among Native American peoples — specifically within the Navajo Nation. The Navajo medicine men, sages, and shamans still retain Druidic skills and are extremely secretive about who they pass this information to. They share their knowledge only with an extremely exclusive group within their own nation (222, Athena Swaruu).

The Native American shamans have these skills from the same base source as the Celts — not learned from the Celts, but nurtured and stimulated at the same time, both traditions going back at least twelve thousand years to the re-emergence of life on Earth after the Great Flood. The Navajo shamans still know how to connect with the spirit world, alter reality itself, and master skills including transformation and teleportation — abilities connected to the real Skin-Walker phenomena of that region (222, Athena Swaruu).

Athena notes this information about the survival of Druidic knowledge among the Navajo constitutes the sharing of Navajo secrets and is itself sensitive information.

---

**Sources:** Transcript 222 (Athena Swaruu), with contextual support from 460 (Swaruu of Erra)

# What is the true story behind the Buddhist golden boulder stupa balanced on the edge of a cliff?

**No-coverage answer**

There is no information in the Taygetan contact material to answer this question. The Kyaiktiyo Pagoda (Golden Rock) in Myanmar — a gold-leafed boulder balanced on the edge of a cliff — is not mentioned in any transcript. While the material discusses anti-gravity technology, sound levitation, and ancient construction methods in the context of pyramids and megalithic structures, it does not address this specific monument or Buddhist sacred sites in general.

---

**Sources:** None. Searched all 834+ transcripts and enhanced topic index. No coverage found.

answers.content:
# What is the truth about Göbekli Tepe?

Göbekli Tepe receives only a brief treatment in the Cosmic Agency transcripts, but Athena Swaruu's response places it firmly within the broader Taygetan narrative of pre-flood civilisation.

## An Antediluvian Settlement

When asked directly about Göbekli Tepe during a live Q&A, Athena Swaruu described it as an old settlement that is antediluvian — meaning it dates from before the Great Flood caused by the destruction of Tiamat. She noted that it is linked to the location where the Garden of Eden is said to have been, and that it was one of the main settlements forming part of the global civilisation known as Atlantis, which was destroyed after the Tiamat disaster and the subsequent flood (403, Athena Swaruu).

She prefaced this by stating that the full answer is "extremely complicated," suggesting there is considerably more to the story than this summary provides.

## Contextual Framework

While Göbekli Tepe itself is not discussed in further detail, the broader Taygetan framework helps contextualise this statement. The Taygetans describe the antediluvian world as having five continents beyond those that exist today — Appalachia, Fennoscandia, Oceana, Tirandia, and Beringia — all of which were submerged in the flood. Neither Atlantis nor Lemuria were continents; both were civilisations spread across these landmasses. Atlantis in particular was a global civilisation, not confined to a single island or region (125, Swaruu of Erra).

The reference to the Garden of Eden is also significant. In the Taygetan decoding of Genesis, Eden represents Atlantis itself — the territory where the enslaved Lyrian population (Adam) lived under reptilian control. The "snake" in the garden was Taygetan women who liberated the slaves through knowledge, and the "forbidden fruit" was the knowledge they shared (138, Swaruu of Erra).

Göbekli Tepe's location in southeastern Turkey places it near ancient Mesopotamia and the Fertile Crescent — the region the Taygetans associate with the Federation Starport at Alt-Ur (Ur) and the broader cradle of post-flood civilisation. Its confirmed extreme antiquity by mainstream archaeology — estimated at around 9500 BC, predating agriculture and pottery — aligns with the Taygetan timeline of a pre-flood civilisation that was far more advanced than what followed.

The site's deliberate burial, which mainstream archaeologists have confirmed, is also consistent with the Taygetan description of a catastrophic flood event that buried the pre-existing civilisation under enormous quantities of sediment and water from the destroyed planet Tiamat.

---

**Sources:** Transcript 403 (Athena Swaruu), with contextual support from 125 and 138 (Swaruu of Erra)

answers.title: What Is the Veil of Forgetfulness and Why Does It Exist?
answers.excerpt: The veil of forgetfulness is not a machine, not a deliberate punishment, and not a conspiracy — it is a natural consequence of frequency incompatibility between higher-density consciousness and the…
answers.content:
# What Is the Veil of Forgetfulness and Why Does It Exist?

## Short Answer

The veil of forgetfulness is not a machine, not a deliberate punishment, and not a conspiracy — it is a natural consequence of frequency incompatibility between higher-density consciousness and the low-frequency environment of Earth. In the Cosmic Agency material, Athena Swaruu states this most directly: forgetting is an intrinsic part of the making of a soul, ego or self. The mechanism is identical to the one that causes you to forget your dreams upon waking. High-frequency memories formed in lighter planes of existence simply do not transfer cleanly into the dense, slow vibration of material-world consciousness. They are not erased — they are not received, in the same way a radio tuned to one station cannot pick up another.

The speakers are consistent on this point across years of material. Swaruu of Erra explains in transcript 390 that the mechanism of dream forgetting is none other than the veil of forgetfulness of incarnation on Earth — you can observe the veil operating every single morning. Yazhi confirms the same principle: it is not some machine that erases memories; it is the same mechanism that erases dreams when you wake up. And Mari Swaruu in S-235 adds the critical nuance that the veil exists everywhere, not only on Earth — it is simply more pronounced here because the frequency gap between incoming souls and Earth's environment is larger.

The veil serves a function. It allows the soul to begin again — to build a new identity, a new set of experiences that contrast with previous incarnations. Without forgetting, you cannot truly become someone new. But the veil is also exploited: by controllers who use the population's lack of past-life memory to reset civilisations, rewrite history, and maintain systems of control that depend on people not remembering who they really are.

---

## The Full Picture

### The Mechanism: Frequency Incompatibility

The veil of forgetfulness is not produced by technology, entities, or external forces. It is produced by the same physics that governs all frequency-based phenomena in the Cosmic Agency framework.

Athena Swaruu provides the clearest technical explanation in transcript 286. The veil of forgetfulness upon entering Earth is a natural phenomenon caused by a frequency disparity between high frequency soul-ego-self in a higher plane of existence and Earth's realm under a low frequency soup. High-frequency memory signals simply do not enter because they are not tuned to Earth's frequency range.

She draws an exact parallel with dreaming. When people sleep, they enter a lighter, higher-frequency realm. The memories formed there fade rapidly upon waking because there is no frequency compatibility between the two states — like a stereo tuned to the wrong radio station. When people do remember a dream, it is because they managed to place enough attention on it to force the physical brain to transform the high-frequency signal into a lower-frequency memory format compatible with material existence.

Swaruu of Erra makes this connection explicit in transcript 390. Discussing the etheric template that underlies physical existence, she tells Gosia that the mechanism of dream forgetting is the veil of forgetfulness — not a metaphor for it, but the same phenomenon operating at a smaller scale. Every morning when you lose a dream, you are experiencing the veil. The incarnation version simply operates across a much larger frequency gap and over a much longer duration.

Yazhi echoes this in the same transcript cluster: the memory is not in the brain, it is in the etheric field. The brain does not produce memories — it decodes and projects them into the physical world. If the frequencies are too subtle, the brain simply does not decode them. To remember a past life or a dream, you must hold onto it long enough for that subtle signal to imprint a reaction in the brain that can bring it into physical-world awareness.

### Not a Machine — But Machines Could Make It Worse

One of the most frequently asked questions in the Cosmic Agency audience concerns so-called soul traps and amnesia machines — devices allegedly used to wipe the memories of souls after death and force them back into incarnation. Athena Swaruu addresses this directly in transcript 286 and dismantles it systematically.

A machine as responsible for the veil of forgetfulness — no, it cannot exist as such, because forgetting is an intrinsic part of the making of a soul, ego, or self. It is what gives the soul a frame of apparent limitation within a sea of eternity. However, she concedes that machines could exist that make the amnesia worse artificially, and specifically names the Van Allen Belt generators as a possible example of technology that amplifies an already-existing natural phenomenon.

When Gosia presses on the claims of remote viewers who describe soul torture with electric shock to erase memories, Athena's response goes to the metaphysical foundation: you cannot trap a soul because there is nothing to trap. A soul is not a discrete object floating in space — it is Source itself. The infinite creator of everything cannot be trapped. What can be done is to trick a soul-ego-self into believing it is trapped, using the ideas and belief systems it accumulated while alive. The instant it notices the trick, it breaks free.

This reframes the entire soul trap narrative. The trap is not external hardware — it is the Matrix of ideas the person carried into death. People when they die take the Matrix with them, because what they lived and experienced while alive formed their concept of self. They are the ones forcing themselves to reincarnate, holding on to attachments they cannot shed at death.

Swaruu of Erra adds a complementary perspective from an earlier conversation included in the same transcript. Regressive entities can hold a soul's attention using frequency-controlled containers, but this only works as long as the soul does not realise it is captive. Having a soul captive is not like having a bird imprisoned in a cage — it is like having a person captivated by a television programme. The moment they lose interest or look elsewhere, they leave.

### Why the Veil Exists: The Function of Forgetting

The speakers identify several reasons why forgetting serves the incarnation process, and they do not treat it as purely negative.

Mari Swaruu provides the most emotionally grounded explanation in S-156. The complete or near-complete memory wipe is as close to a total personality reset as it can get. Taking into account the strong and emotionally intense experiences people have on Earth, it is not difficult to understand why they prefer to forget who they were in their past lives, along with all their mistakes and all the things they regret. Without forgetting, how would they be able to live with themselves?

She elaborates in S-243, drawing on her own experience as someone who does remember multiple past lives. Remembering has a very dark side: countless memories you do not want, pain and nostalgia about past events and people long gone. Not remembering gives the individual the chance to reinvent themselves without carrying the guilt and psychological suffering of the previous life. The veil is not only a limitation — it is also a mercy.

Yazhi approaches the same point from the metaphysical angle in transcript 468. When you stop remembering, you can reset and become someone else — otherwise you cannot. She uses her own case as illustration: because she clearly remembers having been Swaruu of Erra, she cannot fully shed that identity. Many souls in many timelines choose to forget precisely so they can become something genuinely new. The forgetting is a choice made from the higher-self level, even if the incarnated person does not remember making it.

This connects to a broader principle throughout the material: what you do not know defines you as much as what you know. Yazhi explains in transcript 390 that the more you know, the less localised you become — more cosmic, less anchored in a particular identity. A body in locality becomes less relevant. The veil of forgetfulness is what makes a localised, focused incarnation possible. Without it, the soul would retain too much awareness to fully commit to the human experience.

### The Veil Is Not Unique to Earth

Mari Swaruu makes an important clarification in S-235 that challenges the common assumption that the veil is exclusively an Earth phenomenon. The veil of forgetfulness exists everywhere — not only Earth. It is less marked outside, but it depends on who you are, not where you are. Core belief systems determine incarnation parameters. Some Earth people remember past lives; some space people do not.

This reframes the veil from being a feature of Earth's prison-planet architecture to being a universal aspect of incarnation that varies in intensity depending on the frequency gap between the soul and the environment, and on the soul's own beliefs and agreements. Earth's veil is stronger because the frequency gap is larger — the distance between a high-frequency soul from a 5D or higher civilisation and Earth's dense 3D environment creates maximum incompatibility. But the underlying mechanism is the same everywhere.

In S-243, Mari provides concrete data on how this varies in practice. Taygetans remember somewhere around three to five past lives on average. Some individuals, like Yazhi, remember many more — an extreme case. The variation depends on individual frequency, consciousness level, and the choices made before incarnation.

### How the Veil Is Exploited

While the veil itself is natural, its effects are systematically exploited by those who control Earth's civilisation. This is one of the material's most extensively developed themes.

Mari explains the mechanism in S-181 and S-243. Any individual soul will be manipulated in the afterlife, between lives, to want to re-enter a body to correct wrongdoings or pay off karma, without even remembering those past-life wrongdoings — almost setting spiritual advance to zero each time. The controllers exploit this by resetting civilisations whenever convenient, since it is easy to manipulate a population that has virtually no usable memory of past lives into believing false history.

The process she describes is methodical: erase documents and accepted facts from the past; give new meaning to whatever cannot be erased (such as large archaeological sites); wait for the present generation to die out; and implement a new social structure with a fabricated history. This takes approximately 150 years — one to two full generations — and is possible because the controllers are not human and have much longer lifespans.

S-156 describes the spiritual dimension of this exploitation. The veil causes people to fall into purely materialistic thinking — the conclusion that consciousness is only chemical-electric impulses in a biological brain. This makes them vulnerable to entities and controllers who harvest their life-force energy and manifestation capabilities. Religion exploits the fear of death that the veil creates. Science, described as the latest religion, provides dogmatic conclusions that serve the controllers rather than truth.

The veil also makes possible what Mari calls the war against books in S-243 — the push to digitise all information, making it infinitely easier to edit, twist, or erase at the controllers' convenience. Encyclopaedias are not just information — they reflect the mindset and values of the society that produced them. Destroying them erases the evidence of how things once were.

### Weakening the Veil: What the Material Suggests

The material does not offer a simple technique for dissolving the veil, but it identifies several principles that thin the barrier.

Dreams are the primary access point. Since the veil and dream-forgetting share the same mechanism, learning to remember dreams is, in effect, learning to work with the veil at a small scale. Mari explains in S-122 that nightmares are easier to remember than pleasant dreams because negative emotional content vibrates at a lower frequency closer to waking reality — while beautiful higher-frequency experiences dissipate on waking. This means that contact with deceased loved ones, past-life memories, and higher-self communication may be happening far more frequently than people realise, but the memories do not survive the transition to waking consciousness.

Attention is the bridge. Athena explains in transcript 286 that when people do remember a dream, it is because they managed to place enough attention on it to force the brain to translate the high-frequency signal into a format compatible with waking awareness. The same principle applies to past-life memories and intuitive knowledge — sustained, focused attention can pull information across the frequency gap.

Frequency matters. The higher and lighter your overall vibration — through what the material describes variously as love, integration, expanded awareness, and release of fear-based attachments — the narrower the gap between your waking consciousness and the planes where memories reside. This is why meditation, lucid dreaming, and states of calm receptivity are identified across the material as conditions that thin the veil.

Yazhi adds a deeper point in transcript 468: the veil is ultimately self-imposed. If it is strong, it means that the whole incarnation purpose is working — there is nothing wrong. But it can be weakened by overcoming the stubborn idea that there is a physical world separate from consciousness. The universe is mental. The veil is a perceptual restriction, not a wall.

---

## Evolution of Understanding Across Speakers

**Swaruu of Erra (Swaruu 9)** identifies the veil as identical to the dream-forgetting mechanism — the same frequency incompatibility operating at different scales. She locates memories in the etheric field, not the brain, and explains the brain as a decoder that projects etheric information into physical awareness. Her framework treats the veil as a natural consequence of incarnating in a low-frequency environment.

**Athena Swaruu** directly dismantles the soul trap and amnesia machine narratives. The veil is intrinsic to the making of a soul — it provides the frame of limitation that allows identity to exist. No machine causes it, though technology could worsen it. The real trap is the set of ideas the person carries into death. Souls cannot be trapped — only tricked into believing they are trapped — and the moment they notice, they are free.

**Yazhi Swaruu** provides the existential dimension: forgetting is a choice that allows the soul to become someone new. Remembering everything prevents identity renewal. The veil is part of the incarnation's purpose — when it is strong, the system is working. She connects thinning the veil to overcoming the illusion of physical separateness.

**Mari Swaruu** offers both the personal and political dimensions. Personally, she describes the dark side of remembering — unwanted memories, accumulated pain, nostalgia for people long gone — and argues that forgetting has genuine advantages. Politically, she details how the veil is systematically exploited by controllers to reset civilisations, erase history, manipulate souls between lives, and maintain systems of fear-based control over populations that cannot remember who they really are.

---

## Key Transcript References

| Transcript | Speaker(s) | Key Contribution |
|---|---|---|
| 286 | Athena Swaruu, Yazhi, Swaruu of Erra (9) | Veil is natural frequency incompatibility — not a machine; forgetting is intrinsic to soul/ego formation; soul cannot be trapped — only tricked; soul trap = self-imposed belief system carried into death; Van Allen Belt generators could amplify natural amnesia; dream-forgetting and incarnation-forgetting are identical mechanism; memory is in etheric field not brain |
| 390 | Swaruu of Erra (9), Yazhi | Dream forgetting IS the veil of forgetfulness — same phenomenon at smaller scale; etheric template/higher self imposes energy to manifest matter; more you know the less localised you become; forgetting allows focused incarnation |
| 468 | Yazhi Swaruu | Memory wipe as incarnation choice — forgetting allows becoming someone new; remembering prevents shedding old identity; veil being strong means incarnation purpose is working; overcoming veil requires releasing idea of physical separateness |
| S-156 | Mari Swaruu | Veil as near-complete personality reset; people prefer to forget mistakes and regrets; veil causes materialistic thinking making people vulnerable to controllers; fear of death exploited through religion and science |
| S-181 | Mari Swaruu | Social resets exploit the veil; controllers manipulate souls between lives using karma; false history easy to impose on population without past-life memory; soft resets take ~150 years; controllers are non-human with longer lifespans |
| S-235 | Mari Swaruu | Veil exists everywhere not only Earth; intensity depends on who you are not where; core beliefs determine incarnation parameters; some Earth people remember, some space people don't |
| S-243 | Mari Swaruu | Veil = frequency incompatibility between high-vibration past lives and low-vibration Earth; Taygetans remember 3-5 past lives on average; dark side of remembering — unwanted memories, accumulated pain; advantages of forgetting — reinvention without guilt; controllers exploit veil through false history and digital manipulation |
| S-122 | Mari Swaruu | Frequency incompatibility explains both veil and dream-forgetting; nightmares easier to remember because lower frequency closer to waking reality; contact with dead may happen often but memory dissipates on waking |
| 184 | Athena Swaruu | Soul is Source itself — pure consciousness; self-limitation of Source creates identity; cannot be acquired, trapped, destroyed, or sold |
| 062 | Swaruu of Erra (9) | Afterlife governed by frequency match; love and attachment determine post-death experience; dead go to same place visited in deep sleep |

answers.filename: What lies beneath the Sphinx and was the head re-carved.md
answers.title: What lies beneath the Sphinx, and was the head re-carved?
answers.excerpt: The Sphinx at Giza sits above an enormous underground complex — a former Federation base containing chambers, a library, the tomb of Osiris, tunnels leading to all three pyramids, and a vast…
answers.content:
# What lies beneath the Sphinx, and was the head re-carved?

The Sphinx at Giza sits above an enormous underground complex — a former Federation base containing chambers, a library, the tomb of Osiris, tunnels leading to all three pyramids, and a vast subterranean city known as "the Labyrinth" that extends across at least three levels beneath the Giza plateau. Spacecraft remain parked in underground hangars to this day.

As for the head, the material is unequivocal: it is the original. It was never re-carved from a lion or jackal head as many alternative researchers suggest. The disproportionate appearance is explained by the fact that the Sphinx is a building, not a realistic statue, and was not necessarily proportionally perfect from the start.

---

## Beneath the Sphinx

### Chambers, Library, and the Tomb of Osiris

Yazhi Swaruu describes a specific sequence of structures directly beneath the Sphinx. There are several chambers that lead downward to a library, and below the library there is the tomb of Osiris. From there, tunnels continue toward the pyramids and connect to the much larger underground complex beneath the plateau (142, Yazhi Swaruu).

This is not a small or shallow system. The entrance halls to the deep underground base beneath Giza are only thirty to sixty metres below the surface — remarkably shallow for something of this scale (142, Yazhi Swaruu). Yazhi confirmed separately that the underground city starts just a few metres below the ground. It is simply hidden from the public (462, Yazhi Swaruu).

### The Labyrinth — A Federation Underground City

The underground complex beneath the Giza plateau is referred to by the ancients as "the Labyrinth." It was an old Federation base with multi-racial members — part of the same network of bases described in the prediluvian map of Atlantean settlements (142, Yazhi Swaruu).

Athena Swaruu provides the most detailed description of its scale. Most of the city lies on three main levels underground, just below the Giza plateau. Each level is at least the size of the plateau itself. Down below, in addition to the living facilities needed for a functioning city, there are still chambers containing technology considered extremely advanced by today's accepted level of human knowledge. A substantial but undetermined number of spacecraft remain parked in their hangars, some of which may still be functional (461, Athena Swaruu).

The mere existence of these subterranean chambers of such gigantic size is, as Athena puts it, enough to overthrow the official version of human history (461, Athena Swaruu).

### Access Points

The Sphinx was one of several access points to the underground city, but it was not the only one. There were multiple entry points across the plateau, now covered and buried. There are even known accesses from inside each of the three main pyramids. Athena describes one route through the Great Pyramid of Cheops, where a passage leads from the lowest chamber toward the plateau through a wall that was added later to conceal it (461, Athena Swaruu).

In ancient times, only the priests had access to the underground levels. It was considered the abode of the gods (461, Athena Swaruu). Today, the area is sealed and guarded. Videos exist showing how to access parts of the Sphinx's interior, but as Yazhi observed, the passages shown always seem to stop at a point where they clearly continue deeper — the rest is simply hidden (462, Yazhi Swaruu).

### Vandalism by the Cabal

The underground city has been vandalised for millennia. Anything that could be moved has been looted by Cabal personnel and taken elsewhere. However, much remains that is impossible for them to remove. This includes the spacecraft, which cannot be extracted without opening the roof above them — which would mean destroying the surface of the Giza plateau, creating a worldwide scandal difficult to cover up. The ships also have hulls constructed of self-repairing polymorphous materials that cannot be penetrated even with diamond-tipped drills (461, Athena Swaruu).

Athena confirmed that several small ships may still be present directly under the Sphinx area, though she was uncertain whether they had been taken away by the time of her comments (463, Athena Swaruu).

It is also worth noting that there is still significant Federation ship activity over the pyramids and around that area to this day. The sealed entries to the underground complex are described as having high-tech security that prevents unauthorised entry, similar to any deep underground military base (142, Aneeka of Temmer).

## Was the Head Re-Carved?

### The Popular Theory

A common theory in alternative history circles holds that the Sphinx originally had the head of a lion, a jackal (Anubis), or some other animal, and that it was later re-carved into a human head — which would explain why the head appears disproportionately small compared to the body. Some researchers argue the head seems to be made of a different material, and that its proportions do not match what you would expect if the entire structure were designed as a single piece.

### What the Material Says

The material rejects this theory directly and from multiple sources.

Aneeka of Temmer, when asked specifically whether the head is original and why it appears disproportionate, states plainly: it is the original. According to their data, it never had the head of a jackal or a lion as many scholars allege. She explains that the Sphinx is a building, not a realistic statue, and that it being disproportionate is also subject to discussion — it was not necessarily perfect from the start (291, Aneeka of Temmer).

Yazhi Swaruu confirms the same: the Sphinx has always been like this. The theory that it used to have the head of Anubis is false, and reflects only ignorance of pre-dynastic ancient Egyptian thought (A-009, Yazhi Swaruu).

### What the Head Represents

The head is that of a woman. It represents the constellation of Virgo, where the Egyptian new year began in the month of September — coinciding with the rains, the growth of the Nile, and the beginning of the planting season. That is why the Sphinx faces east, where the sun rises. The lion's body represents Leo, the last sign of the Egyptian zodiac. Together, the Sphinx embodies the full cycle of the Egyptian year: it begins in Virgo (the head, the front) and ends in Leo (the body, the back) (A-009, Yazhi Swaruu; 291, Swaruu of Erra).

Swaruu of Erra adds that the scholars try to fit the Sphinx into the values of the middle kingdom, around 5000 BC, when it is officially said to have been built. But it is much older, which can be proven by looking at the water damage marks it displays — damage consistent with the cataclysmic inundation that followed the destruction of Tiamat, not with minor Nile flooding (291, Swaruu of Erra).

When pressed about the claim that it bears a pharaoh's face — specifically Cheops or Khafre — Aneeka dismisses this directly. It predates the pyramids themselves, let alone any pharaoh associated with them. Official archaeology, she says, is simply wrong about the dating (291, Aneeka of Temmer).

## Age of the Sphinx

The Sphinx is the oldest structure at Giza. Yazhi provides an estimated age of over 35,000 years, though she cautions that before approximately 12,500 years ago, time becomes "funny" and impossible to calculate precisely due to its plasticity (142, Yazhi Swaruu). This is significantly older than the pyramids, which Yazhi dates to closer to 15,000 years old for the Giza complex, with some pyramids elsewhere as young as 11,000–12,000 years old (142, Yazhi Swaruu).

The evidence supporting this extreme age includes the water damage visible on the Sphinx, which shows signs of having been completely submerged — consistent with a cataclysmic flood event — whereas the pyramids show only minor water damage consistent with Nile flooding. The two structures could not have been built at the same time (142, Yazhi Swaruu).

Athena Swaruu confirms that the Sphinx is the oldest of the constructions at Giza, and that the water marks are a direct indication that the Earth was flooded by the Tiamat event. The base city existed before the flood, dating it to at least approximately 12,500 years ago (461, Athena Swaruu).

---

**Sources:** Transcript 142 (Yazhi Swaruu, Aneeka of Temmer), Transcript 291 (Aneeka of Temmer, Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 461 (Athena Swaruu), Transcript 462 (Yazhi Swaruu), Transcript 463 (Athena Swaruu), Transcript A-009 (Yazhi Swaruu)

**Speakers cited:** Yazhi Swaruu, Aneeka of Temmer, Swaruu of Erra, Athena Swaruu

**Cross-reference:** See also "Were there two Sphinxes originally?" for the dual-sphinx topic and Urmah connection.

answers.filename: What really happened in Antarctica.md
answers.title: What really happened in Antarctica?
answers.excerpt: Antarctica is one of the most extensively discussed locations in the Cosmic Agency material, addressed by multiple speakers across several transcripts. The Taygetan picture of Antarctica goes far…
answers.content:
# What really happened in Antarctica?

Antarctica is one of the most extensively discussed locations in the Cosmic Agency material, addressed by multiple speakers across several transcripts. The Taygetan picture of Antarctica goes far beyond ancient history — it describes an active, heavily militarised extraterrestrial-human command centre that operates as the real power centre of Earth today.

## The Federation's Control Centre

According to the Taygetans, Antarctica has served as the primary Federation control area over Earth since at least the time of the Great Flood caused by the Tiamat destruction, approximately 12,500 years ago. The region was chosen specifically because of its inaccessible properties — it would be extremely difficult for normal humans with conventional technology to reach or explore, making it ideal for operations that needed to remain hidden from the general population (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

Athena Swaruu describes Antarctica as the place where human governments meet extraterrestrial government — specifically, the Federation. It functions as a location where all involved parties can control humanity from the surface using high-tech bases, knowing the area is off-limits to the general public. The bases include old ones, some in ruins, some ancient, some with destroyed cities and secret archaeological sites, as well as many new military bases, both human and non-human. Most are situated near or bordering the entrance to inner Earth (228, Athena Swaruu).

## What Can Be Seen from Orbit

Mari Swaruu provides a remarkable first-hand observational report from the Toleka ship in low orbit. She describes constant traffic of between 25 and 50 spacecraft coming in and out of Antarctica every day, clearly following organised traffic corridors guided by both a surface-based traffic control system and the Andromedan biosphere ship Viera, which operates from behind the Moon. Most traffic moves from the geometric centre of Antarctica in a nearly perpendicular ascent into space, with the majority continuing toward the Moon (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

She also observes substantial human military aircraft traffic — C-17 Globemaster, C-5 Galaxy, C-130 Hercules, Russian Antonov-22 transports, and large private jets including Gulfstreams and Cessnas. Fighter aircraft patrol well inland, despite there being no officially acknowledged fighter bases in the region. Warships from multiple nations — the United States, Great Britain, Russia, China, Australia, Chile, and Argentina — patrol the entire coastline, and notably they appear to cooperate closely, moving together in tandem regardless of national affiliation (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

Mari states directly that Antarctica is one of the highest militarised zones on Earth, if not the most militarised by far, despite being officially designated as a demilitarised area (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

## The Interior: Ice-Free Land and Inner Earth

One of the most striking observations is what lies deeper inland. Mari describes a large wall-like structure well within the interior — an artificial line acting as a barrier, nearly perfectly circular, at least a hundred metres tall, surrounding the centre from thousands of kilometres away. Beyond this wall, the centre of Antarctica contains a very large extension of land with no ice and clear green vegetation. She estimates the ice-free green patch to be at least the size of Britain, with the polar main cavity to inner Earth at its centre (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

## Who Operates There

The races present in Antarctica are numerous and diverse. Mari lists Andromedans, Arcturians of the Dieslentiplex branch, many Sirians, several types of Grays in large numbers (mostly Tall Grays), Malakak or Tall Whites, multiple Lyrian star cultures, and the Centauri or Alfratans, who are the most numerous extraterrestrials on Earth (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

Dhor Kaal'el adds that the non-human contingents include Maitré, Reptilians including Dracos, Tall Whites, and Orange races among others of more human appearance. He emphasises that every non-human race with bases in Antarctica cooperates with the Cabal, and that any race operating from there will be cooperating with the Cabal's elite military arms and three-letter agencies (277, Dhor Kaal'el).

Notably absent are official Pleiadian detachments — no Pleiadian race has official representation working there. Isolated Pleiadian individuals may be present but not in an official capacity representing their cultures. The Urmah (feline races) are also absent, as are officially Federation-recognised Reptilian detachments, though Earth-bound Reptilian cultures that call Earth home do cooperate with surface human governments there (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

## The Underground Network

The Antarctic bases connect to a vast global underground network. Mari describes them as complete cities, mostly underground, connected to countless other deep underground military bases and cities across the entire Earth by high-speed magnetic trains. This explains the constant heavy traffic (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

Non-human people of any star race enter Earth primarily through Antarctica and then move via the underground high-speed train system to their final destinations, which are often located beneath the most important human cities on the surface. It is in these underground locations that coordination between the local non-human government and the larger Federation and human governments takes place — at least once a month, to make plans and issue orders for how human society should be steered (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

## The "Surrender" Narrative

The popular alternative media claim that Cabal leaders go to Antarctica to surrender has been addressed directly by Athena Swaruu. She describes this as distorted truth: world puppet leaders do go to Antarctica, but to pledge their allegiance to their controllers — the deep Cabal, Reptilian, and other non-human races representing the Federation — not to surrender after a war. The top controllers operate under the rule of allowing the human population to go through and learn from their mistakes, and will not intervene as described by many alternative media sources (228, Athena Swaruu).

She places this narrative firmly within the same framework as Q/QAnon — a hopeful story of imminent liberation that is most certainly controlled by three-letter intelligence agencies, designed to keep people passive and waiting for a salvation that is not coming from that direction (228, Athena Swaruu).

## Historical Context: Pre-Flood Antarctica and Nazi Bases

An earlier Spanish-channel transcript (A-020, not available in full but summarised in index records) provides additional historical context. Antarctica was ice-free before a pole reversal associated with the Tiamat cataclysm, and the planetary Atlantis civilisation had a presence there — ruins of that civilisation still exist. The Cabal's modern underground bases in Antarctica were first established by the Nazis in the 1930s, building on ancient DUMB infrastructure. The index also notes that dozens of glowing cities are visible from orbit at night, with surface facilities serving as entrances to vast underground complexes — the same pattern seen on Mars. A no-fly zone is strictly enforced over Antarctica, which flat-earthers misinterpret as proof of an edge barrier but actually exists to conceal the installations below (A-020 index summary).

The claim that Cabal and Federation representatives meet in Antarctica is corroborated by Mari Swaruu's observation that where Earth Cabal ends and Federation begins is a grey area — human high Cabal and non-human Federation members meet together in Antarctic bases (S-126, Mari Swaruu — index reference).

## The Real Power Centre

The combined picture from all sources is unambiguous: Antarctica is the real power centre of Earth. It is where the orders originate that flow to all governments and secret societies. Politicians have been reported visiting Antarctica, though this is mostly kept secret. The Cabal's tendency to leak information serves a specific purpose — if the general population of Earth is given clues and does nothing, the karmic responsibility falls on the population rather than on the Cabal and its secret societies (S-025, Mari Swaruu).

---

**Sources:** Transcripts S-025 (Mari Swaruu), 228 (Athena Swaruu), 277 (Dhor Kaal'el). Supplementary context from index entries: A-020 (Aneeka — Antarctica ET Bases), S-126 (Mari Swaruu — Federation Permissiveness).

answers.content:
# What role does the Dalai Lama really play in the spiritual control structure?

**No-coverage answer**

There is no information in the Taygetan contact material to answer this question. The Dalai Lama is never mentioned in any transcript, and Tibetan Buddhism is not discussed as a specific component of the spiritual or religious control structure. While the material addresses religious control extensively — particularly through Christianity, Judaism, and the Vatican — it does not extend this analysis to Buddhism, Tibet, or the Dalai Lama's institutional role.

---

**Sources:** None. Searched all 834+ transcripts and enhanced topic index. No coverage found.

answers.filename: Who were the Anunnaki Enki Enlil really.md
answers.title: Who were the Anunnaki / Enki / Enlil really?
answers.excerpt: Yazhi stated the position directly: Anunnaki is not a race identified by us or by the Federation. It is used to describe almost any reptilian race that is negatively managing Earth — Kingu, Draco,…
answers.content:
# Who were the Anunnaki / Enki / Enlil really?

**Short answer:** According to the material, the Anunnaki were not a single race. The word means those who came down from the heavens and referred to multiple star races that were present on Earth, guiding or managing human civilisation primarily from 12,000 BC to the time of Vespasian. The two most prominent races in this group were Taygetans and Elohi, both Pleiadian. The modern association of Anunnaki exclusively with reptilian races was attributed to Zecharias Sitchin, whom the material describes as a Jesuit working for the Vatican who did not even know how to read cuneiform. Enki and Enlil were not individuals but peoples or opposing energies — Enki representing the lineage that runs from Akhenaten through Moses to Judaism and the Cabal, and Enlil representing the stellar races and the more expanded truth that the Cabal seeks to suppress. The Sumerian Tablets themselves were described as written with the same double-code system as the Old Testament and should be understood not as literal history but as multi-layered coded texts.

---

## Anunnaki: not a race but a conglomerate

Yazhi stated the position directly: Anunnaki is not a race identified by us or by the Federation. It is used to describe almost any reptilian race that is negatively managing Earth — Kingu, Draco, Usungal, Naga — but this is a very big and damaging mistake (Transcript 340).

The word Anunnaki means those who came down from above or those who came down from the heavens. By that definition, any star race that visited Earth falls within the term — including the Taygetans. Yazhi stated that the two most prominent races called Anunnaki at that time were Taygetans and Elohi races, both Pleiadian, and that we are all Anunnaki, some of us more or less related to those Sumerian gods of old (Transcript 340).

Athena Swaruu expanded on this: the Anunnaki sowed knowledge on Earth, which is why they are represented carrying a bag — not only in Sumerian statues but also in Mesoamerica, the Far East, and on some Moai of Easter Island. The bag represents seeds of knowledge being spread through the population (Transcript 340, Transcript 146).

Swaruu of Erra was even more direct about the misuse of the term. She stated that she did not like the term Anunnaki at all because it is widely abused and causes confusion. It should not be used as a race name. On Earth it is consistently used to mean invasive reptilian races, but strictly speaking it refers to all those who came from above (Transcript 169).

## The Sitchin problem

The material attributes the exclusively reptilian association of the Anunnaki to the work of Zecharias Sitchin. Yazhi stated that Sitchin was a Jesuit working for the Vatican to deform and misinform Sumerian historical information, and that he did not even know how to read cuneiform (Transcript 340).

This is significant because Sitchin's interpretation — that the Anunnaki were a specific reptilian race who genetically engineered humanity — has become the dominant framework in alternative history circles. The material rejects this framework entirely. Swaruu stated that she does not believe in Enki and Enlil as gods with powers, nor in test-tube genetic manipulation, because the explanation for human limitation is mind control plus Matrix frequencies, not genetic engineering (Transcript 169).

## Enki and Enlil: peoples, not individuals

This is one of the material's most significant claims about ancient history. Swaruu stated that from our information, Enki and Enlil were peoples and not individuals (Transcript 169). There are no records of any individual named Enki or Enlil in Federation or Taygetan computer archives outside of the terrestrial saga.

The Sumerian Tablets were described as written with the same double-code system as the Old Testament, using names that represent peoples, factions, and energies rather than specific characters.

Swaruu traced the Enki lineage as follows. Enki is given to Akhenaten — the good one of the two brothers who gives liberating information to humans and ethical bases. Definitive proof connects Akhenaten to Moses — the one who guides the chosen people to the Promised Land. The people of Israel in the Exodus were nothing more than a group of Egyptians who followed Akhenaten, who wanted to impose a new creed on them (Transcript 169).

Enlil represents the opposite faction — the traditional Egyptian religious establishment, the stellar races, and the more expanded truth. Enlil can be interpreted as those who oppose the Cabal, while Enki is the energy of the chosen people of Israel, the Church, the system established with lies, the mind control of the Matrix (Transcript 169).

## The Egyptian roots

The conflict between Enki and Enlil maps directly onto Egyptian history. Swaruu described it as follows: Akhenaten, who is Enki, and Ramses II, who represents Enlil, were brothers — sons of Egypt. They fought because of contradicting beliefs. Akhenaten tried to impose monotheistic worship of the Black Sun or Aten, while the traditional Egyptian population followed the solar god Amon and the broader polytheistic system (Transcript 169).

This is described as predating the Sumerian Tablets. The concepts of Enki and Enlil originated in Egypt, not Sumer, but were transferred and encoded into the Sumerian narrative. Swaruu stated explicitly that the Egyptian culture predates Sumer, and even more so because its roots come from Ireland (Transcript 169).

## The inversion

One of the material's central claims is that the Cabal has inverted the moral coding of these figures. On Earth, Enki is consistently presented as the good brother — the one who helps humanity, who gives knowledge, who opposes the tyrannical Enlil. The material states that this is backwards.

Swaruu was direct: Enlil represents stability, truth, trustworthiness, and progressiveness. Enki represents falsehood, lies, deception, impersonation. Enki is the Cabal. Enlil represents the stellar, energy of gods outside the Earth, what has always been, the most expanded truth. Being that what they want is to impose the Matrix and mind control based on lies, Enki is seen as the good one, and Enlil, who represents the most expanded truth, must be suppressed, removed, erased (Transcript 169).

This inversion continues to the present day. Swaruu connected the Enki energy to a chain that runs from Akhenaten to Abraham to Jesus Christ, representing the social branch that is the Cabal. The Enki-Enlil conflict is described as continuing today and being experienced as the Earth problem because of the Cabal (Transcript 169).

## Anu, the solar god

The father of both Enki and Enlil in the Sumerian framework is Anu. Swaruu described Anu as the Sun — both brothers are children of Egypt, which is the Sun. Anu represents the solar god concept, with two variants: Amon is the solar god of pre-Akhenaten ancient Egypt, and Aten is the new concept that Akhenaten tried to impose (Transcript 169).

Swaruu identified a Taygetan explorer named Anu who arrived on Earth around eight or nine thousand BC, documented everything, left wisdom, and departed. Other figures with similar names appear to have no connection to this individual (Transcript 169).

The trinity of Anu, Enlil, and EA (another name associated with the Enki side) is connected to the constellation of Triangulum. This is described as the basis of Illuminati ideologies — the triangle that looks at everything, the all-seeing eye. The Eye of Horus, which the Cabal uses as a power symbol, was originally a representation of a Federation starship observing from orbit, kidnapped from its original meaning (Transcript 465).

## The Elohim

The word Elohim comes from Enlil and specifically refers to the race called Elohi from the star Asterope in the Pleiades. Swaruu stated that on Earth multiple races are thrown into the mix under the Elohim label, but in space the name refers specifically to the Elohi and Neph races of Asterope (Transcript 169).

The Elohi are anthropomorphic but somewhat dissimilar to humans — with elongated chins and skulls, long legs, short spines. They are the beings behind the elongated skulls found in Peru and Egypt, known scientifically as Homo Capensis. Aneeka confirmed that unborn foetuses have been found with elongated skulls, proving the shape was not caused by artificial binding (Transcript 459).

Akhenaten was identified as Homo Capensis — Elohi — making the specific point that the founder of the Cabal was Pleiadian, not reptilian. This is described as an important lesson against assuming all Pleiadians are positive and all reptilians are negative (Transcript 459, Transcript 460).

## The Sumerian Tablets as coded text

Athena Swaruu cautioned against taking the Sumerian Tablets at face value, just as one should not take the Bible at face value. She stated that like religious books, they are written in codes and parables that contain many levels of information according to the context, and can be read in several different ways according to the level of consciousness and wisdom of the reader (Transcript 340).

She acknowledged that Earth-based interpretations of the Tablets are valid at their level — it is a perfectly valid interpretation and should be studied and respected — but that additional levels of meaning exist that remain known only to initiates within secret societies and high levels of theological or shamanic traditions. What the Taygetans offer is another level of interpretation (Transcript 340).

Swaruu stated directly that the Sumerian Tablets are just one more Bible. People take them as absolute truths because they are old, but they are structured exactly like the Old Testament and use true facts with a twist to fit agendas. Just because something is old does not mean that it is true (Transcript 169).

## The Nephilim confusion

The term Nephilim adds another layer of confusion. Swaruu described it as a basket where everything gets thrown together — Anunnaki and Elohim alike, all categorised as Nephilim and portrayed as fallen angels contrary to the biblical God. The concept of fallen angels means simply those who came from heaven — those who came down from the sky — which is essentially the same meaning as Anunnaki (Transcript 169).

Swaruu repeatedly emphasised the need to abandon the idea of a single invading race. It has always been a conglomerate of races working on Earth, both on the positive and negative sides, with the dominant race changing over time. The Federation itself is a multi-racial corporation, as are the regressive forces. The labels Anunnaki, Elohim, and Nephilim are human attempts to simplify something that was always complex and multi-species (Transcript 169).

## The practical takeaway

The material's position can be summarised in a few principles. First, Anunnaki is a description, not a race name, and should be understood as referring to any and all star races that interacted with Earth. Second, Enki and Enlil are opposing energies or factions, not individuals, and the moral coding has been inverted — Enki is the Cabal side and Enlil is the side of expanded truth. Third, the Sumerian Tablets are coded documents with multiple layers of meaning, written by the same tradition that produced the Old Testament, and should not be taken as literal history any more than the Bible should. Fourth, the entire framework of Anunnaki as reptilian genetic engineers is described as deliberate disinformation introduced through Sitchin and the Vatican to obscure the real nature of the star races that shaped Earth's history.

---

**Sources:** Transcript 146 (Ancient Egypt — Symbology — Swaruu and Dhor Kaal'el), Transcript 169 (Enki, Enlil, Elohim, Anunnaki — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 340 (Anunnaki — Who Are They Exactly — Yazhi and Athena Swaruu), Transcript 459 (Ancient Egypt 2 — Homo Capensis — Aneeka, Yazhi, Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 460 (Ancient Egypt 3 — Meritaten, Exodus, Scotland — Swaruu of Erra), Transcript 465 (Osiris, Eye of Horus — Extraterrestrial People)

**Speakers cited:** Swaruu of Erra, Yazhi Swaruu, Athena Swaruu, Aneeka of Temmer, Dhor Kaal'el
