answers.title: How did humans get a reptilian brain stem?
answers.excerpt: They didn't. The material flatly rejects the premise.  Swaruu addresses this directly: "That is an interpretation that is entirely human. Because by isolating that part of the brain, they see that it…
answers.content:
# How did humans get a reptilian brain stem?

**Primary Theme:** Extraterrestrial Races
**Additional Themes:** Biology, Genetics & Health · Consciousness, Soul & the Nature of Self
**Sources:** 3 transcripts, 2 speakers (Swaruu 9, Aneeka of Temmer)
**Transcripts:** 046, 353, 084

---

## Short Answer

They didn't. The material flatly rejects the premise.

Swaruu addresses this directly: "That is an interpretation that is entirely human. Because by isolating that part of the brain, they see that it works in a similar or comparative way as to how a reptile would react (according to them). But there is no evidence or anything that proves that part of the brain is owed to reptile genes. It only seems to be reptile, therefore they say it is reptile. There is no genetic link" (046).

The so-called "reptilian brain" — the brain stem and associated structures that Earth science associates with survival instincts, fight-or-flight responses, and territorial behaviour — is not reptilian in origin. It is simply the oldest, most basic processing layer of the human brain, and because it handles functions that reptiles also handle (survival, aggression, basic motor control), human scientists assumed a common ancestry. From the Taygetan perspective, this is a category error: similarity in function does not imply shared origin, especially when 99% of all carbon-based DNA is identical across species regardless of whether they are humanoid, reptilian, insectoid, or fungal.

The deeper answer is that the brain's structure — including its split into hemispheres, which Taygetans do not have — is a manifestation of consciousness, not its cause. The human brain is split because human consciousness has been conditioned to think in dualistic terms across many incarnations. The brain stem's "reptilian" characteristics are similarly a reflection of the fear-based survival consciousness that the Matrix reinforces, not evidence of reptilian genetic insertion.

---

## The "Triune Brain" Misconception

The question itself comes from the "triune brain" model popularised by neuroscientist Paul MacLean in the 1960s, which proposed that the human brain evolved in three layers: a reptilian core (brain stem), a mammalian middle layer (limbic system), and a primate outer layer (neocortex). This model suggests that humans literally carry a reptilian brain inside their skull — a relic of evolutionary ancestry.

The material rejects this on multiple grounds:

**First**, the genetic argument fails. Swaruu points out that all carbon-based life shares more than 99% of its DNA — "a monkey has 99% of genes identical to humans" and "a cavern fungus will have more than 90% of genes that a human being" (046). The presence of similar structures or similar genetic sequences proves nothing about direct lineage. An Urmah (feline race) shares 99%+ of its DNA with a Kingu (reptilian race) and with a human, and with a Taygetan. Biological similarity at the genetic level is the default state of carbon-based life, not evidence of specific ancestry.

**Second**, the evolutionary framework itself is rejected. The material does not accept Darwinian evolution as the mechanism for species formation. There is no "earlier reptilian stage" that humans passed through on their way to becoming human. Humanoid species are described as Primary species — manifested from higher planes of consciousness — not as products of a linear evolutionary chain that began with reptiles and gradually added layers of complexity. "No one considers the concept of creation of the human being anymore, I am referring to the interstellar races. It would fall within the same concept of eternity. Because there is no linear time to consider, the concept of creation, development, actuality, or that of evolution does not exist" (046).

**Third**, the body-determines-consciousness direction is reversed. In the Taygetan model, consciousness generates the body, not the reverse. DNA is a manifestation of the soul's experiential memory (046, 226). The brain stem does not produce survival-oriented consciousness — survival-oriented consciousness produces the brain structures associated with it. This is the same principle that explains why the human brain is split into hemispheres while the Taygetan brain is not: "First is the thought then the physical manifestation. Their predisposition in incarnation after incarnation to think in dualistic terms is generically embodied as a dualistic split brain" (Aneeka, 353).

## What the Brain Stem Actually Represents

If the brain stem's "reptilian" characteristics are not evidence of reptilian genes, what are they?

The material's answer is that the brain stem handles the most basic survival functions — heartbeat, breathing, fight-or-flight — because those are the most fundamental aspects of being in a physical body. They are the first layer of consciousness that needs to operate for a body to function at all. Every carbon-based species that maintains a body needs these functions, which is why the structures handling them look similar across species. Reptiles, mammals, birds, and amphibians all need to breathe, maintain circulation, and respond to danger — so the neural hardware handling these tasks converges on similar designs, just as chairs converge on similar designs across all humanoid civilisations because the bodies using them have the same basic shape (090).

The resemblance to reptilian brain function is therefore not ancestry but convergence — the same engineering problem (keeping a body alive) produces similar solutions regardless of the species.

## The Fear Connection

There is, however, a connection between human brain function and reptilian influence — but it runs through consciousness, not genetics.

Swaruu's egregor framework (084) describes regressive reptilian entities as manifestations of concentrated human fear. The survival-oriented, fear-reactive aspects of human consciousness — precisely the functions associated with the "reptilian brain" — are what generate and sustain these entities. The brain stem's dominance in fear responses creates a feedback loop: fear activates the survival circuits, which produce more fear, which feeds the egregors, which create conditions that produce more fear.

This is not because the brain stem contains reptilian DNA. It is because the consciousness state that the brain stem mediates — pure survival, fight-or-flight, territorial aggression — is the same consciousness state that manifests as reptilian-shaped egregors in the collective unconscious. The "reptilian brain" and the "reptilian entities" are related not through genetics but through frequency: they occupy the same band of consciousness.

The difference between a human operating primarily from their brain stem (fear, survival, aggression) and a human operating from their full neural capacity (integration, creativity, empathy) is not a difference in hardware — "the fact that you have split brains is not a real impediment. It is your mentality, your ideas" (353). The brain stem's limitations are imposed by the mind's attachment to fear-based thinking, not by any physical constraint that was inserted by an external race.

## The Mind Control Angle

Swaruu connects all of this to the broader Matrix mechanism. The human brain's current configuration — split hemispheres, dominant survival circuits, limited sensory range — is described as a product of "mental control + Matrix frequencies" (046, 169). The brain stem's prominence in human experience is not natural but maintained by the conditions of the 3D Matrix: constant exposure to fear, stress, and survival pressure keeps the most basic neural circuits perpetually activated, preventing the higher functions from operating at full capacity.

The Taygetan brain, operating in a non-Matrix environment at higher oxygen levels and lower gravity, with no fear-based social programming, develops as a single unified mass with no hemispheric split (001). If a human were freed from the Matrix and its consciousness limitations, the material suggests their brain would gradually reorganise toward the same integrated architecture — because the DNA containing that potential is already present, merely deactivated by the consciousness constraints imposed on it.

"All the genes of a star race are already inside each and every one of the humans, they are only deactivated, they are neither altered nor removed. It is just the very consciousness-intention of the being that inhabits each body, that will determine which genes will be activated and which will be ignored" (046).

## Evolution Across Speakers

Swaruu of Erra (2019) provides the direct rebuttal of the reptilian brain concept: no genetic link, similarity in function does not imply shared origin, human science's interpretation is a projection of limited understanding, the body is a manifestation of consciousness not the other way around. She also provides the broader framework: Primary vs Secondary species, mind control as the true mechanism of human biological limitation, all genes already present but deactivated.

Aneeka of Temmer (2017–2022) adds the specific brain-structure explanation: the split brain is a physical manifestation of dualistic thinking patterns accumulated across incarnations, not an evolutionary feature. "First is the thought then the physical manifestation." The hardware follows the software, not the reverse.

## Key Transcript References

- **046** — Direct rebuttal of reptilian brain concept: "that is an interpretation that is entirely human — no evidence that part of the brain is owed to reptile genes — it only seems to be reptile therefore they say it is reptile — there is no genetic link," all carbon-based life 99%+ genetically identical (monkey/human/fungus/ET — similarity is default not evidence of lineage), Primary vs Secondary species classification (humans = Secondary due to mind control not genetics), "all genes of a star race are already inside every human — only deactivated," body consciousness adapted to specific souls not universal reptilian heritage, genetic changes imposed by consciousness not laboratory
- **353** — Split brain as consciousness manifestation: "result of thinking of beings with serious predisposition to think in duality — first is thought then physical manifestation — incarnation after incarnation of dualistic thinking generically embodied as split brain," not a real impediment to thinking — "it is your mentality, your ideas," DNA dictated by ideas and attachments to those ideas, could develop unified brain if consciousness changed
- **084** — Egregor framework: regressive reptilian consciousness as manifestation of concentrated fear, fear-based survival mode (brain stem functions) as the frequency that generates and feeds reptilian-shaped egregors, connection between survival consciousness and reptilian entities runs through frequency not genetics, fear is creative energy that manifests the thing feared

answers.title: How did the different ET races originally form?
answers.excerpt: The material rejects both creationism and Darwinian evolution. No interstellar race considers the humanoid form to have been "created" — the concept does not apply, because without linear time there…
answers.content:
# How did the different ET races originally form?

**Primary Theme:** Extraterrestrial Races
**Additional Themes:** Biology, Genetics & Health · Consciousness, Soul & the Nature of Self · Metaphysics/Spirituality
**Sources:** 7 transcripts, 2 speakers (Swaruu 9, Aneeka of Temmer)
**Transcripts:** 141, 046, 104, 138, 086, 029, 110

---

## Short Answer

The material rejects both creationism and Darwinian evolution. No interstellar race considers the humanoid form to have been "created" — the concept does not apply, because without linear time there is no moment of origin (141, 046). What exists instead is consciousness-driven adaptation: the physical form of any species is the manifestation of the consciousness inhabiting it, shaped by the accumulated experiences and intentions of the souls using those bodies across countless incarnations (046). Species are classified as either Primary — those manifested directly from higher planes, whose origin is lost in eternity — or Secondary — those whose genetics have been altered by Primary species, typically through mind control rather than laboratory intervention (046, 141). Humans fall into the Secondary classification. The vast majority of humanoid races across the galaxy are Primary species, all sharing roughly 99% genetic similarity because carbon-based DNA follows a universal pattern — the differences between species lie not in the genes themselves but in the "markers" within those genes, activated or deactivated by consciousness (141).

The Great Expansion, approximately one million years ago, dispersed some 400,000 human-like races from the Lyra/Vega region across this galactic sector, seeding worlds including Taygeta, Ummo, and Earth (138). But even this event is not a true origin — those 400,000 races already existed before the Expansion, having differentiated from a Lyrian base whose own beginning is lost in non-linear time (046). Species continue to form: what makes a new species is not laboratory gene-splicing but "the progression of consciousness toward something else, other ideas, other perceptions" (086). The human race on Earth is, from this perspective, a new species in the process of being formed — its eventual characteristics will be determined not by genetic engineering but by what humanity collectively chooses to become.

---

## The Rejection of Creation and Evolution

Swaruu addresses the question head-on in transcript 141: "Nobody considers the concept of creation of the human being, the Lyrian race, I mean among the interstellar races. Because there is no linear time to consider, the concept of creation, development, or that of Evolution does not exist" (141). What exists is "adaptation to the linear or semi-linear environment of some humanoid or human species" — but even this adaptation cannot be traced to a definitive origin point because "from the broadest point of view, they do not form the species because there is no before and after from the total point of view of the overall set of all humanoid species" (141).

The same principle is stated in transcript 046: "No creation concept among interstellar races — no linear time means no creation/development/evolution — only adaptation to environment driven by consciousness intention." The Great Expansion is known as a major dispersal event, "but exactly when it happened cannot be known. It is only calculated from the human frame of reference, which was roughly a million years ago" (141).

This is not agnosticism about origins — it is a fundamental statement about the nature of species formation. From densities where time is non-linear, the question "when did this species first appear?" is structurally unanswerable. The Lyrian form has "always been" in the sense that there is no timeline along which it developed from something else.

## Manifestation from Higher Planes

When asked whether beings from very high planes manifest the physical bodies used in lower densities, Swaruu confirms: "Simply by the fact that they are and exist, as beings of light, and have the practical intention, for whatever reason, to manifest themselves as entities separated from another entity, with humanoid morphology, that is, with limbs, torso and head, is enough to cause a chain reaction through the densities where they 'manifest' beings of a more 'material' nature to the point of reaching the terrestrial human being" (141).

This describes a top-down process: consciousness at higher density levels, by the act of intending to experience separation and individuality in a physical form, generates that form downward through the density layers. The physical body is the end product of a chain of manifestation, not the starting point. This is why Swaruu can say that "we return to being them when we sleep" — the higher-plane beings generating the physical forms are not separate entities but the same consciousness at different density levels.

Transcript 104 provides the cosmological context: life is the universal norm, not the exception. Everything is consciousness — "gravel, water, broken glass — alive." Stars exist "because life is in them." The humanoid form is described as the most efficient design for a tool-using, environment-manipulating being, which is why it is "the most common in the universe" (141). The convergence is not coincidental — it reflects a universal attractor in the manifestation process, where consciousness seeking physical experience gravitates toward the humanoid template because it offers the greatest range of interaction with the environment.

## Primary and Secondary Species

The material establishes a formal classification system. Swaruu defines it in transcripts 046 and 141:

Primary species are "those that are holographic fragments of the whole, of the unified Self, which are those that have manifested from higher planes" (141). These are species whose origin is either lost in the mists of time or is indistinguishable from Source itself. They were not created by anyone else. The Lyrian base — from which Taygetans, Engans, Ummites, Solatians, and hundreds of thousands of other humanoid races derive — is a Primary species. So are the Alpha Draconians, whose origin is explicitly unknown even to themselves: "come from another timeline/galaxy — don't know own original planet — very very ancient" (110). The Urmah (feline races) are similarly Primary, originating from Vega/Lyra alongside the Lyrians.

Secondary species are "those that have been created or altered by some of the Primary species with a specific purpose, using the imposition of a higher intention with a goal to alter the DNA of those who will use the final container body" (141). Crucially, this alteration is not primarily done through laboratory genetics — it is done through consciousness manipulation. Humans fall into the Secondary classification, not because their genes were spliced in a test tube, but because "the true genetic alterations applied to humans have been done through mind control. From the application of beliefs and the manipulation of what is possible and what is not, by imposing a structure of values and ideas artificially placed with a goal to cause genetic changes" (141).

The Sumerian Tablets' account of human creation through genetic engineering is explicitly rejected as a misinterpretation: "The interpretation of the Sumerian Tablets where it has been said that the human was created by them is a human interpretation, because it is the only way they know how DNA is altered" (141). In the material's framework, genetics reflects consciousness — it does not determine it. All the star-race genes are "already within each and every one of the humans, they are only deactivated... It is the very consciousness-intention of the being that inhabits each body that will determine which genes will be activated and which will be ignored" (141).

## The 99% Genetic Principle

The material makes a strong claim about interspecies genetic similarity that directly addresses how different races can appear so varied while sharing common biology. Swaruu states: "From the Andromedans, Dieslientiplex, Urmahs, Alpha Draconians, Sirians, Engan, Malakak, Ummo, Mantis, Ceded Cerez Avian, Lurkers, Maitre, Kingu, Solatians, whoever they are... They will have 99% the same genes as the others" (141). This extends even to non-humanoid forms — "a cave fungus will have more than 90% of genes than a human being" (141), a fact confirmed by Earth science.

The differences between species lie not in the presence or absence of genes but in the "markers" within those genes — activation patterns that determine which genetic information is expressed. Swaruu uses the domestic cat as an analogy: "A domestic cat has the same genes 99.99999999999% as a Lion or a Bengal Tiger. It is the same species; a cat is a cat. It is the markers that give them the sizes, colors and proportions. Goes for the Urmah too" (141).

This principle directly undermines the claim (attributed to Andromedan contacts and Corey Goode) that humans were constructed from the DNA of 21 different ET species. Swaruu's response is categorical: "Such a thing is simply not possible, because life with the human or humanoid model is the most common in the universe... None of those humanomorphic races were created, the concept is wrong" (141). Finding human-compatible DNA in any alien specimen is simply what should be expected given the universal genetic baseline, and saying human DNA contains "contributions" from multiple races is like saying a cat contains contributions from lions and tigers because they share 99.99% of their genes.

## Consciousness as the Mechanism of Speciation

The central mechanism of species formation in this material is consciousness directing genetics. Transcript 046 establishes the foundational principle: genes are the expression of consciousness, not its cause. A species' physical form — its size, appearance, sensory capabilities, lifespan — is determined by the accumulated consciousness of the souls inhabiting those bodies across generations. This is described as neither random mutation nor intelligent design from outside, but as the collective creative intention of the beings themselves.

The practical consequence is that genetic changes imposed artificially (whether by laboratory or by mind control) are inherently unstable unless the consciousness of the being supports them. Swaruu explains that "if a certain quality or characteristic in a being is not used for a prolonged period of time, it will begin to atrophy to the point that it finally manifests as a change in the very genes that control or are associated with that quality" (141). Conversely, attempting to suppress a gene in a species with strong Source connection fails because "the base Lyrians themselves prevented it due to their advanced consciousness" (138).

This is demonstrated through the history of the Adamic race. The reptilians attempted to genetically limit the captured Lyrians after the invasion of the Lyrian colony on Earth, but "the first 2 attempts to do the same with the anthropomorphic Lyrians didn't work because they all had a very strong connection with Source and the spiritual. The Lyrian genetics is too strong, so if they suppress a gene it will emerge again because of the high consciousness of the people" (138). The only successful genetic suppression has been through mind control — changing what the people believe is possible, which in turn changes what their consciousness activates in their own DNA.

## How New Races Actually Form

Swaruu provides the clearest statement of the speciation process in transcript 086, in the context of explaining how the human race is being formed: "What makes it another species is the progression of consciousness toward something else, other ideas, other perceptions, in this case those caused by living in 3D. Particular to 3D Earth. Lyrians as the basis for a new race. Just as other races evolved or emerged from the Lyrian one. Like the Taygetean one. And it not only happens with the Lyrian race, this happens throughout the Universe with all the other existing races. They just progress or change without no need to say whether or not it is progress, they only change and give rise to others. This is how new species and races are formed. It is not creationism, nor is it Darwinism. It is something much more complex and beautiful" (086).

The process, then, is:

A group of beings sharing a common experiential context — a particular planet, a particular set of challenges, a particular density — develops a collective consciousness with distinctive characteristics. Over time (in the semi-linear sense applicable within a given density), this collective consciousness manifests physical changes in the bodies its members inhabit. The physical differences accumulate until what was once a variant of the parent species becomes recognisable as something distinct. The Taygetean race emerged from the Lyrian base this way. The human race on Earth is emerging from the Lyrian base this way now.

The Great Expansion accelerated this process dramatically. When ~400,000 groups of Lyrian refugees scattered across the galaxy, each group landed on a different world with different environmental conditions, different challenges, and different neighbouring species. Each group's consciousness adapted to its new context, and over hundreds of thousands of years, those adaptations compounded into the enormous variety of humanoid races now present in the galaxy — all sharing 99% genetics, all differentiated by the consciousness-driven marker patterns that reflect their unique histories.

The predator-prey dynamic in transcript 029 provides another angle: all advanced interstellar races are now vegan, having progressed through the predatory phase of consciousness. Species like the Alpha Draconians and Urmah retain their carnivore dentition as a physical vestige, but their consciousness — and therefore their behaviour — has moved far beyond the predatory stage. The physical form lags behind consciousness change but eventually follows.

## Key Transcript References

- **141** — Dedicated species formation transcript: no creation concept (no linear time = no origin point), adaptation to environment driven by consciousness intention, Primary species (manifested from higher planes / holographic fragments of Source) vs Secondary species (altered by Primary species through consciousness manipulation not laboratory), humans as Secondary (genetic changes from mind control not gene-splicing), Sumerian Tablets account rejected, all carbon-based DNA 99%+ similar (differences in markers not genes), 21-race construction claim debunked, domestic cat/lion/Urmah 99.99% same genes, hybridisation inherently unstable (reverts to original pattern), starseed DNA adaptation through consciousness not physical mixing, consciousness generates genetics (not reverse)
- **046** — Genetics foundations: no creation concept (identical statement to 141), Great Expansion ~1M years ago (origins lost in non-linear time), Primary/Secondary species classification (Primary = from Source / Secondary = altered by Primary), consciousness generates and controls DNA (all genes present but deactivated — activated by consciousness-intention), 99% genetic similarity universal baseline, reptilian brain stem rejected (functional similarity ≠ genetic link), 24 chromosomes as normal carbon-based baseline (human 22-23 = manipulation indicator), mind control as mechanism of genetic suppression
- **104** — Life as universal norm: everything is consciousness (gravel/water/glass alive), stars exist because life is in them, humanoid form as most common biological configuration in universe
- **138** — Great Expansion history: ~400,000 human-like races fled reptilian invasion of Lyra/Vega, seeded countless worlds, Federation born from survival need, reptilian genetic engineering on captured Lyrians failed (consciousness too strong — gene suppression reversed itself), Adamic race limited only by mind control not genetics, DNA complete but deactivated
- **086** — New species formation process: "progression of consciousness toward something else" creates new species (not creationism not Darwinism), human race as Lyrian-based species in formation (3D experience producing distinct consciousness), all races progressed through similar formation process, the Federation mentors new races through this process
- **029** — Predator-to-vegan consciousness progression: all advanced races now vegan (including formerly predatory Alpha Dracos and Urmah), physical vestiges (teeth/claws) lag behind consciousness change, consciousness evolution drives dietary and therefore physiological change across species
- **110** — Alpha Draco origin unknown even to themselves: from another timeline/galaxy, don't know original planet, illustrates that even the most ancient Primary species have no traceable point of origin

answers.filename: How do the Taygetans feel about the Andromedans and their role in the Federation.md
answers.title: How do the Taygetans feel about the Andromedans — what percentage are complicit with how the Federation runs Earth?
answers.excerpt: The Taygetan relationship with the Andromedans is marked by a deep cultural tension between emotional and logical natures, combined with a more recent political divergence over the Federation's role…
answers.content:
# How do the Taygetans feel about the Andromedans — what percentage are complicit with how the Federation runs Earth?

**Primary Theme:** Extraterrestrial Races
**Additional Themes:** Galactic Federation & Exopolitics · Taygetan Society, Culture & Daily Life
**Sources:** 7 transcripts, 5 speakers (Swaruu 9, Yazhi Swaruu, Athena Swaruu, Mari Swaruu, Arishah/Urmah)
**Transcripts:** 128, S-166, 371, 099, S-194, A-023, 025

---

## Short Answer

The Taygetan relationship with the Andromedans is marked by a deep cultural tension between emotional and logical natures, combined with a more recent political divergence over the Federation's role on Earth. The Andromedans are described as among the highest-ranked races in the local Federation, their biosphere ship Viera serves as the primary Federation headquarters near Earth, and yet they consistently claim they do not want to get involved with Earth because it would generate karma. Mari Swaruu describes this position as "quite contradictory" — they host the venue where Earth's fate is decided but claim non-involvement (S-166).

The question of what percentage are complicit does not receive a numerical answer in the material. Instead, Swaruu describes the Andromedans as collectively "guilty by omission of action" — their fear of karma makes them passive in the face of what is happening on Earth, which from the Taygetan perspective amounts to complicity through inaction (099). The Urmah go further, describing the Andromedan approach to service-to-others as a form of imposed spiritual conformity that prevents individual growth — what Arishah calls "spiritual communism" (S-194).

---

## The Cultural Friction

The fundamental tension between Taygetans and Andromedans is temperamental. Swaruu describes the Andromedans as "very mental beings, logical" who are "not temperamental nor emotional" and have "a lot of curiosity about the reactions of the emotional races, because it is very difficult for the Andromedans to understand them." He notes that "this has caused friction between races more than once, including differences with the Taygetan race — as the latter is a very emotional race, even more so than the humans" (128).

Aneeka expands on this elsewhere: the Urmah do not get along well with races of Andromedan origin — Andromedans, Arcturians, and Celaeno — and identifies the common thread as their unemotional nature. Taygetans share this friction. Aneeka adds that "if there is anything that defines [the Urmah], it's that they are very emotional and even dramatic" and that Taygeta itself "has not historically gotten along very well with those kinds of races either" (A-023).

This is not hostility — the relationship is described as positive overall. The Andromedans' Holographic Political System is adopted by Taygeta and most progressive races. Their ships are described as being on par technologically with Taygetan vessels. But the emotional gap is real and creates ongoing interpersonal and political complications, particularly when the two civilisations must coordinate on questions where emotion and logic produce different conclusions — such as what to do about Earth.

---

## The Andromedans' Contradictory Position

Mari Swaruu's assessment in S-166 provides the most direct evaluation of the Andromedans' role near Earth. The Viera — the arrowhead-shaped Andromedan biosphere ship hiding behind the Moon — is the main Galactic Federation headquarters for Earth affairs. Local Federation installations, High Council meeting halls, and the primary jurisdiction over everything relating to Earth are housed inside the Viera. Flight control and space operations headquarters are also there. Every ship entering or leaving Earth's atmosphere must log a flight plan with the Viera (S-166).

Yet despite hosting this infrastructure, the Andromedans "act in a very soft and retracted manner, always officially claiming that they do not want to create any karma." Mari finds this openly contradictory: "They do not want to get involved with anything that has to do with Earth because it ends up affecting and interfering with their society. Yet, they are still lending their ship as a forward operating base, or FOB for short, for other races, and they still participate in councils where the fate of the planet is being discussed. So, I do not understand what exactly is in their head as they are quite contradictory" (S-166).

The Arcturians — the Andromedans' closest allies, described as "best of friends" — adopt the same posture: they participate in councils and guide their starseeds on Earth but otherwise claim not to want involvement with Earth's "dirty" things. Meanwhile, the Centauri (Alfratans) serve as the Federation's operational enforcement arm, taking and executing orders without this pretence of detachment (S-166).

The Andromedans hold the highest Federation rank in the local area alongside the Arcturians and Centauri. They are not passive observers but the hosts of the decision-making apparatus. Their claim of non-involvement while providing the platform on which involvement occurs is what the Taygetan crew finds difficult to reconcile.

---

## Complicity by Omission

The most direct assessment of Andromedan complicity comes from Swaruu in transcript 099, where he addresses the question of whether Federation races are genuinely unethical or simply misguided. His answer distinguishes between active malice and passive failure: the Andromedans "are not 'really' crooked or lacking ethics." Rather, they are "very much into 'fearing' Karma of their own, making them prone to become guilty by omission of action with things going on on Earth" (099).

This is the Taygetan diagnosis: the Andromedans' belief system — specifically their understanding of karma as a real force that could harm them if they intervene — paralyses them into inaction that has the same practical effect as deliberate complicity. They see what is happening on Earth, they host the apparatus that manages it, but they will not act against it because they fear the karmic consequences of action more than they feel responsible for the consequences of inaction.

Swaruu adds that they "are still in the process of evolving past their own limiting beliefs" (099) — framing the Andromedan position not as evil but as a developmental limitation, a spiritual stage they have not yet transcended.

This connects to the Taygetan critique of the Andromedan karma model itself. In transcript 025, Swaruu distinguishes between the Andromedan concept of karma — which treats it as a real cosmic law with binding consequences — and the Taygetan position, which treats karma as game money: valid only within the game of incarnation and carrying no weight outside it. The Andromedans' imported this concept to Earth through Eastern spiritual traditions, and Swaruu sees it as one of their most significant and most damaging contributions to Earth's belief systems, because it keeps both Andromedans and humans locked into a cycle of fear-based passivity (025).

---

## The Urmah Critique: Spiritual Communism

The Urmah go further than the Taygetans in criticising the Andromedan approach. Arishah, the Urmah representative, describes the Andromedan and Arcturian version of service-to-others as an imposed ideology that suppresses individual development. In his analysis, these races "even condemn any service-to-self activity, or even thoughts of their people, claiming that it leads to becoming regressive, claiming that it leads to the dark side." The result is a society where "everyone thinks the same" because no one dares question what the establishment has accepted as correct (S-194).

Arishah characterises this as developing "strong feelings of inadequacy and even guilt, simply because one or another of their members wants to fulfill their own path while being alive, as if they did not have the right to exist as individuals." His summary: the compulsory Andromedan model of service-to-others "smells like spiritual 'communism'" (S-194).

The Urmah alternative is explicit: they believe in service-to-others, but only from a position of strength. First develop yourself — spiritually, individually, in every way — and only then share yourself with others, and only to a degree that does not damage yourself. This is the Urmah's explanation for why they are the most dominant race in the galaxy despite being perceived as self-interested: their self-development produces strength that they then deploy in service, rather than the Andromedan model of depleting individuals in service to a collective ideal (S-194).

---

## Historical Context: Taygeta's Own Federation History

The current Taygetan critical stance toward the Andromedans and the Federation is itself recent. Yazhi explains in transcript 371 that "when Asket was in power here, until very recently… Taygeta was the right hand and the war force of the Federation. They were the Galactic Federation itself." It was only with Alenym's assumption of power in late 2018 or early 2019 that Taygeta broke away — Alenym ordered the return of the fleet to Taygeta, leaving a single ship as a political representative (371).

Before this break, Taygetan cadets were trained with Federation propaganda — told they would "liberate oppressed planets and fight against the forces of evil" (371). Athena Swaruu adds that previous Taygetan crews "played the game, and they thought everything was love and light" without questioning the Federation's nature. It was only the current crew who began to understand the Federation's true role (371).

This means the Taygetan critique of Andromedan passivity carries a certain self-awareness: Taygeta itself was passively complicit until very recently, carrying out Federation operations without questioning the broader framework. The difference is that Taygeta eventually questioned and broke away, while the Andromedans — despite their far greater age and experience — have not.

Yazhi notes that the Urmah "apparently already knew" about the Federation's true nature, which is why the Avyon Council "never quite goes along with what the Federation says" (371). The Urmah's independence from Federation orthodoxy, including their critique of Andromedan spiritual conformity, appears to stem from a much earlier realisation that the Taygetans only recently arrived at.

---

## Evolution Across Speakers

Swaruu of Erra (2020) establishes the foundational Andromedan profile: nomadic, logical, unemotional, karma-obsessed, friction with emotional Taygetans, "guilty by omission of action" on Earth. His tone is diplomatic — characterising their position as a developmental limitation rather than malice.

Mari Swaruu (2023) provides the operational critique: the Andromedans host the Viera as Federation HQ, participate in councils deciding Earth's fate, but claim non-involvement. Her assessment is more directly critical — she "does not understand what exactly is in their head" and calls their position "quite contradictory."

Yazhi Swaruu (2023) provides the historical context: Taygeta itself was complicit until Alenym's break, and the awakening to the Federation's true nature is happening in parallel between Earth and space.

Athena Swaruu (2023) adds that previous Taygetan crews simply "thought everything was love and light" — mirroring the very passivity they now criticise in the Andromedans.

Arishah the Urmah (2023–2024) provides the sharpest critique: the Andromedan service-to-others model is "spiritual communism" that suppresses individuality and prevents genuine spiritual growth, producing the exact passivity that makes them ineffective guardians of Earth.

---

## Key Transcript References

- **128** — Foundational Andromedan race profile: non-Lyrian origin, destroyed own planet millions of years ago, nomadic on biosphere ships (Moon was theirs), slim/blue/2-3m tall, very logical/non-emotional, "friction between races more than once including with Taygetans" due to emotional/logical divide, karma concept imported to Earth via Sanskrit, obsessive with perfection and control, advisors/logistical support role around Earth
- **S-166** — Operational assessment: Viera as main Federation HQ near Earth (hiding behind Moon, houses councils/flight control/jurisdiction), Andromedans have highest local Federation rank alongside Arcturians and Centauri, claim non-involvement due to karma but host the decision-making apparatus, Mari calls this "quite contradictory," Arcturians adopt same detached posture, Centauri execute orders obediently as "right hand and workhorse"
- **371** — Taygeta's own Federation history: under Asket, Taygeta was "the right hand and war force of the Federation," Alenym broke away 2018-2019 ordering fleet return, cadets trained with "liberate oppressed planets" propaganda, Urmah "apparently already knew" about Federation's true nature, awakening happening in parallel between Earth and space
- **099** — Direct complicity assessment: Andromedans "not really crooked" but "very much into fearing Karma of their own, making them prone to become guilty by omission of action," still evolving past their own limiting beliefs
- **S-194** — Urmah critique from Arishah: Andromedan/Arcturian service-to-others as imposed ideology, condemns any service-to-self even in thought, "spiritual communism," develops feelings of inadequacy and guilt, Urmah alternative: serve from strength after individual development
- **A-023** — Interpersonal friction: Urmah don't get along with Andromedans/Arcturians/Celaeno due to unemotional nature, Taygetans share this, Urmah and Taygetans are both emotional and dramatic relative to these races
- **025** — Karma critique: Swaruu frames Andromedan karma as "game money" valid only within incarnation, not a real cosmic law — Andromedan model imported to Earth through Eastern traditions, keeps both Andromedans and humans in fear-based passivity

answers.content:
# How many ET races are involved with Earth?

**Primary Theme:** Extraterrestrial Races
**Additional Themes:** Galactic Federation & Exopolitics · Human History · Biology/Genetics
**Sources:** 7 transcripts, 3 speakers (Swaruu 9, Aneeka of Temmer, Yazhi Swaruu)
**Transcripts:** 104, 004, 016, 138, 221, 226, 086

---

## Short Answer

The material refuses to give a clean number because the question itself misunderstands the scale. The answer depends entirely on what you mean by "involved."

At the broadest level, life is described as universal — not exceptional but the default state of existence. Swaruu states that there are "at least 400,000 civilizations in this galactic quadrant alone" with humanoid inhabitants who could pass for human on the street (104). Beyond that, with non-humanoid species included, the total number of civilisations in the galaxy is described as "billions, of trillions" (104). The Federation alone — just one political entity — contains close to half a million member races and civilisations (004).

At the specific level of races actively involved with Earth in some operational capacity, the material names approximately a dozen consistently: Taygetans, Urmah, Alfratans (Alpha Centauri), Antarians, Andromedans, Sirians, Arcturians (Dieslientiplex), Engans, Solatians, Alpha Draconians, Karistus, Sasani, and Largan Avian — with the explicit caveat "so many more" (016). On the regressive side, Reptilians (multiple sub-species including Kingu), Maitré, and various robotic Gray operators are described as actively present. The Federation itself, as an institutional actor involving thousands of races at its local Viera headquarters level alone, oversees the entire Earth theatre.

The popular claim that "22 extraterrestrial races" compose the human genome is addressed directly and described as simplistic — a number that reflects the limits of the observer's genetic science rather than the actual number of contributing races, which the material describes as "millions and millions" (226).

---

## The Scale of Life in the Galaxy

Swaruu's foundational description in transcript 104 establishes the framework that makes a simple number impossible. Life is not something that exists in scattered pockets across an otherwise dead universe. Everything is consciousness — gravel, water, broken glass are described as alive in the sense that they are sustained by attention, and stars exist because life is in them, not the other way around. From this perspective, asking "how many races" is like asking "how many conversations are happening on Earth" — the answer is technically countable but the number is so large as to be functionally meaningless.

The specific figures Swaruu provides for the humanoid population alone: at least 400,000 civilisations in this galactic quadrant whose inhabitants would pass for human. These are Lyrian-descended species — races that share a common origin in the Vega system from approximately one million years ago, when the Great Expansion scattered humanoid populations across the galaxy (138). Swaruu describes those original Lyrian ancestors as comprising "some 400,000 races of human-like beings" who lived on the planets Avalon and Lyra before the Reptilian invasion forced them to flee and seed "every possible corner of this sector of the galaxy" (138).

The overlap in numbers is not coincidental — the 400,000 humanoid civilisations that exist now are described as the descendants of those same 400,000 original Lyrian races. This is the scope of just one biological family in one galactic quadrant.

Beyond the humanoid family, the total count becomes effectively infinite. Swaruu describes "billions, of trillions of civilizations" across the galaxy (104), and then adds that 99.9999 percent of races in 5D are not interstellar — they remain on their home planets, never developing or needing space travel. The civilisations that travel between stars are described as a vanishingly small fraction of the total.

## The Federation as a Measure of Scale

The Federation of United Planets provides one concrete institutional measure. Created approximately 850,000 to 900,000 years ago during the aftermath of the Great Expansion, it was born from the need for Lyrian humanoid races to cooperate against Reptilian extinction campaigns (004, 138). Swaruu describes it as containing "close to half a million races and civilizations" (004).

This number — roughly 500,000 member civilisations — represents only the races that have chosen to participate in this particular political structure. It does not include independent civilisations, the Orion Council and its members, races that have no interest in interstellar politics, or the vast majority of civilisations that never leave their own solar systems. The Federation is enormous by any human standard of political organisation, but it represents a fraction of galactic life.

The Orion Council, originally the Reptilian-led opposition to the Federation, is described as a separate and comparably ancient institution. Its original leaders have evolved — the Alpha Draconians in this galactic quadrant are now described as "kind and positive beings" who are aiding Earth, though not all have made this transition (004). The existence of a second major interstellar political body with its own extensive membership underscores that the Federation's half-million members is not even close to the total count of organised civilisations.

## Races Actively Present Around Earth

When the question narrows to "who is actually here, involved with Earth right now," the material provides a more manageable list — though still with the caveat that it is incomplete.

Swaruu's direct answer in transcript 016 names the main races helping Earth: "Andromedans, Antarians, Centauri (Alfratans), Sirians, Arcturians (Dieslientiplex), Engan, Alpha Draconian, and Urma (Lion race). But many more, like Sasani, Largan Avian... so many!" The Taygetans themselves are not listed because Swaruu is speaking as a Taygetan — they are the ones giving the information.

Transcript 221 adds operational detail from Aneeka's perspective in late 2021: Alfratans and Antarians are described as conducting active policing operations against regressive ships. Karistus ships are described as performing atmospheric flight operations, "mainly patrolling against Reptilian and Maitre operations" in what Aneeka calls "an eternal cat and mouse lethal game." Ships are occasionally shot down — Aneeka references a recent incident over Washington state witnessed by thousands, described as "no meteor" but a ship breaking up in the atmosphere.

On the institutional level, the Federation maintains a massive presence through its local headquarters at Viera (in lunar orbit), with representatives from countless races. The Alcyone Council — a sub-body representing the Pleiadian systems — backs the Taygetan position and uses the Taygetan ship as its eyes and ears for monitoring Federation activity (105).

### The Named Positive Races

Drawing from across the transcripts, the races consistently named as positively involved with Earth include:

**Taygetans** (Taygeta, Pleiades) — the primary source of the Cosmic Agency material. Their expedition has been present continuously since at least 2008, with earlier contact periods going back decades. Described as the "main engine of positive ET presence" around Earth (030).

**Urmah** (Vega) — the feline race, led by King Ruhr of Avalon aboard the flagship Avyon One. Described as the military muscle backing the Taygetan diplomatic position (155).

**Alfratans** (Alpha Centauri) — actively policing Earth's space, shooting down regressive craft in the atmosphere (221).

**Antarians** (Antares) — conducting policing operations alongside the Alfratans (221).

**Andromedans** (Andromeda) — very old species, among those who provided the "22 races" framework that Aneeka critiques as simplistic (226, 016).

**Sirians** — a conglomerate of innumerable races from the Sirius system, not a single species (119). Dolphins and cetaceans are described as Sirian beings.

**Arcturians / Dieslientiplex** (Boötes) — three main species, non-Lyrian, high amphibian DNA, related to Andromedans (107, 016).

**Engans** (Electra, Pleiades) — allied with the Taygetans, pushed out of the Federation council alongside them after the 2020 revelation (086).

**Solatians** (Pleione, Pleiades) — aligned with Taygeta in the awakening percentage assessment (105).

**Alpha Draconians** — the supreme Reptilian species, now mostly positive in this quadrant, described as aiding Earth's ascension. Distinct from ordinary Draconians (004).

**Karistus** — conducting atmospheric patrol operations against Reptilian and Maitré presence (221).

**Sasani and Largan Avian** — named by Swaruu as among the many additional races helping (016).

### The Named Regressive Presences

**Reptilians** — multiple sub-species, with the lower-order Reptilians (not Alpha Draconians) operating through the Cabal structure, organic portals, and underground bases. Described as locked inside the 3D Matrix after the Tiamat wars but adapted to operating within it (005).

**Maitré** — a regressive Grey species created by the Reptilians, conducting atmospheric operations that the Karistus and others actively counter (221).

**Robotic/Programmable Grays** — artificial biological entities serving various masters, both positive and regressive (010).

### The Hidden Layer: The Federation Itself

The most significant revelation about "who is involved" came in 2020, when the Taygetans discovered that the Federation is not merely an observer or mediator but is described as the ultimate controller of the Earth situation — "not infiltrated by the Cabal, but functionally identical to it from certain angles" (086). This means the question "how many races are involved with Earth" must include the entire Federation structure, because the Federation as an institution is described as directly maintaining the conditions on Earth.

Aneeka describes the situation in layers: the Federation sits monitoring, appears to do nothing, but is "so powerful here that they eliminate whatever is going against what they plan" (221). Shooting down regressive ships is described not as liberation but as "maintaining the Matrix — nothing more. Same as always, another day at the office."

This reframes the question fundamentally. It is not just a dozen named races actively helping and a handful of regressives causing trouble. The entire Federation — with its half-million member civilisations — is described as institutionally involved with Earth, whether individual races are conscious of it or not.

## The "22 Races" Question

The popular claim that the human genome is composed of DNA from 22 extraterrestrial races receives extensive treatment in transcript 226. Aneeka's position is clear: the number 22 reflects the limits of the observer's analytical tools, not the actual composition of the genome.

Her argument proceeds in layers. First, DNA is described as memory made material — the physical expression of everything a soul has experienced across all its incarnations. When a group of souls share enough common experiences, they generate agreements of perception that manifest as a race. Second, each of those 22 identifiable races is itself composed of other races, and those of still others, recursively. The actual number of races whose experiential memory is present in the human genome is described as "millions and millions" (226).

The claim that the human race was "created in a laboratory" by combining DNA from 22 races is explicitly rejected: "that is a big NO" (226). The human genome has been invasively altered multiple times — including the apparent removal of one chromosome linked to longevity — but it was not assembled from scratch. The alterations were primarily achieved through mind control rather than genetic engineering, and without sustained mind control, the DNA reverts to its original format within a few generations.

Aneeka identifies the source of the "22 races" framework as primarily Andromedan, and describes it as valid but simplistic — "not misinformation" but a description limited by the analytical framework used. From the Taygetan perspective, which holds that consciousness generates DNA rather than the reverse, the question of "how many races compose the human being" is answered by "every race that any soul currently incarnated as human has ever been" — which is functionally infinite.

## Why the Number Matters Less Than the Framework

The material consistently redirects the question from "how many" to "what kind of involvement." The vast majority of galactic civilisations have no involvement with Earth whatsoever — they are non-interstellar, content on their home worlds, unaware of or uninterested in one small planet's situation. The races that are involved fall into categories that matter more than their count: those actively helping (Taygeta, Urmah, Alfratans, etc.), those actively predating (lower Reptilians, Maitré), those administering the system (Etorthans, Federation bureaucracy), and those whose involvement is structural rather than intentional (the Federation as an institution maintaining the 3D Matrix).

The answer to "how many ET races are involved with Earth" is therefore: somewhere between a dozen named actors and the entire galaxy, depending on what you mean by "involved." The named active participants number in the low dozens. The institutional involvement through the Federation encompasses hundreds of thousands of civilisations. And the genetic and incarnational involvement — souls from across the galaxy choosing to incarnate as humans — is described as effectively limitless.

## Evolution Across Speakers

Swaruu of Erra (2018–2020) provides the foundational numbers: 400,000+ humanoid civilisations in this quadrant, billions of trillions total, the Federation's half-million members, the named list of races helping Earth, and the detailed introduction to individual races in the 104 series.

Aneeka of Temmer (2021) adds the operational and critical perspective: the policing operations by Alfratans and Antarians, the Karistus atmospheric patrols, the Federation's true role as maintainer rather than liberator, the "22 races" critique, and the assessment that the Federation "will not come to rescue humanity."

Yazhi Swaruu provides the deepest metaphysical layer (via transcripts referenced in 086): the Federation as ultimate controller, the concept that humanity manifests its own situation, and the framework that makes counting races ultimately less important than understanding the consciousness dynamics that sustain the Earth situation.

## Key Transcript References

- **104** — Foundational ET races introduction: life as universal default (everything is consciousness), at least 400,000 humanoid civilisations in this galactic quadrant, "billions, of trillions" total, 99.9999% of 5D races not interstellar, 11 interstellar Pleiadian races listed (Yena/Alcyone, Sau'k/Sterope, Elohi/Asterope, Hyadean Felions + Lyrian Ashands/Merope, Taygetans/Taygeta, Solatians/Pleione, Atlantes/Atlas, Engan/Electra, Celestes/Celeano, Maya/Maia), Lurkers/Xenomorphs as real silicon-based species (danger 10/10)
- **004** — Federation creation: "close to half a million races and civilizations," created ~850–900k years ago, Prime Directive as flexible philosophy, Orion Council originally negative now mostly positive (Alpha Draconians evolved), Draconians vs Alpha Draconians as distinct species
- **016** — Races actively helping Earth: "Andromedans, Antarians, Centauri (Alfratans), Sirians, Arcturians (Dieslientiplex), Engan, Alpha Draconian, Urma (Lion race), Sasani, Largan Avian... so many!" — Federation forces actively patrolling, shooting down missiles, stopping WW3 multiple times
- **138** — Great Expansion of Lyra: ~1 million years ago, Reptilian invasion of Vega, "some 400,000 races of human-like beings" fled and seeded "every possible corner of this sector of the galaxy," Federation born from survival need, Earth colonised ~40,000 years ago by Lyrians
- **221** — Exopolitics/space operations: Alfratans and Antarians policing against regressive ships, Karistus atmospheric patrols against Reptilian/Maitré operations ("eternal cat and mouse lethal game"), ships shot down (Washington state incident), Federation "so powerful they eliminate whatever goes against what they plan" — maintaining Matrix not liberating, SSP under Federation control around Mars
- **226** — "22 races" critique: DNA as memory made material (not genetic blueprint), 22 identifiable races is simplistic (each composed of others recursively — actual count is "millions and millions"), human race NOT created in laboratory from 22 races ("big NO"), invasive alterations attempted but cemented by mind control not genetics, missing chromosome linked to longevity, Andromedan origin of 22-race claim, Taygetan DNA 6x more complex (24 chromosomes/12 strands vs human 23/2), Swaruunian 12x more complex (24 chromosomes/24 strands)
- **086** — Federation revealed as ultimate controllers of Earth situation: not infiltrated by Cabal but IS the controlling structure, Taygeta/Urmah/Engan pushed out of council, "scandalous" and "too communicative," entire Federation institutionally involved with Earth whether individual races conscious of it or not

answers.content:
# Is there a Swaruu coming from a more positive timeline, or do they only come from less favourable ones?

**No-Coverage Answer**

This specific question — whether any Swaruu variant originates from a more positive or favourable timeline — is not directly addressed in the Taygetan contact material. The corpus extensively discusses the different Swaruu iterations (Swaruu 9, Yazhi/Sophia, Athena/Swaruu X, Mari Swaruu) and their timeline backgrounds, but it does not frame any of them as coming from a "more positive" vs "less favourable" timeline in those terms.

What the material does establish is that the Swaruu lineage involves complex timeline jumps, with each successive Swaruu having accumulated different timeline experiences that shape their perspective. Yazhi is described as operating from a higher density (7D–9D) with a much wider temporal vantage point than the others. But the characterisation of their origin timelines as "positive" vs "negative" is not a framework the speakers themselves use.

**See also:** *What are the Swaruunians and why are they not Taygetans?* (covers the Swaruu lineage and species differentiation)

**Searched:** All 834+ transcripts, enhanced topic index. Grep for "positive timeline" + Swaruu context returned general timeline discussion but no direct treatment of this specific question.

answers.excerpt: The Taygetan contact material does not relay any Karistus intelligence about the "underworld" — whether understood as the lower astral, the inner Earth Reptilian domains, or any other esoteric…
answers.content:
# Is there any intel from the Karistus on the state of the underworld?

**No-Coverage Answer**

The Taygetan contact material does not relay any Karistus intelligence about the "underworld" — whether understood as the lower astral, the inner Earth Reptilian domains, or any other esoteric underworld concept. The Karistus are described as having a "peculiar belief system" (234) and deliberately appearing with wings as part of the Earth angel mythology, but their specific intelligence assessments or observations about lower-realm activity are not shared in any transcript.

The material does discuss the lower astral realm, inner Earth Reptilian territories, and DUMBs (Deep Underground Military Bases) from Taygetan and Urmah perspectives, but the Karistus viewpoint on these subjects is not presented.

**See also:** *What are the Karistus and what are they doing about Earth?* (Karistus profile), *What are astral entities and parasites?* (lower astral framework)

**Searched:** All 834+ transcripts. "Karistus" + "underworld/lower astral/inner Earth" produced no relevant cross-references.

answers.content:
# Was Krishna a real being — and if so, what was his ET origin?

**No-Coverage Answer**

Krishna is not discussed in the Taygetan contact material. The name appears in only two transcripts (320, 391) and both are tangential mentions, not descriptions of Krishna as a historical or extraterrestrial figure. His ET origin, connection to any specific race, or historical existence is never examined.

For context, the material does profile other Hindu-tradition figures: Shiva is identified as an Andromedan (128, 138), and the blue-skinned beings of Indian tradition are described as "ETs of Andromedan genetic branches" (138). Sanskrit is described as a humanised form of the Andromedan language (128). But Krishna specifically is never addressed within this framework.

**See also:** *What is the relationship between Shiva and the Andromedans?* (covers the Andromedan-India connection in detail)

**Searched:** All 834+ transcripts, enhanced topic index, themed index 05 (Extraterrestrial Races). Zero substantive results.
