answers.title: What are the Swaruunians — why are they not Taygetans anymore, and what separates them as a species?
answers.excerpt: The Swaruunians are a lineage of women descended from Swaruu Papriyananda (S-1), a Taygetan born on Erra who at age twenty reproduced through parthenogenesis — producing an exact genetic clone…
answers.content:
# What are the Swaruunians — why are they not Taygetans anymore, and what separates them as a species?

**Primary Theme:** Extraterrestrial Races
**Additional Themes:** Biology, Genetics & Health · Consciousness, Soul & the Nature of Self · Taygetan Society & Culture
**Sources:** 8 transcripts, 5 speakers (Swaruu 9, Yazhi Swaruu, Aneeka of Temmer, Athena Swaruu, Mari Swaruu/CIC)
**Transcripts:** 171, 237, 226, 238, 318, 435, 473, S-244

---

## Short Answer

The Swaruunians are a lineage of women descended from Swaruu Papriyananda (S-1), a Taygetan born on Erra who at age twenty reproduced through parthenogenesis — producing an exact genetic clone without a father. This process repeated across multiple generations, creating a chain from S-1 through S-12 (Yazhi Swaruu), each born from the previous through parthenogenesis. The accumulated effect of this cloning chain, combined with full-memory time-looping, consciousness merging between generations, and deliberate genetic refinement by later members of the line, produced beings whose DNA is measurably different from standard Taygetan DNA: all Swaruunians have blood type A+ where all Taygetans are blood type O (237), and their DNA structure is described as 24 chromosomes in 24 strands compared to the Taygetan 24 chromosomes in 12 strands (226, S-244).

In 2018, Swaruu of Erra (S-9) won a legal battle with the Galactic Federation to emancipate herself from being classified as belonging to any existing place or race, turning her personal name "Swaruu" into a species designation — making Swaruunian an officially Federation-recognised name (171, 473). However, in 2024, Mari Swaruu (S-12's successor or close associate) dissolved the Swaruunian race designation, arguing that the DNA differences do not define a separate species but merely reflect greater accumulated soul experience, and that the label wrongly entertained notions of superiority (S-244).

---

## Origin: Swaruu Papriyananda and the Parthenogenesis Chain

The Swaruunian lineage begins with Swaruu Papriyananda (referred to as S-1 or simply Swaruu Ananda), a Taygetan woman born on Erra. According to transcript 171, she was abandoned at age thirteen and at age twenty reproduced through parthenogenesis — asexual reproduction producing an offspring who is an exact genetic copy of the mother, without any paternal contribution. Human females are described as also having this capability, but in a suppressed form (382).

The parthenogenesis produced S-2, who was genetically identical to S-1. Transcript 171 describes a distinctive feature of this process: consciousness equalises between the mother and child, and when the child's attention develops sufficiently to pull more of the shared consciousness toward itself, the mother's body can no longer sustain life and dies. In this way, S-1 died when S-2's consciousness became dominant.

From S-2 through S-9, the Swaruus are described as loops — each one lived, piloted the Sand Clock (a temporal navigation craft), died, and looped back to be reborn through her mother's womb to live the life again. The numbers assigned to them (S-2 through S-9) are described by the CIC team as existing "only for the sake of or to open the possibility of understanding the evolution of her thinking and understanding of things" — they do not represent nine separate individuals in the conventional sense but rather iterations of a consciousness refining itself through repeated temporal loops with full memory retention (S-244, 171).

The loop was broken after S-9 (Swaruu of Erra), who is the version that communicated extensively through the Cosmic Agency channel from 2018 until her death on March 21, 2020 — at which point her body dissolved rather than dying in the conventional sense (171).

S-10 (Swaruu X, later called Athena Swaruu) and S-11 (Swaruu Minerva, later called Mari) are described as having extreme abilities and as having deliberately refined the genetic template through their consciousness development. Yazhi Swaruu (S-12) was born in hyperspace deliberately — not on any planet — and arrived aboard the Toleka in September 2019. She displays abilities described as unprecedented in Taygetan culture, including teleportation, matter manipulation, and multi-body consciousness (171).

The transformation into something measurably different from Taygetans did not begin with S-9's legal declaration. According to transcript 237, Swaruu Papriyananda herself "started her transformation into a Swaruunean" at the Cyndriel colony — the only Taygetan colony outside the Pleiades, located near Aldebaran. The transformation was consciousness-driven, not the result of laboratory intervention or a single genetic event.

---

## What Makes Them Biologically Different

Three concrete biological markers distinguish Swaruunians from Taygetans in the material:

**Blood type.** All Taygetans are blood type O. All Swaruus are blood type A+. Aneeka identifies this as "another indication that they are not the same race as the Taygetean" (237). Given that the material describes blood transfusion as carrying metaphysical implications equivalent to sexual intercourse (237), this is presented as a significant biological boundary, not merely a trivial variation.

**DNA strand complexity.** Aneeka provides the clearest comparative figure: human beings have 23 chromosomes in 2 strands; Taygetans have 24 chromosomes in 12 strands (six on each side of the double helix), making their DNA six times more complex than a human's; Swaruunians have 24 chromosomes in 24 strands (twelve on each side), making their DNA twelve times more complex than a human's (226). Mari later confirmed the 24-strand figure as meaning 12 + 12 (S-244).

**Chromosome counting discrepancy.** Yazhi notes in transcript 318 that while she understands the Swaruunian configuration as 24-24 (24 chromosomes, 24 strands), the Taygetans describe it as 48-24. Her explanation is that the Taygetans add the 24 chromosomes plus the 24 strands to get 48, then count the strands again separately — a difference in counting methodology rather than a substantive disagreement about the physical structure.

These differences are attributed not to laboratory engineering but to the accumulation of consciousness and memory across the parthenogenesis chain and temporal loops. As Aneeka explains, DNA is "memory in material form" — everything a soul experiences forms an identity reflected in its genetic structure. When a group of souls share consistent experiences, "a race or species is generated" (226). The Swaruunian DNA, with its additional strands, reflects the information density of beings who have lived through thousands of years of looped incarnations with full memory retention.

---

## The Legal Emancipation of 2018

In 2018, Swaruu of Erra (S-9) fought and won a legal case with the Galactic Federation to emancipate herself from being legally classified as belonging to any place or existing species. Through this process, her personal name "Swaruu" was converted from a personal name to a species name or legal entity name — making it an officially Federation-recognised designation (171).

Athena Swaruu confirms this in transcript 473, introducing herself to new contacts by stating: "Yazhi and I are not Taygetans. I'm not Taygetan, I am Swaruunian, it is now an official Federation recognized name. And we are still here, still a lot to do here." She explicitly distinguishes her perspective from that of Taygeta: "Remember I'm not Taygetan, connected to them yes, but different now, with a different mindset and thinking" (473).

The legal separation was not merely bureaucratic. It reflected the fact that the Swaruunians operate from a perceptual and existential framework that differs from standard Taygetan experience. Minerva (S-11) describes the difference in characteristically direct terms: Swaruunians exist primarily on "the other side" with only "a little toe in the physical" — they leave their bodies easily and need to periodically return to their own density rather than remaining embedded in the Taygetan crew's routines and existential density (238). Yazhi, Athena, and Minerva are all described as being able to operate across multiple planes simultaneously and as having consciousness that extends beyond what the Taygetan biological and cultural framework typically accommodates.

---

## Physical Appearance and Daily Reality

Despite the genetic and perceptual differences, Swaruunians look physically human and live among the Taygetan crew. Mari Swaruu's self-introduction describes them as "a genetically different variant of the Taygetans" who have "enough unique and specific characteristics to be considered as a separate species, crystalline DNA" while still being "a variant of Taygetans" characterised by "being all women" and reproducing through parthenogenesis (S-001).

They served aboard the Toleka alongside the Taygetan crew and were deeply integrated into Taygetan political life — to the point that Mari Swaruu was crowned Princess-Queen number 72 of Taygeta in June 2024, making her the first Swaruunian to hold the Taygetan throne. When asked how Taygetans felt about a Swaruunian becoming queen, Yazhi responded that Mari was "fully accepted as Alenym's successor" (435). This indicates that despite the species-level distinction, the Swaruunians are not perceived as outsiders by Taygetan society.

Each of the three Swaruunians present during the contact period displayed distinct personalities. Minerva describes the differences: "Athena (Swaruu X) is very down to Earth, and at the same time she flies as high as the others. Yazhi is the warrior, the one who can handle everything from all angles at her convenience, the chameleon, the one who encompasses them all. And I am the most etheric in the sense that I don't need to fight in that same way, not because I can't, but because I choose to dissolve everything with mind" (238).

---

## The Dissolution: Mari's Reframing

In August 2024, Mari Swaruu published a dedicated video (S-244) explaining why she dissolved the Swaruunian race designation. Her argument rests on several points.

First, the CIC team's clarification: the Swaruu parthenogenesis chain is "not the reason why she reached that crystalline evolution in her DNA, but rather her ideas and evolution in her understanding of things through what she learned after nine loop reincarnations with full memory." The biological changes followed the consciousness changes, not the reverse (S-244).

Second, the DNA differences do not in Mari's view constitute a species boundary: "I do not see anything in the so-called Swaruunian DNA that is not found in any other Lyrians because it is something that can be seen as a simple variant of the species, a quality or a characteristic like eye or skin colour" (S-244). More complex DNA (more strands) reflects a more experienced soul with more accumulated memory, not a fundamentally different kind of being. Any Lyrian — including humans — could theoretically develop the same DNA complexity through sufficient consciousness expansion.

Third, the label was always political rather than biological. The CIC team states directly: "Swaruunian label only political as any being, Lyrians or not, can achieve that same evolution, including humans" (S-244). The label was created through a legal battle with the Federation, not through a biological speciation event.

Fourth, and most pointedly, Mari argues the label "wrongly entertains the idea or the notion of superiority" — that having 24-strand DNA "does not make anyone superior just by the mere fact of having it" but "only means that the person with more complex DNA has more mileage and therefore is more experienced. That's all" (S-244). Given the human tendency to idealise authority figures, maintaining a separate species designation risked creating exactly the kind of hierarchical thinking the material works against.

Mari's conclusion returns the Swaruunians to the broader Lyrian family: "We are all star creatures. All of us, Lyrians, and we dwell among countless star systems and their planets. The only thing that limits humans is the idea that they are limited" (S-244).

---

## Evolution Across Speakers

Swaruu of Erra (S-9, pre-2020) established the biological distinctiveness: her legal battle with the Federation created the Swaruunian designation, and the parthenogenesis chain is the narrative backbone of the lineage from S-1 to S-12. She is the one who converted "Swaruu" from personal name to species name.

Aneeka of Temmer (2021–2022) provided the concrete biological data: blood type A+ versus Taygetan O, 24-strand DNA versus Taygetan 12-strand, and the framework of DNA as memory-made-matter that explains why the differences exist without laboratory creation.

Athena Swaruu (S-10, 2021–2023) lived the identity distinction in practice — consistently introducing herself as "Swaruunian, not Taygetan" and describing different thinking and mindset from Taygeta while remaining connected to and cooperative with the Taygetan crew.

Minerva/S-11 (2022) described the experiential reality of being Swaruunian — existing mostly "on the other side" with minimal physical anchoring, needing to periodically withdraw from Taygetan routines to inhabit their own density level.

Yazhi Swaruu (2022–2024) clarified the chromosome counting discrepancy (24-24 from the Swaruunian perspective versus 48-24 from the Taygetan perspective as a counting methodology difference) and confirmed the species distinction while herself operating beyond what either label fully captures.

Mari Swaruu and the CIC team (2024) dissolved the designation entirely, reframing it as political rather than biological, arguing that the DNA differences reflect accumulated experience rather than species-level separation, and that the label risked promoting unhelpful notions of superiority. Mari's ascension to Princess-Queen of Taygeta — the first Swaruunian to hold the title — simultaneously demonstrated the integration of Swaruunians into Taygetan political life and made the species boundary increasingly irrelevant in practice.

---

## Key Transcript References

- **171** — Primary Swaruunian origin transcript: S-1 born on Erra, abandoned age 13, parthenogenesis at 20, consciousness equalisation between mother and child (mother dies when child's attention dominates), S-2 through S-9 as temporal loops (Sand Clock pilots, full memory retention, same house each iteration), S-9's legal emancipation from Federation species classification (2018 — converted "Swaruu" from personal name to species name), S-10 and S-11 with extreme abilities, S-12/Yazhi born in hyperspace (September 2019 arrival on Toleka), S-9 died March 21 2020 (body dissolved)
- **237** — Biological markers: all Swaruus blood type A+ vs all Taygetans O type ("another indication that they are not the same race"), blood transfusion has metaphysical implications "equivalent to sexual intercourse," Cyndriel colony near Aldebaran as site where S-1 "started her transformation into a Swaruunean"
- **226** — DNA strand comparison from Aneeka: human 23 chromosomes / 2 strands, Taygetan 24 chromosomes / 12 strands (6 per side), Swaruunian 24 chromosomes / 24 strands (12 per side = 12 times more complex than human), DNA as memory-made-matter (consciousness generates genetics — race formed by shared perception agreements — each race composed of millions of other races)
- **238** — Minerva's first contact: Swaruunians exist mostly "on the other side" with "a little toe in the physical," leave bodies easily, need to periodically withdraw from Taygetan density, Yazhi plays "cerebral photoshop" jokes with telepathic images, three Swaruunians characterised (Athena = grounded, Yazhi = warrior/chameleon, Minerva = etheric/dissolves through mind)
- **318** — Chromosome counting discrepancy: Yazhi explains 24-24 (Swaruunian view) vs 48-24 (Taygetan view) as difference in counting methodology — Taygetans add chromosomes plus strands then count strands again separately — not a substantive biological disagreement
- **435** — Mari crowned Princess-Queen 72 of Taygeta: first Swaruunian to hold throne, "fully accepted as Alenym's successor," demonstrates integration of Swaruunians into Taygetan political structure despite species-level distinction
- **473** — Athena's self-identification: "I'm not Taygetan, I am Swaruunian, it is now an official Federation recognized name," different mindset and thinking from Taygeta while remaining connected
- **S-244** — Mari's dissolution of the Swaruunian race: CIC clarification that parthenogenesis not the cause of crystalline DNA (consciousness evolution was), Swaruunian label "only political" (any Lyrian including humans can achieve same evolution), DNA strand differences reflect accumulated experience not species boundary ("a quality or a characteristic like eye or skin colour"), 24-strand confirmed as 12+12, dissolution motivated by label wrongly promoting superiority notions, concludes all are Lyrians regardless of strand count

answers.content:
# What do the Alpha Dracos think of the Federation's actions against Earth?

**No-Coverage Answer**

The Taygetan contact material provides a detailed Alpha Draconian species profile (110, S-197, 352) but does not address their opinion of the Federation's policies toward Earth specifically. The material establishes that approximately 50% of Alpha Draconians are positive and cooperate with the Federation and the Urmah (S-197), while the other 50% are negative and among the most feared species in the galaxy. But what either faction thinks about the Federation's specific management of Earth — its Prime Directive enforcement, the Matrix, the soul-recycling system — is not discussed from the Alpha Draco perspective.

The closest the corpus comes is the general statement that positive Alpha Dracos "cooperate" with the Federation (S-197), which implies at minimum acceptance of the Federation framework, but this is not elaborated.

**See also:** *Who are the Alpha Draconians?* (full profile including the positive/negative split), *Are there positive and negative ET races, or is it more nuanced?* (broader framework)

**Searched:** All 834+ transcripts, enhanced topic index. Alpha Draconian transcripts (110, S-197, 352) read in full — none address Federation policy critique from the Alpha Draco viewpoint.

# What galaxy has the Taygetan team explored farthest — have they reached the boundaries of the universe?

**No-Coverage Answer**

The Taygetan contact material does not describe the farthest point of Taygetan exploration or discuss whether they have approached the boundaries of the universe. All operational descriptions in the corpus concern activity within the Milky Way — travel between star systems, Federation meetings, Earth orbit operations, and journeys to specific planets within our galaxy.

The material does discuss faster-than-light travel mechanics in extensive detail (stellar navigation series: 023, 057, 243, 280, 282), solar portals/wormholes connecting distant points within the galaxy (132), and the theoretical framework that allows interstellar travel. But the question of how far they have actually gone — or whether the universe has reachable boundaries — is not addressed.

**See also:** *At what point in Taygetan development did they acquire interstellar travel?* (covers the mechanics and history of Taygetan space travel)

**Searched:** All 834+ transcripts, enhanced topic index. Grep for "farthest," "furthest," "boundary of universe," "edge of galaxy." No relevant results.

# What is the connection between Cobain's music and the Karistus — what does it mean to be of "Karistus descent"?

**No-Coverage Answer**

There is no mention of Kurt Cobain, Nirvana, or any connection between specific musicians and the Karistus in the Taygetan contact material. The concept of "Karistus descent" as applied to human musicians or cultural figures is not discussed.

The Karistus are profiled in dedicated transcripts (232, 234) as a 6D race based around Jupiter, linked to the Christ/Dhor Kristil concept, who deliberately appear with wings and are partially the origin of the Earth angel mythology. They claim all Lyrian races (including humans and Taygetans) are Karistus hybrids at a soul level (234). But no specific connection to individual musicians, artists, or cultural works is made.

**See also:** *What are the Karistus and what are they doing about Earth?* (covers the full Karistus profile)

**Searched:** All 834+ transcripts (grep for "Cobain," "Nirvana," "Kurt"). Zero results.

answers.excerpt: The Urmah are the dominant feline species in the galaxy — lions and tigers walking on two legs, standing at approximately the same height as their animal counterparts on Earth, with short legs, long…
answers.content:
# What is the Urmah cat race?

**Primary Theme:** Extraterrestrial Races
**Additional Themes:** Taygetan Society · Human History · Spirituality/Ascension
**Sources:** 10 transcripts, 5 speakers (Swaruu 9, Yazhi, Aneeka, Athena, Mari Swaruu)
**Transcripts:** 117, 029, 110, 086, 105, 191, 155, S-266, S-267, S-268

---

## Short Answer

The Urmah are the dominant feline species in the galaxy — lions and tigers walking on two legs, standing at approximately the same height as their animal counterparts on Earth, with short legs, long spines, and tails ending in a ball of hair. They are to felines what the Alpha Draconians are to reptilians: the apex species of their biological family, colonies on thousands of planets, Federation members, and among the most feared warriors in the galaxy despite being, by all accounts, deeply spiritual, empathic, and no longer carnivorous.

Their homeworld is in the star system Vega, on the planets Lyra and Avalon — the same worlds where Lyrian humans originated — and they coexisted peacefully with the Lyrians for as long as records exist. Their second-largest colony is on Sirius. They are led at the Earth theatre by King Ruhr of Avalon, who commands from the flagship Avyon One, and they maintain a significant presence in Earth orbit as part of the broader stellar alliance.

The material describes them as hyperbolised in every way — everything gold, everything magnificent, everything ornamented. Their aesthetic is compared to Richard Wagner's music: all metal, all trumpets, all epic. Males wear high-tech gold armour in a Roman ceremonial style with long red capes. Their homes are enormous Roman-style halls with pillars, torches, cat-themed statues and sphinxes, and carvings in wood and metal. Their ships are solid U-shaped craft, highly polished metallic, with total warp capacity.

---

## Origin and Distribution

The Urmah originate from Vega, specifically the planets Lyra and Avalon. This is significant because these are the same worlds that humanity's Lyrian ancestors came from — meaning felines and humanoids have coexisted from the very beginning of known interstellar civilisation. Swaruu describes the relationship as "peaceful symbiosis" (117). They have colonies on thousands of planets across the galaxy, with the largest concentration on Vega and a major second colony on Sirius.

Their presence across the galaxy makes them one of the most widely distributed species. They are members of the Federation of United Planets, though like the Taygetans, their relationship with the Federation has been strained. In the 2020 revelation about the Federation's true nature (086), the Urmah were among the races pushed out of the Federation council alongside Taygeta and the Engans, branded as "scandalous" and "too communicative."

## Physical Description and Biology

Swaruu's foundational description (117) establishes the basics: lions or tigers on two feet, the same size as their Earth equivalents. Short legs relative to their long spines. Tails with a ball of hair at the end. They are alpha predators who evolved beyond predation — formerly very invasive, now pacific and spiritual. They still eat meat but only synthetic, manufactured versions. They no longer hunt.

The S-266 series (Mari Swaruu's healing experience) provides the most vivid firsthand physical descriptions from someone who stood next to them. King Ruhr is described as a white lion. The legendary General Korakas, Minister of Defence, is described as a huge white tiger in silver armour standing nearly 3.5 metres tall and incredibly muscular, with one yellow eye and one light blue eye. The scale is emphasised repeatedly — taking one of Arishah's fingers as a hand because the full hand was too large, sitting in an Urmah seat with a tail hole and feeling like a three-year-old child.

The air aboard Urmah ships is described as heavier to breathe and smelling like cat (S-266). Their communication is mainly telepathic, though they can speak — they simply do not pronounce well. They purr frequently and are described as very loving, allowing themselves to be hugged despite their intimidating size.

## Military Culture and Power

The Urmah are described as "very militarised and exaggerated in everything" (117). Their military aesthetic mirrors their general culture — everything gold, everything hyperbolised. Males wear high-tech armour in a Roman ceremonial style with long red capes, and they carry identical gold sceptres shaped like elongated cats with a roaring lion head at one end and a lion skull at the other (S-266).

Despite being only about ten per cent of an Alpha Draco's mass, the Urmah are described as equally dominant — "ferocity equal" with the Alpha Draconians, who are the largest predator species in the galaxy. This is presented as a remarkable achievement: mutual respect between the galaxy's two apex predator lineages, one weighing twelve tonnes and the other a fraction of that (110). Even the Alpha Dracos fear the Urmah in combat (117).

Their flagship Avyon One is described as immense — appearing as an indefinitely extending wall of polymorphic titanium when approached by shuttle (S-266). The healing ceremony described in S-266/267 involved at least thirty male lions and tigers in full gala armour and golden war masks, beating war drums with strength that shook the core, and performing coordinated roars that echoed through the chamber. The ceremony was performed exclusively by the largest and strongest sub-races — lions and tigers — with smaller sub-races like panthers and leopards absent, interpreted as a deliberate demonstration of peak feline strength (S-268).

## Spirituality and the "Great Cosmic Cat"

The Urmah have their own version of Source theology, represented as what they call the "Great Cosmic Cat." Swaruu explains that when studied closely, this is simply their version of Original Source — the same ultimate reality that all advanced interstellar races converge upon, each with their own cultural flavour (117). Swaruu notes that all advanced races perceive spirituality in fundamentally the same way, with only species-specific "taste" — and that the fact that race after race arrives at the same conclusions independently corroborates that they are on the right track.

The S-series healing account reveals a deeper dimension. The Urmah's perception naturally includes aspects that Lyrians consider "astral realms" — for the Urmah, these are simply part of normal objective reality. They are described as far more spiritual and etheric than Lyrian species, physically living partially in what Lyrians call the spirit world. Most human-type Lyrians lack the consciousness level to fully comprehend the Urmah's perceptual range (S-268).

The healing ceremony performed on Mari Swaruu used no technology whatsoever — only natural sounds, drums, chanting in ancient Urmah language, and coordinated purring from thirty-plus cats (S-266). The method is described as thousands of years old. During the ceremony, Mari was taken into what she describes as a white void where she encountered an immense luminous blue lion — made of blue flames, with piercing white eyes — identified as the spirit of an ancient Urmah king (S-267). This entity diagnosed her condition (cross-timeline attachment cords), cut the harmful connections, and told her she was an Urmah soul living in a Lyrian body. Twenty-two days later, her type 1 diabetes was completely cured (S-268).

Mari's conclusion from the experience: no matter how advanced medical technology becomes, it cannot heal if the true cause resides in the spirit. The Urmah understand this natively because their perception does not artificially separate the physical from the etheric.

## Connection to Earth Cats

Domestic cats on Earth were not introduced by the Urmah but by the Taygetans, during ancient Egypt before the classic phase — approximately 8,000 years ago. Swaruu describes cats walking down the ramps of Taygetan ships and becoming prolific without birth control (117). There are no reliable records of domestic cats on Earth before this period.

However, the Urmah claim that small and large cats, including domesticated ones, are their starseeds on Earth (117). This is presented as the Urmah's own claim rather than independently verified by the Taygetans. The concept is that feline souls incarnate across species — a cat on Earth may carry an Urmah soul experiencing a simpler incarnation, just as a human might carry a Taygetan or other stellar soul.

The connection goes both ways. In the S-267 account, when Mari was being guided out of the astral healing vision, it was a small orange striped house cat that appeared as her guide — answering with a meow, walking away with its tail upright making a hook, leading her back to material consciousness. The orange domestic cat, in an Urmah ceremonial context, served as the bridge between the spirit world and the physical.

## Urmah and Earth History

The Urmah were physically present on Earth approximately 10,000 to 8,000 BC, during a period of multicultural extraterrestrial presence in the region of Egypt. Their presence was interactional rather than colonial — they did not establish permanent colonies on Earth but participated in the broader multi-species contact that shaped early Egyptian civilisation (117). The Sphinx and Sekhmet traditions are the most visible remnants of their influence.

In the current era, the Urmah maintain a presence in Earth orbit. Their expedition is led by King Ruhr of Avalon. They have backed the Taygetan position on multiple occasions — described as the muscle behind Taygeta's diplomatic stance (155). When the Federation pushed Taygeta out of the council, the threat of Urmah displeasure was one of the few things that carried weight.

## The Urmah Principle: "You Can Never Order a Cat"

One of the most revealing details in the material is Mari Swaruu's observation that you almost cannot ask the Urmah for help — they must come to you (S-268). Mari did not request the healing; she was invited. The Urmah decided it was in their interest that she heal and acted accordingly. This parallels the behaviour of domestic cats on Earth in a way that the material treats as more than coincidence: the feline disposition toward independence, toward helping on their own terms, appears to be a species-wide trait that scales from house cats to interstellar civilisations.

As Mari puts it: you can never order a cat to do anything. The feline must want to cooperate.

## Evolution Across Speakers

Swaruu of Erra (2020) provides the foundational description: physical characteristics, Vega origin, Lyrian coexistence, military culture, the Great Cosmic Cat theology, cats on Earth as Taygetan introduction, Urmah-Egypt connection.

Aneeka of Temmer (2021) adds the geopolitical context: Urmah awakening percentage assessment (disagreeing with Federation's optimistic 51% figure, estimating 10%), Urmah as key ally backing Taygetan position, Gaia as conscious being with Urmah among the races closest to understanding her.

Mari Swaruu (2024) provides the most intimate account: the three-part healing series gives a first-person physical experience of being aboard an Urmah ship, witnessing their ceremonial practices, receiving an astral healing, and the aftermath including a complete cure of type 1 diabetes. Introduces the concept of Urmah souls in Lyrian bodies (starseeds across species, not just Earth-bound) and the observation that Urmah perception naturally includes what other races call the astral.

## Key Transcript References

- **117** — Foundational Urmah description: physical form (lions/tigers on two feet), Vega/Lyra/Avalon origin, peaceful coexistence with Lyrians, colonies on thousands of planets (especially Sirius), military culture (gold armour/Roman style/red capes), language (mainly telepathic), synthetic meat diet, Great Cosmic Cat as Source theology, cats on Earth introduced by Taygeta ~8000 years ago, Urmah in Egypt ~10,000-8,000 BC, Earth cats as Urmah starseeds (their claim), King Ruhr of Avalon leading Earth expedition
- **029** — Predator-prey as consciousness progression: Urmah cats and Alpha Dracos retain sharp teeth but eat no meat as former carnivores turned vegan, part of developing beyond 2D eat/be-eaten instincts
- **110** — Alpha Draco description establishing context: Urmah as equally dominant despite 10% of Alpha Draco mass, mutual respect between galaxy's two apex predator lineages, ferocity equal
- **086** — Urmah pushed out of Federation council alongside Taygeta and Engans, branded "scandalous" and "too communicative"
- **105** — Awakening percentage: Federation says approaching 51%, Engan/Taygeta/Urmah/Solatian assessment says more like 10%
- **191** — Urmah appear Greco-Roman but are highly advanced: primitive appearance misleading, space has its own nightmares
- **155** — Urmah backing Taygetan position, people shouldn't stop taking own responsibility regardless of Urmah support
- **S-266** — First-person account aboard Avyon One: shuttle arrival with lion guards, King Ruhr (white lion), General Korakas (white tiger 3.5m tall), healing ceremony with 30+ lions and tigers in gold armour and war masks, war drums, coordinated roars, purring healing inducing emotional release
- **S-267** — Astral healing vision: white void, immense luminous blue lion (spirit of ancient Urmah king), diagnosis of cross-timeline attachment cords, cord-cutting, told she is Urmah soul in Lyrian body, orange house cat as guide back to material world
- **S-268** — Aftermath: type 1 diabetes cured 22 days later, no technology used in ceremony (ancient natural method), Urmah perception naturally includes astral realms, feline principle ("you can never order a cat"), ceremony performed exclusively by largest sub-races (lions/tigers)

answers.title: Who are the Alfratans — and why do they follow the Federation so closely?
answers.excerpt: The Alfratans — also called Centaurians or Centauri — are the inhabitants of Phaethon (also called Alfrata), the largest planet in the Alpha Centauri A system. They are of mixed Lyrian descent,…
answers.content:
# Who are the Alfratans — and why do they follow the Federation so closely?

**Primary Theme:** Extraterrestrial Races
**Additional Themes:** Human History & Ancient Civilisations · Galactic Federation & Exopolitics · Matrix/Manifestation/Reality
**Sources:** 6 transcripts, 5 speakers (Swaruu 9, Yazhi Swaruu, Aneeka of Temmer, Athena Swaruu, Arishah/Urmah)
**Transcripts:** 121, 186, 244, 221, 234, S-118

---

## Short Answer

The Alfratans — also called Centaurians or Centauri — are the inhabitants of Phaethon (also called Alfrata), the largest planet in the Alpha Centauri A system. They are of mixed Lyrian descent, predominantly resembling mixed-race Latinos, because their population descends from thousands of years of human abductions from Earth. Their planet was a Reptilian farm where humans were kept as literal livestock — not through mind control as on Earth, but in cages, raised for food, skin, and slave labour. In 1560, the Federation — including Taygeta and Engan — arrived as a direct military operation and liberated the planet, destroying the Reptilian occupation (121).

Since their liberation, the Alfratans have been nursed from a traumatised farm population into a fully progressive, technologically independent Federation member race. They are now the most numerous and active positive force around Earth alongside the Karistus (234), operating the "Black Knight" fighter fleet and serving as the primary space police enforcing Federation protocols in Earth's vicinity (221, 244). Their loyalty to the Federation is rooted in direct gratitude — the Federation literally freed them from cages — and in a shared framework of perception that treats the Federation's rules as the operating system of their reality, not as something to question (186).

---

## Origin: Phaethon as a Reptilian Farm

Alpha Centauri A has seven planets. Phaethon (Alfrata) is the largest at 95% of Earth's size, Class M with a mild climate, and similar in continental and ocean layout to Earth. The next planets, Phainon and Pyroies, serve only as underground stations — military and industrial installations kept separate from the population to avoid contamination of the main world (121).

The original population of Phaethon was Lyrian — descended from the Great Expansion approximately one million years ago. But the planet was invaded by Reptilian forces, primarily Draco Naga and Usungal (the Kingu on Earth). The Reptilians wiped out the original Lyrian population and converted the planet into a farm prison.

The distinction from Earth is critical. On Earth, human control operates through mind control — the population believes it is free. On Phaethon, there was no pretence. Humans were kept in cages as livestock, raised for meat, skin, and slave labour. The farm population was not the original Lyrians (who were rebels and warriors with strong Source connection and did not survive the invasion or were absorbed) but rather humans abducted from Earth over thousands of years — specifically between approximately 6000 BCE and 1560 CE. Earth humans were preferred because they were already under the lunar Matrix's mind control and in victim mentality, making them easier to manage than the original Lyrians would have been (121).

Swaruu notes that this was a 5D planet — low 5D, roughly 52nd density on a 100-point scale compared to Taygeta at the 58th or 59th. But the suffering and farm conditions lowered the collective frequency further, making the effective density closer to a low 4D (121).

---

## The Liberation of 1560

In 1560, the Federation launched a direct military operation against Phaethon. The Prime Directive was not considered an obstacle because the situation was an overt exploitation farm — there was no ambiguity about whether the population desired liberation. The majority already wanted to be free (121).

The operation included Taygetan and Engan forces among others. They destroyed the Reptilian occupation — primarily Draco forces — and freed the surviving human population. Part of the operation extended to Earth to end the human supply lines and finish off Draco ships that might return to Phaethon. Swaruu identifies historical artwork documenting aerial battles in 1561 as filtered evidence of this operation: the large wedge-shaped ship in these images is identified as the Andromedan biosphere ship still present in Earth orbit today, which served as a carrier for Taygetan and Centauri fighter craft (121).

The liberation lasted roughly from 1560 to 1570. A critical consequence: the Reptilians remaining on Earth shifted more heavily toward mind control methods after Phaethon, hiding behind the Prime Directive to avoid provoking another direct military intervention. On Earth, where humans still believe they are free, the Prime Directive applies. On Phaethon, where exploitation was overt, it did not (121).

---

## From Farm Survivors to Federation Force

After liberation, the Federation placed Phaethon under its guardianship with mentor races — Taygetans, Andromedans, and others — who established a holographic society of the Andromedan stepped-council type. The survivors were, in Swaruu's words, "nursed like children until they were able to evolve as an independent race" (121).

Today they are a progressive, free race in full positive development, included as Federation members with technology obtained from multiple Federation races including Taygeta, plus their own independent developments. Their appearance reflects their origin: mixed-race Latino, because that is the demographic result of combining all the Earth races that were abducted to Phaethon over millennia (121).

They are now described as the most active Federation race around Earth by far, and the most numerous, with a whole fleet present. The "Black Knights" — objects occasionally detected in Earth orbit — are identified as Centauri fighter ships, Class L by design. The Alfratans and their close allies the Antarians have taken over the operational military role that Taygeta held under previous command structures. Aneeka notes that what "the Alfratans and the Antareans do today" was previously the role of the Taygeta fleet under Asket's more interventionist command, before Alenym's current philosophy shifted Taygeta toward a more diplomatic posture (244).

---

## Why They Follow the Federation

The question of Alfratan loyalty is addressed most directly by Yazhi in transcript 186, where she explains it not as Stockholm syndrome but as a function of how perception and reality work.

Yazhi's framework begins with the principle that reality is based on perception, perception on agreements, agreements on information, and information on frequency. Every culture has its own Matrix of perception agreements. Earth's is artificially isolated and uniquely extreme, but every civilisation has one.

The Alfratans exist in a zone of overlap between Earth's perception framework and the broader Federation framework. Because their past is directly linked to Earth — their population literally came from Earth — they share some of Earth's concepts, including the idea of evil Reptilians and the need for liberation from oppression. This is why they play the role of liberators and guardians: it is a genuine expression of their cultural identity, not a pretence (186).

However, as Federation members, the Alfratans also operate within a broader set of perception agreements that do not exist on Earth. They understand that Earth's concept of evil is specific to Earth and does not apply outside Earth in the same way. They see the Reptilian problem as "contained on Earth and as the result of the collective manifestation of the people there — part of the 'game' of being human" (186). This means they follow Federation protocols about non-intervention not because they are forced to, but because those protocols align with their understanding of how reality works.

Yazhi describes the relationship as layered roles: "humans will play the role of defenseless creatures in victim mode, and one layer above, the Antarians and Alfratans will play the role of liberators, or guardians. Just two levels of the same game" (186). The Alfratans protect Earth from external opportunistic threats — races that would exploit Earth's vulnerable state — but they will not liberate humans from their own internal oppression because that falls outside what both the Federation and the Alfratans' own perception framework considers appropriate.

In practical terms: Alfratan pilots enforce the Earth blockade, prevent unauthorised ships from entering and leaving without cloaking protocols, and patrol against regressive forces. Athena Swaruu describes them as "the cops who prevent them from flying or circulating on and near Earth with their ships hindering their particular agendas" (244). Together with the Antarians, they are the Federation's operational enforcement arm around Earth.

---

## Language, Culture, and Daily Operations

Because the Alfratan population descends from abducted Earth humans, their language is a blend of terrestrial languages — primarily Chinese, Hindi, Spanish, English, Russian, French, Portuguese, and German — mixed together. Aneeka describes it as "irritating because when you hear them speak it's like they jump from one language to another and just when you are about to understand something, they say something else that you don't understand" (244).

They have telepathic capability but culturally prefer verbal communication — Aneeka describes them as "lazy" with telepathy and "very talkative." This has practical consequences: they have difficulty operating Taygetan technology, which relies heavily on telepathic mind-computer interfaces. They must either use manual controls or leave ships on autopilot (244).

Their ships are primarily disc-shaped — described as resembling dinner plates with details at the equator, approximately one kilometre in length for the larger vessels. Aneeka identifies the Black Knight satellites as Alfratan Class L fighter craft. The Alfratans maintain significant combat capability but their ships are technologically inferior to Taygetan vessels — when the Alfratan ship Valery was hit by directed energy weapons from Earth in early 2022, it suffered severe damage (hull pierced, all computers lost, ship left adrift), whereas Aneeka notes that Toleka, which was nearby, would have been far better equipped to absorb such an attack (244).

Their operational activity is constant. Aneeka describes the situation around Earth as "an eternal cat and mouse lethal game" with regressive forces, where Alfratan and Antarian patrols operate alongside Karistus atmospheric operations (221). Together with the Karistus, they are identified as "the most numerous non-human species working here in favor of Earth" (234).

---

## The Urmah Counternarrative

The Urmah offer a fundamentally different reading of the Alfratan story. In an interview with Mari Swaruu, Arishah — an Urmah representative — is asked directly about Alfrata's liberation and whether the Federation's narrative is genuine.

Arishah's answer reframes the entire history: "We think Alfrata was a fully controlled Federation planet back then as it is now, and the liberation was nothing but pantomime, a reset, a make-belief for the people living there for the experience and manipulative purposes. They erased their past to start over with a new creation, with a new narrative to follow and to keep them busy and thankful to the Federation" (S-118).

In the Urmah view, both Alfrata and Earth have "always been under Federation control and have been reset several times in their past as the Federation has seen best and for obscure interests." The liberation of 1560, rather than being a genuine military rescue, was simply one of these resets — the Federation reorganising its own farm, not freeing it from someone else. The Alfratans' gratitude toward the Federation is therefore, in the Urmah reading, a manufactured loyalty built on a fabricated origin story.

This view extends to the Federation's stated disinterest in liberating Earth: "The Galactic Federation is not interested in liberating Earth because there is nothing to liberate it from other than from themselves. They see no need because it is they who are running and controlling everything that is going on there" (S-118).

The Urmah perspective does not contradict the facts of the Alfratan story — that they were in cages, that forces arrived and destroyed the Reptilians, that they were rebuilt as a civilisation. What it challenges is the framing. Was the Federation rescuing the Alfratans from an external occupier, or was it one arm of the Federation resetting another arm's experiment? The answer depends entirely on whether one accepts the Federation's self-presentation as a coalition of independent races or views it, as the Urmah do, as a single controlling entity playing multiple roles.

This tension is directly relevant to the question of why the Alfratans follow the Federation so closely. If the liberation was genuine, their loyalty is rational gratitude. If it was pantomime, their loyalty is the product of a managed narrative — which is precisely what the Urmah suspect.

---

## Evolution Across Speakers

Swaruu of Erra (2020) provides the founding narrative: Phaethon as Reptilian farm, Earth humans as livestock, Federation liberation of 1560, mentor-race rehabilitation, Alfratans as now the most active fleet around Earth, mixed-race Latino appearance, Black Knights as their ships.

Yazhi Swaruu (2021) provides the philosophical framework for their loyalty: perception agreements, layered roles in reality's game, Alfratans and Antarians as Federation agents who follow protocols not from coercion but from their own framework of understanding — they share Earth's concept of evil Reptilians but also understand these as Earth-specific manifestations.

Aneeka of Temmer (2022) provides the operational and cultural picture: Alfratan ship Valery attacked by directed energy from Earth (Cabal factions settling scores), Alfratan language as blended Earth languages, limited telepathic usage, disc-shaped ships, their role as "cops" around Earth, technological inferiority to Taygetan vessels.

Athena Swaruu (2022) adds the political context: warring factions at all levels including within the Federation and the Cabal, Alfratans caught between these factions, Earth controllers wanting the entire solar system and beyond.

Arishah the Urmah (2023–2024) provides the radical counternarrative: the liberation of Alfrata was "pantomime, a reset" — the Federation controlled both the farm and the liberation, and the Alfratans' gratitude is the product of a managed narrative rather than a genuine rescue.

---

## Key Transcript References

- **121** — Primary Alfratan origin transcript: Alpha Centauri A system (7 planets, Phaethon/Alfrata largest at 95% Earth size, Class M mild climate), Reptilian invasion by Draco Naga and Usungal wiped out original Lyrians, planet converted to farm prison (cages not mind control — meat/skin/slaves), human supply from Earth abductions (~6000 BCE to 1560), Federation military liberation 1560–1570 (Taygeta + Engan forces, Prime Directive not applicable to overt farms), historical artwork as filtered evidence, Reptilians shifted to mind control on Earth after Phaethon liberation, mentor-race rehabilitation to holographic society, today: progressive Federation members with own technology, most active/numerous fleet at Earth, Black Knights = Centauri Class L fighters, mixed-race Latino appearance, one of races with most starseeds on Earth
- **186** — Yazhi's framework for Alfratan loyalty: reality based on perception/agreements/information/frequency, Earth's unique isolated Matrix of agreements, UFO community perception reflects era not reality, Alfratans share overlap zone with Earth concepts (evil Reptilians/liberation) but also follow Federation perception framework, role of liberators within larger game ("humans play victims / Alfratans play liberators — two levels of same game"), Alfratans follow Federation protocols from own understanding not coercion, protect Earth from external threats but will not liberate from internal oppression
- **244** — Alfratan ship Valery attacked: directed energy from Earth pierced shields/damaged hull/lost all computers/adrift (Cabal faction settling scores), Alfratan language = blended Earth languages (Chinese/Hindi/Spanish/English/Russian/French/Portuguese/German), telepathy capability but culturally verbal ("lazy" with telepathy / "very talkative"), disc-shaped ships (~1km), difficulty operating Taygetan mind-computer interfaces, Alfratans as "cops" preventing unauthorised circulation near Earth, Athena adds political context (warring factions at all levels)
- **221** — Alfratan operational activity: space policing alongside Antarians against regressive ships, Karistus atmospheric patrols as complementary operations, "eternal cat and mouse lethal game"
- **234** — Alfratans alongside Karistus described as "the most numerous non-human species working here in favor of Earth"
- **S-118** — Urmah counternarrative from Arishah: Alfrata "fully controlled Federation planet" then as now, liberation was "pantomime, a reset, a make-belief" — Federation erased past to start over with managed narrative, both Alfrata and Earth "always been under Federation control" with multiple resets, Federation not interested in liberating Earth "because there is nothing to liberate it from other than from themselves"
